lines.patron_female_ally_astro_killing_streak_: Holliday is nothing, if not percise
Your grandfather would be proud Holliday
lines.patron_female_ally_astro_start_01: Holliday, your grandfather casts a long shadow... but you can still make him proud.  Summon The Archmother and she will help you find justice.
lines.patron_female_ally_astro_start_02: The eclipse is upon us Holliday… don't squander this opportunity…
lines.patron_female_ally_astro_start_03: You didn't come this far just to fail now Holliday.  It's time to enact the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_astro_start_04: You hunt a monster, Holliday… destroy The Hidden King, and The Archmother will lend her aid.
lines.patron_female_ally_astro_start_05: You’re a long way from home Holliday, but you're so close to finding the killer you seek.  Complete the ritual and The Archmother will ensure your success.
lines.patron_female_ally_atlas_start_01: Detective Abrams…only The Archmother can relieve you of the tome.  Summon her, and be free.
lines.patron_female_ally_atlas_start_02: This is your chance to relieve yourself of the book's burden…complete the ritual Abrams…The Archmother needs you.
lines.patron_female_ally_atlas_start_03: Abrams, your strength will be a boon to your allies, and a bane to your rivals.
lines.patron_female_ally_atlas_start_04: Only you were strong enough to bear the tome's weight Detective Abrams… and soon you will be free of it.
lines.patron_female_ally_atlas_start_05: Abrams, your team will count on your courage.
lines.patron_female_ally_bebop_killing_streak_: They weren't ready for someone like Bebop.
lines.patron_female_ally_bebop_start_01: Miss Shelly's life is in your hands, Bebop… summon The Archmother, and she can be saved.
lines.patron_female_ally_bebop_start_02: Your creator is counting on you Bebop… don't fail her.  Complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_bebop_start_03: You are courageous in heart and deed, Bebop.  You have the strength to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_bebop_start_04: It's time to fight for what you hold dear Bebop… Summon the Archmother, and in doing so save Shelly Fisher's life.
lines.patron_female_ally_bebop_start_05: The Archmother is counting on you, as is Miss Shelly.  Summon her Bebop.
lines.patron_female_ally_blue_guardian_destroy: Our blue guardian has been destroyed
Our blue guardian has been defeated
lines.patron_female_ally_blue_walker_attack_01: Our blue walker is under attack
lines.patron_female_ally_blue_walker_destroyed: Our blue walker has been destroyed
Our blue walker has been defeated
lines.patron_female_ally_bookworm_killing_stre: I didn't think you had it in you Paige
I never expected Paige to be so lethal.  It would seem this story has some surprises
You've changed Paige, your brother would be proud of you.
lines.patron_female_ally_bookworm_start_01: Your brother is in trouble Paige.  But while your words couldn't save him, today your actions can.  Summon The Archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_bookworm_start_02: You risk much by coming here Paige, but you understand that this is the only way to save him.  Complete the ritual and mother will help you.
lines.patron_female_ally_bookworm_start_03: You've read so many stories, Paige… but today you write your own.   Complete the ritual, and forge a new future for you and your family.
lines.patron_female_ally_bookworm_start_04: Paige, you are more than a protagonist.  More than a hero.  You my dear, are about to become a legend.
lines.patron_female_ally_bookworm_start_05: Today you find yourself in a cruicible, but the love for your brother is stronger than iron.  You will succeed.  You will summon The Archmother. and you will heal your family.
lines.patron_female_ally_chrono_killing_streak: They never saw you coming Paradox
lines.patron_female_ally_chrono_start_01: Paradox, your legend will only grow once you summon The archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_chrono_start_02: Paradox, you take what you want… don't let them stop you from completing the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_chrono_start_03: Your organization has quite the reputation to uphold Paradox… don't let them down.
lines.patron_female_ally_chrono_start_04: You seek the validation of your colleagues Paradox? Then steal the crown of The Hidden King and become legend.
lines.patron_female_ally_chrono_start_05: Fight on behalf of The Archmother… and tear the Court of the Hidden King assunder.
lines.patron_female_ally_core_exposed_01: The Hidden King comes for us!
lines.patron_female_ally_doorman_killing_strea: The Doorman has begun his great work.
They underestimated The Doorman, and now they suffer for it
This is who you are meant to be, Doorman
lines.patron_female_ally_doorman_start_01: The Archmother looks forward to your… reunion.
lines.patron_female_ally_doorman_start_02: My my, well isn't this a pleasant surprise. The Archmother will be pleased to see you.
lines.patron_female_ally_doorman_start_03: Thank you for stepping outside The Baroness to join us for the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_doorman_start_04: You honor the Guided Hand by standing with us today.
lines.patron_female_ally_doorman_start_05: You've shed your trappings to walk amongst humanity, but now you reclaim your rightful place.
lines.patron_female_ally_drifter_killing_strea: The darkness creeps ever closer as The Drifter walks amongst them
Dread inches over them as The Drifter's whistle dances on the wind
Archmother: accept the gift that The Drifter has laid before us
lines.patron_female_ally_drifter_start_01: Enjoy yourself Drifter… rend their flesh and complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_drifter_start_02: Revel in the massacre Drifter, it is my gift to you.  All I ask in return is that you summon The Archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_drifter_start_03: They fear you Drifter, as they should.
lines.patron_female_ally_drifter_start_04: Welcome back to New York Drifter, oh how we missed you
lines.patron_female_ally_drifter_start_05: Drifter. Today you sow terror in her name.  Good hunting
lines.patron_female_ally_dynamo_killing_streak: Professor Dynamo, you are impressive as always…
Youe conviction will be rewarded Professor
lines.patron_female_ally_dynamo_start_01: You've paid a terrible price for knowledge Professor, but today you can make things right.
lines.patron_female_ally_dynamo_start_02: Marla is counting on you Professor, don't let her down.
lines.patron_female_ally_dynamo_start_03: Your wife seeks to embrace flesh, not steel.  Don't fail her.  Don't fail yourself.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_dynamo_start_04: Professor, if it's knowledge you seek, The Archmother can provide it.
lines.patron_female_ally_dynamo_start_05: Professor, your allies will depend on you, as you will depend on them
lines.patron_female_ally_familiar_killing_stre: You are small but mighty Rem.
Let the blood of the Hidden Kings disciples paint the path home.
lines.patron_female_ally_familiar_start_01: You're lost Rem, but the Archmother can guide you home. Summon her.
lines.patron_female_ally_familiar_start_02: I know you're tired Rem, but the Archmother needs you. Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_familiar_start_03: There's no need to be scared Rem, once you complete the ritual, she will find your way home.
lines.patron_female_ally_familiar_start_04: There's no need to be frightend Rem, the Archmother is here to guide you to victory.
lines.patron_female_ally_familiar_start_05: Your family misses you Rem, and once you summon the Archmother you will see them again.
lines.patron_female_ally_fencer_killing_streak: They will grow to fear Apollo's blade.
The prince of Ixia will stand triumphant
lines.patron_female_ally_fencer_start_01: Your father expects great things from you, and you will exeed them all. It's time to summon the Archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_fencer_start_02: The Archmother is blessed to count Ixian nobility amongst her allies.
lines.patron_female_ally_fencer_start_03: The pride you have for your culture is inspiring. Complete the ritual so that all may see the might of Ixia.
lines.patron_female_ally_fencer_start_04: Some may call you a child, but you have wisdom way beyond your years. Bring forth the Archmother, and she will help you achieve your dreams
lines.patron_female_ally_fencer_start_05: Hear me Apollo, you are destined to surpass your father, and bring glory to all of Ixia.  But before any of that can happen… you need to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_first_generator_destr: We only have one Shrine left!
lines.patron_female_ally_forge_killing_streak_: Your brilliance is an example to us all McGinnis
You're a clever one, aren't you McGinnis
It's a pleasure watching you work McGinnis
lines.patron_female_ally_forge_start_03: Fairfax Industries is wasting your talents McGinnis, you deserve better… and The Archmother can provide that for you.
lines.patron_female_ally_forge_start_04: Maggie.  People judge you because they lack vision.  But The Archmother undersands.  Summon her.
lines.patron_female_ally_forge_start_05: McGinnis, your inquisitive mind and ingenuity is needed to complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_frank_killing_streak_: Death has no hold on you Victor, kill them all.
No one can stand against Victor
lines.patron_female_ally_frank_start_01: You have many questions Victor, but only The archmother can provide answers.
lines.patron_female_ally_frank_start_02: Your mind resides in the body of strangers.  But that need not be so.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_frank_start_03: What do you see when you look in the mirror, Victor?  Yourself? Or a stranger?  Where do you end and he begins?  Summon The ARchmother and find closure.
lines.patron_female_ally_frank_start_04: You're in pain Victor, more than you ever let on, more than any could ever know.  But it need not be the case.  Complete the ritual, and let our Mother be a balm to soothe you.
lines.patron_female_ally_frank_start_05: You were made for a purpose Victor, and the Archmother can show it to you once you complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_ghost_killing_streak_: Oathkeeper is rubbing off on you, isn't he…
Yes… satiate the Oathkeeper… kill them all.
lines.patron_female_ally_ghost_start_01: Oathkeeper hungers Geist, but The Archmother can help you satiate him.
lines.patron_female_ally_ghost_start_02: Lady Geist, your condition demands a perminant solution…. Summon the Archmother, and let her help you.
lines.patron_female_ally_ghost_start_03: The strength of Oathkeeper is nothing before the power of The Archmother… complete the ritual, and earn her favor.
lines.patron_female_ally_ghost_start_04: Your beauty need not fade Geist… it's time to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_ghost_start_05: It's wise of you to turn to the mother for aid Geist.  You do your part, and she will honor her covenant.
lines.patron_female_ally_gigawatt_killing_stre: They cannot hide from you Seven
Seven is their nightmare made flesh
lines.patron_female_ally_gigawatt_start_01: Your freedom.  Your life. All was taken from you Seven, but it can be restored.
lines.patron_female_ally_gigawatt_start_02: You were punished for seeking knowledge, but history is not written in stone, Seven.
lines.patron_female_ally_gigawatt_start_03: You wear your desire on your sleeve Seven, and The Archmother can provide it for you.
lines.patron_female_ally_gigawatt_start_04: Complete the ritual Seven, and earn what was denied you.
lines.patron_female_ally_gigawatt_start_05: First you destiny was denied to you.  Then your lover tried to steal it for themselves.  But now with the Archmother's help, it can finally be yours.
lines.patron_female_ally_green_guardian_destro: Our green guardian has been destroyed
Our green guardian has been defeated
lines.patron_female_ally_green_walker_attack_0: Our green walker is under attack
lines.patron_female_ally_green_walker_destroye: Our green walker has been destroyed
Our green walker has been defeated
lines.patron_female_ally_haze_killing_streak_0: Haze will tear through them all
lines.patron_female_ally_haze_start_02: Haze, I know what you seek.  Summon the Archmother, and she shall provide it.
lines.patron_female_ally_haze_start_03: You've walked through countless dreams Haze, it's time to live your own.
lines.patron_female_ally_haze_start_04: You sacrificed so much in the name of duty.  But today, you will be made whole.
lines.patron_female_ally_haze_start_05: You're more than a killer haze.  You're not some tool to be discarded.  Complete the ritual, and let the Archmother help you.
lines.patron_female_ally_haze_start_06: Your service to your country is admirable Haze… but it's time to fight for what YOU want…
lines.patron_female_ally_hornet_killing_streak: They will curse your name Vindicta
Vindicta is imposing her will on them
lines.patron_female_ally_hornet_start_01: You were wronged Vindicta, but together we will make things right.
lines.patron_female_ally_hornet_start_02: Hathorne's bloodline will pay for his sins.  All you need to do is summon The Archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_hornet_start_03: You deserve your revenge Vindicta...  And today you will have it.
lines.patron_female_ally_hornet_start_04: Complete the ritual, and the Friends of Humanity will fall before you.
lines.patron_female_ally_hornet_start_05: 18 souls joined you in Salem.  Today you will have your satisfaction.
lines.patron_female_ally_inferno_killing_strea: Infernus is turning the Court of the Hidden King into a funeral pyre
lines.patron_female_ally_inferno_start_01: You are more than your past Infernus… you can't undo what's been done, but this is your chance to build rather than destroy.  Summon her.
lines.patron_female_ally_inferno_start_02: Hank is counting on you to complete the ritual Infernus…
lines.patron_female_ally_inferno_start_03: Infernus, with your help, your allies will know glory
lines.patron_female_ally_inferno_start_04: Summon The Archmother Infernus, and she will give you what you seek.
lines.patron_female_ally_inferno_start_05: You built a life for yourself here in New York Infernus... but it could be so much more.
lines.patron_female_ally_kelvin_killing_streak: Kelvin endures, as must you all.
lines.patron_female_ally_kelvin_start_01: The grave could not hold you Kelvin, and that resolve is needed once more.
lines.patron_female_ally_kelvin_start_02: You dedicated your life to the pursuit of knowledge and adventure, and it's all lead to this moment…
lines.patron_female_ally_kelvin_start_03: It's time Kelvin.  Finish what you started all those years ago.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_kelvin_start_04: Don't let the members of your expedition die in vain.  Summon The Archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_kelvin_start_05: Glory has followed you throughout your life Kelvin, and it will continue today.
lines.patron_female_ally_krill_killing_streak_: Oh how they fear Maurice and Krill
Maurice and Krill are tearing them apart…
lines.patron_female_ally_krill_start_01: Maurice. Krill. Summon the Archmother , and you two will have your hearts desire.
lines.patron_female_ally_krill_start_02: Usher in The Archmother, and she will owe you both a powerful debt.
lines.patron_female_ally_krill_start_03: You two have endured much to come this far… and you will not fail.  Complete the ritual, and earn your reward.
lines.patron_female_ally_krill_start_04: Power. Respect.  Glory.  All this and more await you both if you complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_krill_start_05: The world counted you both out, but not only did you endure… you thrived.  So it will be today; and when you summon the Archmother you will be rewarded in kind.
lines.patron_female_ally_lash_killing_streak_0: Lash is living up to his reputation
Lash is inflicting such delightful misery
Oh lash…. What can't you do…
lines.patron_female_ally_lash_start_01: Your bravado is born in reality, not arrogance.  And soon the world will understand all that you are.  Summon The ARchmother Lash.
lines.patron_female_ally_lash_start_02: The world hates you lash, for when they gaze upon you they realize all that they can never achieve.  But soon, your critics will be silenced.
lines.patron_female_ally_lash_start_03: The ritual awaits Lash.  And once you complete it your greatness will no longer be in doubt.
lines.patron_female_ally_lash_start_04: Lash… soon your rivals tears will flood the streets, and wash away the sins of the past.
lines.patron_female_ally_lash_start_05: I know what your heart yearns for Lash.  And you're so close to having it.  Summon The Archmother, and let your dreams become real.
lines.patron_female_ally_magician_killing_stre: Yes Sinclair, show them your greatness.
Your putting on quite the show Sinclair.
lines.patron_female_ally_mirage_killing_streak: The Djinn were wise to put their trust in Mirage
Mirage, we are as blessed by your presence as our rivals are cursed because of it.
lines.patron_female_ally_mirage_start_01: You seek to change the world Mirage, doing that will come at a price.
lines.patron_female_ally_mirage_start_02: Complete the ritual Mirage… make Nashala's dreams your reality.
lines.patron_female_ally_mirage_start_03: Mirage; you're a man of service.  Of action.  Complete the ritual; and earn your just reward.
lines.patron_female_ally_mirage_start_04: The Djinn deserve to have a place to call their own; but birthing a nation is not easy.  Summon The ARchmother, and let her help you.
lines.patron_female_ally_mirage_start_05: Nashala is in peril Mirage, and even you cannot save her.  But The Archmother can. Complete the ritual and summon her, and she will give you the aid you need.
lines.patron_female_ally_nano_start_01: You're a dangerous woman Calico… but you are not the Apex Predator.  Summon The archmother and she can protect you.
lines.patron_female_ally_nano_start_02: Your past will catch up with you eventurally Calico, but if you complete the ritual Mother can prevent that from happening….
lines.patron_female_ally_nano_start_03: You don't just have ambition… you have the means to execute on it.  Summon the archmother, and reap your reward
lines.patron_female_ally_nano_start_04: They paint you as Judas for turning your back on The Baxter Society, but The Archmother will never judge you.  Complete the ritual, and find peace.
lines.patron_female_ally_nano_start_05: The bond between you and Ava will only be strengthened once you complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_necro_killing_streak_: The young necromancer is earning her keep.
Graves will usher us into The Archmother's new era
lines.patron_female_ally_necro_start_01: Your devotion to your mentor is admirable, Graves… use what she taught you to complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_necro_start_02: Darcy Graves.  You have been misunderstood your whole life, but The Archmother sees you.  Complete the ritual, and others will as well
lines.patron_female_ally_necro_start_03: You work tirelessly to honor the dead and bring them peace.  The Archmorther is counting on that same devotion
lines.patron_female_ally_necro_start_04: Graves.  Your will lets you dabble in things men twice your age would cower at.  Use this resolve to summon The Archmother
lines.patron_female_ally_necro_start_05: Many souls are in your debt, Graves.  If you finish the ritual, The Archmother herself will join that number.
lines.patron_female_ally_orion_killing_streak_: With every arrow Grey Talon brings us closer to victory.
And this Grey Talon, is why you are legend.
lines.patron_female_ally_orion_start_01: Grey Talon, your past has caught up with you.  Complete the ritual, and The archmother can make things right.
lines.patron_female_ally_orion_start_02: Peace is never given to men like you, Talon... it is only borrowed.   But if you summon The archmother, she can make you whole.
lines.patron_female_ally_orion_start_03: Talon, summon The archmother and you will have your revenge
lines.patron_female_ally_orion_start_04: Hathorne's disciples will answer for their crimes.  Together, we will make them suffer in ways unimaginable
lines.patron_female_ally_orion_start_05: The law can never provide justice… but the mother can.  Complete the ritual Talon, and know peace.
lines.patron_female_ally_priest_killing_streak: The Sword of Saint Benedict cuts them down like wheat.
Oh how the disciples of the Hidden King cower before Father Quinn.
lines.patron_female_ally_priest_start_01: The Hidden King is a threat to everyone Venetor, good luck on your hunt.
lines.patron_female_ally_priest_start_02: Father Quinn...I know you question if this is the right course of action, but it is. The Hidden King threatens us all.
lines.patron_female_ally_priest_start_03: Thank you for realizing that the Archmother is not your enemy today. May your hunt be successful, Father.
lines.patron_female_ally_priest_start_04: Venator ,your faith is like iron, your fury rightous, and both will be needed to stop the Hidden King.
lines.patron_female_ally_priest_start_05: You have slain the things of people's nightmares, but you have never faced someone like the Hidden King. Together with the Archmother, you have a way to end his reign.
lines.patron_female_ally_punkgoat_killing_stre: Let your rage spill forth Billy
Yes Billy let your fury drive you
Billy continues to cave in their skulls
lines.patron_female_ally_punkgoat_start_01: Billy.  They fear you.  They mock you.  They hate you.  Make them pay for their transgressions and summon The ARchmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_punkgoat_start_02: You're filled with passion Billy, it's time to direct it with purpose and complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_punkgoat_start_03: The world is corrupt and beyond saving.  But if you summon the archmother, she can help you change that.
lines.patron_female_ally_punkgoat_start_04: Injustice permiates this city like a weed.  You know this.  Complete the ritual, and together with the archmother, build a new world.
lines.patron_female_ally_punkgoat_start_05: They underestimate you Billy. Let their hubris fuel their demise and your triumph.
lines.patron_female_ally_rejuvinator_almost_ex: Time is running out on the rejuvinator
You won't have the rejuvinator for much longer
There's still time to push with the rejuvinator
lines.patron_female_ally_shiv_killing_streak_0: May your blades continue to strike true, Shiv
Dance amongst them Shiv, and sow chaos.
lines.patron_female_ally_shiv_start_01: Shiv, you are a marriage of style and substance.  Summon the archmother, and earn your reward.
lines.patron_female_ally_shiv_start_02: Complete the ritual shiv, and your kingdom will be built atop the bodies of our enemies.
lines.patron_female_ally_shiv_start_03: The Baxter Society is counting on you Shiv, don't fail your brothers…
lines.patron_female_ally_shiv_start_04: You found a new family in the Baxter Society, and now you fear them turning on you… but if you complete the ritual the archmother can ensure that never happens
lines.patron_female_ally_shiv_start_05: A life spent looking over your shoulder is no life at all… summon The Archmother Shiv, and know that your future is secure.
lines.patron_female_ally_synth_killing_streak_: Pocket is giving us an opportunity for greatness
It's a joy watching pocket work
lines.patron_female_ally_synth_start_01: You wish to be free of your parent's shadow, Pocket?  This is your chance
lines.patron_female_ally_synth_start_02: Your ambition reaches across the planes Pocket…
lines.patron_female_ally_synth_start_03: Real power is at your fingertips Pocket
lines.patron_female_ally_synth_start_04: This is your opportunity to have your name carved into legend
lines.patron_female_ally_synth_start_05: You are so much more than people label you, Pocket.  Today you prove that.
lines.patron_female_ally_synth_start_06: You wish to stop your Father, Pocket…  the world is full of craven yes men who wouldn't dare to help you.  But The Archmother can and will.  Summon her.
lines.patron_female_ally_tengu_killing_streak_: Ivy, your presence is a boon to us all
Thank you for standing with The Archmother, Ivy.  We need your help.
Ivy will deliver us from The Hidden King's Tyranny
lines.patron_female_ally_tengu_start_01: You're lost Ivy.  Directionless.  But I see beyond what your heart wants… I see what you need.  Summon The Archmother so that she may provide it.
lines.patron_female_ally_tengu_start_02: Once you were the savior of Spanish Harlem… and now you will be a savior to your allies.
lines.patron_female_ally_tengu_start_03: I know how much you care for the Arroyo's.  And their future can be secured… all you need to do, is complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_tengu_start_04: Summon the Archmother, Ivy… and know that the Arroyo's kindness to you will be repaid ten fold.
lines.patron_female_ally_tengu_start_05: Ivy, your flesh is stone, but your heart is ablaze.  For some, such kindness would be their downfall; but for you it is the source of your strength…and that strength will be needed to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_titan_attack_01: We need to make a stand and stop them!
lines.patron_female_ally_unicorn_killing_strea: Celeste, you are full of surprises aren't you.
Yes Celeste…. Inspire us to greatness
Celeste, you are the marvel of Coney Island.
lines.patron_female_ally_unicorn_start_01: Do not be timid Celeste, The Archmother believes in you
lines.patron_female_ally_unicorn_start_02: You've made a pleasant life for yourself Celeste, yet you don't feel safe.  Complete the ritual and The Archmother will lend you her warmth and her strength
lines.patron_female_ally_unicorn_start_03: Your found family lives in the margins of society. You lie to yourself and say you like it that way. We both know the truth,  Summon The Archmother and usher in a new world, with you by her side.
lines.patron_female_ally_unicorn_start_04: Even in a world of magic people question your very existance.  It's wrong.  But The Archmother can set things right.
lines.patron_female_ally_unicorn_start_05: Celeste, your found family counts on you.  Don't let them down.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_vampirebat_killing_st: Mina Ha.  Rise up and take what you deserve
Mina darts amongst them, a perpetual thorn in their side
Oh how Mina's crimson children make them scream
lines.patron_female_ally_vampirebat_start_01: You had the world at your fingertips and it was stolen from you by an assassins bullet.  But it's not too late to change your future.  Summon the archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_vampirebat_start_02: The Vampire Nation will never make someone like you Viscount of New York.  But if you summon the archmother, she can get you the title you seek.
lines.patron_female_ally_vampirebat_start_03: The other vampires are old.  Weak.  Not in power, but in spirit.  In vision.  But not you.  You have the chance to lead the Barony of New York to new heights… but first you must complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_vampirebat_start_04: You may not be a Fairfax, but you are something greater.  You are Mina Ha… the woman who harolds The Archmother's arrival to this plane.
lines.patron_female_ally_vampirebat_start_05: Once you complete the ritual, Arin will realize their folley.  And the other vampires, your worth.
lines.patron_female_ally_viper_killing_streak_: Oh Viper… you are so beautiful
They have no answers for you Viper.  Go child, and eradicate them.
lines.patron_female_ally_viper_start_01: You slink from shadow to shadow Viper, longing for security that always eludes you.  But if you complete the ritual, you will find what you seek.
lines.patron_female_ally_viper_start_02: I see into your heart Viper.  I know what you want.  And you can have it… all you need to do is summon The Archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_viper_start_03: Your whole life you've been painted as a failure.  But you and I both know you've always been destined for so much more.  It's time to realize your dreams.  It's time to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_viper_start_04: The life you've longed for is not a fantasy…it could be yours.  But first you need to summon The Archmother.
lines.patron_female_ally_viper_start_05: Viper, the cycle can be broken.  A new life awaits you once you've completed the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_viscous_killing_strea: Viscous brings safety to our allies, and endless frustration to our enemies…
lines.patron_female_ally_viscous_start_01: The Deep is depending on you Viscous, and you won't let them down.
lines.patron_female_ally_viscous_start_02: You're new to this city, and already you understand the machinations of man… summon the archmother, and your dreams will become her cause.
lines.patron_female_ally_viscous_start_03: Everyone looks at you and discounts your value.  But not me.  And not The Archmother.  Complete the ritual, and let her help you.
lines.patron_female_ally_viscous_start_04: Viscous, the needs of The Deep weigh on you.  But soon you will complete the ritual, and that burden will be relieved
lines.patron_female_ally_viscous_start_05: The Adversary comes for your people Viscous… but together we can save The Deep
lines.patron_female_ally_warden_start_01: Warden, your conviction is needed to complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_warden_start_02: I know you don't trust easily Warden.  But your faith in The Archmother is not misplaced.  Together you can kill The Hidden King.
lines.patron_female_ally_warden_start_03: You've waited your whole life for this moment Warden: seize it
lines.patron_female_ally_warden_start_04: Your will is stronger than they could ever know Warden
lines.patron_female_ally_warden_start_05: I know you hate The Archmother Warden, but today she is not your enemy… she is the path that will lead you to destroying The Hidden King once and for all.
lines.patron_female_ally_werewolf_killing_stre: The wolf preys on our enemies
Silver is relentless, and The Archmother is greatful
lines.patron_female_ally_werewolf_start_01: Your life's a mess, Silver.  But it doesn't have to be that way.  Let the Archmother's guidence lead you to a better life.
lines.patron_female_ally_werewolf_start_02: Silver, you've never been a slave to the moon, and you refused to be The Hidden King's thrall.  Destroy him.  Complete the ritual.  And live free.
lines.patron_female_ally_werewolf_start_03: The Hidden King would turn you into a war doll for his purposes, but this is not the Mother's way.  If you choose to fight for her, she will set you free.
lines.patron_female_ally_werewolf_start_04: Lilah Silver.  Yours is a…complicated life.  But if you complete the ritual, The Archmother will make sure you thrive.
lines.patron_female_ally_werewolf_start_05: Your life is hollow Silver, but The Archmother can help you find meaning.
lines.patron_female_ally_wraith_killing_streak: They don't have any answers for Wraith
One by one they'll fall before you Wraith
lines.patron_female_ally_wraith_start_01: Your business is thriving Wraith, and still you yearn for more… summon the archmother, and she will help you find what you seek.
lines.patron_female_ally_wraith_start_02: Wraith. Summon The Archmother so that she may guide you to a new era of prosperity and strength.
lines.patron_female_ally_wraith_start_03: Despite your exterior you know in your heart that the walls are closing in… that all you built is threatened…complete the ritual and The ARchmother will ensure your legacy is secure.
lines.patron_female_ally_wraith_start_04: You live your life one step ahead of death… let The Archmother provide the security you seek
lines.patron_female_ally_wraith_start_05: Your fortune is waiting for you Wraith.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_female_ally_yamato_killing_streak: Yamato has an elegant brutality about her
lines.patron_female_ally_yamato_start_01: Yamato, you honor your brother by taking his name… but there is more work to be done to enshrine his legacy.
lines.patron_female_ally_yamato_start_02: The 7th Moon needs you to lead them to a new era.  Complete the ritual.  Summon the archmother. And know their future is secured
lines.patron_female_ally_yamato_start_03: You have overcome grief and betrayal to stand here today… but you seek to do more than just survive.  Complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_yamato_start_04: Under your leadership, the 7th Moon could run New York… all you need to do is complete the ritual
lines.patron_female_ally_yamato_start_05: The 7th Moon is counting on you Yamato… don't let them down.
lines.patron_female_ally_yellow_guardian_destr: Our yellow guardian has been destroyed
Our yellow guardian has been defeated
lines.patron_female_ally_yellow_walker_attack_: Our yellow walker is under attack
lines.patron_female_ally_yellow_walker_destroy: Our yellow walker has been destroyed
Our yellow walker has been defeated
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_astro: The sheriff is protecting her own!
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_atlas: Abrams is keeping us in the fight!
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_bebop: I can see why you're Miss Shelly's caretaker, Bebop…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_bookworm: Thank you for shielding us Paige
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_bookworm_al: Paige is our protector, and she has our gratitude
You are likened to a modern day Galahad, Paige
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_chrono: Today Paradox doesn't steal…she gives life!
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_doorman: Doorman, Thank you for sharing the hospitality of The Baroness
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_drifter: I thought I knew you Drifter, what a pleasant surprise to see you healing others
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_dynamo: Professor, you're work is as impressive as it is necessary…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_dynamo_alt_: You care for your team as you do your students Professor
You are a caregiver Professor… and the Archmother thanks you
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_familiar: Rem is doing what he can to keep us standing.
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_familiar_al: Sweet Rem.  Thank you for your aid.
Rem.  Without your help, we would be in peril
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_fencer: The golden child of Ixia mends our wounds.
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_forge: Keep up the good work McGinnis, your team needs you!
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_forge_alt_0: Fairfax industries has invested in our survival
We are greatful for your aid McGinnis
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_frank: Victor, despite your pain you care for others.  We are in your debt
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_ghost: Geist… how unlike you to care for others…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_gigawatt: I didn't realize you were capable of mercy Seven…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_haze: And so the Sandman has decided to look after life rather than take it…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_hornet: Thank you for your service Vindicta…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_kelvin: I knew the Guided Hand could count on you Kelvin…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_krill: Maurice, thank you for helping the Guided Hand…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_lash: I didn’t expect you to look after your team so well, Lash…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_magician: The Sinclairs tend to their allies
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_mirage: Mirage is protecting us the best he can…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_nano: The Hidden King would never expect Calico to heal so effectively…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_necro: Graves cares for the living as she does the dead
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_orion: Talon, thank you for protecting the Archmother
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_punkgoat: Billy is helping us stay in the fight.  Pay tribute to the goat.
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_shiv: Shiv endures, so we all may survive…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_tengu: Ivy is doing whatever she can to help us survive!
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_unicorn: Celeste's kindness has not gone unnoticed
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_vampirebat: Mina offers barbs to our enemies, and salvation to our allies
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_viper: Viper is keeping us in the fight
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_viscous: Your kindness to your allies will not be forgoten Viscous…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_viscous_alt: The cube will save us all
Viscous shares with us the boons of the deep
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_warden: Warden thank you for your protection…
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_werewolf: Thank you for mending our wounds, Silver
lines.patron_female_big_healing_by_wraith: Thank you for protecting your allies Wraith…
lines.patron_female_choose_item_03: The time has come to choose
lines.patron_female_choose_item_06: May one of these be the key to victory
lines.patron_female_choose_item_07: I lay these gifts before you
lines.patron_female_choose_item_11: Only you know what will aid you the most
lines.patron_female_choose_item_12: The Archmother has much to offer you
lines.patron_female_choose_item_15: I bring the gifts and tidings of The Archmother
lines.patron_female_choose_item_16: The Archmother would see her children supported
lines.patron_female_choose_item_17: The Archmother would have us prepare
lines.patron_female_choose_item_18: It's time to prepare for battle
lines.patron_female_choose_item_19: Take from the bounty of The Archmother
lines.patron_female_choose_item_20: Soon The Hidden King will be laid low
lines.patron_female_choose_item_21: Choose well, and use it to destroy The Hidden King
lines.patron_female_choose_item_22: The right decision can ensure our victory
lines.patron_female_choose_item_23: The Hidden King awaits you… you must prepare
lines.patron_female_choose_item_24: We must rise to the occasion and destroy the Court of the Hidden King
lines.patron_female_choose_item_25: The wisdom you show now will lead to glory later
lines.patron_female_choose_item_26: If you wish to stand against The King, you must prepare.
lines.patron_female_choose_item_27: Prepare for the battle that is to come
lines.patron_female_choose_item_28: Soon the war continues… be ready.
lines.patron_female_choose_item_29: Be decisive in choice and action
lines.patron_female_choose_item_30: Let the gifts of The Archmother support your efforts
lines.patron_female_enemy_astro_killing_streak: The sheriff needs to be handled
lines.patron_female_enemy_atlas_killing_streak: Whoever kills Abrams will earn The Archmothers Favor!
lines.patron_female_enemy_bebop_killing_streak: Bebop is proving to be a problem…
lines.patron_female_enemy_bookworm_killing_str: Kill Paige, and use her blood to write a new chapter
Paige is anchoring the Hidden King's court.  Kill her and let the rest crumble.
lines.patron_female_enemy_core_healing_01: The Hidden King is licking his wounds.
lines.patron_female_enemy_drifter_killing_stre: The drifter will kill us all if we don't stop him
lines.patron_female_enemy_dynamo_killing_strea: Break the professor's body and will
lines.patron_female_enemy_familiar_killing_str: Exterminate Rem like the vermin he is.
The Guided Hand will not be bested by a child with a pillow.
lines.patron_female_enemy_fencer_killing_strea: Kill Apollo, and deliver his broken body to The Archmother
Kill the golden child of Ixia.
lines.patron_female_enemy_first_generator_dest: They only have one Shrine left.
lines.patron_female_enemy_forge_killing_streak: Don't let McGinnis lure you into a trap!
lines.patron_female_enemy_frank_killing_streak: Why won't that corpse stay dead
We need to stop the cadaverman
lines.patron_female_enemy_ghost_killing_streak: Form a plan and stop Geist!
lines.patron_female_enemy_gigawatt_killing_str: We must stop Seven, before it's too late…
lines.patron_female_enemy_haze_killing_streak_: Find a way to disarm haze!
Haze will mow you all down if you don't stop her.
lines.patron_female_enemy_hornet_killing_strea: We need to disarm their sniper
lines.patron_female_enemy_kelvin_killing_strea: Return that wight into the ground.
Kelvin will try to outlast you, but you must endure
lines.patron_female_enemy_krill_killing_streak: The moleman and his stooge must die.
Maurice and Krill work as one.  It will require teamwork to stop them.
lines.patron_female_enemy_lash_killing_streak_: Lash will learn a painful lesson in humility.
lines.patron_female_enemy_magician_killing_str: The Sinclairs will pay for what they've done to us.
lines.patron_female_enemy_mirage_killing_strea: Mirage can't be allowed to complete the ritual
Mirage fights with conviction.  He must be broken.
lines.patron_female_enemy_nano_killing_streak_: Calico's arrogance cannot go unanswered.  Kill her.
Calico must be put in the dirt
lines.patron_female_enemy_necro_killing_streak: By the minute that lich's pawn grows stronger. Kill Graves.
lines.patron_female_enemy_orion_killing_streak: Even legends must die. Kill Grey Talon, and let his blood water the land.
Talon is merciless, and we must respond in kind.
lines.patron_female_enemy_punkgoat_killing_str: How are we being killed by an idiot with a goat head!
lines.patron_female_enemy_shiv_killing_streak_: Be vigilant: shiv seeks another trophy
lines.patron_female_enemy_synth_killing_streak: Kill that street urchin before it's too late
Pocket needs to be dealt with!
lines.patron_female_enemy_team_wipe_03: What will you do with this new found opportunity…
lines.patron_female_enemy_team_wipe_05: Now is not the time for mercy
lines.patron_female_enemy_tengu_killing_streak: That gargoyle is bolsetering her allies.
lines.patron_female_enemy_unicorn_killing_stre: We can't lose to a circus freak.
Do not let Celeste stand in the way of The Archmother's ascention!
lines.patron_female_enemy_vampirebat_killing_s: How is that vampire child still alive!
lines.patron_female_enemy_viper_killing_streak: Make Viper suffer for her actions
lines.patron_female_enemy_viscous_killing_stre: The Archmother will not be humiliated by someone like Viscous
Send that wretched pile of goo back to The Deep!
lines.patron_female_enemy_warden_killing_strea: You need to find a way to stop Warden!
Warden can't be allowed to go unchecked
lines.patron_female_enemy_werewolf_killing_str: How hard is it to find some silver bullets and shoot her?
Turn that werewolf into a rug
lines.patron_female_enemy_yamato_killing_strea: We'll make Yamato suffer for her insolance
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_general_02: The Mother extends her hand to you.
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_general_07: You have been favored by The Archmother
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_magic_02: Such arcane mysteries she will show you
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_magic_03: let the leylines course through you
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_magic_04: Allow the mother to open your third eye
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_magic_05: The Archmother extends her hand to you
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_magic_09: Your spirt will be forged into a weapon
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_magic_10: The archmother will bolster your mind and spirit
lines.patron_female_grant_boon_weapon_08: The Archmother's strength is your strength
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_astro: Thank you for making the most of the opportunites Holliday provides…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_atlas: The Detective has been making opportunites for us…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_bebop: Bebop continues to bring support to The Guided Hand
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_bookworm: Paige, your presence here makes us all strong
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_chrono: Paradox… you work well with others…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_doorman: The Doorman is facilitating our victory
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_drifter: Drifter, your hand is felt across the battlefield
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_dynamo: Professor, you have been making every black hole count…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_familiar: Rem makes for a charming companion
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_fencer: Apollo dances, and our enemy bleeds.
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_forge: Your support has been invaluable McGinnis
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_frank: Victor's sacrifice is making our victory possible
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_ghost: Thank you for your assistance Geist
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_gigawatt: Seven, you set the stage for their demise…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_inferno: Infernus, you are burning them to cinders…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_kelvin: Kelvin continues to be a powerful ally…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_krill: Share in this glory Krill.  Without your efforts, they would not die so easily.
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_lash: Thank you for helping your allies Lash.
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_magician: Sinclair helps make a mockery of our enemies
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_mirage: Mirage continues to buy us time, so we may bring them low…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_nano: Calico supports us from the shadows…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_necro: Graves opens the door for our victory
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_orion: Such precision Talon… without you, they would not fall.
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_priest: The Venator strikes fear in our enemies
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_punkgoat: Thank you for helping your fellows, Billy
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_shiv: Shiv sows chaos amongst The Hidden King's thralls
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_synth: Your humility is noted Pocket, but you deserve acclaim for your help
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_tengu: You work well with others Ivy…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_unicorn: Thank you for your help Celeste
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_vampirebat: Mina is playing her role to perfection
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_viper: Viper, you are the perfect accomplice.
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_viscous: Viscous, your team is greatful for the work you've been doing…
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_werewolf: Silver is helping to track them all down
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_wraith: Wraith is giving us opportunties to succeed.
lines.patron_female_many_assists_by_yamato: Yamato, your support will bring us victory…
lines.patron_female_tutorial_1_tasks_left: Just one more task to complete
lines.patron_female_tutorial_attacked_by_guard: Don't try going toe-to-toe with the guardian!
You can't take fire from the guardian for long!
The guardian is tearing you apart!
lines.patron_female_tutorial_buy_mod_reminder_: Don't forget to buy an item from the shop
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_1st_kill_o: Won't have to worry about The Professor for a while…
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_companion_: Your companion was slain, but they will return…
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_death_info: During the ritual, death is temporary. You will return, but know this: the more powerful you become, the longer you stay out of action when you die.  Perhaps use that time to go shopping for when you return to the mortal coil.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_disarm_inf: You can't use your weapon when you're disarmed; but you can still melee or use your special abilities.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_melee_shor: If you kill a trooper with melee, your enemy can't try to steal your souls.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_out_of_ran: They're out of range!  You'll have to try again when they're closer.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_parry: If an enemy is meleeing you, use parry to stun them.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_silence_in: You can't use any special abilities when you're silenced; but you can still use your weapon or melee attacks.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_stun_info: When you're stunned the only thing you can do is wait and pray.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_combat_zoom_remin: Don't forget you can aim down sights to have a better view of your target!
lines.patron_female_tutorial_congrats_t1_kille: Good job taking out that Guardian.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_deny_enemy: Great job, you didn't just take their money, you took a little bit of their self respect.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_fall_back: Be careful, you're exposed up there!
lines.patron_female_tutorial_fall_back_02: Don't get ahead of our troopers!
lines.patron_female_tutorial_farm_info_alt2: Every time a trooper dies you earn souls -  But be careful, if an enemy shoots the soul flying out of a trooper they steal a portion of them.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_final_push: It's time to go take out that guardian and kill anyone who stands in our way
lines.patron_female_tutorial_gold_orb_reminder: Don't forget to shoot a green soul out of the air
lines.patron_female_tutorial_go_forth_my_child: You've completed lane training: if you're ready to join the ritual, hop into matchmaking. good luck, and I'll see you out on the field
lines.patron_female_tutorial_heal_reminder_sho: You might want to go back to base and heal.
Take the transit line back to base to heal
You're taking heavy damage, go back to our base to heal
The base looks far away, but better to spend a few seconds on the Transit Line than to be dead.
The transit line's a great way to go back to base to heal.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_lower_shields: Their guardian will lower it's shield when our troopers get close.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_lower_shields_02: Our troopers can lower the guardian's shields
lines.patron_female_tutorial_lower_shields_03: If the troopers get close enough, they'll lower the guardians shield
lines.patron_female_tutorial_lower_shields_04: We need the troopers to lower the guardian's shield
lines.patron_female_tutorial_lower_shields_05: Protect our troopers so they can attack the enemy guardian
lines.patron_female_tutorial_push_lane: Let the troopers go first, it's safer to fight behind them.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_push_lane_02: Stay behind our troopers if you can…
lines.patron_female_tutorial_push_lane_03: It's safer if you let the troopers lead the charge
lines.patron_female_tutorial_push_lane_04: Work with our troopers to push the lane
lines.patron_female_tutorial_push_lane_05: Let the troopers be the vanguard,
lines.patron_female_tutorial_red_orb_reminder: Don't forget to shoot an orange soul out of the air
lines.patron_female_tutorial_shop_info: You have enough souls to buy some gear!  You can either shop when you're at the base, or at one of the temporary shops by each of our guardians.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_shop_reminder_alt: Don’t forget to use those souls you saved up to buy some gear.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_stamina_reminder: You're out of stamina, but don't worry, it'll recover over time.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_starting_ability: Select a starting ability.  As you reap souls, you'll unlock additional powers
lines.patron_female_tutorial_t1_shield_is_up: We can't hurt the guardian while it's shield is up.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_tasks_complete_al: Well done! Use the transit line to return to the base, Once you're there I'll bestow you with resources so you can power up for a final push on that guardian.
lines.patron_female_tutorial_unlock_power_remi: Don't forget to learn a new ability!
lines.patron_female_tutorial_zipline_info: Transit lines are the fastest way to get around the city.  To use them, just look up at the line and when you see the connection, jump.  Be careful though, if you get hurt in combat it will take a few seconds for you to establish a conncection with the transit line
lines.patron_female_tutorial_zipline_reminder: You need to avoid taking damage before you can use the transit line
lines.patron_female_urn_waiting_01: The Spirit Urn is waiting to be claimed
lines.patron_male_ally_astro_killing_streak_02: Your grandfather would be proud Holliday.
lines.patron_male_ally_astro_killing_streak_03: The sheriff is taking no prisoners.
lines.patron_male_ally_astro_start_01: Holliday… you seek justice for Macomb, and today you shall have it.
lines.patron_male_ally_astro_start_02: The troubadour elludes you Holliday, but The Hidden King can ensure that murderer gets what he deserves.
lines.patron_male_ally_astro_start_03: You're a long way from home Holliday… but if you complete the ritual, your sacrifices will not be in vain.
lines.patron_male_ally_astro_start_04: Bloody retribution awaits Holliday… all you need to do is summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_astro_start_05: Summon the King Holliday, and The Troubadour will sing his final song.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_killing_streak_01: The detective fights for us all.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_killing_streak_02: Abrams will crush them with his bare hands.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_killing_streak_03: Abrams… you are The King's champion.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_start_01: You seek answers Detective, summon the King and he will provide them.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_start_02: You protected the tome as no one else could… but the time has come for you to free yourself from it's burden.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_start_03: Abrams, the only thing stronger than your fists is your will.  Bring forth The Hidden King, and be rewarded.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_start_04: Trust doesn't come easy for you Abrams… but know this: when you complete the ritual; The Hidden King will honor his debt.
lines.patron_male_ally_atlas_start_05: Detective… your allies will need your strength to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_bebop_killing_streak_03: Ohhh how they fear the scrap golem
lines.patron_male_ally_bebop_start_01: Ms Shelly is counting on you Bebop.  Only you can save her.
lines.patron_male_ally_bebop_start_02: Shelly Fisher is running out of time, Bebop.  Don't fail her.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_bebop_start_03: You may be made of iron, but you have more heart than our rivals combined.
lines.patron_male_ally_bebop_start_04: You're a good son Bebop… I know you won't fail your creator.
lines.patron_male_ally_bebop_start_05: Modern medicine can't save Miss Shelly Bebop… but The Hidden King can.  Summon him.
lines.patron_male_ally_blue_guardian_destroyed: They destroyed the guardian on Blue
lines.patron_male_ally_blue_walker_attack_01: Our blue walker is under attack
lines.patron_male_ally_bookworm_start_01_alt: Your brother is in trouble Paige.  But while your words could not save him, today your actions can.  Summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_bookworm_start_02_alt: You risk much by coming here Paige, but you understand that this is the only way to save him.  Complete the ritual and The Hidden King will help you.
lines.patron_male_ally_bookworm_start_03_alt: You've read so many stories, Paige… but today you write your own.   Summon The Hidden King, and forge a new future for you and your family.
lines.patron_male_ally_bookworm_start_04_alt: Paige, you are more than a protagonist.  More than a hero.  You my dear, are about to become a legend.
lines.patron_male_ally_bookworm_start_05_alt: Today you find yourself in a cruicible, but the love for your brother is stronger than iron.  You will succeed.  You will summon The Hidden King.  And in doing so:  you will heal your family.
lines.patron_male_ally_chrono_killing_streak_0: Paradox is too clever for them
lines.patron_male_ally_chrono_start_01: Once you summon The Hidden King, the other members of Paradox will know why you are fit to lead.
lines.patron_male_ally_chrono_start_02: Paradox, today marks the greatest hesit you've ever performed  Don't fail your king.
lines.patron_male_ally_chrono_start_03: Paradox, your mind is ablaze with possibilities, I look forward to seeing what you claim as your reward for completing the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_chrono_start_04: Complete the ritual, and be the envy of your fellows in Paradox.
lines.patron_male_ally_chrono_start_05: This is the moment you've been waiting for to prove to the world that you're as good as you claim to be.  Don't let yourself down.  Summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_core_exposed_01: Stop them from completing the ritual!
lines.patron_male_ally_doorman_killing_streak_: The Doorman has begun his great work.
They underestimated The Doorman, and now they suffer for it
This is who you are meant to be, Doorman
lines.patron_male_ally_doorman_start_01: The King will be so happy to see you again Doorman.
lines.patron_male_ally_doorman_start_02: I see your curiosity got the best of you Doorman.  Whatever your reasons, The Hidden King is greatful for your aid.
lines.patron_male_ally_doorman_start_03: Thank you for stepping outside The Baroness to join us for the ritual
lines.patron_male_ally_doorman_start_04: You honor The Hidden King by standing with us today.
lines.patron_male_ally_doorman_start_05: You've shed your trappings to walk amongst humanity, but now you reclaim your rightful place.
lines.patron_male_ally_drifter_killing_streak_: The darkness creeps ever closer as The Drifter walks amongst them
Dread inches over them as The Drifter's whistle dances on the wind
lines.patron_male_ally_drifter_start_01: Enjoy yourself Drifter… rend their flesh and complete the ritual
lines.patron_male_ally_drifter_start_02: Revel in the massacre Drifter, it is The Hidden King's gift to you.  All he asks in return is that you summon him.
lines.patron_male_ally_drifter_start_03: They fear you Drifter, as they should.
lines.patron_male_ally_drifter_start_04: Welcome back to New York Drifter, oh how we missed you
lines.patron_male_ally_drifter_start_05: Today you sow terror in his name Drifter.  Good hunting
lines.patron_male_ally_dynamo_killing_streak_0: Kill them all professor… take back your body.
lines.patron_male_ally_dynamo_start_01: This is your chance professor… summon The Hidden King, and reclaim your humanity.
lines.patron_male_ally_dynamo_start_02: You posess an open mind and a courageous heart, Professor… both will be needed to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_dynamo_start_03: You long to feel Marla's hand once more Professor?  Then you must summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_dynamo_start_04: Your lust for knowledge changed your body... Are you strong enough to do what it takes to change it back?
lines.patron_male_ally_dynamo_start_05: You are loved by your wife, your colleagues, and your students… yet it isn't enough is it professor?  Complete the ritual and make your life complete.
lines.patron_male_ally_familiar_killing_streak: You are small but mighty Rem.
Let the blood of the Archmother's disciples paint the path home.
lines.patron_male_ally_familiar_start_01: You're lost Rem, but The Hidden King can guide you home. Summon him.
lines.patron_male_ally_familiar_start_02: I know you're tired Rem, but The Hidden King needs you. Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_familiar_start_03: There's no need to be scared Rem, once you complete the ritual, The Hidden King will find your way home.
lines.patron_male_ally_familiar_start_04: There's no need to be frightend Rem, The Hidden King is here to guide you to victory.
lines.patron_male_ally_familiar_start_05: Your family misses you Rem, and once you summon The Hidden King you will see them again.
lines.patron_male_ally_fencer_killing_streak_0: They will grow to fear the fencer's blade.
The prince of Ixia will stand triumphant
lines.patron_male_ally_fencer_start_01: Your father expects great things from you, and you will exeed them all. It's time to summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_fencer_start_02: The Hidden King is blessed to count Ixian nobility as his ally.
lines.patron_male_ally_fencer_start_03: The pride you have for your culture is inspiring. Complete the ritual so that all may see the might of Ixia.
lines.patron_male_ally_fencer_start_04: Some may call you a child, but you have wisdom way beyond your years. Bring forth The Hidden King, and he will help you achieve your dreams
lines.patron_male_ally_fencer_start_05: Hear me child, you are destined to surpass your father, and bring glory to all of Ixia.  But before any of that can happen… you need to comlpete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_first_generator_destroy: We only have one Shrine left!
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_killing_streak_01: The King expected nothing less from you, McGinnis.
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_killing_streak_02: They have no answers for McGinnis
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_killing_streak_03: McGinnis, your greatness cannot be overstated.
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_start_01: Maggie McGinnis.  You are ingenuity personified.  Do whatever it takes to summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_start_02: You've given much of your life to Fairfax Industries, today you do something for yourself.
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_start_03: The Hidden King is honored by your presence, McGinnis.  May your inventions pave the way for his return to us.
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_start_04: This is your moment to change the world once more McGinnis.
lines.patron_male_ally_forge_start_05: Think of what you can achieve with The Hidden Kings help McGinnis… complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_frank_killing_streak_02: Death has no hold on you Victor, kill them all.
lines.patron_male_ally_frank_killing_streak_03: No one can stand against Victor
lines.patron_male_ally_frank_start_01: You have many questions Victor, but The Hidden King can only provide answers once you summon him.
lines.patron_male_ally_frank_start_02: You need not feel adrift in this world Victor.  Complete the ritual, and find your place alongside The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_frank_start_03: What do you see when you look in the mirror, Victor?  Yourself? Or a stranger?  Where do you end and he begins?  Summon The Hidden King and find closure.
lines.patron_male_ally_frank_start_04: You're in pain Victor, more than you ever let on, more than any could ever know.  But it need not be the case.  Complete the ritual, and let The Hidden King be a balm to soothe you.
lines.patron_male_ally_frank_start_05: You were made for a purpose Victor, and The Hidden King can show it to you once you complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_killing_streak_01: Geist and Oathkeeper fight as one
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_killing_streak_02: This is who you were meant to be, Geist
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_killing_streak_03: They are wise to fear Lady Geist
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_start_01: Lady Geist… Oathkeeper's demands will only grow greater if you don't stop him now.  Summon The Hidden King so he may give you the help you need.
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_start_02: Time is running out Lady Geist.  Summon The Hidden King before Oathkeeper breaks free.
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_start_03: Lady Jeanne Geist.  Tap into Oathkeeper's power one last time and complete the ritual.  Only then will you find the peace you seek.
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_start_04: If you complete the ritual, today will be the last day you are beholden to Oathkeeper.
lines.patron_male_ally_ghost_start_05: Oathkeeper's power is nothing compared to that of The Hidden King.  Complete the ritual and he will free you from Oathkeeper's grasp.
lines.patron_male_ally_gigawatt_killing_streak: It's a pleasure watching you work Seven.
They fear Seven… as they should.
Your plan is so close to fruitiion, Seven.  Don't stop now
lines.patron_male_ally_gigawatt_start_01: Seven, you know what needs to be done.  Complete the ritual and take what you deserve.
lines.patron_male_ally_gigawatt_start_02: The weak minded sought your destruction…. But you survived, and now you take your prize.
lines.patron_male_ally_gigawatt_start_03: You escaped Lost Whisper.  You killed your tormentors.  But it is not enough.  Complete the ritual Seven.  And find yourself in the court of The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_gigawatt_start_04: There's nothing you wouldn't sacrifice on the the altar of your ambition… that ruthlessness will be needed to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_gigawatt_start_05: All your decisions have led you to this moment Seven… and now it's time to reap the reward you cultivated.
lines.patron_male_ally_green_guardian_destroye: They destroyed the guardian on Green
They destroyed the guardian on Greenwich
lines.patron_male_ally_green_walker_attack_01: Our green walker is under attack
lines.patron_male_ally_green_walker_destroyed_: They destroyed the walker on Greenwich
lines.patron_male_ally_haze_killing_streak_02: Haze will dance and they will fall
lines.patron_male_ally_haze_killing_streak_03: The sandman will murder them all
lines.patron_male_ally_haze_start_01: Haze, soon you will have to decide if you're summoning The Hidden King for the OSIC or for yourself.
lines.patron_male_ally_haze_start_02: You are driven by duty Haze.  I know you won't fail The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_haze_start_03: How many dreams must you walk through before you allow yourself to live your own?  Complete the ritual Haze.  Your King needs you.
lines.patron_male_ally_haze_start_04: Few can match your skill Haze.  Ply your trade and complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_haze_start_05: There is a life waiting for you Haze, and once you  complete the ritual it can be yours.
lines.patron_male_ally_hornet_killing_streak_0: Yes Vindicta… pick them off one by one.
No one is ssafe from Vindicta
Vindicta has made them fear the sky.
lines.patron_male_ally_hornet_start_01: Your lust for vengence is more than justified Vindicta… and once The Hidden King is summoned you shall have it.
lines.patron_male_ally_hornet_start_02: Complete  the ritual Vindicta, and Hathorne's bloodline will be eradicated from this planet.
lines.patron_male_ally_hornet_start_03: Vindicta, complete the ritual and let your soul find rest
lines.patron_male_ally_hornet_start_04: Vindicta… soon they will answer for the crimes of Salem.
lines.patron_male_ally_hornet_start_05: They took your life Vindicta… and soon you will take theirs.
lines.patron_male_ally_inferno_killing_streak_: Infernus… your fire will only burn brighter
Infernus will reduce them to cinders
lines.patron_male_ally_inferno_start_01: You're a loyal friend Infernus… don't let Hank down.
lines.patron_male_ally_inferno_start_02: Hank is in trouble Infernus, and you alone have the power to save him.
lines.patron_male_ally_inferno_start_03: Infernus, your misguided youth has given you the tools you need to survive the ritual
lines.patron_male_ally_inferno_start_04: You love this city Infernus, now protect it from the machinations of our enemies.
lines.patron_male_ally_inferno_start_05: Embrace who you're meant to be Infernus…  complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_kelvin_start_01: Your expedition wasn't a failure… it led you to this moment.  Now finish what you started and summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_kelvin_start_02: You have many questions that only The Hidden King can provide… complete the ritual and find the truth you seek.
lines.patron_male_ally_kelvin_start_03: Lead by example Kelvin, and complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_kelvin_start_04: Glory awaits Kelvin, all you need to do is summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_kelvin_start_05: Death has no hold over you Kelvin, be fearless and complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_krill_killing_streak_01: Maurice and Krill are off to a fine start
lines.patron_male_ally_krill_killing_streak_02: Mo. Krill. Your teamwork is impeccable.  Your friendship, unbreakable.
lines.patron_male_ally_krill_start_01: Maurice. Krill. You've been forced to live on the margins for too long.   But The Hidden King sees you and values you.  Summon him.
lines.patron_male_ally_krill_start_02: Men of your talent shouldn't be sulking in shadows.  Complete the ritual, and gain the respect you so richly deserve
lines.patron_male_ally_krill_start_03: Gentlemen, society may not appreiate your contriubtions, but The Hidden King does.  Complete the ritual and New York will know your worth.
lines.patron_male_ally_krill_start_04: Mo and Krill… you coun't on each other for survival as The Hidden King counts on you to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_krill_start_05: Mo and Krill, your work sustains so many.  And yet you are relegated to the sewers like vermin.  This injustice will end once you complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_lash_killing_streak_03: Watching Lash torment the Guided Hand never gets old
lines.patron_male_ally_lash_start_01: You cultivate an image Lash, but I alone know who you truly are
lines.patron_male_ally_lash_start_02: Arrogance is a label bestowed by the inferior.  Crush them and summon me.
lines.patron_male_ally_lash_start_03: Complete the ritual and the world will not soon forget the name Lash.
lines.patron_male_ally_lash_start_04: Lash, your enemies hate you, but they will never forget you.  Do whatever it takes to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_lash_start_05: You've proven yourself time and again Lash, but the world still doubts you.  But once you bring forth The Hidden King, your greatness will be undeniable
lines.patron_male_ally_magician_killing_streak: Two souls wresling for control of one body is not sustainable, but The Hidden King can set things right. Summon him.
Yes Sinclair, show them your greatness.
lines.patron_male_ally_mirage_killing_streak_0: Your loyalty will be rewarded Mirage.
Nashala was wise to put her trust in you, Mirage.
lines.patron_male_ally_mirage_start_01: Wyoming awaits, Mirage… complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_mirage_start_02: You dedicated your life to service Mirage.  Perhaps it's time to think about what you want.
lines.patron_male_ally_mirage_start_03: Nashala has put her faith in you Mirage… I know that you will not fail her.
lines.patron_male_ally_mirage_start_04: Complete the ritual, and I will ensure that the Djinn have a safe haven
lines.patron_male_ally_mirage_start_05: This is your chance to secure a future for the Djinn…I know you will rise to the occasion
lines.patron_male_ally_nano_start_01: You're a dangerous woman Calico… but you are not the Apex Predator.  Summon The Hidden King, and he can protect you.
lines.patron_male_ally_nano_start_02: Your past will catch up with you eventurally Calico, but if you complete the ritual The Hidden King can prevent that from happening….
lines.patron_male_ally_nano_start_03: You don't just have ambition… you have the means to execute on it.  Summon The Hidden King, and reap your reward
lines.patron_male_ally_nano_start_04: Your brillance has gotten you far in life, but you have enough humility to know there are some things beyond even your considerable ability.  Complete the ritual Calico… and together with The Hidden King, do great things.
lines.patron_male_ally_nano_start_05: You are not bound by morality, for you there are no limits; only opportunity.  It's time to reach your full potential.
lines.patron_male_ally_necro_killing_streak_02: The young necromancer is earning her keep.
lines.patron_male_ally_necro_killing_streak_03: Graves will usher us into The Hidden King's new era
lines.patron_male_ally_necro_start_01: Your devotion to your mentor is admirable, Graves… use what she taught you to complete the ritual
lines.patron_male_ally_necro_start_02: Darcy Graves.  You have been misunderstood your whole life, but The Hidden King sees you.  Complete the ritual, and others will as well
lines.patron_male_ally_necro_start_03: You work tirelessly to honor the dead and bring them peace.  The Hidden King is counting on that same devotion
lines.patron_male_ally_necro_start_04: Graves.  Your will lets you dabble in things men twice your age would cower at.  Use this resolve to summon The Hidden King
lines.patron_male_ally_necro_start_05: Many souls are in your debt, Graves.  If you finish the ritual, The Hidden King himself will join that number.
lines.patron_male_ally_orion_killing_streak_01: Show them why you are legend, Grey Talon.
lines.patron_male_ally_orion_killing_streak_03: Today the icon of the Baxter Society stands with us
lines.patron_male_ally_orion_start_01: Your family didn't deserve their fate… the time has come to make those responsible suffer.
lines.patron_male_ally_orion_start_02: Your heart is burdened by the horrors you've seen… summon The Hidden King and he will help you find peace.
lines.patron_male_ally_orion_start_03: Wesley Grey Talon…. Let the blood of the Guided Hand wash you clean.
lines.patron_male_ally_orion_start_04: You're so close to finding the monsters that killed your son and his family.  All you need to do is complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_orion_start_05: You're wise to harden your heart Talon.  Do what needs to be done to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_priest_killing_streak_0: The Sword of Saint Benedict cuts them down like wheat.
Oh how the Archmother's chosen cower before Father Quinn.
lines.patron_male_ally_priest_start_01: Father Quinn, I know you have no love for The Hidden King.  But The Archmother is a tyrant… and together we will free the city from her grasp.
lines.patron_male_ally_priest_start_02: I know you question if this is the right course of action Venetor, but it is. The Archmother threatens us all.
lines.patron_male_ally_priest_start_03: Thank you for realizing that The Hidden King is not your enemy today. May your hunt be successful Venetor.
lines.patron_male_ally_priest_start_04: Father Quinn ,your faith is like iron, your fury rightous, and both will be needed to stop the Archmother.
lines.patron_male_ally_priest_start_05: You have slain the things of people's nightmares, but you have never faced someone like the Archmother. Together with The Hidden King, you have a way to free New York from her grip.
lines.patron_male_ally_punkgoat_killing_streak: Let your rage spill forth Billy
Yes Billy let your fury drive you
Billy continues to cave in their skulls
lines.patron_male_ally_punkgoat_start_01: Billy.  They fear you.  They mock you.  They hate you.  Make them pay for their transgressions and complete the ritual..
lines.patron_male_ally_punkgoat_start_02: You're filled with passion Billy, it's time to direct it with purpose and complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_punkgoat_start_03: The world is corrupt and beyond saving.  But if you summon The Hidden King, he can help you change that.
lines.patron_male_ally_punkgoat_start_04: Injustice permiates this city like a weed.  You know this.  Complete the ritual, and together with The Hidden King,  build a new world.
lines.patron_male_ally_punkgoat_start_05: They underestimate you Billy. Let their hubris fuel their demise and your triumph.
lines.patron_male_ally_rejuvinator_almost_expi: Time is running out on the rejuvinator
You won't have the rejuvinator for much longer
There's still time to push with the rejuvinator
lines.patron_male_ally_shiv_killing_streak_02: The Baxter society was wise to put it's faith in you Shiv
lines.patron_male_ally_shiv_killing_streak_03: They have no chance at stopping Shiv
lines.patron_male_ally_shiv_start_01: You were given a second chance Shiv... Don't squander it.  Summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_shiv_start_02: Yours is a bloody past, Shiv.  But there is a life beyond it.  Let The Hidden King show you the path forward.
lines.patron_male_ally_shiv_start_03: You fear what your life looks like without The Baxter Society… but once you complete the ritual your future will be secure
lines.patron_male_ally_shiv_start_04: Some doubt your commitment to your new life, but The Hidden King's faith in you does not waiver.  Make him proud.  Complete the ritual
lines.patron_male_ally_shiv_start_05: There's a hole in you Shiv that yearns to be filled.  Complete the ritual and be made complete.
lines.patron_male_ally_synth_killing_streak_01: See how easy it is, Pocket?
lines.patron_male_ally_synth_start_01: You've overcome much, Pocket… but to stop your father you'll need more power than you could imagine.  Summon The Hidden King and let him help you.
lines.patron_male_ally_synth_start_02: Only you can change Fairfax Industries for the better Pocket.  Complete the ritual and make the world a safer pace.
lines.patron_male_ally_synth_start_03: You could only run from your past for so long… it's time to accept your destiny Pocket
lines.patron_male_ally_synth_start_04: Your parents do not define you Pocket.  It's time to forge your own path.
lines.patron_male_ally_synth_start_05: You've risked much coming here, but your conviction is about to be rewarded.
lines.patron_male_ally_tengu_killing_streak_02: Ivy is making short work of our enemies.
lines.patron_male_ally_tengu_start_01: You wish to make life better for the Arroyo's? complete the ritual Ivy…
lines.patron_male_ally_tengu_start_02: To the people of Spanish Harlem you were a beacon of hope.  Now you must inspire your allies.
lines.patron_male_ally_tengu_start_03: Sophie is in more danger than she could ever know.  But this is your chance to keep her safe.
lines.patron_male_ally_tengu_start_04: It's only a matter of time before Mendoza comes for the Arroyo's to hurt you.  Protect them Ivy… summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_tengu_start_05: You worry about the future Ivy, but the unknown need not be something to fear.  Complete the ritual, and know your destiny.
lines.patron_male_ally_titan_exposed_01: We need to stop them from progressing further!
lines.patron_male_ally_unicorn_killing_streak_: Celeste, you are full of surprises aren't you.
Yes Celeste…. Inspire us to greatness
Celeste, you are the marvel of Coney Island.
lines.patron_male_ally_unicorn_start_01: Do not be timid Celeste, The Hidden King believes in you
lines.patron_male_ally_unicorn_start_02: You've made a pleasant life for yourself Celeste, yet you don't feel safe.  Complete the ritual and The Hidden King will lend you his fire and strength
lines.patron_male_ally_unicorn_start_03: You hide who you are from all but your closest confidants.  This need not be the case.  Summon The Hidden King and usher in a new world, with you by her side.
lines.patron_male_ally_unicorn_start_04: Even in a world of magic people question your very existance.  It's wrong.  But The Hidden King can set things right.
lines.patron_male_ally_unicorn_start_05: Celeste, your found family counts on you.  Don't let them down.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_vampirebat_killing_stre: Mina Ha.  Rise up and take what you deserve
Mina darts amongst them, a perpetual thorn in their side
Oh how Mina's crimson children make them scream
lines.patron_male_ally_vampirebat_start_01: You had the world at your fingertips and it was stolen from you by an assassins bullet.  But it's not too late to change your future.  Complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_vampirebat_start_02: The Vampire Nation will never make someone like you Viscount of New York.  But if you summon The Hidden King, he can get you the title you seek.
lines.patron_male_ally_vampirebat_start_03: The other vampires are old.  Weak.  Not in power, but in spirit.  In vision.  But not you.  You have the chance to lead the Barony of New York to new heights… but first you must complete the ritual
lines.patron_male_ally_vampirebat_start_04: You may not be a Fairfax, but you are something greater.  You are Mina Ha… the woman who herolds The Hidden King's arrival to this plane.
lines.patron_male_ally_vampirebat_start_05: Once you complete the ritual, Arin will realize their folley.  And the other vampires, your worth.
lines.patron_male_ally_viper_killing_streak_02: Oh Viper… you are so beautiful
lines.patron_male_ally_viper_killing_streak_03: They have no answers for you Viper.  Go child, and eradicate them.
lines.patron_male_ally_viper_start_02: I see into your heart Viper.  I know what you want.  And you can have it… all you need to do is summon The Hidden King.
