lines.patron_male_ally_viper_start_03: Your whole life you've been painted as a failure.  But you and I both know you've always been destined for so much more.  It's time to realize your dreams.  It's time to complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_viper_start_04: The life you've longed for is not a fantasy…it could be yours.  But first you need to summon The Hidden King.
lines.patron_male_ally_viper_start_05: Viper, the cycle can be broken.  A new life awaits you once you've completed the ritual
lines.patron_male_ally_viscous_killing_streak_: Viscous has shown us the glory of The Cube
They don't know how to deal with Viscous
lines.patron_male_ally_viscous_start_01: You are wise to see the danger The Adversary poses.  Summon The Hidden King, so that he may protect the denizens of The Deep.
lines.patron_male_ally_viscous_start_02: You yearn to understand humanity Viscous, even as it shuns you. Complete the ritual and make your dreams reality.
lines.patron_male_ally_viscous_start_03: The landwalkers  don’t understand what horrors await them if you fail today.  But you are strong in heart and body.  You will not falter.  You will complete the ritual, and together with The Hidden King you will kill The Adversary.
lines.patron_male_ally_viscous_start_04: New York can be an unwelcoming place… but once you complete the ritual, you will be able to navigate it with ease.
lines.patron_male_ally_viscous_start_05: You have a kind heart Viscous, and after today all will know it.
lines.patron_male_ally_warden_killing_streak_0: Warden fights as a man possessed
lines.patron_male_ally_warden_start_02: You were forged since birth to be a weapon… but to what end.
lines.patron_male_ally_warden_start_03: Warden…how long do you think you can hide your heart from The Hidden King?
lines.patron_male_ally_warden_start_04: You are consumed by singular purpose Warden, do you have the will to see it though?
lines.patron_male_ally_warden_start_05: I can't tell what you're after Warden…but I know you're afraid of failure.  Fear not, for The Hidden King will be your guide to victory
lines.patron_male_ally_werewolf_killing_streak: The wolf preys on our enemies
Silver is relentless, and The Hidden King is greatful
lines.patron_male_ally_werewolf_start_01: Your life's a mess, Silver.  But it doesn't have to be that way.  Let The Hidden King guide you to a better life.
lines.patron_male_ally_werewolf_start_02: Silver, you've never been a slave to the moon, and you refused The Archmother's call to be her thrall.  Destroy her.  Complete the ritual.  And live free.
lines.patron_male_ally_werewolf_start_03: The Archmother would turn you into a war doll for her purposes, but this is not the King's way.  If you choose to fight for him, he will set you free.
lines.patron_male_ally_werewolf_start_04: Lilah Silver.  Yours is a…complicated life.  But if you complete the ritual, The King will make sure you thrive.
lines.patron_male_ally_werewolf_start_05: Your life is hollow Silver, but The Hidden King can help you find meaning.
lines.patron_male_ally_wraith_start_01: You're torn between your desire to be feared and your desire to be loved, today you will be both.
lines.patron_male_ally_wraith_start_02: Your dreams need not be dreams for much longer Wraith
lines.patron_male_ally_wraith_start_03: Summon The Hidden King Wraith, and live the life you've dreamed about.
lines.patron_male_ally_wraith_start_04: Wraith, in the past, ambition has driven you to greatness… today it will enshrine you in legend.
lines.patron_male_ally_wraith_start_05: Wealth. Power. And so much more await once you complete the ritual.
lines.patron_male_ally_yamato_killing_streak_0: Your blade drinks the blood of the Guided Hand
They would be wise to fear the 7th Moon.
lines.patron_male_ally_yamato_start_01: You mourn your brother, but today you will make him proud.
lines.patron_male_ally_yamato_start_02: Complete the ritual, and the 7th Moon's rise to power will be assured.
lines.patron_male_ally_yamato_start_03: You have enemies back home who still hunt you.  But once you complete the ritual only a fool would oppose the 7th Moon.
lines.patron_male_ally_yamato_start_04: This is not your city Yamato, but after you summon The Hidden King it will be.
lines.patron_male_ally_yamato_start_05: Kaori.  You honor your brother by taking his name… and honor him further still by making his dreams a reality.  Complete the ritual and see the success you both dreamed of.
lines.patron_male_ally_yellow_guardian_destroy: They destroyed the guardian on Yellow
lines.patron_male_ally_yellow_walker_attack_01: Our yellow walker is under attack

Rem.  Without your help, we would be in peril

lines.patron_male_big_healing_by_unicorn: Celeste your kindness will not be forgotten

Viscous shares with us the boons of the deep

lines.astro_kill_gigawatt_02: I knew I couldn't trust you…
lines.astro_kill_gigawatt_04: I came here to kill The Troubador, but I'll settle for you…
lines.astro_kill_haze_02: If I never see a sandman again it'll be too soon…
lines.astro_kill_haze_03: Shoulda known the OSIC would be here…
lines.astro_kill_haze_04: Never shoulda come after me Haze
lines.astro_kill_hornet_03: Put on some shoes for god's sake…
lines.astro_kill_hornet_04: What is wrong with this city…
lines.astro_kill_hornet_05: Lot more snipers here than back in Macomb…
lines.astro_kill_inferno_01: Eh, I'll leave him a tip later…
lines.astro_kill_inferno_02: You picked a bad day to leave the bar…
lines.astro_kill_inferno_03: One less demon to worry about…
lines.astro_kill_inferno_04: Infernus is out of the picture
lines.astro_kill_kelvin_01: I tried to reason with you Kelvin.
lines.astro_kill_kelvin_04: …and I thought I was out of place in New York…
lines.astro_kill_kelvin_05: Kelvin, you're not ready to fight someone like me.
lines.astro_kill_krill_03: Glad I got 'em before they tore me in half…
lines.astro_kill_krill_04: Fighting those two is always risky…
lines.astro_kill_krill_05: Glad that went my way, Molemen are no joke.
lines.astro_kill_lash_02: That guy thought he owned the skies…
lines.astro_kill_lash_03: Lash, everything you do I'm just better at
lines.astro_kill_lash_04: A little humility'll do him good…
lines.astro_kill_magician_03: I'm tired of your bunny rabbit bullshit.
lines.astro_kill_magician_04: Why don't you go play with scarves or something
lines.astro_kill_mirage_03: You picked a helluva time to visit New York
lines.astro_kill_mirage_05: It was you or me, pal…
lines.astro_kill_nano_02: "Most Dangerous Woman On The Planet" my ass…
lines.astro_kill_nano_03: That cat deserved better than to be attached to you.
lines.astro_kill_nano_04: You belong in jail, Calico, but I'll settle for you in the dirt…
lines.astro_kill_nano_05: No one's above the law Calico.
lines.astro_kill_necro_02: What the hell am I doing…
lines.astro_kill_necro_03: That kid didn't give me a choice.
lines.astro_kill_necro_04: Where the hell was that kid's parents…
lines.astro_kill_operative_02: You don't look so handsome with a bullet in you, do ya…
lines.astro_kill_operative_03: Hope this doesn't start an international incident…
lines.astro_kill_operative_05: Great, now I'm fighting soviet spies.
lines.astro_kill_orion_02: Goddamn it Talon, I don't want to do this.
lines.astro_kill_orion_04: Feeling pretty conflicted about that one…
lines.astro_kill_orion_05: Won't be seeing that owl anytime soon…
lines.astro_kill_priest_01: I've seen some crazy preachers before, but that's a new one.
lines.astro_kill_priest_02: I am going to hell, aren't I?
lines.astro_kill_priest_04: Probably shouldn't tell the folks back home about this.
lines.astro_kill_priest_05: Get out of my way, Father.
lines.astro_kill_punkgoat_01: I don't have time for this goat-boy.
lines.astro_kill_punkgoat_02: You never had a chance, Billy.
lines.astro_kill_shiv_01: Shiv, shiv, shiv…when are you gonna wise up.
lines.astro_kill_shiv_02: You're not above the law Shiv. You're just a shitty biker.
lines.astro_kill_shiv_03: You lost Shiv. Deal with it.
lines.astro_kill_shiv_05: By the way: your hair is rediculous.
lines.astro_kill_slork_03: I can't get back to illinois fast enough…
lines.astro_kill_slork_04: Don't see those things in Macomb…
lines.astro_kill_synth_02: You have a trust fund, why are you wasting your time here?
lines.astro_kill_synth_04: That bag of tricks was never going to get the job done…
lines.astro_kill_synth_05: You're never completing the ritual pocket
lines.astro_kill_tengu_05: She shoulda flown away while she could…
lines.astro_kill_trapper_03: Got nothing against the boys in the coven, but you're not stopping me.
lines.astro_kill_trapper_04: Sorry Trapper, we're both just doing our jobs.
lines.astro_kill_trapper_05: That guy shoulda called in sick.
lines.astro_kill_unicorn_04: I need to get outta this city…
lines.astro_kill_unicorn_05: Yeah, I'm not a circus girl
lines.astro_kill_vampirebat_04: How about you go cry about it to Mommy and Daddy?
lines.astro_kill_viper_02: You're really bad at being a criminal, Viper
lines.astro_kill_viper_05: Thought you were supposed to tough, Viper?
lines.astro_kill_viscous_02: I'm not getting bossed around by a pile of goo…
lines.astro_kill_viscous_03: I don't know what that thing was, but I think it's still on me…
lines.astro_kill_viscous_04: Hey gooey. Slink off into a lake or something.
lines.astro_kill_warden_01: We could have worked together Warden…
lines.astro_kill_warden_02: You picked the wrong day to mess with me Warden.
lines.astro_kill_warden_03: Only one of us gets to take the law into their own hands…
lines.astro_kill_warden_05: Was only a matter of time before I had to put you down Warden…
lines.astro_kill_werewolf_01: You're not the law Silver, I am.
lines.astro_kill_werewolf_02: Another life we'd probably be friends
lines.astro_kill_werewolf_03: Wish we met on a different day, Silver
lines.astro_kill_wraith_02: I'm lucky Wraith didn’t get the drop on me
lines.astro_kill_wraith_03: I'm not on your payroll, Wraith…
lines.astro_kill_wraith_04: God that lady creeps me out.
lines.astro_kill_wrecker_01: What the hell was that thing…
lines.astro_kill_yamato_01: One less crime lord to deal with…
lines.astro_kill_yamato_03: Hey Yamato; next time you try to lead by example, be compotent.
lines.astro_kill_yamato_04: That sword was never going to get it done
lines.astro_last_one_standing_02: Gotta hold on until backup arrives
lines.astro_last_one_standing_03: I can hold this down for a little bit
lines.astro_leaving_area_02: I'll be back when I can..
lines.astro_leaving_area_03: You're on your own for now…
lines.astro_match_start_astro_chrono_convo01_0: I don't care about you or your friends.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_chrono_convo02_0: I can't wait to hear this…
lines.astro_match_start_astro_chrono_convo03_0: How often do you take mask off?
Lady, you're running around with a fishbowl on your head I think it's safe not to assume anything.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_chrono_convo04_0: So what's your story lady, you fall in a vat of clocks?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_forge_convo01_01: What's it like working for Fairfax
lines.astro_match_start_astro_forge_convo01_03: Nah, I'm from central illinois -  I just assume they're assholes with god complexes
lines.astro_match_start_astro_forge_convo02_01: You were that kid genius right?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_forge_convo02_03: How'd that work out for you?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_forge_convo03_01: How long you think you'll stay with Fairfax Industries?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_ghost_convo01_03: You know how to use it?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_ghost_convo03_05: You've done some horrible things.  And after I stop the Troubador I'm going to find out what.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_hornet_convo01_0: How good are you at hitting moving targets?
I'm going to pretend that was a joke
You know I have to arrest you now.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_hornet_convo03_0: Laws come a long way since you died.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_inferno_convo02_: Bet you had quite the life before you became a bartender.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_inferno_convo03_: Not afraid.  Just don't like it.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_kelvin_convo01_0: You look more out of place than I do
lines.astro_match_start_astro_kelvin_convo03_0: If all goes well, it ends today.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_krill_convo01_02: Thanks.  It belonged to my grandfather.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_krill_convo02_02: I bet you are.  How much you charge?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_lash_convo02_02: I'm tracking down a serial killer.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_lash_convo02_04: Oh my god I hate you.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_lash_convo03_01: Lash here's the thing.  I'm going to need you to talk to me as little as humanly possible.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_lash_convo03_03: I don't knock your teeth in
lines.astro_match_start_astro_mirage_convo01_0: You really think the US is going to sell Wyoming to the Djinn?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_orion_convo03_01: I know that look in your eyes… who did they take from you.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_orion_convo03_03: I hope today we both find peace.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_shiv_convo01_01: So you're with the Baxter Society?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_shiv_convo02_01: How come the Baxter Society isn't trying to stop The Troubadour?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_shiv_convo02_03: Must be nice having the luxury to drag your feet while innocent people are dying.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_synth_convo01_03: Yes.  You are.  And I need to know if I have to look after you.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_synth_convo02_01: You look like you've lived a life.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_synth_convo03_02: I think that if we don't we'll be dead so it's not going to matter a whole helluva lot.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_tengu_convo02_01: Heard about you on the news
lines.astro_match_start_astro_tengu_convo02_03: I am.  Turns out lots of people are interested in crime fighting gargoyles
lines.astro_match_start_astro_tengu_convo02_05: Ivy, it's hard not to say nice things about you…
lines.astro_match_start_astro_tengu_convo03_02: I'm here to catch a killer, not go sight seeing.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_tengu_convo03_04: Can we focus on the shooting?
lines.astro_match_start_astro_viscous_convo01_: Tell ya what, if we win, sure.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_viscous_convo02_: You don't know what I said do you
lines.astro_match_start_astro_viscous_convo03_: No Viscous.  It, um.  It doesn't feel warm.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_wraith_convo01_0: Don't worry Wraith, I'm here for The Troubadour, not your gambling ring.
Ya know what, maybe I'll stay for your gambling ring.
lines.astro_match_start_astro_wraith_convo03_0: You should quit while you're ahead
Your organization.  Shut it down.  Quit while you're ahead.
Either you shut it down or Murphy's gonna shut it down for you.
lines.astro_match_start_atlas_astro_convo03_04: Try not to think about it.
lines.astro_match_start_bebop_astro_convo01_01: Don't see too many Golems in Macomb
lines.astro_match_start_bebop_astro_convo02_03: I like the way you think tin man.
lines.astro_match_start_bebop_astro_convo03_01: I know it's against your nature, or programming, or whatever, but there are going to be times when I need you not to punch someone right after you pull them.
lines.astro_match_start_bebop_astro_convo03_03: Just let me grab them them first, then feel free to beat the hell out of them.
lines.astro_match_start_drifter_astro_convo01_: That's right.  You got a tip for me?
I'm getting real tired of people telling me that.
lines.astro_match_start_drifter_astro_convo02_: I don't take orders from you.
lines.astro_match_start_dynamo_astro_convo01_0: Yeah, well I hope local law enforcement feels the same way…
lines.astro_match_start_dynamo_astro_convo02_0: I'm happy to drag back anyone you miss.
lines.astro_match_start_dynamo_astro_convo03_0: I really don't want to talk about it.
I'm not going to catch him.  I'm going to kill him.
lines.astro_match_start_familiar_astro_convo03: I'm sorry, I don't know the area.  Have you talked to the police?
Have you talked to police that live here?
Cause they- just stay close to me, we'll talk after The Ritual.
lines.astro_match_start_fencer_astro_convo01_0: Do I look like Grey Talon?
lines.astro_match_start_fencer_astro_convo02_0: Know how to use that sword?
This is gonna be a long day.
lines.astro_match_start_fencer_astro_convo03_0: Be ready to stab 'em when I bring 'em in close.
lines.astro_match_start_frank_astro_convo01_01: Forgive me for not being as chatty as some of the other folks around here.
lines.astro_match_start_frank_astro_convo02_02: Whole lotta things are bothering me… nothing you can help with though.

lines.astro_match_start_gigawatt_astro_convo03: When this is over I have to turn you in.
lines.astro_match_start_haze_astro_convo02_02: I'm happy to work with anyone who doesn't get in my way.
lines.astro_match_start_haze_astro_convo03_02: You sleep 'em.  I grab 'em. You shoot 'em?

lines.astro_match_start_necro_astro_convo02_03: Snark isn't gonna keep you alive.
lines.astro_match_start_necro_astro_convo02_07: You shouldn't be here.  It's not safe.

lines.astro_match_start_priest_astro_convo03_0: Thanks for praying with me earlier.
It didn't.  But it was nice that you tried.
lines.astro_match_start_viper_astro_convo01_04: What sort of question is that.
lines.astro_match_start_viper_astro_convo02_02: Doubt it, I'm not from around here.
lines.astro_match_start_viper_astro_convo03_05: If you didn't need my help right now you would stab me in the back.
lines.astro_match_start_werewolf_astro_convo02: What I'm doing here is none of your business.
I'm not going after one of your bounties Silver.  Once I stop The Troubadour I'm going back home.
lines.astro_match_start_yamato_astro_convo01_0: I'm sorry I don't speak japanese
lines.astro_match_start_yamato_astro_convo02_0: What did you say about Murphy?
lines.astro_match_start_yamato_astro_convo03_0: Picking a fight with the other families isn't going to end well for you.
lines.astro_melee_kill_04: Great, now there's blood on my boots. Those were a gift.
lines.astro_melee_kill_05: Was never gonna end well for ya…

lines.astro_upgrade_power1_05: Nows not the time for subtley…

lines.astro_upgrade_power1_08: I brought a little surprise from back home…
lines.astro_upgrade_power1_09: I'm either gonna blow 'em up or make 'em run like hell…either works for me…
lines.astro_upgrade_power1_10: This stuff's more unstable than my 1st marriage…

lines.astro_upgrade_power2_07: I'm not letting someone escape me again…
lines.astro_upgrade_power2_09: I won't give up the chase
lines.astro_upgrade_power2_10: Gotta be ready to jump in
lines.astro_upgrade_power3_02: I know how to use the family heirloom…
lines.astro_upgrade_power3_03: Don't have time to mess around with these people…
lines.astro_upgrade_power3_04: Dad gave me the gun, and he damn sure taught me how to use it.
lines.astro_upgrade_power3_07: They'll learn not to mess with me
lines.astro_upgrade_power3_08: Sheriff's not just a fancy title: I know how to back it up.
lines.astro_upgrade_power3_09: They'll back down or they'll die
lines.astro_upgrade_power3_10: Ready to lay down the law.
lines.astro_upgrade_power4_01: I know how to tie 'em up
lines.astro_upgrade_power4_02: Gotta isolate 'em one at a time…
lines.astro_upgrade_power4_03: Gotta get in there, grab 'em, and get out…
lines.astro_upgrade_power4_05: Need a plan before I use this…
lines.astro_upgrade_power4_06: Once I got 'em, there's nothing they can do.
lines.astro_upgrade_power4_07: Need to communicate before using this thing…
lines.astro_upgrade_power4_09: With a little coordination, this can make all the difference
lines.astro_use_power2_02: Hope I got this positioned right…
lines.astro_use_power2_10: Time to do what I do best…
lines.astro_use_power3_05: I know how to make it hurt
lines.astro_use_power3_10: Let me show you why I'm the law…

lines.atlas_killstreak_mid_03: You guys getting the message yet?

lines.atlas_kill_anyhero_08: Looks like it's my day after all…

lines.atlas_kill_dynamo_05: If I'm gonna die, it ain't gonna be to someone with patches on their elbows…

lines.atlas_kill_forge_04: Takes more than some machines to stop me…
lines.atlas_kill_forge_05: Shoulda stayed in the workshop, McGinnis…

lines.atlas_kill_gigawatt_05: Men like you deserve to rot in Lost Whisper.
lines.atlas_kill_haze_02: What did I do to piss of the feds...
lines.atlas_kill_haze_03: I never wanted the OSIC as an enemy…
lines.atlas_kill_high_networth: All the money in the world can't buy talent
lines.atlas_kill_hornet_03: You made me do this Vindicta...
lines.atlas_kill_hornet_04: Your anger's justified, but your methods aren't…
lines.atlas_kill_hornet_05: There's other ways to get what you want Vindicta…

lines.atlas_kill_inferno_03: He won't be starting fires anytime soon…
lines.atlas_kill_inferno_05: Hope I didn' kill my bartender for nothing…

lines.atlas_kill_kelvin_04: You seemed like a decent guy Kelvin, but you had to be stopped…
lines.atlas_kill_kelvin_05: What are you gonna do, ice skate me to death?

lines.atlas_kill_krill_03: See you at the game Sunday, Krill
lines.atlas_kill_krill_05: I'll make it up to those guys another time…

lines.atlas_kill_lash_04: He thought ego was a substitute for talent
lines.atlas_kill_lash_05: That felt more satisfying than it should…
lines.atlas_kill_mirage_04: The brave are the first to die
lines.atlas_kill_orion_01: Killed the old man! Shit, I killed an old man…

lines.atlas_kill_orion_05: You never shoulda let me get this close to you Talon
lines.atlas_kill_shiv_02: Now the Baxter Society is hunting me?
lines.atlas_kill_shiv_04: Takes more than a couple knives to take me down…

lines.atlas_kill_synth_03: Take your case and get outta town Pocket…
lines.atlas_kill_synth_05: I know who you are Pocket…trust me when I tell you it's not worth it…

lines.atlas_kill_tengu_04: You picked the wrong side Ivy
lines.atlas_kill_tengu_05: You never should have come for me Ivy…

lines.atlas_kill_viscous_05: I dealt with the pile of Goo

lines.atlas_kill_warden_02: I had to stop you Warden
lines.atlas_kill_warden_03: You really need a new hobby Warden
lines.atlas_kill_warden_05: That cape kinda freaks me out…

lines.atlas_kill_wraith_03: Hope she's still taking action on the Knickerbockers
lines.atlas_kill_wraith_04: This better not kick me out of Sunday's card game

lines.atlas_kill_wrecker_03: Things like you don't deserve to live…
lines.atlas_kill_wrecker_05: Tell Fairfax to go to hell.

lines.atlas_last_one_standing_02: I may be tough, but I don't wanna take on their whole team alone…

I'm warning you Paradox… you touch my property you won't like what happens next

lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_forge_convo03_01: Just to give you a heads up I plan on picking a lot of fights today.

lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_ghost_convo03_03: So you're calm because you're delusional.

lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_gigawatt_convo02: Don't know if I need life advice from someone who was caught and exececuted
lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_gigawatt_convo03: What did you do to end up in Lost Whisper.
You don't try to obliterate someone's soul just because they offended you.
lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_haze_convo02_02: I think you guys have enough people who can kick down doors.
lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_haze_convo03_01: You're not going to leave me out to dry are you?

You wanna walk in times square barefoot, be my guest

lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_hornet_convo03_0: How long have you been in New York
That had to be an adjustment

lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_inferno_convo03_: Yeah, the case I'm working's been… consuming.
lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_kelvin_convo01_0: You're the most confident dead man I've ever met.

lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_krill_convo03_03: Oh they are going to hate us

lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_orion_convo02_04: No shit.  Tell ya what, we survive this I'll take the whole family out for a drink.
lines.atlas_match_start_atlas_orion_convo03_01: Talon.  I know you don't care if you die, but I am highly motivated to stay alive so please don't do anything stupid.

lines.atlas_parry_02: Who did you think you were punching?

lines.atlas_upgrade_power1_02: If they don't get out of the way that's on them…

lines.atlas_upgrade_power1_10: The only way to face a problem is head on.

lines.atlas_upgrade_power2_10: This book is gonna give them more than they bargained for…

lines.atlas_upgrade_power3_03: I'll fight to the bitter end
lines.atlas_upgrade_power3_07: I didn't survive this long just to die here.
lines.atlas_upgrade_power3_08: In the end… I will be the one still standing.
lines.atlas_upgrade_power3_10: I know how to take a hit

lines.atlas_upgrade_power4_07: I'm going to be holding onto a book for dear life… great
lines.atlas_upgrade_power4_08: I gotta figure out to use this damn book before it gets me killed

lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_ghost_convo02_01: Geist… are you Dr. Johann's sister?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_ghost_convo03_02: Not particularly, beyond a few noteable excpetions.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_gigawatt_convo01: No.  She gives me something to fight for.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_gigawatt_convo02: You're not like the other organics.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_gigawatt_convo03: I got my eye on you Seven
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_haze_convo03_01: When this is over the OSIC isn't going to take me away from Ms Shelly , right?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_haze_convo03_03: Don't you kill people in their dreams?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_hornet_convo01_0: True, I can be a right bastard.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_hornet_convo02_0: You're the one I read about in the papers, right?
That known assocoates of John Hathorne and the Friends of Humanity have been winding up dead.
They were shot in the head with a high powered rifle
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_hornet_convo03_0: That sounds rather intense,  I think I'll let you be.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_inferno_convo01_: I didn't realize you two were acquainted.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_inferno_convo03_: Why couldn't I've been paired up with a bouncer instead of a bartender.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_kelvin_convo01_0: Just worried about Ms Shelly is all.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_kelvin_convo02_0: I'm still a little confused on your condition: are you alive or dead.
Not really. I was summoned into existance by an act of craftsmanship, willpower and sacrifice. There's a clear path that someone could replicate. You're a psudeo corpse with a glowing rock.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_kelvin_convo03_0: Ms. Shelly loved reading about your adventures.  When you disappeared it was sad thinking  about her not being able to read a new one before she died.  But now that you're back there's hope for one more story.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_krill_convo01_01: Alright boys, when I pull 'em in I need you to be ready to grab 'em
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_krill_convo02_02: Thanks mate, that might have been my last night.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_krill_convo02_04: All goes well today I won't need to fight in the pit anymore
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_mirage_convo01_0: You care about Nashala's safety, right?
Then why are you taking her into a fight?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_mirage_convo02_0: If it means saving Ms shelly, I'll take 'em all on myself.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_mirage_convo03_0: How do you like our chances?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_orion_convo01_02: I'm not sure why you'd think it would be any different from working with a person.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_orion_convo02_03: Yeah.  Seems like a lot of people are scared of you.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_orion_convo03_01: It true you were in The Baxter Society?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_orion_convo03_03: Bet you have a lot of stories.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_synth_convo02_01: Pocket… I don't mean to pry, but if after the ritual you need a place to stay…
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo01_02: Might be a little too heavy for you, Miss.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo02_02: Why do you fight people for free?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo03_02: That sounds rather nice Ivy, thank you.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_viscous_convo01_: You what, she might.  After the ritual, come over to say hi.  I'll make biscuts
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_viscous_convo02_: Hey Viscous.  I'm not organic, why does the cube heal me?
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_wraith_convo02_0: Helping Ms Shelly's never a waste of time.
lines.bebop_match_start_bebop_wraith_convo03_0: If today goes well, I won't have a reason to fight.
lines.bebop_match_start_doorman_bebop_convo01_: That's rather kind of you, thank you.
Well, that's what the patrons are for mate…
lines.bebop_match_start_doorman_bebop_convo02_: So what do you plan on doing once I pull them in?
That kind of defeats the purpose of me pulling them in, right?
This isn't going to go well is it.
lines.bebop_match_start_drifter_bebop_convo01_: You look a little rough around the edges, mate
In that case you should come over to the scrap yard after the ritual.  I'm sure Miss Shelly could help out with dinner.
lines.bebop_match_start_drifter_bebop_convo02_: I'll pull 'em in close to you Drifter
lines.bebop_match_start_drifter_bebop_convo03_: How long are you planning on being in New York?
lines.bebop_match_start_frank_bebop_convo01_02: Miss Shelly is a good woman.
lines.bebop_match_start_frank_bebop_convo01_04: After the ritual I could introduce you to -
lines.bebop_match_start_frank_bebop_convo01_06: No imposition.  I insist.  People like us need to stick together.
lines.bebop_match_start_frank_bebop_convo02_01: I'm sorry you don’t know who made you.
lines.bebop_match_start_frank_bebop_convo02_03: You've been talking to Pocket, haven't you.
lines.bebop_match_start_frank_bebop_convo03_01: I'm not trying to be rude, but how much of you is… original you.  Well not original per se but-
lines.bebop_match_start_punkgoat_bebop_convo01: Shut your mouth Billy.  I'm not in the mood.
lines.bebop_match_start_punkgoat_bebop_convo03: Mate, I got a bloody laser, what's a bat going to do?
lines.bebop_match_start_viper_bebop_convo02_01: Me pulling him in gonna be a problem?
lines.bebop_match_start_viper_bebop_convo03_03: Are you supposed to be in prison?
lines.bebop_match_start_yamato_bebop_convo03_0: Yamato, I don’t particularly care if I disappoint you or not.  I'm here for Ms Shelly.  Not you.
lines.bebop_melee_kill_03: Getting close to me was never gonna work out well for ya…
lines.bebop_melee_kill_04: Nothing like a good ol' fist fight to get the proverbial blood pumping…
lines.bebop_parry_02: You ain't laying another hand on me…
lines.bebop_parry_03: You messed around, and you found out…
lines.bebop_pick_up_gold_02: Now what do we have here
lines.bebop_pick_up_gold_04: Who would leave these lying around…
lines.bebop_pick_up_gold_05: If they're gonna drop it, I'm gonna pick it up…
lines.bebop_revenge_kill: Thought you got the best of me, did ya?
lines.bebop_select_01: My creator needs my help, and I won't let her down.
lines.bebop_select_02: I'll do whatever it takes to save Ms. Shelly.
lines.bebop_select_03: Ms. Shelly's a good person, and probably wouldn't condone me participating in bloodsport for money. I however, am not shackled by human morality, and find it a rather entertaining use of my time.
lines.bebop_select_04: Ms. Shelly's taking a nap, I probably got enough time to contact some god-like creature.
lines.bebop_select_05: People get me all wrong - I'm not interested in violence for violence's sake. I'm interested in violence for money's sake.
lines.bebop_select_06: A little trouble never hurt anyone…
lines.bebop_select_07: The only way this day get's any better is if I get to punch Lash in the face.
lines.bebop_select_08: Ready to start some trouble with me mates.
lines.bebop_select_09: Who wants to play with Ol Bebop?
lines.bebop_select_10: Facing me the last mistake they're gonna make.
lines.bebop_t1_shop_reminder_01: I should check out the store…
lines.bebop_t1_shop_reminder_03: I should pop by the shop
lines.bebop_t2_shop_reminder_01: I can afford some better items
lines.bebop_t2_shop_reminder_03: I wonder what I can afford now…
lines.bebop_t3_shop_reminder_01: I can afford a quality relic
lines.bebop_t3_shop_reminder_02: Might be time to spend these souls…
lines.bebop_t3_shop_reminder_03: I should check out what I can get a the store…
lines.bebop_t4_shop_reminder_01: I can get some top shelf merchandise
lines.bebop_t4_shop_reminder_02: Nothing in the shop I can't afford
lines.bebop_t4_shop_reminder_03: Time to get the best gear out there
lines.bebop_tower_got_denied_01: We're gonna complete the ritual in no time…
lines.bebop_tower_got_denied_05: Another part of the ritual complete…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_01: I'll give 'em a proper send off
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_04: You ever punch a man a city block? Helluva feeling.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_05: I can't wait to throw hands…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_06: Time to get in a scrap
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_07: The ol' left hand won me a lot of purses.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_08: Sometimes you need a laser. Sometimes you just need your fist.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_09: No one hits harder than me.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power1_10: There ain't a man alive I can't send flyin'.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power2_01: If they think they can run away, well, I got a surprise for them…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power2_02: Nothing beats catching some poor bastard unaware…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power2_04: Ready to give the ol metal handshake
lines.bebop_upgrade_power2_07: I'll pull 'em all over the battlefield.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power2_08: I hope I find somone walkin' all by themselves…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power2_09: Me and my mates are bout to pick a fight.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power2_10: Now this is how you start a fight.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_02: Sometimes when I put these on people they're like "oh no what can I do" and it's like: nothing mate, you're gonna blow up.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_03: Is stickin' someone with a bomb they can't remove fair? Of course not, if it was I wouldn't be doin' it.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_04: The only thing that makes this better is sendin' em flying before the bomb goes off.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_05: Another thing humans are bad at: surviving explosions.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_06: I love the looks on their faces.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_07: The inevitable is a helluva thing….
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_08: A gift from me to them…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_09: I love givin' these to people…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power3_10: I got enough of these for everyone…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_01: You'd think shooting people with a giant laser would get old, but no it is always satisfying.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_02: I can't wait to fire this thing.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_03: They'll be minding their own business like "Oh look at me, im not about to be murdered" and then BAM! Hook get's em.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_04: Now THIS is a proper laser.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_05: This'll burn a hole through anyone.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_06: What's not to love about a giant laser.
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_07: Let's see 'em stand against something like this…
lines.bebop_upgrade_power4_09: Now that's how you send a message.
lines.bebop_use_colossus_02: I'll take on all of you
lines.bebop_use_power3_05: You got somethin' on ya, mate…
lines.bebop_use_power3_07: Nothin' you can do now, mate.
lines.bebop_use_power3_09: You can try to run, but it won't help.
lines.bebop_use_power3_10: fraid you got yourself a little problem
lines.bebop_use_power4_07: I'll cut through all of ya!
lines.bebop_use_unstoppable_03: I'm not worried about their abilities…
lines.bebop_ping_astro_on_top_of_garage: Holliday's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_atlas_on_top_of_garage: Abrams's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_bookworm_on_top_of_garage_alt: Paige's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_can_heal_orion: Grey Talon, I can heal you!

lines.bebop_ping_kelvin_on_top_of_garage: Kelvin's on top of the garage!

lines.bebop_ping_nano_on_top_of_garage: Calico's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_no_teamfight: I'm not ready for a team fight
lines.bebop_ping_orion_on_top_of_garage: Grey Talon's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_orion_on_top_of_mid: Grey Talon's on top of mid!
lines.bebop_ping_press_advantage: We need to press the advantage!
lines.bebop_ping_pre_game_01: Don't worry Ms. Shelly, I won't let you down.
lines.bebop_ping_pre_game_02: I for one, am looking forward to proving I'm better than Lash.
lines.bebop_ping_pre_game_03: Stay close to me, I'll be bringing the trouble to us.
lines.bebop_ping_pre_game_04: I wasn't built for fighting, but I'm damn good at it.
lines.bebop_ping_pre_game_05: Ms. Shelly probably wouldn't approve of what I'm about to do… unfortunately for them she's at home resting.
lines.bebop_ping_pre_game_06: I've been waiting for this moment…
lines.bebop_ping_priest_on_top_of_garage: Venator's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_punkgoat_on_top_of_garage: Billy's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_shiv_on_top_of_garage: Shiv's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_synth_on_top_of_garage: Pocket's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_tengu_on_top_of_garage: ivy's on top of the garage!
lines.bebop_ping_use_ability4_07: Got the ol' death ray primed and ready…
lines.bebop_ping_use_ability4_08: Ready to melt some faces off…
lines.bebop_ping_vampirebat_on_top_of_garage: Mina's on top of the garage!

lines.bebop_ping_yamato_on_top_of_garage: Yamato's on top of the garage!
lines.bookworm_be_careful_01: Oh man, I haven't seen my friends in a while…
lines.bookworm_be_careful_02: I need to be careful out here…
lines.bookworm_close_call_04: Whew that was a little too exciting for me
lines.bookworm_close_call_05: I can't believe I survived that!
lines.bookworm_desperation_power1_04: Hope this is the right book…
lines.bookworm_desperation_power3_05: I call on the lady of the lake!
lines.bookworm_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: We need to be careful, they have the rejuv
lines.bookworm_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: Get ready to defend the base, they'll be coming for us.
lines.bookworm_hunt_02: They have to be here somewhere
lines.bookworm_killstreak_high_01: Guys you can't kill me I got plot armor
lines.bookworm_killstreak_high_02: Don't you get it I'm  the protagonist, I always win
lines.bookworm_killstreak_mid_01: So this is what it feels like to be a hero
lines.bookworm_killstreak_mid_02: You guys can give up whenever you want
lines.bookworm_killstreak_start_01: I think I'm getting the hang of this
lines.bookworm_killstreak_start_02: This storyy is starting to get good
lines.bookworm_killstreak_start_03: Can't wait to see how this story plays out
lines.bookworm_killstreak_start_04: I won't let you stop me from summoning the patron
lines.bookworm_killstreak_start_05: I'm gonna complete the ritual, and there is nothing you're gonna do about it
lines.bookworm_kill_anyhero_05: I can't belive I did that…
lines.bookworm_kill_anyhero_10: What have I gotten myself into…
lines.bookworm_kill_astro_02: Man, now that was a cop on the edge…
lines.bookworm_kill_astro_03: I don't think they should trust that lady with a gun…
lines.bookworm_kill_astro_05: I won't let you stop me Holliday
lines.bookworm_kill_atlas_02: I can't believe I stopped the detective
lines.bookworm_kill_atlas_03: I'm not scared of Abrams, or his McGuffin
lines.bookworm_kill_atlas_05: Abrams isn't making it easy for us…
lines.bookworm_kill_bebop_02: Bebop won't be pulling us for a while…
lines.bookworm_kill_bebop_05: Hey, I took out a pit fighter…
lines.bookworm_kill_chrono_01: I bet that lady stole some really good books…
lines.bookworm_kill_chrono_03: They say never judge a book by its cover, but you're running around in a trenchcoat and mask and shooting at people so I think it's pretty safe to make reasonable assumptions.  You look great though.
lines.bookworm_kill_doorman_03: I know you were just doing your job, I'm sorry
lines.bookworm_kill_drifter_03: I'm not going to be another one of your victims
lines.bookworm_kill_drifter_05: I won't let you stalk anyone else!
lines.bookworm_kill_dynamo_01: He seemed nice until he tried to kill me.
lines.bookworm_kill_dynamo_03: He always seemed so polite at the library.
lines.bookworm_kill_forge_02: You know when I woke up today I didn't expect to fighting against the occult industrial complex
lines.bookworm_kill_forge_03: and I thought my brother was a curmudgeon
lines.bookworm_kill_forge_04: I hope Fairfax Industries still plans on donating to the library…
lines.bookworm_kill_forge_05: Those turrets were only going to get you so far McGinnis…
lines.bookworm_kill_frank_03: He was in so much pain…
lines.bookworm_kill_frank_04: I wish I could help him
lines.bookworm_kill_frank_05: I didn't want to fight you Victor
lines.bookworm_kill_ghost_03: Glad to be able to walk away from that one…
lines.bookworm_kill_ghost_05: Geist is out of the picture…
lines.bookworm_kill_gigawatt_01: I won't let my brother end up like you, Seven
lines.bookworm_kill_gigawatt_04: I couldn't let Seven run free
lines.bookworm_kill_haze_01: Oh god, what if the OSIC sends a curator to my dads store…
lines.bookworm_kill_haze_02: Sooo that was a Sandman… that's fine, everythings fine, she won't come back and kill me in my sleep
lines.bookworm_kill_haze_04: That uh… that was an OSIC agent…
lines.bookworm_kill_haze_05: Oh my god I picked a fight with the federal government.
lines.bookworm_kill_high_networth: All that money it still wan't enough to save you.
lines.bookworm_kill_hornet_01: I don't blame her for doing what she's doing, but she needed to be stopped.
lines.bookworm_kill_hornet_04: You didn't give me any choice Vindicta
lines.bookworm_kill_hornet_05: Your story deserved a better ending than this Vindicta…
lines.bookworm_kill_inferno_01: No sir, you will not be lighting my books on fire thank you very much.
lines.bookworm_kill_inferno_02: Glad all my books are intact
lines.bookworm_kill_inferno_04: Why are you doing this Infernus?
lines.bookworm_kill_inferno_05: He'll burn down everything if we don't stop him
lines.bookworm_kill_kelvin_01: I know they say don't meet your heroes and he tried to kill me, but I don't care, Kelvin is great.
lines.bookworm_kill_kelvin_02: He was as impressive as the stories said…
lines.bookworm_kill_kelvin_03: Man, I get to be the antagonist in one of Kelvin's stories
lines.bookworm_kill_kelvin_04: This will make the next book signing a little awkward
lines.bookworm_kill_krill_02: I want to be their friend.
lines.bookworm_kill_krill_03: Yeah you're losing, but at least you have each other and that counts for something
lines.bookworm_kill_krill_05: Moles are a lot less adorable when they're trying to rip you in half…
lines.bookworm_kill_lash_02: That guy sure thought highly of himself…
lines.bookworm_kill_lash_03: He needs to learn to be nicer to people…
lines.bookworm_kill_lash_04: That guy wants to be Heathcliff so bad but at the end of the day he's just a dime store Mr. Collins
lines.bookworm_kill_lash_05: I get why people don't like you Lash.
lines.bookworm_kill_mirage_03: I wish we were fighting on the same side Mirage…
lines.bookworm_kill_mirage_04: I'll find a way to help him later…
lines.bookworm_kill_mirage_05: This probably isn't the right time to ask if I can show him around New York
lines.bookworm_kill_nano_02: I can't stay mad at her, she's got a cat
lines.bookworm_kill_nano_04: I don’t think Calico is going to take that very well…
lines.bookworm_kill_orion_03: I'm sorry about your family Talon, I get it, but I can't let you stop me
lines.bookworm_kill_orion_04: He was like my grandpa if my grandpa was really into shooting people with arrows.
lines.bookworm_kill_priest_01: I thought you were supposed to hunt monsters!
lines.bookworm_kill_priest_05: The last thing I needed in my life was that guy trying to hunt me down
lines.bookworm_kill_punkgoat_01: Why are you angry all the time
lines.bookworm_kill_punkgoat_02: He's like a bootleg version of Bottom from Midsummer
lines.bookworm_kill_punkgoat_03: I wish I could just give him a hug
lines.bookworm_kill_punkgoat_04: It wouldn't kill you to be nicer Billy
lines.bookworm_kill_punkgoat_05: You don't have to be so mean all the time Billy
lines.bookworm_kill_shiv_01: Lash should take notes, that's how you pull off the bad boy thing.
lines.bookworm_kill_shiv_04: I think one of his knives might be stuck in my books
lines.bookworm_kill_shiv_05: Sorry Shiv, that pompadour could only get you so far.
lines.bookworm_kill_synth_02: Sorry Pocket, I didn't have a choice
lines.bookworm_kill_synth_03: I think they wanted to be here less than me…
lines.bookworm_kill_synth_04: Now that right there was someone with a whole lotta feelings.
lines.bookworm_kill_synth_05: Why couldn't they just keep an angsty journal like most people?
lines.bookworm_kill_tengu_02: I can't believe I got to fight The Savior of Spanish Harlem
lines.bookworm_kill_tengu_04: Oh my god, why is Ivy fighting me?  Am I the bad guy?
lines.bookworm_kill_tengu_05: Stay away from me Ivy, I'm not the enemy!
lines.bookworm_kill_vampirebat_02: Why are you so mean to people.
lines.bookworm_kill_vampirebat_03: I think she has self esteem issues
lines.bookworm_kill_vampirebat_05: Glad I didn't end up like her
lines.bookworm_kill_viper_03: I bet she hangs out with Lash.
lines.bookworm_kill_viper_05: I hope I never have to see her again…
lines.bookworm_kill_viscous_02: Viscous, you need to pick better friends
lines.bookworm_kill_viscous_03: They're taking advantage of you Viscous
lines.bookworm_kill_viscous_04: I feel like George to his Lennie.
lines.bookworm_kill_viscous_05: For what it's worth Viscous, I think your cube looked neat.
lines.bookworm_kill_warden_02: That guy was playing for keeps
lines.bookworm_kill_warden_03: Glad I'm walking away from that fight…
lines.bookworm_kill_warden_04: He's going to be back and he'll be looking for retribution
lines.bookworm_kill_warden_05: Can't believe I survived a fight with Warden
lines.bookworm_kill_wraith_02: I can't believe I'm still standing…
lines.bookworm_kill_wraith_04: So… I um… killed a crime lord.  That won't have any repurcisions.
lines.bookworm_kill_wraith_05: Our actions always catch up with us eventually, Wraith
lines.bookworm_kill_yamato_02: That's one less crazy lady with a sword running around…
lines.bookworm_kill_yamato_04: And I thought Wraith was mean…

lines.bookworm_match_start_bookworm_doorman_co: That’s very kind of you to say.
So how long have you worked at The Baroness?
I know that's your job, but what's your name?
What if I called you Brian?
lines.bookworm_match_start_bookworm_frank_conv: You know earlier I made a joke about Byronic heroes but seeing you here makes it less of a joke and more like I made my high school diary come to life.
Ohmigod I can't imagine how many questions you have. "Where did I come from?", "who made me" "who am I made of"
You're a walking mystery novel, and I need to know everything.
Hey, I'm not trying to insert myself into your business - well I guess I kind of am, but I won't be offended if you don't -
I know. You just.  You just look sad, and I know what that feels like.
lines.bookworm_match_start_bookworm_orion_conv: I read a book on the Baxter Society once.
Fascinating.  Your life is amazing Grey Talon.
Of course not, they'd be worried sick.
It is.  I need to do this.
No Talon.  I'm going to protect you.
lines.bookworm_match_start_bookworm_viper_conv: I don't know what that is.
Seriously,  what are you talking about.
I'm not lying to a police officer.
lines.bookworm_match_start_punkgoat_bookworm_c: No one, I like to read.

Sure but you need your breakfast book that gets you going, your coffee book for when you need a little break that you secretly want to be a long break.  You got your main book that you're working on (I'm assuming that’s what you meant by one book at a time),  and then you have your comfort book for when you had a bad day and just want to dissapear on the purple line.
This whole mad at the world schtick.  I bet secretly you have the heart of a poet and just are waiting for the world to be a little kinder.
You think you do, but that's just masking some void in your life.
See that doesn't make any sense because you don't know me.
That's what people say in the first act, but then by the thrid they're best friends.
You know there's a shakespere festival next weekend
He didn't write in middle english but that's a whole nother thing, point is that every one loves Midsumer Nights Dream and you would basically be their king.

lines.chrono_match_start_astro_chrono_convo01_: We're not going to have any problems, right Sheriff?
In that case: Welcome to New York
lines.chrono_match_start_astro_chrono_convo02_: Don't trust the OSIC.  Their goals and your goals are not in alignment.

lines.chrono_match_start_atlas_chrono_convo02_: We've been following your work Detective
We like secrets, and you seem to have a knack for finding them.  But a word of advice:  some things aren't meant to be revealed.  Stop asking questions about us.
lines.chrono_match_start_atlas_chrono_convo03_: With the ritual upon us Paradox has bigger concerns than your nose in our business.  So no.  You have nothing to fear from me.

I can't wait to see it.

You gonna let a little thing like hands stop you?
Suppose so, but I bet there's a solution if you try hard enough
lines.chrono_match_start_chrono_wraith_convo01: At some point they're going to think they escaped us, and then reality is going to hit them.
lines.chrono_match_start_chrono_wraith_convo03: We're securing a few more items of interest; but hopfully the gallery will be open shortly
Blackmail on Fairfax, The Ghent Altarpiece, The Tome of Anubis….
lines.chrono_match_start_drifter_chrono_convo0: I am annoyed.  You don't have anything interesting to steal.
All members of Paradox wear one.
I can just get you a coat.
Don't worry, if they try to run from you I'll bring them back into position.

Lady, we already robbed you.  You're exactly the person to play games with.  If you want the painting back I recommend that you try to find it.  Good luck.
lines.chrono_match_start_ghost_chrono_convo02_: It had a Hellenistic bust of Homer
lines.chrono_match_start_ghost_chrono_convo03_: We're a bunch of bored rich people, of course we brag about what we stole.

What is it worth to you to have your safehouse's location not exposed.
I won't be threatened by you Seven
You have until the end of the ritual to consider your answer.
No, our jobs are based on indivudial interest and challenge.
I would be lying if I didn't say I was curious

Who's to say: we definitely planned on robbing you during the ritual, but my colleague may or may not have broken into your home yet.
Be flattered that you lived a life interesting enough to be robbed by us.

An explorer is just a theif that specializes in stealing from the dead.

If it did would you tell me?
I really thought you'd be more fun.

Don't expect me to carry you if you lag behind.

lines.chrono_upgrade_power4_03: Getting them out of position can make the difference…
lines.chrono_upgrade_power4_04: One well timed swap can change everything…
lines.chrono_upgrade_power4_06: I love using this when they try to run away.
lines.chrono_upgrade_power4_07: They can try to escape… see how that works out for 'em…
lines.chrono_upgrade_power4_08: I'll move 'em all over the battlefield.
lines.chrono_upgrade_power4_09: They'll go where I want them to go.
lines.chrono_upgrade_power4_10: Hope I get to catch someone delivering an urn…
lines.chrono_use_metal_skin_02: They can shoot me all they want…
lines.chrono_use_metal_skin_03: I'm not worried about getting shot
lines.chrono_use_power1_06: Have I got a surprise for them….
lines.chrono_use_tech_purge_03: Those party tricks won't work on me

lines.chrono_ping_pre_game_01: They're not ready for what I've got planned.
lines.chrono_ping_pre_game_02: Paradox is coming for them, and there's nothing they can do about it.
lines.chrono_ping_pre_game_03: I'll put them in their place.

lines.doorman_ally_dynamo_clutch_heal_02: I am in your debt Dynamo
lines.doorman_ally_haze_big_ult_01: I could watch her dance for hours
lines.doorman_ally_haze_big_ult_03: She is a master at her craft
lines.doorman_ally_hornet_far_snipe_02: She took their head clean off
lines.doorman_ally_kelvin_clutch_heal_02: Your aid will not be forgotten
lines.doorman_ally_orion_far_shot_03: They can't hide from you Talon
lines.doorman_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_02: Greytalon was looking out for us
lines.doorman_ally_viscous_clutch_cube_02: It's like the spa at The Baroness
lines.doorman_ally_viscous_clutch_cube_03: The Baroness needs to install a cube
lines.doorman_be_careful_01: Hmm… the enemy can be anywhere
lines.doorman_be_careful_02: I bet they're hiding in walls like the vermin they are
lines.doorman_be_careful_03: Perhaps I'm too far from my allies
lines.doorman_close_call_03: They thought they could actually stop me
lines.doorman_close_call_05: I won't be killed by the likes of them
lines.doorman_congrats_03: You make for a lovely companion
lines.doorman_congrats_05: We compliment each other nicely, don't we…
lines.doorman_desperation_power3_03: I still have time to escape…
lines.doorman_desperation_power3_05: Time to get a little creative
lines.doorman_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_01: Brute force only will get you so far Bebop
lines.doorman_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: I thought you'd make me work for it Bebop…
lines.doorman_enemy_gets_rejuv_01: We need to prepare our defenses
lines.doorman_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: They have the rejuvinator we need to be careful
lines.doorman_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They're going to try to take objectives and we need to be ready
lines.doorman_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_0: You can't run from me Haze
You think you can cloud my mind Haze?
lines.doorman_enemy_inferno_killed_mid_ult_01: Oh that would never do Infernus
lines.doorman_enemy_inferno_killed_mid_ult_02: I can't have you blowing up my friends Infernus
lines.doorman_enemy_krill_grabbed_03: Get this damn mole away from me!
lines.doorman_enemy_tengu_flies_away_03: You can fly Ivy, but I'll still find you
lines.doorman_hunt_01: Now where did they run off to?
lines.doorman_hunt_03: Oh don't run and hide, we were having so much fun together
lines.doorman_killstreak_high_01: I haven't slaughted man like this for years, what a treat.
lines.doorman_killstreak_high_02: Mortals, your pointless lives are about to come to an end
lines.doorman_killstreak_high_03: Don't you fools get it? I am the patron you should worry about angering..
lines.doorman_killstreak_mid_01: I forgot how wonderful it can feel to be feared
lines.doorman_killstreak_mid_02: If you give up now I'll throw in a free nights stay at The Baroness…
lines.doorman_killstreak_mid_03: You're running out of time to not be slaughtered like the lambs you are, just surrender.
lines.doorman_killstreak_start_01: Old habits die hard, I'm afraid.
lines.doorman_killstreak_start_02: I've come this far, I might as well kill them all I suppose…
lines.doorman_killstreak_start_03: So it's to be a day of violence I see.
lines.doorman_killstreak_start_04: Dispensing gratuitous violence is so much easier than I remembered
lines.doorman_killstreak_start_05: In time I will butcher you all
lines.doorman_kill_anyhero_04: It would appear I made a mess…
lines.doorman_kill_anyhero_08: Little children playing at war pose no threat to me
lines.doorman_kill_anyhero_09: They have no idea the deep waters they now find themselves in
lines.doorman_kill_anyhero_10: The fool thought they could stop me
lines.doorman_kill_astro_02: New York does not suit you Holliday…
lines.doorman_kill_astro_03: Go back to the cornfields where you were safe…
lines.doorman_kill_astro_04: No wonder the Troubadour toyed with her, she's no threat…
lines.doorman_kill_atlas_01: Detective Abrams has been put down
lines.doorman_kill_atlas_04: You're out of your element Detective
lines.doorman_kill_atlas_05: You can't punch your way through every problem Abrams
lines.doorman_kill_bebop_02: Bebop is no longer a concern
lines.doorman_kill_bebop_03: Go back to the scrap yard Bebeop
lines.doorman_kill_bebop_04: Tend to Miss Shelly, Bebop… It's safer for you
lines.doorman_kill_bebop_05: Your flesh may be iron, but your heart is too soft for this…
lines.doorman_kill_bookworm_01: Stick to the library my dear
lines.doorman_kill_bookworm_02_alt: Every story has an ending Paige
lines.doorman_kill_bookworm_05: Her taste in books was acutally quite lovely
lines.doorman_kill_chrono_02: The time thief won't be bothering us
lines.doorman_kill_chrono_03: Tsk tsk tsk Paradox when are you going to learn.
lines.doorman_kill_chrono_04: I wouldn't let you take a coaster from The Baroness' lounge, what makes you think I'll let you finish the ritual
lines.doorman_kill_chrono_05: You may be clever Paradox, but in the end you're only human.
lines.doorman_kill_drifter_01: Always a pleasure to see you again drifter
lines.doorman_kill_drifter_02: The Drifter stalks us no more
lines.doorman_kill_drifter_03: This is New York, not some spooky Mardi Gras
lines.doorman_kill_drifter_04: I won't be hunted by the likes of you
lines.doorman_kill_drifter_05: New York is your hunting ground no longer
lines.doorman_kill_dynamo_02: A man of culture met a noble end
lines.doorman_kill_dynamo_04: Professor Dynano isn't a threat anymore
lines.doorman_kill_dynamo_05: You dabble in the void Professor, but it is not enough
lines.doorman_kill_forge_02: I do enjoy your tools of war, McGinnis but they aren't enough
lines.doorman_kill_forge_03: Quaint little machines will never be enough to stop me
lines.doorman_kill_forge_05: You never had a chance McGinnis
lines.doorman_kill_frank_01: Return to obscurituy Victor, it's where you belong
lines.doorman_kill_ghost_01: Better luck next time Lady Geist
lines.doorman_kill_ghost_04: At the end of the day, a queen bee is still merely an insect
lines.doorman_kill_ghost_05: Oathkeepers power is nothing compared to my own
lines.doorman_kill_gigawatt_02: You are miles away from the God you wish you were Seven
lines.doorman_kill_gigawatt_04: And people say Lash is delusional…
lines.doorman_kill_haze_01: The OSIC is not In control here
lines.doorman_kill_haze_02: You've never fought someone like me Haze
lines.doorman_kill_haze_03: Haze, your handlers sent you here to die
lines.doorman_kill_hornet_01: You can't hide from me Vindicta
lines.doorman_kill_hornet_02: Your ambition exceeded your talent Vindicta
lines.doorman_kill_hornet_04: You won't be picking off my friends…
lines.doorman_kill_hornet_05: I will always be able to get to you Vindicta , you are far from untouchable
lines.doorman_kill_inferno_01: I hate fighting a fellow member of the service industry…
lines.doorman_kill_inferno_03: Infernus will forgive me, he understands the way the world works
lines.doorman_kill_inferno_04: I hate that our employers are pitting us against against each other, Infernus
lines.doorman_kill_inferno_05: It wasn't personal Infernus, I hope you understand that
lines.doorman_kill_kelvin_03: Your ice path is adorable but it's not bending space and time
lines.doorman_kill_krill_01: You're strong Maurice, but not strong enough
lines.doorman_kill_krill_02: Well that was one angry mole
lines.doorman_kill_krill_05: I'm glad I surived that fight with both my arms intact…
lines.doorman_kill_lash_03: That's the best you got Lash?
lines.doorman_kill_mirage_01: I'm sorry your stay at The Baroness was cut short
lines.doorman_kill_mirage_02: I do hate killing the guests
lines.doorman_kill_mirage_03: Please give Ambassador Nashala my deepest apologies
lines.doorman_kill_mirage_04: It's rather unfourtunate that things turned out this way Mirage
lines.doorman_kill_nano_02: Ava is welcome to stay at The Baroness as long as she wishes
lines.doorman_kill_nano_03: Ava will belong to The Baroness soon enough
lines.doorman_kill_nano_04: I can't have you assassinating my allies Calico
lines.doorman_kill_nano_05: You took the wrong contract Calico
lines.doorman_kill_orion_02: Your quest for vengence has come to an end Gray Talon
lines.doorman_kill_orion_03: He was too old to be a real threat
lines.doorman_kill_orion_04: I almost pity you old man
lines.doorman_kill_orion_05: All hunts come to an end eventually
lines.doorman_kill_priest_01: Your mission is doomed to fail Venator
lines.doorman_kill_priest_02: Run back to your handlers while you still can
lines.doorman_kill_priest_03: Youv'e never faced someone like me before Cain
lines.doorman_kill_priest_04: I'm not some petty vampire that you can just steak
lines.doorman_kill_punkgoat_02: Billy you make for a perfectly mediocre sacrifice
lines.doorman_kill_punkgoat_05: Well now you have something else to complain about Billy
lines.doorman_kill_shiv_02: Your'e the best the Baxter Society can muster?
lines.doorman_kill_shiv_03: Your knife throwing days are over
lines.doorman_kill_shiv_04: He wasn't a hunter he was a sheep with a shotgun
lines.doorman_kill_synth_02: The child was out of their depth…
lines.doorman_kill_synth_03: Pocket you were doomed the moment you returned to New York
lines.doorman_kill_synth_04: Your father is going to be so disappointed Pocket
lines.doorman_kill_synth_05: We don't need to worry about Pocket for a while
lines.doorman_kill_tengu_01: You have a big heart Ivy, that won't save you here.
lines.doorman_kill_tengu_02: Go home to the Arroyos while you can Ivy
lines.doorman_kill_tengu_03: I'm not some petty crook Ivy, you never had a chance
lines.doorman_kill_vampirebat_03: I can't believes she thinks that she can be Vicount
lines.doorman_kill_vampirebat_04: Vampires and their delusions of grandeur
lines.doorman_kill_viper_03: I dealt with the petty criminal
lines.doorman_kill_viper_04: Viper won't be bothering us for a while
lines.doorman_kill_viscous_02: Back to the Deep with you, Viscous
lines.doorman_kill_warden_01: Your parents wil be sorely disappointed in you.
lines.doorman_kill_warden_02: A failure just like your father
lines.doorman_kill_warden_03: Maybe one day you'll have a son and he'll grow up to be a disapointment just like you
lines.doorman_kill_wraith_01: Wraith, I just want you to know that I still think you're a delight
lines.doorman_kill_wraith_02: She was such a generous tipper too
lines.doorman_kill_wraith_03: The patrons will make enemies of us all, won't they
lines.doorman_kill_wraith_04: You chose to back the wrong Patron, Wraith
lines.doorman_kill_wraith_05: My friendships will certainly be tested today, won't they…
lines.doorman_kill_yamato_03: Perhaps New York does not suit you Yamato
lines.doorman_kill_yamato_04: A wonder people didn’t think you were fit to lead…
lines.doorman_kill_yamato_05: Your brothers sacrifice was in vain…
lines.doorman_last_one_standing_01: A Doorman's job is never done
lines.doorman_last_one_standing_03: I will tend to things until my allies return
lines.doorman_match_start_bookworm_doorman_con: You should host a storytelling event at The Baroness sometime.
The Baroness hosts a wide variety of guests, I'm sure most would be delighted to have you, and the ones that don't will regret their decision later in life.
Yours is a rare gift, only a fool wouldn't delight in it.
Well, I tormented man for so long that serving them still retains it's novel charm.
Don't worry about it, the ritual is about to begin.
It's not, but for my purposes in New York it helps me stay grounded that I am here to serve and not to rule.
lines.doorman_match_start_doorman_bebop_convo0: Bebop, if we surive the ritual please let me treat Miss Shelly to a spa day at The Baroness.
I wish I could offer more for her.
Not the ideal pairing, no, but I'm sure we can make it work.
lines.doorman_match_start_doorman_ghost_convo0: I will lodge your complaint with management
I wouldn't dream of expecting anything from you Lady Geist.
And how is Oathkeeper treating you these days.
You're as charming as ever Lady Geist.
lines.doorman_match_start_doorman_orion_convo0: I'm excited to get a front row seat to you throwing your life away for revenge.
I'm sure your wife will see it the same way.
I forget myself, please accept my apology.
They've been running smoothly since The Baxter Society's intervention.
It is.  There are some sins that not even bottomless mimosas can make up for.
Just the tri-state area I'm afraid, that ghastly business in Macomb pulled a lot of midwest specters.
It's fine.  I imagine today will put things back on track.
lines.doorman_match_start_frank_doorman_convo0: After the ritual you should stop by The Baroness - our house tailor is top notch should any part of you… pop loose.
Oh The Baroness does not discriminate my friend.  I assure you that you will be well taken care of.
lines.doorman_match_start_vampirebat_doorman_c: How are you doing Miss Ha?
Ah, but this one's freshly pressed.
lines.doorman_melee_kill_01: I hope there's not blood on my uniform
lines.doorman_melee_kill_02: Look what you made me do
lines.doorman_melee_kill_03: I can't remember the last time I had to kill someone with my own hands
lines.doorman_near_miss_01: They’ll be more opportunities to kill them…
lines.doorman_near_miss_03: I look forward to meeting them again…
lines.doorman_near_miss_04: Come back when you find your courage, friend
lines.doorman_pick_up_gold_04: No sense in letting this go to waste
lines.doorman_pick_up_gold_05: I'm sure I'll find a way to spend this
lines.doorman_pick_up_rejuv_03: It's time to get back to work
lines.doorman_power4_generic_01: You are of course welcome to stay at The Baroness for as long as you'd like. I do hope you enjoy your visit.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_02: Right now I'm sure your mind is reeling... questioning your very eyes, if not your sanity.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_02_short: I hope you enjoy your stay here...
lines.doorman_power4_generic_03: The hallowed halls of The Baroness welcome all… we do not descrimate. Stay for as long as you'd like.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_04: Time slips away, as does your worry. Well. I suppose your worry is likely mounting as we speak, but eventually it will give way to inevitibility, and from there to the sweet blackness of the void.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_04_short: Such secrets The Baroness can show you...
lines.doorman_power4_generic_05: Your friends are alone, likely dying while you sit here basking the finest luxuries this plane can offer. You can try to save them but why? You're already too late.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_06: Why die on the streets of Manahattan like a common criminal? Die here in The Baroness like a celebrity with creative demons and a substance abuse problem.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_06_short: All you have to do is walk towards that door...
lines.doorman_power4_generic_07: Personally I'm impressed with your will to live. It's futile and pointless, but inspiring. Like watching a colony of ants working to carry a strawberry blissfully unaware of the gardener turning on the hose.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_07_short: The Baroness is always looking for new guests...
lines.doorman_power4_generic_08: Thank you for giving your life at The Baroness Hotel, gratuties are never expected but always appreciated
lines.doorman_power4_generic_08_short: I hope your time at The Baroness is unforgettable
lines.doorman_power4_generic_09: The Patrons have waited centuries to be summoned, they can wait a little longer. Stay. Enjoy the sauna and egyptian cotton sheets. Let the troubles of the world melt away.
lines.doorman_power4_generic_09_short: Please forgive the mess, The Baroness is mid renovation...
lines.doorman_power4_on_astro: I can only imagine the horrors you witnessed in Macomb. Rest Holliday, and put aside your trauma for tomorrow.
lines.doorman_power4_on_astro_short: You failed to stop The Troubadour in Macomb and you'll fail again in New York
lines.doorman_power4_on_atlas: The tome is an impossible burden dectective, why don't you lay your head down, and enjoy the ammeneties that The Baroness can offer.
lines.doorman_power4_on_atlas_short: The tome will pull you down with it Abrams, it is inevitable.
lines.doorman_power4_on_bebop: How much of your time is spent taking care of Miss Shelly, Bebop? The double life you lead must be exhausting. Take some time for yourself, you deserve it.
lines.doorman_power4_on_bebop_short: Know this Bebop: when Miss Shelly dies it will be because of your failure.
lines.doorman_power4_on_bookworm: Patience, you now find yourself the Alice to my Cheshire Cat. So please… indulge in your personal Lewis Carroll fantasy as long as you wish. Such wonderful sights and experiences await you here at The Baroness.
lines.doorman_power4_on_bookworm_short: You're not the hero of your story, you're a footnote in mine.
lines.doorman_power4_on_chrono: I know what your thinking Paradox, sadly, there are no chotchies for you to take as a souvenir from your time at The Baroness, just the memory of an unforgettable experience.
lines.doorman_power4_on_chrono_short: What will the Paradox Council think when you fail in spectacular fashion?
lines.doorman_power4_on_doorman: Reality twists and bends around you. How can this be? Has The Baroness turned on it's loyal servant? Or has a fledging god lost his mind in the face of the Patrons?
lines.doorman_power4_on_drifter: Your heart beats faster as you find yourself in new territory. Slowly but surely realizing that here you are no predator, merely vermin scuttling down the hall. It won't be long before you find yourself feeling something that's elluded you for centuries. Fear.
lines.doorman_power4_on_dynamo: Professor, a little birdy told me that your anniverssary is coming up. How wonderful. I would love to extend the The Baroness' hospitality to you and your wife.
lines.doorman_power4_on_dynamo_short: Professor, be honest with yourself... you're never getting your body back
lines.doorman_power4_on_forge: The pursuit of excellence is a marathon not a sprint. And while you are miles ahead of your competition, you still have miles to go. So please... take this time to rejeuvenate yourself and relax. Fairfax industries will be there tomorrow. You can take some me time today.
lines.doorman_power4_on_forge_short: Your creations are responsible for the deaths of millions McGinnis, you're a monster.
lines.doorman_power4_on_frank: You've looked so hard for answers Victor, yet still they ellude you. It must be exhausting. Take a moment to rest. The mysteries of your past will be there tomorrow.
lines.doorman_power4_on_frank_short: You weren't made for great purpose, you were made on a whim to satisfy some scientists hubris.
lines.doorman_power4_on_ghost: Lady Geist, I have the most wonderful room for two. I'm sure that you and Oathkeeper will be happy at The Baroness.
lines.doorman_power4_on_ghost_short: That ward on your arm won't hold forever Geist... Oathkeeper is coming for you
lines.doorman_power4_on_gigawatt: I'd offer you advice, but I know you wouldn't take it. Good luck in your pursuit Seven, I hope in the end, the price that you paid was worth it.
lines.doorman_power4_on_gigawatt_short: Seven your ambition got you killed once, why haven't you learned your lesson?
lines.doorman_power4_on_haze: The OSIC is lucky to have you, Haze… your commitment to your work is an inspiration but even you deserve some R & R. Why don't you take a PTO day at The Baroness.
lines.doorman_power4_on_haze_short: Keep calling yourself a "Sandman" instead of executioner. Maybe you'll believe it.
lines.doorman_power4_on_hornet: Vindicta, how many lives have you claimed? Do they weigh on you? If so... rest and purge yourself of that nagging sense of guilt. If not, take a moment to revel in the fruits of your labor.
lines.doorman_power4_on_hornet_short: You can't put a bullet through hate Vindicta. Hathorne will win.
lines.doorman_power4_on_inferno: You ruined many lives Infernus, do you really think that saving Hank's bar will make up for the harm you caused?
lines.doorman_power4_on_inferno_short: You thought your put your past behind you, but it will be your undoing.
lines.doorman_power4_on_kelvin: You wrestle with so much guilt… the things you know you did and even more horrifying, the things you forgot. But at The Baroness you don't need to worry about Ettrick or the expedition. Let me lighten the load.
lines.doorman_power4_on_kelvin_short: You pushed away Ettrick for his ambitions, yet remained a slave to your own.
lines.doorman_power4_on_krill_01_short: Maurice, Krill is just dead weight. Kill him.
lines.doorman_power4_on_krill_02_short: Krill, Maurice would be better off if he never met you.
lines.doorman_power4_on_lash: Lash lash lash… you have been such a naughty boy lately. Whatever should I do with you…
lines.doorman_power4_on_lash_short: Oh look: a stevedore will delusions of grandeur.
lines.doorman_power4_on_mirage: Wyoming can wait, Mirage. If your goal is to protect Nashala, there is no safer place in the world than The Baroness.
lines.doorman_power4_on_mirage_short: Wyoming is a pipe dream, Mirage... the Djinn are doomed.
lines.doorman_power4_on_nano: I see you Calico. Your heart is cold, but it is not dead. There is a part of you that has not buried the past... it's not too late to rethink your choices. Stay a while, The Baroness has a way of calming the tempest of the mind.
lines.doorman_power4_on_nano_short: Look on the bright side Calico, when your body rots I'll take care of your cat.
lines.doorman_power4_on_orion: Wesley, you dedicated your life to protecting others but in the end you couldn't protect your son. Or his wife. Or their children. How many moments of their lives did you miss because you were too busy. Becasue you were traveling for work. Because your calling was important and your family would be there when you return. Yes... their lives were stolen; but it was you who robbed them of a father. Well done.
lines.doorman_power4_on_orion_short: Talon...you couldn't save your family, and you can't save yourself.
lines.doorman_power4_on_priest: You know Cain one day you will actually believe the legend you sell to people, and on that day you will die screaming.
lines.doorman_power4_on_priest_short: I know you're prepared to die here, Venator. Which is good. Because you shall.
lines.doorman_power4_on_punkgoat: Normally I would take this time to make you confront your inner demons, but in order to do that you'd have to be a person with some sort of actual passion and drive. But your not. You’re a charicature of outrage. A contrarion who thinks that hating something is the same thing as being interesting. So please leave, you're dreadfully boring.
lines.doorman_power4_on_shiv: You don't belong in the Baxter Society, Shiv. You know this. But there will always be a place for you here at The Baroness.
lines.doorman_power4_on_shiv_short: The Baxter Society will turn on you Shiv... it's only a matter of time.
lines.doorman_power4_on_slork: Fathom, your dreams of conquest are over. The Adversary's grasp of The Deep will not be broken by the likes of you... a forgotten god with no one to worship him.
lines.doorman_power4_on_synth: Arin. Your mother and father love you and would be glad to see you come ho-*laughter* sorry, i tried but i couldn't keep a straight face, you have no home.
lines.doorman_power4_on_synth_short: Why couldn't you have just died like your family wanted? It would have saved us a lot of trouble.
lines.doorman_power4_on_tengu: Ivy, you're a good person and I have no desire to torment you here. Just know this: in 5 years one of the Arroyos is going to die and there is nothing you can do to stop it.
lines.doorman_power4_on_tengu_short: If you're here with me, who's protecting the Arroyo's from Mendoza?
lines.doorman_power4_on_vampirebat: Mina, Mina, Mina. Your future was stolen from you by an assassins bullet and replaced with the promise of eternal youth. We both know how well that's turned out for you. You're a child just learning to play a game that others have spent hundreds of years perfecting... you are destined to fail.
lines.doorman_power4_on_vampirebat_short: You're a noboby Mina. You don't have a chance at becoming Viscount.
lines.doorman_power4_on_viper: I've seen you eye The Baroness as you stumble through Manhattan. Wondering what life could be like if you were the sort of person worthy of it's hospitality... Viper, I'm here to tell you that you are worthy. Just stay. You belong here.
lines.doorman_power4_on_viper_short: Oh why bother taunting you, you're going to die of liver failure anyway.
lines.doorman_power4_on_viscous: I suppose The Baroness is much like "The Cube." A warm refuge where you get to feel the glorious embrace of oblivion.
lines.doorman_power4_on_viscous_short: Humans don't understand the problems of The Deep because they don't care about the problems of The Deep.
lines.doorman_power4_on_warden: What do you want Warden? I can't restore the childhood you were denied, but you can be happy here. All you have to do is choose to stay.
lines.doorman_power4_on_warden_short: You're not a man, you're a war doll fixing mommy and daddy's failures
lines.doorman_power4_on_wraith: You're a gambling woman, right Wraith? I bet you don't have the will to stay here until I'm finished talking... you're probably scoffing at the idea right now, "why would I do that there's nothing to gain", and yet you're curious. Maybe the risk is worth the reward. Maybe there is a carrot at the end of the stick. Even as your life is slowly ebbing from your body you wonder if this is a trick. Some sort of meta commentary that is challenging you, and if you stay the course riches await. They don't. Well, maybe they do and this is part of the trick. Maybe I'm desperate to stall time because I need you to back out before you gain immesurable power. Are you still alive? I can keep talking. You're fun.
lines.doorman_power4_on_wraith_short: Your aspirations are about to come crashing down Wraith. The house always wins.
lines.doorman_power4_on_yamato: Your brother died to save your life Kaori, and what do you have to show for it? A life of exile in a country full of people that can't be bothered to learn your real name and an organization that is a shadow of it's former glory. Just give up Kaori - sorry, I forgot, It's Yamato now.
lines.doorman_power4_on_yamato_short: The only way you'll ever honor your brother is by falling on his sword.
lines.doorman_revenge_kill: I haven't forgotten what you did…
