lines.drifter_ally_vampirebat_killed_in_lane_0: They took out that pathetic excuse for a vampire…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_03: Oathkeeper is calling to me Geist…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_04: How long do you think you can hide from me, child…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_05: Wesley… it's time we finish this…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_06: Why you hiding Shiv… don't wanna say hello to an old friend?
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_07: Come on Sheriff… you didn't come all the way to New York just to hide from monsters…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_08: Lash, come out and die like a man
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_09: Is the big bad sandman trying to hide from me?
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_10: Where you run off to pocket…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_11: Come out and play Venator, don't be scared…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_12: Bet you haven't been this scared in a long while, Vindicta...
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_13: Come on out and face me Ivy,  unless you want me to pay the Arroyo's a visit…
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_14: Seven… don't tell me your scared, I expected so much more from you
lines.drifter_bespoke_ability_line_15: Infernus… you didn’t think you could try to burn me and I'd just let you go, did you?
lines.drifter_desperation_power1_05: You got some fight in ya…
lines.drifter_desperation_power2_02: I got my eye on you…
lines.drifter_desperation_power2_05: You don't think you're gonna win do you…
lines.drifter_desperation_power3_04: I won't stop until they're dead…
lines.drifter_kill_anyhero_05: Love what you do, you never work a day in your life…
lines.drifter_kill_anyhero_06: I could listen to that scream all day
lines.drifter_kill_anyhero_08: This is the best vacation I ever took
lines.drifter_kill_anyhero_09: God I love visiting New York
lines.drifter_kill_astro_01: Don't worry about The Troubador sheriff, worry about me….
lines.drifter_kill_astro_03: I should have given the Troubadour some professional courtesy
lines.drifter_kill_astro_04: Came a long way just to die here Sheriff…
lines.drifter_kill_astro_05: You know, I liked her so much I might pay Macomb a visit later…
lines.drifter_kill_atlas_01: He was big boy, now wasn't he
lines.drifter_kill_atlas_02: Its fun when they're strong like that…
lines.drifter_kill_atlas_03: Oh he put up a good fight…
lines.drifter_kill_atlas_05: I like you detective, you're fun to play with.
lines.drifter_kill_bebop_03: Machines are so less satisfying to kill
lines.drifter_kill_bebop_04: I heard about Miss Shelly bebop, and I can't wait to meet her.
lines.drifter_kill_bookworm_01: THe soft hearted are usually the first to die…
lines.drifter_kill_bookworm_03_alt: You'e not the hero Paige, you're the vicitm.
lines.drifter_kill_bookworm_04: She put up more of a fight than most
lines.drifter_kill_bookworm_05: All she managed to do was prolong her sufferin'….

lines.drifter_kill_chrono_02: I love it when they think they're clever
lines.drifter_kill_chrono_03: Paradox you can do better than that.
lines.drifter_kill_chrono_04: I can't wait to find more of her little friends
lines.drifter_kill_doorman_01: Cute tricks aren't gonna be enough to stop me Doorman.
lines.drifter_kill_doorman_02: Why don't you scurry back to The Baroness, doorman…
lines.drifter_kill_doorman_04: The streets aren't your dominion Doorman, they're mine.
lines.drifter_kill_doorman_05: Stay out of my business Doorman
lines.drifter_kill_dynamo_02: Now what was his wife's name again?  Marla?
lines.drifter_kill_dynamo_03: Don't worry Dynamo, your wife'll be joining you soon enough
lines.drifter_kill_dynamo_04: You're gonna regret angering me professor

lines.drifter_kill_forge_03: Machines were never gonna save you McGinnis
lines.drifter_kill_forge_04: I'll break all her fancy little toys…
lines.drifter_kill_forge_05: Daddy Fairfax ain't gonna happy he lost his favorite toy, is he

lines.drifter_kill_frank_03: He'll sew himself up and be back…
lines.drifter_kill_frank_04: Come back any time Victor, I'll be ready…

lines.drifter_kill_ghost_04: It's over Geist.  Set Oathkeeper free.
lines.drifter_kill_ghost_05: I can't believe someone like her trapped Oathkeeper…

lines.drifter_kill_gigawatt_02: Seven died a lot easier than I expected
lines.drifter_kill_gigawatt_03: That boy still has too much humanity left in him…
lines.drifter_kill_gigawatt_04: You still gotta lot to learn, Seven…
lines.drifter_kill_gigawatt_05: I was expecting so much more from you, Seven

lines.drifter_kill_haze_03: Yeah, the OSIC are really in control…
lines.drifter_kill_haze_04: You'd think the OSIC would have sent their best

lines.drifter_kill_hornet_04: Lady, you need a couple hundred years before your close to my level
lines.drifter_kill_hornet_05: Their sniper isn't a problem anymore

lines.drifter_kill_inferno_03: No one's gonna miss a dead bartender
lines.drifter_kill_inferno_04: Can't have you settin' me on fire, now can I

lines.drifter_kill_kelvin_05: Kelvin, all you managed to do was prolong your suffering
lines.drifter_kill_krill_04: Thought he could burrow away from me…
lines.drifter_kill_krill_05: I love it when they're brave and stupid.
lines.drifter_kill_lash_01: I've killed hundreds of men like you, Lash.
lines.drifter_kill_lash_04: What do I have to fear from a man like him…
lines.drifter_kill_lash_05: Throw your life away Lash, makes no difference to me…
lines.drifter_kill_magician_02: Not as much fun when they're already dead
lines.drifter_kill_mirage_02: Noble men bleed just like any other…
lines.drifter_kill_mirage_03: Thought the Djinn would be more of a threat…
lines.drifter_kill_mirage_04: Whatever Nashala is paying him, it's too much…

lines.drifter_kill_nano_03: Huntin' man aint the same as hunting me…
lines.drifter_kill_nano_05: Wesley could never stop me, and you're no Wesley

lines.drifter_kill_orion_05: I waited a long time to kill you Wesley

lines.drifter_kill_priest_05: God ain't coming to save you Venator

lines.drifter_kill_punkgoat_05: I hate it when they whine…

lines.drifter_kill_shiv_03: The Baxter Society made you soft.
lines.drifter_kill_shiv_04: You're not the man I thought you were, Shiv

lines.drifter_kill_synth_03: The chase had to end eventually…
lines.drifter_kill_synth_04: It ain't your family that you should be worrying about Pocket
lines.drifter_kill_synth_05: You didn’t think you were actually win, did you Pocket?

lines.drifter_kill_tengu_03: Optimisim was only gonna get you so far…
lines.drifter_kill_tengu_04: You've never fought someone like me, Ivy
lines.drifter_kill_vampirebat_01: You're out of your depth, child
lines.drifter_kill_vampirebat_02: Kid like you is never gonna be Viscount
lines.drifter_kill_vampirebat_04: The Vampire Nation is a ponzi scheme Mina, the sooner you realize that the better…
lines.drifter_kill_viper_02: I almost feel bad killing someone so pathetic
lines.drifter_kill_viper_03: No one is going to miss her
lines.drifter_kill_viscous_01: I'm not quite sure what I killed…
lines.drifter_kill_viscous_02: I'll never pretend to understand The Deep
lines.drifter_kill_viscous_03: Flesh isn't supposed to have that texture
lines.drifter_kill_warden_01: All your life was leading up to this moment of failure
lines.drifter_kill_warden_02: You trained a long time just to die here, boy
lines.drifter_kill_warden_03: You were never going to be a hero, Warden… you were always destined to be a martyr
lines.drifter_kill_warden_04: Shame you threw your whole life away
lines.drifter_kill_warden_05: Warden never had a chance against me
lines.drifter_kill_wraith_02: Wraith is too worried about money and not enough about winning
lines.drifter_kill_wraith_03: You're not as good as you think you are Wraith
lines.drifter_kill_wraith_04: She can try to get away but it ain't gonna work
lines.drifter_kill_yamato_04: I ain't scared of someone like you Yamato….
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_astro_convo0: You're looking for The Troubadour, right?
Yeah, you don't wanna find him.
Macomb matters a lot to you, but to him it was just a fun time that will get lost in the ocean of memory.  But if you find him… if he knows he got his hooks in you?  You're going to be his hobby.
Oh I wouldn't want to spoil the surprise, but trust me Sheriff… for your sake.  Let it go.
Tie them down Holliday, and leave the rest to me.
You want 'em dead? Tie 'em down for me.
You spell holliday with one l or two?
I know who's gun that is.  You gonna be able to make him proud?
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_bebop_convo0: Been travelin' a long way to get here…haven't had time to rest up and get a proper meal.
Thanks for giving me something to look forward to Bebop
Well aren't you a thoughtful scrap golem
Counting the days until I'm gone?
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_chrono_convo: What size jacket do you wear?
You got any friends you don't mind go missing?
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_ghost_convo0: I was talking to your arm.
Oh we go back a long ways…
<laughs> Oh today is gonna be fun…
That ward's lookin' like it ain't lasting much longer Geist.
You gotta be scared as hell…
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_haze_convo02: Think you can keep up, Haze?
All business.  That's fine.  I can appreciate directness.  I am going to kill more than you, though.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_haze_convo03: Smile Haze, you're gonna like killing people with me.
Lifes more fun when you accept who you are Haze…
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_hornet_convo: Why limit yourslef to the friends of humanity, there's plenty of people that deserve to die.
Now that’s some ambition I can appreciate.
What's with the rifle, don't like working up close?
I thought I was gonna like you…
Just to get this out of the way, I'm not precious about murder.  If I'm carving someone up and you wanna take the shot I'm not gonna be offended.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_inferno_conv: You got a gleam in your eye Infernus… how long has it been since you really cut loose.
While I do have a song in my heart, I am not.
You friends with every bartnder in Manhattan?
No.  Never met the man, just know him by reputation.
Let's just say I'm glad you're on my side.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_kelvin_convo: Now that is the question, isn't it…
You're lookin a little upset Kelvin.
Careful now, you keep talkin' like that you might hurt my feelings; and no one wants that…
I know it's not necessary, I just like to go above and beyond expectations.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_lash_convo02: Are you that arrogant stevedore everyone's been talking about
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_lash_convo03: Heard you like hurting people, Lash.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_mirage_convo: So how much dirty work do the Djinn have you do?
I see.  So she doesn't trust you.
If you don't like it now, wait till you hear the sounds I make when I'm ripping out your gullet.
Ritual's startin' pretty boy.  We'll finish this later.
If she really did she would have told you to play nice.
What happens if I break that fancy bottle of yours.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_orion_convo0: Wesley, if I was gonna murder your grandkids we both know I woulda tied you down and made you watch.
Oh you're certaily gonna try.  But it ain't gonna be today.  You need me.
The Patrons have a curious sense of humor now don't they.
The silent treatment?  Really?  Don't tell me you're still raw about Oklahoma
What are the boys and girls at the Baxter Society gonna say about us working together.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_tengu_convo0: Well lookie here, "The Savior of Spanish Harlem" herself.
Legends don't get to choose what they're called.
Yes you are.  You know it and you're afraid of it.  Don't be.
I don't care what your name is, you'll be dead long before your relevent in my world.
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_viper_convo0: I don't know if the rest of our team shares your exhuberance.
What, you lookin' to get drinks?
lines.drifter_match_start_drifter_wraith_convo: You like to gamble, right Wraith?
Oh it's gonna be a massacre.
You should be Wraith, otherwise I-
lines.vo.votereveal.drifter: Oh, I'm exactly who you think I am
lines.drifter_upgrade_power1_01: I can't wait to rip their lungs out
lines.drifter_upgrade_power1_02: I love working with my hands…
lines.drifter_upgrade_power1_03: Ready to get up close and personal…
lines.drifter_upgrade_power1_04: The best part of working close is you get to hear every beautiful sound
lines.drifter_upgrade_power1_05: My hands are twitching in anticipation…
lines.drifter_upgrade_power1_06: I'm gonna tear them apart and there aint a damn thing they can do about it
lines.drifter_upgrade_power1_08: Ready to do what I do best
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_01: I'll be behind them in no time…
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_02: I'll get the element of surprise….
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_04: They'll think they're safe, then I'll be right behind 'em
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_05: Once they're marked theres nothing they can do
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_06: I won't be deterred from my purpose
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_07: I'll take whatever I want whenever I want
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_08: Once I set my eyes on someone, there's no shaking me
lines.drifter_upgrade_power2_09: I can't wait to meet the lovely people of New York
lines.drifter_upgrade_power3_02: There's no one I can't track
lines.drifter_upgrade_power3_04: Let them try to run, it won't help
lines.drifter_upgrade_power3_05: I love it when they cower
lines.drifter_upgrade_power3_06: If I find someone on their own god himself couldn't save 'em
lines.drifter_upgrade_power3_07: I'll find them wherever they run to
lines.drifter_upgrade_power3_08: I love the thrill of the hunt
lines.drifter_upgrade_power3_10: The hunters will be on the prowl tonight…
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_01: They're gonna be lost in the wildnerness…
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_02: The darkness will come for them
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_03: First comes the darkness, then comes the terror
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_05: They're gonna hear me whistle, then they're gonna die
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_06: I bring the night with me
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_07: They won't know where to turn
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_08: The walls are gonna close in on them….
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_09: They're gonna feel alone and they're gonna feel scared
lines.drifter_upgrade_power4_10: You gotta let the dread marinate a little
lines.drifter_use_power2_03: Let's see what your insides look like
lines.drifter_use_power4_05: No time to play with my food
lines.drifter_use_power4_08: They can try to fight back, it won't matter

lines.dynamo_ally_forge_clutch_heal_02: Nice to have someone take care of me for a change…
lines.dynamo_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_03: I'm glad he's on our side…
lines.dynamo_ally_haze_big_ult_01: Good lord that woman is a killing machine…
lines.dynamo_ally_haze_big_ult_03: Hate to have to fight her…
lines.dynamo_ally_hornet_far_snipe_03: How did she land that shot?
lines.dynamo_ally_kelvin_clutch_heal_02: Kelvin's keeping me in the fight….
lines.dynamo_ally_orion_far_shot_01: You still have it, don't you Talon…
lines.dynamo_ally_orion_far_shot_02: You're an artist with that bow
lines.dynamo_ally_orion_far_shot_03: You ever want an honorary degree in Archery I can introduce you to people…
lines.dynamo_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_01: I don't know what we'd do without Talon…
lines.dynamo_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_02: Talon, there's a cassarole with your name on it waiting for you when this is over…
lines.dynamo_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_03: Grey Talon's looking out for us…
lines.dynamo_ally_warden_big_ult_03: Now there goes a man with conviction…
lines.dynamo_be_careful_01: I should check in and see how the team is doing…
lines.dynamo_be_careful_02: I don't like being exposed out here…
lines.dynamo_be_careful_03: Well this is going great, I haven't seen an enemy in a while. Yep, haven't seen an enemy in a while… that’s… that's not good is it…
lines.dynamo_close_call_04: Marla would be worried sick if she knew what I was up to…
lines.dynamo_congrats_04: Just glad I was able to help!
lines.dynamo_desperation_power1_01: I'm not going down without a fight
lines.dynamo_desperation_power3_01: I'm not leaving Marla a widow…
lines.dynamo_desperation_power4_03: We have to make this count!
lines.dynamo_end_streak: Glad I put a stop to that…
lines.dynamo_enemy_atlas_unkillable_03: What does it take to stop this man?!
lines.dynamo_enemy_bebop_hooked_02: I'm gonna get punched, aren't I…
lines.dynamo_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_02: You'll have to try harder than that Bebop…
lines.dynamo_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: Tell me we have a plan…
lines.dynamo_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They have the rejuv, be careful…
lines.dynamo_enemy_gigawatt_hide_from_ult_02: Find a place to hide from the storm cloud!
lines.dynamo_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_01: You can't hide from me Haze!
lines.dynamo_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_02: You can run but it won't be enough…
lines.dynamo_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_03: And she thought she could escape us…
lines.dynamo_enemy_hornet_damaged_by_snipe_02: Vindicta's trying to take me out…
lines.dynamo_enemy_hornet_damaged_by_snipe_03: I need to hide from their sniper…
lines.dynamo_enemy_inferno_killed_mid_ult_02: Whew, that could have gone poorly…
lines.dynamo_enemy_shiv_unkillable_03: We need to keep Shiv from healing!
lines.dynamo_killstreak_high_01: I think the class would be impressed. Or terriffied. Probably terrified.
lines.dynamo_killstreak_high_02: No one will stop me from getting my body back!
lines.dynamo_killstreak_high_03: Let's see the provost cut funding now…
lines.dynamo_killstreak_mid_01: I feel like I can do anything!
lines.dynamo_killstreak_mid_03: I am suprisingly good at killing people…
lines.dynamo_killstreak_start_02: Alright I think I'm getting the hang of this…
lines.dynamo_kill_anyhero_05: I'm doing rather well, aren't I…
lines.dynamo_kill_anyhero_08: Just need to keep this up…
lines.dynamo_kill_anyhero_09: I can't let you stop us!
lines.dynamo_kill_astro_05: My friends don't appreciate being dragged around by you…
lines.dynamo_kill_atlas_03: Hope he didn't have any friends on the force…
lines.dynamo_kill_atlas_04: That was a very large man…
lines.dynamo_kill_atlas_05: Can't believe I took down Abrams…
lines.dynamo_kill_chrono_02: Took care of the time theif!
lines.dynamo_kill_chrono_05: She made me work for that…
lines.dynamo_kill_forge_01: McGinnis you are letting a brilliant mind go to waste…
lines.dynamo_kill_forge_04: Never was a fan of the Occult Industrial Complex…
lines.dynamo_kill_forge_05: Did Fairfax put you up to this, McGinnis?
lines.dynamo_kill_ghost_02: The world's a little safer without you in it, Geist…
lines.dynamo_kill_ghost_03: She'll be back, and she'll be pissed…
lines.dynamo_kill_ghost_05: That's one way to deal with the Oathkeeper problem…
lines.dynamo_kill_gigawatt_02: I've never seen power like his…
lines.dynamo_kill_gigawatt_04: He's even more terrifying than I thought…
lines.dynamo_kill_gigawatt_05: Got some breathing room from Seven…
lines.dynamo_kill_haze_01: She's probably going to want revenge isn't she…
lines.dynamo_kill_haze_02: My students will not believe that I took out a Sandman
lines.dynamo_kill_haze_03: And now I've picked a fight with the OSIC… great.
lines.dynamo_kill_haze_06: When I got into education I did not expect to be fighting the us government.
lines.dynamo_kill_hornet_01: For a minute there I thought Marla was going to be a widow…
lines.dynamo_kill_hornet_04: The ends never justify the means Vindicta…
lines.dynamo_kill_hornet_05: You can't change hearts and minds with a bullet Vindicta…
lines.dynamo_kill_inferno_02: Not a fan of being immolated…
lines.dynamo_kill_inferno_03: And that my friends, is how we snuff out a fire.
lines.dynamo_kill_inferno_04: I hope my jacket isn't singed too badly…
lines.dynamo_kill_kelvin_01: Kelvin you are a man after my own heart, and I am so sorry I had to do that…
lines.dynamo_kill_kelvin_02: It's an awkward time to say this Kelvin, but I love your book.
lines.dynamo_kill_kelvin_03: Even when he's fighting you, that guy is just so classy…
lines.dynamo_kill_kelvin_04: Best of luck niext time Kelvin.
lines.dynamo_kill_krill_04: That was one big mole guy.
lines.dynamo_kill_lash_01: A little humility would do you good Lash.
lines.dynamo_kill_lash_03: Pride always comes before the fall Lash.
lines.dynamo_kill_lash_05: Lash: you need to learn to be a little nicer.
lines.dynamo_kill_mirage_04: Mirage is tough to bring down…
lines.dynamo_kill_orion_02: Vengence will only get you so far Grey Talon…
lines.dynamo_kill_orion_04: That could have gone very poorly…
lines.dynamo_kill_shiv_02: I hope the Baxter Society doesn’t take this personally…
lines.dynamo_kill_shiv_03: I admire what the Baxter Society does but I can't let you stop me…
lines.dynamo_kill_shiv_04: Shiv won't be bothering us for a while…
lines.dynamo_kill_shiv_05: a classic example of style over substance…
lines.dynamo_kill_synth_04: They couldn't hide in that case forever…
lines.dynamo_kill_synth_05: You should audit my class sometime, pocket…
lines.dynamo_kill_tengu_02: I'll be sure to give my condolences to Sophia Ivy…
lines.dynamo_kill_tengu_03: I assure you Ivy, your behavior will not impact my grading of Sophia Arroyo.
lines.dynamo_kill_viscous_01: That is something you don't see everyday…
lines.dynamo_kill_viscous_05: Goo washes out of tweed, right?
lines.dynamo_kill_warden_02: Your crusade comes to an end here!
lines.dynamo_kill_wraith_02: One less crime lord to deal with…
lines.dynamo_kill_wraith_03: Didn't expect to deal with a telekenetic mobster today…
lines.dynamo_kill_wrecker_01: The students are not gonna believe me when I talk about my day…
lines.dynamo_kill_wrecker_02: Is this what the future of war looks like?
lines.dynamo_kill_yamato_03: The 7th Moon will never take root in New York…
lines.dynamo_kill_yamato_04: New York has enough crime lords thank you very much…
lines.dynamo_kill_yamato_05: That woman was really invested in stabbing people…
lines.dynamo_last_one_standing_02: Oooooo everyone's dead but me that's bad.
lines.dynamo_last_one_standing_03: OK, just breathe…I'll be fine, what's the worst that could happen, they kill me? Ok that sounds pretty bad….
lines.dynamo_leaving_area_03: I need to step away, good luck
lines.dynamo_match_start_atlas_dynamo_convo01_: Mr. Abrams, if you think this is the first fight I've been in you've never played pinochle in Bristol.
lines.dynamo_match_start_atlas_dynamo_convo02_: Detective, I was about to say the same thing to you.
lines.dynamo_match_start_atlas_dynamo_convo03_: I don't suppose I could take a look at that tome when all of this is over.
lines.dynamo_match_start_bebop_dynamo_convo01_: Oh, I wasn't made - my body just was obliterataed by an astral gate.
Listen, we're both just a couple floating souls in iron bodies I think there's plenty of common ground.
lines.dynamo_match_start_bebop_dynamo_convo02_: Bebop; you are gentleman and I appreciate you.
lines.dynamo_match_start_bebop_dynamo_convo03_: You know you seem remarkably polite for a pit fighter.
Well she should be proud of her son
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_astro_convo01_: I'm glad you're here sheriff, if The Troubadour is in New York - the city is going to need your expertice.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_astro_convo02_: Sheriff I do my best to be percise but sometimes even I miscalutate the area of a blackhole.  If you would be so kind-
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_astro_convo03_: I read about what happened in Macomb.  Absolutely ghoulish.
Understandable.  I just - I just hope you catch whoever's responsible.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_chrono_convo01: So how does time manipulation work?
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_chrono_convo02: I am absolutely fascinated by your organization Paradox
I took Marla to the last pop-up, truly wonderful things to behold.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_chrono_convo03: Can I ask you a question?
Why do keep stealing things?  Don't you have enough?
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_forge_convo01_: I appreciate the offer Ms McGinnis, but hopefully after today your services won't be needed.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_forge_convo02_: Have you ever considered being an adjunct professor?
Good god, you'd be the Lash of acadameia.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_forge_convo03_: Oh no, why do you ask?
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_ghost_convo01_: Not sure what to do with that
I'll see what I can do.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_ghost_convo02_: That binding ward is looking in rough shape
I would have that looked at soon.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_ghost_convo03_: Yes.  And very paitient.  Hopfully after the ritual that patience will be rearded.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_gigawatt_convo: Easy words to say when you've never loved someone.
I am flattered and horrified in equal measure
I'm sure it's a touchy subject, but I simply must know how you stopped your soul from being obliterated
Many things are, but if I let that stop me from trying to learn I wouldn't be.. Well I probably would still have my body.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo01_0: For a moment I thought you said Marla and I got terribly confused.
I'm quite happy in the private sector.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo02_0: So you're in the Sandman Division.
Are there a lot of you?
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo03_0: Once I open the blackhole I'm going to be pretty exposed.
I'm not worried about you capitalizing on the opportunity, I'm worried about dying in the process.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_hornet_convo01: That sound's rather ominous and I'm ok not asking questions
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_hornet_convo02: You know I have a friend in the history department that would be over the moon if he got to meet you
You are not and I am sorry to offend you.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_inferno_convo0: May I ask a favor Infernus?
I was thinking of buying a hat and I would love it if you'd join me at the haberdashery.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_kelvin_convo01: Well, you've been a little busy being dead.
It's great to see you again Kelvin.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_kelvin_convo02: Today wil be a day to remember, my friend.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_kelvin_convo03: Well, I'm hoping my body.  But if not, I've got an eye on some books.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_krill_convo01_: You know what, actually I do think there is someone I can talk to
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_krill_convo02_: Mo. Krill.  If we get our timing down I am confident that we can make their lives a living hell.
And I'll try not to drop a black hole on someone you grabbed.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_krill_convo03_: Gentlemen, you're both well connected individuals right?
My anniversary is coming  up and I was really hoping to get Marla something special.
She's a big reader so I was thinking a rare book.
I would be very excited, then remind you that I have a teacher's salary.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_lash_convo01_0: I'm shocked you know what an adjunct is.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_lash_convo02_0: Don't talk about Marla like that.
And I'm just telling you to respect my wife.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_lash_convo03_0: I believe you mean "The Patron", but to answer your question: give Marla a hug and not let go for about 3 months.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_mirage_convo01: I have wanted to speak to a djinn for quite some time, I imagine they are a facisning people.
It’s a fancy way of saying boring.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_mirage_convo03: What's your favorite part of New York that you've seen?
One of my favoirte places to go think.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_orion_convo02_: It was either that or give into despair, and that's not really an option is it?
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_orion_convo03_: I won't lie - after what happened to my body I decided to stay clear of Astral Gates, but I hear that South Ixia is beautiful.
Maybe when this is over we could takes the wives on a couples trip.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_shiv_convo02_0: If you think academics lack willpower you are sorely mistaken.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_shiv_convo03_0: Stay close to me Shiv, I'll do my best to keep you in the fight
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_synth_convo01_: After the ritual, I don't suppose I could thake a look at that case?
While disapointed, I respect your decision.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_synth_convo02_: These days "friends" might be pushing it, but I'd say he has warm nostaliga for me
He's a complicated man.  There's a difference.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_synth_convo03_: You should have told me you were alive, Arin.
I'm your godfather,  I would have helped you.
Well at least I'm here now.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_tengu_convo01_: That's kind of you to say.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_tengu_convo02_: Ok-ish.  She's a great student, but lately she's been falling asleep in class.  She she says she's been pulling long shifts at her job and it's wearing her out.
Well, if you could talk to her I think it'd do a world of good
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_tengu_convo03_: So Ivy, how long have you been a vigilante.
Well, if we survive and you need a reference, let me know.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_viscous_convo0: Well aren't you a facinating creature…
When the ritual is over I'd love to pick your brain.
Oh!  It's an expression, it means to ask questions.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_wraith_convo01: I couldn't help but overhear one of my students mention that she frequents your establishment.
Indeed they do.  They also don't have fully formed brains, and if I find out you are taking advantage of that I will it take it personally.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_wraith_convo02: Marla and I have been known to make bridge night a little more interesting.
I prefer working with people, not lying to them.
lines.dynamo_match_start_dynamo_wraith_convo03: So yes.  Anyway: a profesional question for you -
In your line of work do people end up dead
Then close enough.  The point is if I hold someone in a black hole are you ok with shooting them.
lines.dynamo_match_start_yamato_dynamo_convo02: I'm going to assume that's a compliment
lines.dynamo_match_start_yamato_dynamo_convo03: Forgive my ignorance Yamato, but is that sword an heirloom?

lines.dynamo_upgrade_power2_19: It's a simple matter of translocation

lines.dynamo_upgrade_power3_02: I'm here to support the team…

lines.dynamo_upgrade_power3_05: People don't need to understand why this works, they just need to be excited that it works…
lines.dynamo_upgrade_power3_06: Who's to say where science ends and magic begins…
lines.dynamo_upgrade_power3_07: I'll support people anyway I can…
lines.dynamo_upgrade_power3_08: I thought my condition a curse, but I've learned how to use it to help people…
lines.dynamo_upgrade_power3_09: I'll help my friends the best I can…
lines.dynamo_upgrade_power3_10: If we don't surive The Ritual, all of this will be for nothing
lines.dynamo_upgrade_power4_01: My team is counting on me.
lines.dynamo_upgrade_power4_03: I won't let the team down…

lines.fencer_killstreak_start_05: You have no idea who you're up against…
lines.fencer_kill_anyhero_03: and they thought they could stop me…
lines.fencer_kill_anyhero_06: I can't afford to get cocky, the ritual is far from over.
lines.fencer_kill_anyhero_07: That was their best?  how sad
lines.fencer_kill_anyhero_08: I'm beginning to see how the rest of the day is going to go…
lines.fencer_kill_anyhero_09: I won't rest until we win…
lines.fencer_kill_anyhero_10: This is but one of many who will fall
lines.fencer_kill_astro_04: She didn't live up to family name.
lines.fencer_kill_astro_05: Her grandfather must be so dissapointed in her
lines.fencer_kill_atlas_01: He forgot where he came from.
lines.fencer_kill_atlas_02: I hate to do that to a fellow Ixian
lines.fencer_kill_atlas_03: Why aren't you standing with me, Brother!
lines.fencer_kill_atlas_04: I take no joy in cutting down one of my own
lines.fencer_kill_atlas_05: He was a titan of a man… a shame he made bad life choices
lines.fencer_kill_bebop_02: I'm too fast for you Bebop
lines.fencer_kill_bebop_03: I'm not some drunk pit fighter Bebop, I'm a real talent
lines.fencer_kill_bebop_04: I don't see why Lash had trouble stopping him…
lines.fencer_kill_bebop_05: What chance did a machine have against me…
lines.fencer_kill_bookworm_01: You seem like a good person Paige, I'm sorry
lines.fencer_kill_bookworm_02: I feel like I was fighting a primary school teacher
lines.fencer_kill_bookworm_03: Paige isn't a threat to us
lines.fencer_kill_bookworm_04: We don't need to worry about paige
lines.fencer_kill_bookworm_05: I'm not loosing to a glorified librarian
lines.fencer_kill_chrono_01: Paradox's antics have come to an end
lines.fencer_kill_chrono_03: She thought she was untouchable… she was wrong
lines.fencer_kill_chrono_04: Paradox, you are all mystique, no talent
lines.fencer_kill_chrono_05: Your nothing more than a vandal that fancies herself a revolutionary
lines.fencer_kill_doorman_02: Well, I'll say this: the man had decorum.
lines.fencer_kill_doorman_03: I took care of the Doorman
lines.fencer_kill_doorman_04: Your tricks are just a novelty Doorman, they'll never be enough to win
lines.fencer_kill_doorman_05: I don't care if he tried to kill me, The Baroness still has the best brunch in Manhattan
lines.fencer_kill_doorman_06: I tipped the man last weekend, and he tries to kill me? No class.
lines.fencer_kill_drifter_01: You should have stuck with human prey, Drifter
lines.fencer_kill_drifter_02: I'm not afraid of you Drifter
lines.fencer_kill_drifter_03: I'm not your victim Drifter… I'm your executioner
lines.fencer_kill_drifter_04: He thought he was in control, didn't he…
lines.fencer_kill_dynamo_02: You deal in theoreticals Professor, but my dominance is reality
lines.fencer_kill_dynamo_04: I'm sure he makes a better teacher than he does a fighter.
lines.fencer_kill_familiar_01: Go back to the petting zoo or wherever you crawled out of…
lines.fencer_kill_familiar_03: I don't know what that thing was, but it's dead
lines.fencer_kill_familiar_04: I know better than to be decived by appearences
lines.fencer_kill_familiar_05: It doesn't matter how cute it looked, it was a threat
lines.fencer_kill_forge_01: A pity you're not on my side McGinnis, my father would be a fan
lines.fencer_kill_forge_02: A brilliant mind… a mediocre combatant
lines.fencer_kill_forge_03: You can't rely on technology to do the work for you, McGinnis
lines.fencer_kill_frank_02: I put him out of his misery…
lines.fencer_kill_frank_04: Don't try getting back up Victor
lines.fencer_kill_ghost_01: I won't be one of your victim's Lady Geist
lines.fencer_kill_ghost_02: Oathkeeper will die with you, Geist
lines.fencer_kill_ghost_03: She got what was coming to her
lines.fencer_kill_gigawatt_01: There are no shortcuts to power, Seven
lines.fencer_kill_gigawatt_02: It was a privilage to stop someone like him.
lines.fencer_kill_gigawatt_03: I'm not scared of you Seven
lines.fencer_kill_gigawatt_04: I won't be intimidated by humans with delusions of grandure
lines.fencer_kill_gigawatt_05: I'm not running from you Seven.  I'm running through you.
lines.fencer_kill_haze_02: I'm more dangerous than I thought
lines.fencer_kill_haze_03: That the best you got, Haze?
lines.fencer_kill_haze_05: She'll be back and I'll need to be ready
lines.fencer_kill_high_networth: You have tools at your disposal but you still don't know how to use them…
lines.fencer_kill_hornet_01: Only a coward kills a man at a distance.
lines.fencer_kill_hornet_03: You're not picking me off Vindicta
lines.fencer_kill_hornet_05: I'm not a dillitante that’s going to stand around to get shot, Vindicta
lines.fencer_kill_inferno_01: You can do better than that Infernus.
lines.fencer_kill_inferno_02: Have some self respect Infernus… stop being a human's hired help
lines.fencer_kill_inferno_03: Your parents should have taught you about your culture.
lines.fencer_kill_inferno_04: Under proper tutalage you could have been somebody, Infernus
lines.fencer_kill_inferno_05: You have so much power and you waste it peddling drinks in a pool hall
lines.fencer_kill_kelvin_01: I've read stories about you Kelvin.  You fell a little short of the legend.
lines.fencer_kill_kelvin_02: Not all adventures have a happy ending Kelvin
lines.fencer_kill_kelvin_03: No one cheats death forever, Kelvin
lines.fencer_kill_kelvin_05: I put kelvin in the ground
lines.fencer_kill_krill_02: Perhaps you should have stayed underground where you belong
lines.fencer_kill_krill_03: Krill, you pretend to be a man of culture but you're just a crook
lines.fencer_kill_lash_01: You couldn't even beat a high school kid Lash… how sad.
lines.fencer_kill_lash_02: This has got to be humiliating for you, doesn't it
lines.fencer_kill_lash_03: Lash.  You're not the best.  I am.
lines.fencer_kill_lash_04: I could take your stupid bear pit title from you any day I want.
lines.fencer_kill_lash_05: Ego wilts in the face of real talent
lines.fencer_kill_magician_02: Parlor tricks were never going to be enough
lines.fencer_kill_magician_03: I won't suffer the indignity of being turned into a rabbit
lines.fencer_kill_magician_04: I'm not worried about someone who's claim to fame involves silk scarves
lines.fencer_kill_mirage_01: My father sends his regards to ambassador Nashala
lines.fencer_kill_mirage_02: This isn't how I was hoping I would meet the ambassador, apologies
lines.fencer_kill_mirage_04: He seemed like a decent guy
lines.fencer_kill_nano_01: Her reputiaiton seems to be overblown
lines.fencer_kill_nano_03: You're not used to fighting someone with talent, are you Calico
lines.fencer_kill_nano_04: Stay away from my family Calico
lines.fencer_kill_nano_05: It was a mistake taking this contract Calico
lines.fencer_kill_necro_01: It's a shame you stood against me Graves
lines.fencer_kill_necro_02: Not all Blackmore students are created equal
lines.fencer_kill_necro_03: She was a decent lab partner
lines.fencer_kill_orion_02: I sent him to his son.
lines.fencer_kill_orion_03: I gave him the death he wanted.
lines.fencer_kill_orion_04: You're a good man Grey Talon, I'm sorry.
lines.fencer_kill_orion_05: It's an honor to fight someone of your pedigree Grey Talon
lines.fencer_kill_priest_03: I won't be hunted like some pathetic vampire
lines.fencer_kill_priest_05: You don't have what it takes to stop me, Father.
lines.fencer_kill_punkgoat_01: You belong in a trash heap, Billy.
lines.fencer_kill_punkgoat_02: It's easy to rage aginst the elite when you have nothing of substance to offer, Billy
lines.fencer_kill_punkgoat_03: Billy… no one will miss you
lines.fencer_kill_punkgoat_05: I couldn't shut him up fast enough…
lines.fencer_kill_shiv_01: I thought he would be more dangerous
lines.fencer_kill_shiv_02: He knows how to use a knife, I'll give him that
lines.fencer_kill_shiv_03: I would think the Baxter Society could afford better teachers
lines.fencer_kill_synth_01: I don't respect anyone who runs from their obligations
lines.fencer_kill_synth_02: Your father is a great man, Pocket… it's a shame you fell so short
lines.fencer_kill_synth_03: Should have hid in that case for longer
lines.fencer_kill_synth_04: You could have had the world at your fingertips Pocket, and you pissed it all away
lines.fencer_kill_synth_05: You can change your name, but you can't change who you are Pocket
lines.fencer_kill_tengu_02: You're a noble woman Ivy, I'm sure we'll meet again.
lines.fencer_kill_tengu_03: She fights with emotion… probably why she lost.
lines.fencer_kill_tengu_04: Who else wants to fall to my blade?
lines.fencer_kill_tengu_05: The Savior of Spanish Harlem herself couldn’t stop me
lines.fencer_kill_unicorn_01: No way she's a real unicorn
lines.fencer_kill_unicorn_03: Go back to working children's birthday parties
lines.fencer_kill_unicorn_04: The unicorn isn't a problem anymore
lines.fencer_kill_vampirebat_01: You always had too high an opinion of yourself, Mina
lines.fencer_kill_vampirebat_03: You're not half as good as you think you are Mina
lines.fencer_kill_vampirebat_04: No love for your alma mater, Mina?
lines.fencer_kill_viper_02: She was a blight on society.
lines.fencer_kill_viper_03: I did this city a favor
lines.fencer_kill_viscous_01: The Deep's issues matter little to Ixia.
lines.fencer_kill_viscous_03: You never had a chance against me, Viscous
lines.fencer_kill_viscous_05: The cube only delays the inevitable
lines.fencer_kill_warden_01: You trained your whole life Warden, and still you fail.  How sad.
lines.fencer_kill_warden_04: You were a worthy opponent Warden
lines.fencer_kill_warden_05: The man had discipline and conviction… it's a shame he didn't fight for us.
lines.fencer_kill_werewolf_02: I just killed a werewolf.  You're welcome.
lines.fencer_kill_werewolf_03: My father would have turned her into a cloak…
lines.fencer_kill_werewolf_05: Silver was all emotion, no skill.
lines.fencer_kill_wraith_01: You pray on people's vice's Wraith - I can't respect that.
lines.fencer_kill_wraith_02: You crave a legitamcy you will never earn Wraith… because at the end of the day you're just a goon with a gun.
lines.fencer_kill_yamato_02: Not all swordsmen are created equal.
lines.fencer_kill_yamato_03: And here I was thinking Yamato would be a challenge
lines.fencer_last_one_standing_03: My team is counting on me - I will not falter
lines.fencer_match_start_familiar_fencer_convo: Why are you carrying a pillow?
This is no place for a child.
Are you the best at anything?
You're not getting a jacket like this, sorry.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_astro_convo01_: I'm the person who's putting his life in the hands of an emotional trainwreck on a suicide mission.
Grey Talon has discipline that you could only dream about.  I'm amazed you haven't accidently fired your gun already.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_astro_convo02_: I'm carrying it because I'm in Macbeth, what do you think.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_gigawatt_convo: I shouldn't be seen with someone like you.
I have a responsibility to my family.
You're the one that escaped Lost Whisper.
Just enough time to wax poetic about brushing me off?
There's no honor in stabbing someone who can't defend themselves.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_haze_convo01_0: I think you covered that with the "Don't expect special treatement"
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_haze_convo02_0: I don't take orders from you.
Then I guess we better win.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_haze_convo03_0: Are you here for the OSIC or yourself?
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_inferno_convo0: Infernus, I want you to know that I'm approachable. I don't expect you to address me by my formal title.
It's nice to fight alongside a fellow Ixian
Have you been here so long that you forgot where you came from?
I've heard what you can do.
You know what I mean.  Why are you working as a bartender?
So they just want to abandon our culture?
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_krill_convo01_: So is the mole your servant?
Then why doesn't he speak for himself.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_necro_convo02_: I notice everything.  Were you sick?
Of course I care.  It's hard for you fight if you have a high fever or food poisoning or whatever.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_necro_convo03_: It's a cultural thing.  You don't have a word in English for someone who wields the power of a governor and a general the way we do in Ixia.
I don't expect you to understand.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_priest_convo01: No.  I'm great now.   I'm just waiting for the world to catch up with the times so I can show it.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_priest_convo02: Men like you call people like me demons, so no.  I don't trust you.
Yeah I definitely don't trust you.
lines.fencer_match_start_fencer_werewolf_convo: You're hilarious.  Are you housebroken too?
Are you good at your job?
Then why can't you afford pants that aren't destroyed.
lines.fencer_match_start_unicorn_fencer_convo0: Of course I'm not.  I'm better than them.
lines.fencer_melee_kill_02: There's a reason I'm a champion
lines.fencer_melee_kill_03: Look on the brightside, you lost to the best
lines.fencer_melee_kill_04: You were cougrageous.  And stupid.  Mostly stupid.
lines.fencer_near_miss_05: Bet they can't wait to tell their friends how they ran from a high school kid
lines.fencer_parry_02: You didn't honestly think that would work, right?
lines.fencer_parry_03: I saw that coming a mile away
lines.fencer_pick_up_gold_03: If they were stupid enough to leave this laying around, so be it
lines.fencer_pick_up_gold_04: I know not to pass up an opportunity
lines.fencer_pick_up_gold_05: I'll take any edge I can get
lines.fencer_pick_up_rejuv_02: Now's our chance to push the advantage
lines.fencer_t1_shop_reminder_01: I can get something at the store
lines.fencer_t1_shop_reminder_03: I should check out the curiosity shoppe
lines.fencer_t2_shop_reminder_02: I wonder what I can buy now
lines.fencer_t2_shop_reminder_03: Might be time to get something
lines.fencer_t3_shop_reminder_01: I can afford a quality relic
lines.fencer_t3_shop_reminder_02: I need to think about what to buy next
lines.fencer_t3_shop_reminder_03: What to buy, what to buy…
lines.fencer_t4_shop_reminder_02: No point in saving more souls
lines.fencer_t4_shop_reminder_03: I need to go shopping when I can
lines.fencer_tower_got_denied_01: Who cares, we took the objective
lines.fencer_tower_got_denied_02: A few souls won't make the difference
lines.fencer_tower_got_denied_03: We did what we came here to do…
lines.fencer_tower_got_denied_04: They can have the souls, we got what we came for
lines.fencer_tower_got_denied_05: We took down the objective, good work
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_01: The sigil of my family will protect me.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_02: A true son of Ixia knows how to defend themselves
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_03: I can't let them trap me in a corner…
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_04: I have a few tricks up my sleeve.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_05: I have fond memories of father teaching me this…
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_06: I won't let them pin me down
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_07: I get to define the engagment, not them
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_08: I can't wait to see the look on their faces
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_09: If they want to stop me, they're going to have to work for it
lines.fencer_upgrade_power1_10: If only this was legal in fencing tournaments…
lines.fencer_upgrade_power2_02: I know how to finish off an opponent.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power2_03: I'll bleed them out, one strike at a time.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power2_04: I'll strike when they least expect it.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power2_05: My blade will dance amongst them.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power2_08: I'll use my speed to my advantage
lines.fencer_upgrade_power2_09: I need to rely on my cunning as well as my strength
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_02: They won't lay a filthy hand on me
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_03: Their frustration is only going to rise.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_04: I'll shake their confidence before I run them through.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_05: Father always said the first step to victory begins with crushing the enemy's hope
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_06: They will try their best, and it won't be enough
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_07: They will learn what it means to fail
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_08: Hard to stop an opponent you can't hit
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_09: This was drilled into me since I was 5.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power3_10: Stopping their attacks is second nature to me
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_01: I'll show them what my tutors taught me.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_03: I will bring glory to my family's name.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_04: I'll be sure to finish them off
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_05: My victory will not be denied
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_06: I'm not going to hold anything back.
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_07: I hope they made peace with their god
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_08: The results will speak for themselves
lines.fencer_upgrade_power4_10: I have no time for second guessing or self doubt… I need to strike true and decisively
lines.fencer_use_ability_refresher_02: Oh I'm just getting warmed up.
lines.fencer_use_colossus_02: I'll take on all of you!
lines.fencer_use_power3_05: You really need to try harder
lines.fencer_use_power3_06: What did you think was going to happen?
lines.fencer_use_power3_07: You actually thought that would work?
lines.fencer_use_power3_09: I really expected more from you
lines.fencer_use_power3_10: I almost feel sorry for them

lines.fencer_ping_pre_game_01: You all are about to bear witness to greatness.
lines.fencer_ping_pre_game_02: I am a proud son of Ixia
lines.fencer_ping_pre_game_03: I've sized up our opponents… we shouldn't be worried.
lines.fencer_ping_pre_game_04: If we work together, victory will be assured
lines.fencer_ping_pre_game_05: Well… time to see what the patron has given me to work with
lines.fencer_ping_pre_game_06: Try not to die before you're useful

lines.forge_be_careful_03: I don't like being exposed here…
lines.forge_close_call_05: They're not paying me enough to die here
lines.forge_desperation_power1_03: This needs to come online quick
lines.forge_end_streak: Thank god we put a stop to that shit…
lines.forge_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: They got the rejuv, be careful!
lines.forge_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: Let's play it smart, they have the rejuv
lines.forge_hunt_01: They gotta be around here some where…
lines.forge_killstreak_high_01: You guys want to keep throwing yourselves on the murder pile that's your business…
lines.forge_killstreak_high_02: Papa Fairfax is giving me a raise after this...
lines.forge_killstreak_mid_01: This just keeps getting better and better
lines.forge_killstreak_mid_02: If you thought I was a problem before, I'm only getting better…
lines.forge_killstreak_mid_03: You gonna fight back or you really gonna let me do this to you all night?
lines.forge_killstreak_start_01: Get used to it, this is gonna be happening all night.
lines.forge_killstreak_start_02: I got enough ammo for the whole team.
lines.forge_killstreak_start_03: If you don't hate my turrets yet you're gonna real soon
lines.forge_killstreak_start_05: After today my rates are definitely goin' up…
lines.forge_kill_anyhero_03: I love it when things work out.
lines.forge_kill_anyhero_04: Barely had to lift a finger
lines.forge_kill_anyhero_08: Won't be seeing them for a while…
lines.forge_kill_atlas_04: God that took a lot of ammo…
lines.forge_kill_bebop_03: You should be used to losing by now Bebop.
lines.forge_kill_bebop_04: I'm not losing to a machine…
lines.forge_kill_bebop_05: The longer this fight goes on the harder its gonna be to stop Bebop…
lines.forge_kill_chrono_01: And you thought you were so clever…
lines.forge_kill_chrono_02: Maybe Paradox will stop trying to raid my lab
lines.forge_kill_chrono_03: Paradox, come at me again and see what happens
lines.forge_kill_dynamo_02: Glad we won't be dealing with a blackhole for a while…
lines.forge_kill_dynamo_04: You're in over your head Dynamo…
lines.forge_kill_ghost_03: That lady gives me the creeps….
lines.forge_kill_gigawatt_01: So yeah, Seven is as scary as people say…
lines.forge_kill_haze_01: Gonna have to be faster than that Haze.
lines.forge_kill_haze_03: You're quick, but not quick enough…
lines.forge_kill_haze_05: Won't have to worry about that assassin for a while…
lines.forge_kill_hornet_03: Vindicta won't be picking us off anytime soon
lines.forge_kill_inferno_03: You're not going to burn my team.

Well, if you ever want an upgrade or something give me a call.

lines.forge_match_start_haze_forge_convo02_04: Honestly, the rest of us were more rattled than he was.  I was just a kid freaking out cause I thought I was going to lose my job, but Fairfax was surprisingly calm.  I don't think he expected Cadenza to last forever, he just wanted to make the most out of an oppurtunity before legislation caught up.  Plus the guy gets to say he created one the United States.
lines.forge_match_start_haze_forge_convo03_01: I'll box 'em in for you Haze

I think I know what I said.

Come on;  it's just you and me - we're the two people that are gonna be keeping everyone alive right?

lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_forge_convo01_02: You'd be surprised what you're capable of when the only other option's death.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_forge_convo01_04: Oh, Johann dragged me to hundred's of those before, it's second nature.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_forge_convo02_01: Ugh, you smell of motor oil and labor.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_forge_convo03_04: Your concerns are as unwanted as they are unneeded.  Watch and learn.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_hornet_convo01_0: Are you ready to summon a god?
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_hornet_convo02_0: That's because I am the belle of the ball.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_hornet_convo03_0: You're going to actually support me and not just fly away, right?
This isn't the time to be smug, both of our futures are at stake.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_inferno_convo01_: I'm assuming there will be a celebration at Jezebel's after we win?
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_inferno_convo02_: Anything I can do to help?
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_inferno_convo03_: At this moment his two favorite hobbies are medicine and being sanctamonious.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_kelvin_convo02_0: I don't need friends, that's what money's for.
Kelvin.  Believe me when I tell you that you have no idea what you're talking about.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_kelvin_convo03_0: Whatever happened to your friend that caused a scene at your fundraiser?  His name was Edward, Edgar, something like that
Well he was rather rude so I say good riddence
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_krill_convo01_01: I can't believe I'm working with an oversized rat.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_krill_convo01_03: Apologies for saying the wrong rodent.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_lash_convo01_04: Whenever I decide to kill you, just remember it's because of this conversation.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_lash_convo02_03: I can't tell if you're delusional or appropiately arrogant.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_lash_convo03_02: We're not friends Lash.  You don't keep my confidence.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_mirage_convo02_0: When the ritual is compete I'd love to have a chat with her.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_mirage_convo03_0: Good help is hard to find, Nashala's lucky to have you.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_orion_convo03_02: Don't be dramatic, the Baxter Society hunts rampaging monsters; not spirits under lock and key.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo01_01: After the ritual would you like to have a drink?
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo01_03: I'm a dangerous woman whether you know me or not.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo01_05: Jezebel's, assuming the barman's not dead.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo01_07: Let's not get ahead of ourselves.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo02_01: How long have you been with the Baxter's society?
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo02_03: Oh great.  I'm paired with a rank ametuer.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo03_03: You managed to make a pompadour look attractive.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_synth_convo01_03: You were of the urchins my foundation paraded around for good press weren't you.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_synth_convo03_01: Who did you rob for that overcoat?
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_synth_convo03_03: That jacket is a Kelsey Evans.  There's no way someone like you could afford it, who did you rob?
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_wraith_convo01_0: Spoken with the conviction only true ignorance can bring.
lines.ghost_match_start_ghost_wraith_convo02_0: That explains it.  How long were on his waitlist?
lines.ghost_match_start_gigawatt_ghost_convo01: What do you know about Oathkeeper.
lines.ghost_match_start_gigawatt_ghost_convo02: I can't believe I'm about to be seen with a criminal
It's the only thing to worry about; if I die I won't have to deal with the shame of associating with you.
lines.ghost_match_start_gigawatt_ghost_convo03: who do you think you are to speak to me like that?
lines.ghost_match_start_haze_ghost_convo02_02: As a general rule I do my best to avoid state sponsored assassins.
lines.ghost_match_start_punkgoat_ghost_convo01: No self respecting man actually wants to be called Billy.
Believe me William, I wish I didn't
lines.ghost_match_start_punkgoat_ghost_convo02: Be as snide as you like, at the end of the day I'll be sleeping in my penthouse and you'll be chewing on a tin can wondering where your life went wrong
impressive.  I'm sure you were spoiled for choice.
lines.ghost_match_start_viper_ghost_convo01_02: Why do you ask, it's not like you could afford them.
lines.ghost_match_start_viper_ghost_convo01_04: Is that supposed to be a threat?
lines.ghost_match_start_viper_ghost_convo01_06: My dear Viper, I can't wait for you to try.
lines.ghost_match_start_viper_ghost_convo02_01: I can't believe I have to work with the likes of you.
lines.ghost_match_start_viper_ghost_convo02_03: What's the point, you're either going to die during the ritual or die in a gutter shortly thereafter.
lines.ghost_match_start_yamato_ghost_convo02_0: Tu parles pas Francais, je parle pas Japonais mais on est quand meme en train de se parler?
lines.ghost_near_miss_03: They'll come back… and then they'll pay.
lines.ghost_pick_up_gold_02: Well what do we have here?
lines.ghost_pick_up_gold_04: Blood money spends as good as any coin
lines.ghost_pick_up_gold_05: Ah, the fruits of my labor…
lines.ghost_pick_up_rejuv_03: And now we make their lives hell
lines.ghost_revenge_kill: And they thought they could escape me…
lines.ghost_t2_shop_reminder_03: I wonder what I can afford
lines.ghost_t3_shop_reminder_01: It's probably time to buy something new
lines.ghost_t3_shop_reminder_02: The money won't help me in my pocket…
lines.ghost_t3_shop_reminder_03: My next purchase could change the battle
lines.ghost_t4_shop_reminder_03: I need to spend these souls…
lines.ghost_tower_got_denied_01: Let the mediocre fight for scraps…
lines.ghost_tower_got_denied_02: We got what we came for…
lines.ghost_tower_got_denied_04: The ritual is one step closer
lines.ghost_tower_got_denied_05: Another part of the ritual complete
lines.ghost_upgrade_power1_06: If I'm to win, I must be willing to use Oathkeeper to his fullest potential…
lines.ghost_upgrade_power1_07: Blood is but one path to power.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power1_10: I may bleed… but they will die.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power2_01: The lives of the weak are meant to sustain the lives of the strong.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power2_04: No one's will is stronger than my own
lines.ghost_upgrade_power2_08: The smart will run, the foolish will die
lines.ghost_upgrade_power2_09: Today I don't have the luxury of mercy
lines.ghost_upgrade_power2_10: Life can only be bought with life.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power3_02: Pain is the price of victory
lines.ghost_upgrade_power3_03: They will be marked, and they will die.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power3_04: I spend life to take life…
lines.ghost_upgrade_power3_05: My power comes at a cost
lines.ghost_upgrade_power3_07: My essence will slice through them
lines.ghost_upgrade_power3_08: I'll show them the strength of my resolve.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power3_09: I will suffer, but they will die
lines.ghost_upgrade_power4_02: When the time is right, they will be brought low.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power4_04: There is no reward without risk
lines.ghost_upgrade_power4_06: Today Oathkeeper receives his payment in spades
lines.ghost_upgrade_power4_07: Their life will sustain my own
lines.ghost_upgrade_power4_08: This can mean the difference between life and death.
lines.ghost_upgrade_power4_09: I'll lure them into my trap…
lines.ghost_upgrade_power4_10: Life is nothing but a resource to be spent wisely.
lines.ghost_use_colossus_02: What do I have to fear from ants
lines.ghost_use_colossus_03: I won't be killed by the likes of you
lines.ghost_use_echo_shard_03: I have more tricks up my emerald sleeve…
lines.ghost_use_power1_08: You won't walk away from this…
lines.ghost_use_power1_09: I paid the price, now die!
lines.ghost_use_power3_03: This is just a taste of what's to come…
lines.ghost_use_power3_06: It starts with a simple cut…
lines.ghost_use_power3_07: From here only misery will follow…
lines.ghost_use_power4_08: You are not in control here.
lines.ghost_use_power4_09: It's not my time to die!

lines.gigawatt_enemy_ghost_kill_fat_ghost_02: You thought you were untouchable Geist… you were wrong

lines.gigawatt_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_: There's no hiding from me Haze!
There was no where to run, Haze
You thought you could hide from me?

lines.gigawatt_enemy_krill_grabbed_01: Get this mole off of me!

lines.gigawatt_killstreak_mid_02: The city will know my brilliance!
lines.gigawatt_killstreak_mid_03: Feel free to hide… it only delays the inevitable.
lines.gigawatt_killstreak_start_02: You will see what true power looks like
lines.gigawatt_killstreak_start_04: Be honored to die at my hand
lines.gigawatt_killstreak_start_05: Walk away from this. It won't get better.
lines.gigawatt_kill_anyhero_03: I'm no stranger to blood on my hands.
lines.gigawatt_kill_anyhero_07: They'll be dead to the last man.

lines.gigawatt_kill_astro_05: Your grandfather would be so dissapointed, Holliday

lines.gigawatt_kill_atlas_05: You were doomed the moment you crossed me Abrams

lines.gigawatt_kill_bebop_03: No robot will ever match my cunning
lines.gigawatt_kill_bebop_05: I'm not losing to a brute like you

lines.gigawatt_kill_bookworm_05: Today will not end well for you, child
lines.gigawatt_kill_chrono_04: Paradox won't be bothering us for a while.
lines.gigawatt_kill_chrono_05: I tire of your games Paradox

lines.gigawatt_kill_doorman_04: This is far from over Doorman
lines.gigawatt_kill_drifter_03: The old must make way for the new
lines.gigawatt_kill_drifter_05: You never should have crossed my path, Drifter

lines.gigawatt_kill_dynamo_02: You don't have the instinct for this Professor.
lines.gigawatt_kill_dynamo_05: Dynamo is no longer a threat.
lines.gigawatt_kill_familiar_02: I almost feel a twinge of guilt.  Fascinating.

lines.gigawatt_kill_fencer_02: I have stained my hands with the blood of kings
lines.gigawatt_kill_fencer_03: Your father will be so dissapointed
lines.gigawatt_kill_fencer_04: You never even considered failure, did you Apollo
lines.gigawatt_kill_forge_01: Your toys are no match for me
lines.gigawatt_kill_forge_02: What chance does a laborer have against perfection
lines.gigawatt_kill_forge_04: You really thought you had a chance, didn't you…
lines.gigawatt_kill_frank_03: You don't know a thing about real suffering Victor
lines.gigawatt_kill_ghost_01: Your unnatural life has come to an end…
lines.gigawatt_kill_ghost_03: I'm not one of your petty sacrifices Geist
lines.gigawatt_kill_ghost_04: You chase power, but I AM power…
lines.gigawatt_kill_ghost_05: The likes of us don’t get the benefit of mercy, Geist
lines.gigawatt_kill_haze_03: The OSIC will never stop me.
lines.gigawatt_kill_haze_04: Haze met the fate of the many that came before her.
lines.gigawatt_kill_haze_05: I won't be stopped! Not by Kelvin, and not by you!
lines.gigawatt_kill_hornet_03: Vindicta won't be a problem anymore
lines.gigawatt_kill_inferno_02: I appreciate your skills Infernus, but it's not enough.
lines.gigawatt_kill_inferno_03: A pity we couldn't work together Infernus…
lines.gigawatt_kill_kelvin_05: It was always going to come down to you and me Kelvin…
lines.gigawatt_kill_krill_01: A pity Krill, I had use for you two…
lines.gigawatt_kill_krill_04: I told you Maurice: Krill is holding you back.
lines.gigawatt_kill_lash_01: His ego is almost as big as Kelvin's…
lines.gigawatt_kill_lash_02: I will beat humility into you Lash.
lines.gigawatt_kill_magician_01: Ah the folly of young love…
lines.gigawatt_kill_magician_02: I’d rather my fate than theirs.
lines.gigawatt_kill_magician_04: Party tricks were never going to stop me
lines.gigawatt_kill_mirage_01: The djinn will always fail because they ask when they should take.
lines.gigawatt_kill_mirage_03: The djinn need to find better pawns
lines.gigawatt_kill_nano_02: Her talent did not match her reputation.
lines.gigawatt_kill_nano_04: The black sheep of the Baxter Society is dead.
lines.gigawatt_kill_nano_05: You need to be more discerning with your contracts Calico
lines.gigawatt_kill_necro_01: You have much to learn, Graves
lines.gigawatt_kill_necro_03: You have no idea who you're dealing with Graves
lines.gigawatt_kill_necro_04: Your mentor has failed you Graves
lines.gigawatt_kill_necro_05: You're not the dead's master… you're their errand girl
lines.gigawatt_kill_orion_01: Just die with dignity old man
lines.gigawatt_kill_orion_02: The hunter has become the prey
lines.gigawatt_kill_priest_01: Today keeps getting better and better.
lines.gigawatt_kill_priest_03: I'm not afraid of you, Venator
lines.gigawatt_kill_priest_04: You've never hunted anyone like me before, Father
lines.gigawatt_kill_priest_05: To suffer is divine, isn't it Venator
lines.gigawatt_kill_shiv_01: Like knives were going to stop me…
lines.gigawatt_kill_shiv_03: Shiv won't be bothering us for a while
lines.gigawatt_kill_synth_01: This is not the place for a child.
lines.gigawatt_kill_tengu_03: Do I look like some petty goon, Ivy?
lines.gigawatt_kill_tengu_04: You've stepped in the deep waters Ivy
lines.gigawatt_kill_unicorn_02: Go back to your little side show
lines.gigawatt_kill_unicorn_04: She has more power than she lets on…
lines.gigawatt_kill_vampirebat_02: You know nothing of real power, Mina
lines.gigawatt_kill_vampirebat_04: It's adorable that you thought you could stop me.
lines.gigawatt_kill_viper_03: I tire of your pratteling Vyper
lines.gigawatt_kill_viscous_04: That goo suit was never going to protect you…
lines.gigawatt_kill_viscous_05: What happens on the surface is none of your concern Viscous.

lines.gigawatt_kill_warden_03: You made a lot of promises you couldn't keep, Warden.
lines.gigawatt_kill_warden_04: You'll never stop The Ritual, Warden
lines.gigawatt_kill_warden_05: Like you ever had a chance at stopping me, Warden…

lines.gigawatt_kill_werewolf_03: I put the wolf out of her misery
lines.gigawatt_kill_werewolf_04: You never had a chance, Silver
lines.gigawatt_kill_werewolf_05: I will never be bound again!
lines.gigawatt_kill_wraith_04: You have plenty of style wraith, just no substance.
lines.gigawatt_kill_wrecker_01: Slink off to whatever plane you come from, worm.
lines.gigawatt_kill_wrecker_02: Your feast comes to an end Wrecker
lines.gigawatt_kill_wrecker_03: You fancy yourself a monster? Amature.
lines.gigawatt_kill_wrecker_04: I showed Wrecker what a real killer looks like
lines.gigawatt_kill_yamato_03: Leave New York while you still can, Yamato
lines.gigawatt_kill_yamato_05: The 7th Moon should never have gotten in my way
lines.gigawatt_last_one_standing_01: Of course it's up to me…
lines.gigawatt_last_one_standing_02: And once again I am the Omega…
lines.gigawatt_last_one_standing_03: I'm not looking to die like the rest of my team.
lines.gigawatt_leaving_area_01: You're on your own for now
lines.gigawatt_leaving_area_02: I'll be back when I can
lines.gigawatt_match_start_atlas_gigawatt_conv: We haven't. But I am fascinated by what you hold.
Don't worry Detective.  I know better.
That tome is pulling you into deep waters Detective, be careful
Yet here I stand. Perhaps you should consider that I know what I'm talking about.
I offended small minded simpleton's with fragile egoes.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_bebop_gigawatt_conv: Your attachment to your charge makes you weak Bebop
I'm sure she's a lovely woman.  The fact remains that if I considered you a threat, I would go through her to get to you.
I'm sure you'll give me no reason to say hello.
My dear scrap golem, I'm not like any man you've ever met in your life.
Bebop, you should be relieved, not suspicious.  Thanks to me your precious Ms Shelly has a chance to live out the rest of her pleasant yet unremarkable life.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_dynamo_gigawatt_con: I don't understand you, professor… you've been bestowed a great gift, and you're willing to throw it all away for nothing.
No.  Easy words to say when you have.
I'm a fan of your work Professor.
Your research into the Astral Gates paved the way for my own.  In my rare moments of doubt, sometimes I even wonder if I would have became the man I am were it not for you.
I mean no disrespect Professor, but some things may be beyond you.
Hm.  Perhaps we're cut from the same cloth.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_familiar_gigawatt_c: I see the Patron looks to test my patience today.
Fine.  Rem.  Listen to me.  If the ritual fails and you are on your own, stay away from anyone who mentions the OSIC.
They will not help you get home.  Trust me.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_fencer_gigawatt_con: No, you have a yoke that you chose to don.
I don't have time to wax poetic about the indignities I suffered.
Once I've rendered them helpless, run them through.
No.  But there is glory in victory.  And victory is all that matters today.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_astro_conv: So you're the sheriff from macomb…
This should prove to be interesting.
Look at you.  So consumed by revenge that you'll even fight alongside me.
Apologies. I would never dream of upsetting you Holliday.
When this is over, if you are determined to throw your life away I will be happy to take it.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_chrono_con: For all the might your organization wields, you waste it on publicity stunts.
I would settle for you explaining it to anyone.
But if I proposed  something… would you consider it?
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_forge_conv: All your brilliance is wasted toiling for Fairfax.
So you're content with being a wage slave?
I think it's safe to say you plateaued
You are a woman who executes pedestrian ideas at the highest level.  That makes you a master crafstman, but far from a visionary.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_ghost_conv: I see you're finally addressing your Oathkeeper problem.
I know that faustian bargins rarely have happy endings.
I think public image is the least of your worries.
Your pursuit of vanity is as pathetic as it is cliché
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_haze_convo: This must eat at you.  Fighting beside me.
We're going to have so much fun together.
Do your superiors know that you're helping me?
I assume 48 hours is a pipe dream.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_hornet_con: Look at us.  Both victims of the state.
I'm grateful to fight beside someone who has shed the albatross of morality.
It will be a pleasure Vindicta.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_inferno_co: All your power and you waste it as a bartender.
The life you had before you put yourself in a muzzle… do you miss it?
What do I have to fear from an inept government?
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_kelvin_con: Then I let you stew on when I'll come to kill you.
Don't worry Kelvin, I won't let you die.
I do.  But if anyone is going to kill you, it's going to be me.
Kelvin: whatever it is you are now is a pale imitation of the man you were.  To mock someone in your state of frailty is beneath me.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_krill_conv: After the ritual, I have some particular needs in regards to new tunnels…
If they weren't I wouldn't have particular needs in regards to new tunnels.
The mole grabs them, then I make them suffer.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_lash_convo: They say you have quite the ego.
Call me that again and I will pop your eyes like grapes.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_mirage_con: It's so nice to work with someone who understands their place.
How do you like working for the djinn
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_orion_conv: Fortunatley for you, that's not the case.
Good luck on your quest for revenge… the small minded deserve to be culled.
That may be the first I've heard that.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_tengu_conv: I mean it.  You saw the world as it was and decided it was not acceptable to you.  That's to be commended.
That being said, if you have an ill timed bout of heroism and try to stop me from reaching my destiny I will make you suffer.
I'm surprised you wanted to team up with me.
Then watch closely Ivy… perhaps you'll learn something.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_gigawatt_viscous_co: Oh god it's talking to me
Once we summon the patron you'll see for yourelf.
So you say you're from The Deep
There's more to you than I expected Viscous.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_necro_gigawatt_conv: Please, stay on the path you're on and you won't live long enough to end up like me.
I'm not invested in your surivial, I just hate to see talent wasted.
No, because mentors only teach what they want you to learn.  They are craven and use the young to live glories they could not achieve on their own.
Of couse not.  She sees potential in you that she's never seen in ages.  You're special.
You're right.  How silly of me.
I don't care how old you are.  If you're compotent you'll survive, if you're not you'll die - either way you're not my concern.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_priest_gigawatt_con: Did your masters at The Vatican send you?  Or are you thinking for yourself for a change.
Please, you're still willing to work with me - I killed a work acquaintence at best.
Aren't you planning on offering me a benediction?
Thought you were in the business of saving souls.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_unicorn_gigawatt_co: You mask your power in a circus sideshow, it's pathetic.
I'm hiding from federal agents, not trying to be queen in a kingdom of misfits.
Don't be hard on yourself, people's morality always crumbles in the face of self interest.
lines.gigawatt_match_start_werewolf_gigawatt_c: Keeping a close eye on me?
How charming.  What are you planning on asking the Patron for, Silver?  A new liver?
How long are you going to squander your talents?
I know the cliché you are all-to keen to wrap yourself in.  You're worse than a petulant teenager… at least they have the excuse that their brains aren't fully formed.
lines.gigawatt_melee_kill_01: You were out matched from the beginning.
lines.gigawatt_melee_kill_02: euck, I got your flith all over me
lines.gigawatt_pick_up_gold_05: The dead have no use for coin.
lines.gigawatt_pick_up_rejuv_03: And now we press our advantage…
lines.gigawatt_revenge_kill: You thought you were better than me?!
lines.gigawatt_storm_cloud_last_standing_01: I don't need a team to kill them all.
lines.gigawatt_t1_shop_reminder_01: I need to remember to upgrade my gear
lines.gigawatt_t2_shop_reminder_01: I need to buy a relic
lines.gigawatt_t2_shop_reminder_02: Maybe I should see what I can buy
lines.gigawatt_t2_shop_reminder_03: Wonder if the store has anything I need
lines.gigawatt_t3_shop_reminder_02: I can get something new at the store
lines.gigawatt_t3_shop_reminder_03: I can't let these souls go to waste
lines.gigawatt_t4_shop_reminder_02: I should pay the curiosity shop a visit…
lines.gigawatt_t4_shop_reminder_03: The right purchase can cement our victory
lines.gigawatt_tower_got_denied_02: The objective was all that mattered.
lines.gigawatt_tower_got_denied_03: We got what we came for.
lines.gigawatt_tower_got_denied_04: Look at them scramble for some dignity…
lines.gigawatt_tower_got_denied_05: The money's irrelevant, the objective is what really mattered.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_01: Such a small thing that can cause so much damage
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_02: This will tear through their ranks.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_03: In time, this will wear down any objective….
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_04: Need to be careful when I'm aiming this…
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_05: One little spark is all it takes…
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_07: If they don't move they'll be dead
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_09: I will show them true power
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power1_10: They will learn to fear me
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power2_01: They will writhe, then they will die.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power2_02: They'll know the end is coming.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power2_03: It's important to let the fear sink in.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power2_04: They know the end is upon them.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power2_05: First I mark the target, then I hunt them down.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power2_07: Once they're marked, their fate is sealed.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power2_10: They have no chance for escape
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power3_01: They won't hide behind the weak.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power3_02: My bullets will seek my enemies.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power3_03: They will cluster for safety…. And it will be their end…
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power3_05: Lightning will ripple through their army
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power3_06: One bullet may lead to many deaths.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power3_07: My lightning will dance amongst them
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power3_09: Some well placed shots are all it takes.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_01: I will stand, and they will die.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_02: Any who stands against me will die.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_04: Either they run, or they die… both work for me.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_05: Only a fool would oppose me
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_06: I've had to scurry like a rat since I was a child… now THEY will be the ones who run.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_07: When the storm comes, they will die.
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_08: Only those who keep their wits about them will survive…
lines.gigawatt_upgrade_power4_10: They would be wise to fear me.
lines.gigawatt_use_power4_03: I'd hide if I were you…
lines.gigawatt_use_power4_07: All who oppose us will die!

lines.gigawatt_ping_pre_game_03: Greatness can be hindered, but it can never be stopped.
lines.gigawatt_ping_pre_game_04: I tire of sulking in the shadows.
lines.gigawatt_ping_pre_game_05: I remain unshackled by limits or fear.
