lines.haze_ally_dynamo_big_blackhole_03: You played your role to perfection Dynamo
lines.haze_ally_hornet_far_snipe_03: They never saw that coming, did they…
lines.haze_ally_krill_grab_mid_enemy_ult_01: Let's keep isolating them one at a time.
lines.haze_ally_krill_grab_mid_enemy_ult_03: We made short work of them, didn't we Krill?
lines.haze_ally_orion_far_shot_02: You're an artist with that bow
lines.haze_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_01: Talon was looking out for us…
lines.haze_ally_punkgoat_killed_in_lane_01: They took out the goat man!
lines.haze_ally_warden_big_ult_02: Now that's a man with conviction
lines.haze_ally_warden_big_ult_03: All that training paid off, Warden
lines.haze_be_careful_03: Just want to make sure that I'm getting the drop on them, and not the other way around….
lines.haze_close_call_04: I'll come back and finish things later…
lines.haze_close_call_05: I'm a soldier; not a martyr.
lines.haze_desperation_power2_05: I need to live, so they may die
lines.haze_end_streak: Your time in the sun has passed.
lines.haze_enemy_astro_lassoed_02: Get this thing off of me!
lines.haze_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: That the best you got Bebop?
lines.haze_enemy_dynamo_charges_02: He's going to drop a blackhole!
lines.haze_enemy_dynamo_charges_03: Look out for the black hole!
lines.haze_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: Be careful, they took the rejuvinator…
lines.haze_enemy_ghost_kill_fat_ghost_01: You'll answer for every soul you took…
lines.haze_enemy_ghost_kill_fat_ghost_02: You're a leech Geist. And your time is over
lines.haze_enemy_ghost_kill_fat_ghost_03: And you thought you were unkillable, didn't you Geist
lines.haze_enemy_hornet_damaged_by_snipe_02: I can't let Vindicta take me out…
lines.haze_enemy_hornet_damaged_by_snipe_03: Alright, maybe Vindicta's a better shot than I thought…
lines.haze_enemy_tengu_flies_away_03: Well done little gargoyle… we'll meet again
lines.haze_hunt_02: Face your death with some courage…
lines.haze_hunt_03: You think you're clever… but you're only delaying the inevitable.
lines.haze_killstreak_high_01: No one among you can stop me.
lines.haze_killstreak_high_02: The sandman comes for you all
lines.haze_killstreak_high_03: There's no escaping death by my hand
lines.haze_killstreak_mid_01: Challenge me and meet the same fate.
lines.haze_killstreak_mid_02: I'll show you what power really looks like
lines.haze_killstreak_mid_03: You've been sanctioned by the OSIC
lines.haze_killstreak_start_02: Just wait until I get going…
lines.haze_killstreak_start_03: This is the beginning of something beautiful
lines.haze_killstreak_start_04: Keep throwing your lives away, I'll be ready
lines.haze_killstreak_start_05: Today there will be a reaping…
lines.haze_kill_astro_01: New York isn't the place for you Holliday.
lines.haze_kill_astro_02: Your grandfather was a legend. You, however, are a disappointment.
lines.haze_kill_astro_03: You're out of your depth Holliday
lines.haze_kill_astro_04: Leave The Troubador to the OSIC
lines.haze_kill_astro_05: The professionals will take it from here Holliday
lines.haze_kill_atlas_02: The detective is no longer a threat.
lines.haze_kill_atlas_05: Not even the tome could save him.
lines.haze_kill_bebop_03: You expected this would be easy, Bebop?
lines.haze_kill_bebop_04: I will never lose to a machine.
lines.haze_kill_bebop_05: You never had a chance against me, Bebop.
lines.haze_kill_bookworm_01: A shame, she would have made a good Curator.
lines.haze_kill_bookworm_02: Stop trying to play hero Paige.
lines.haze_kill_bookworm_04: Let your brother go, Paige… you'll be happier.
lines.haze_kill_bookworm_05: Go home while you still can Paige.
lines.haze_kill_chrono_02: Paradox should know better than to interfere with us.
lines.haze_kill_chrono_04: You're no queen of thieves… you're just another target.
lines.haze_kill_doorman_01: Marlowe is going to want to hear about this.
lines.haze_kill_doorman_02: Looks like the OSIC is going to have to intervene at The Baroness.
lines.haze_kill_doorman_04: I don't want to know what that guy dreams about.
lines.haze_kill_doorman_05: It's a good thing that I was here.
lines.haze_kill_drifter_02: New York isn't your hunting ground anymore.
lines.haze_kill_drifter_04: Looks like the Viscount is going to owe the OSIC a favor.
lines.haze_kill_drifter_05: That should make the office happy.
lines.haze_kill_dynamo_02: I don't take pleasure in this Dynamo.
lines.haze_kill_dynamo_03: We don’t need to worry about the professor for a while
lines.haze_kill_dynamo_04: Looks like Dynamo needs a new body…
lines.haze_kill_dynamo_05: Stay out of my way Professor
lines.haze_kill_familiar_02: I'm sorry I couldn't protect you.
lines.haze_kill_fencer_01: Washington is going to be thrilled.
lines.haze_kill_fencer_02: This is gonna be tough to explain to Marlowe.
lines.haze_kill_fencer_03: Wonder who we're going to frame for this?
lines.haze_kill_forge_02: Only a coward hides behinds machines
lines.haze_kill_forge_04: McGinnis: you had your chance to make the right choice.
lines.haze_kill_forge_05: Today you reap what you sowed, McGinnis
lines.haze_kill_frank_03: Self pity doesn't suit you, Victor.
lines.haze_kill_ghost_02: Geist and her shackled spectre will be back
lines.haze_kill_ghost_04: Getting on our radar was a mistake Geist
lines.haze_kill_ghost_05: Geist is no longer an issue
lines.haze_kill_gigawatt_02: I've had my eye on Seven for a while
lines.haze_kill_gigawatt_03: I'll tell you a secret Seven… I've dreamed of this moment.
lines.haze_kill_gigawatt_04: You hid yourself from me for the last time
lines.haze_kill_gigawatt_05: Your nightmare has come to an end
lines.haze_kill_hornet_03: She wasn't an avenger, she was a domestic terrorist.
lines.haze_kill_inferno_02: I won't let you burn down this city
lines.haze_kill_inferno_03: You should have stayed retired, Infernus
lines.haze_kill_inferno_04: Leaving that bar was the last mistake you'd ever make
lines.haze_kill_kelvin_01: Respect to you, Kelvin. You put up a fight.
lines.haze_kill_kelvin_02: You're well trained. But not trained enough.
lines.haze_kill_kelvin_04: It's adorable that you thought that dome of yours would stop me.
lines.haze_kill_kelvin_05: There's no running from me, Kelvin.
lines.haze_kill_krill_04: Hope you dug yourself a grave.
lines.haze_kill_lash_03: It's about time you met a real warrior.
lines.haze_kill_lash_04: All your little tricks weren't enough to stop me.
lines.haze_kill_lash_05: You got what you deserved Lash.
lines.haze_kill_magician_03: Don't stand in the OSIC's way.
lines.haze_kill_magician_05: This isn't the place for you, Sinclair.
lines.haze_kill_mirage_01: How dare the djinn try to circumvent official channels!
lines.haze_kill_mirage_02: I know what you're up to Mirage
lines.haze_kill_mirage_03: This isn't the way for the djinn to get what they want
lines.haze_kill_mirage_04: You're impressive Mirage, but you're not better than me.
lines.haze_kill_nano_02: We have nothing to fear from Calico
lines.haze_kill_nano_03: Calico could only evade me for so long
lines.haze_kill_nano_05: That woman died as she lived…
lines.haze_kill_necro_04: We really need a law about not raising the dead until you're 21.
lines.haze_kill_necro_05: Looks like someone forgot what they learned in the S.C.A.R.E program.
lines.haze_kill_orion_04: You got a warrior's death Wesley.
lines.haze_kill_priest_02: You picked the wrong side Father.
lines.haze_kill_priest_03: A shame, the other venetors I met were more reasonable.
lines.haze_kill_priest_04: You can't help but admire his commitment.
lines.haze_kill_priest_05: Go back to Europe Father, the OSIC has it from here.
lines.haze_kill_punkgoat_01: Yelling about something is different than fighting for something, isn't it Billy?
lines.haze_kill_punkgoat_05: You wanted the OSIC's attention Billy? You have it.
lines.haze_kill_shiv_01: With proper training you could be so much more, Shiv.
lines.haze_kill_shiv_02: Your knife skills need some work.
lines.haze_kill_shiv_03: You were never going to beat me.
lines.haze_kill_shiv_04: And he thought he knew how to use a knife…
lines.haze_kill_tengu_03: I wish I didn't have to do that
lines.haze_kill_tengu_04: You didn't give me another choice Ivy
lines.haze_kill_unicorn_01: That's enough whimsy for one day
lines.haze_kill_unicorn_04: The OSIC is gonna want an autopsy.
lines.haze_kill_vampirebat_03: You have a lot to learn, Mina.
lines.haze_kill_vampirebat_04: Looks like the Viscount is going to owe us some favors.
lines.haze_kill_vampirebat_05: You're not in charge Mina, we are.
lines.haze_kill_viper_01: She should have stayed in jail and saved us all some time.
lines.haze_kill_viper_02: You'll never be better than me, Viper
lines.haze_kill_viper_04: Normally cretains like her are beneath my paygrade.
lines.haze_kill_viper_05: Viper, you didn’t have a chance in hell.
lines.haze_kill_viscous_01: What chance did you have Viscous…
lines.haze_kill_viscous_02: That cube was never going to save you.
lines.haze_kill_viscous_03: All you could do was try to delay the inevitable
lines.haze_kill_viscous_04: Turns out bullets kill goo just fine.
lines.haze_kill_viscous_05: To think; the OSIC was worried about your kind…
lines.haze_kill_warden_01: Vigilante's are just criminals with delusions of grandeur
lines.haze_kill_warden_02: New York doesn't need you warden. I'm here.
lines.haze_kill_warden_04: And you thought you could impose your will on me…
lines.haze_kill_warden_05: You're strong Warden. I'm just stronger.
lines.haze_kill_wraith_02: How long did you think you'd escape the OSIC's notice, Wraith?
lines.haze_kill_wraith_04: You're good. Just not good enough.
lines.haze_kill_yamato_01: Yamato, the 7th Moon's time is at an end
lines.haze_kill_yamato_02: It's time for the 7th Moon to leave New York
lines.haze_kill_yamato_03: It was always going to lead to this, Yamato.
lines.haze_kill_yamato_04: You couldn't hide from me forever Yamato
lines.haze_last_one_standing_01: And so it falls on me
lines.haze_last_one_standing_02: I need to keep my focus
lines.haze_last_one_standing_03: I need to buy my allies time
lines.haze_leaving_area_01: You're on your own for now.
lines.haze_leaving_area_03: I have other work to tend to.
lines.haze_match_start_atlas_haze_convo01_04: Stay focused on the task at hand.
lines.haze_match_start_atlas_haze_convo02_01: You should consider working for the OSIC
lines.haze_match_start_atlas_haze_convo02_03: We do.  We don't have enough guys who care what doors are getting kicked down.
lines.haze_match_start_atlas_haze_convo03_02: You may not see me detective, but I promise you: I'm doing my part.
lines.haze_match_start_bebop_haze_convo02_01: You're loyal to your creator Bebop, it's an admirable quality.
lines.haze_match_start_bebop_haze_convo03_02: Of course not.  We fight monsters, not act like them.
lines.haze_match_start_bebop_haze_convo03_04: That was more of a royal "we".
lines.haze_match_start_drifter_haze_convo01_02: No we're using you.  If we were coming for you you'd already be dead.
lines.haze_match_start_drifter_haze_convo02_02: I'm not getting in some schoolyard challenge with you.
lines.haze_match_start_drifter_haze_convo03_02: Being good at something and liking something are two different things.
lines.haze_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo01_01: Marlowe wanted me to tell you that the offer still stands.
lines.haze_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo01_05: You change your mind let me know.
lines.haze_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo02_04: Enough that we call ourselves a divison.
lines.haze_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo03_02: Don't worry professor, I'll do what I can to capitalize on the opportunity.
lines.haze_match_start_dynamo_haze_convo03_04: Your surival may not be a top priority, but it is still a priority.
lines.haze_match_start_familiar_haze_convo02_0: I'm going to get you home.
lines.haze_match_start_familiar_haze_convo03_0: You're fine Rem.  It's… it was nice to see you.
lines.haze_match_start_fencer_haze_convo01_03: I don't care who you are.
lines.haze_match_start_fencer_haze_convo02_03: If you die there's going to be an international incident.
lines.haze_match_start_fencer_haze_convo02_05: Us winning and you dying aren't mutually exclusive.
lines.haze_match_start_fencer_haze_convo03_02: Either you're asking me to tell you classified information or to bare my soul to a teenager.  I'm not sure which one is more absurd.
lines.haze_match_start_frank_haze_convo01_01: Can I ask you a personal question.
lines.haze_match_start_frank_haze_convo01_07: Are they yours?  Or do you think they belong to parts of you.
lines.haze_match_start_frank_haze_convo02_01: So you find out where you came from, what comes next.
lines.haze_match_start_frank_haze_convo02_05: I'm biased, but I think you should consider the OSIC.
lines.haze_match_start_frank_haze_convo03_05: Are you kidding me?  There's a mountain of things you can do to prepare.  Drills, research, streaching… and that's not even dipping our toes in divination and fortu-
lines.haze_match_start_gigawatt_haze_convo03_0: After we summon the patron, how long do you want to wait before we turn on each other?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_astro_convo01_01: I've read your file Sheriff.  You seem compotent.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_astro_convo01_03: We're the OSIC of course there's a file.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_astro_convo02_01: You don't have any issues working with the OSIC do you?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_astro_convo02_03: Don't worry sheriff.  I think our partnership will be good for everyone…
lines.haze_match_start_haze_astro_convo03_01: Do you have a plan Sheriff?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_chrono_convo02_01: Are you're one who stole  Booth's Derringer?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_chrono_convo03_02: That's because I don't trust you.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_forge_convo01_02: No, I think they'll open a permanet office.  With all the activity going on I'm shocked they haven't sooner.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_forge_convo01_04: I'll go wherever they need me.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_forge_convo02_01: Were you working for FI when the whole Cadenza situation was going down?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_forge_convo02_05: when you're someone who cares about legacy as much as he does, that's probably more valuable than money.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_forge_convo03_02: Just make sure you don't box me out.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_ghost_convo01_01: The Oathkeeper issue needs to be resolved Lady Geist.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_ghost_convo01_03: Good.  If it's not the OSIC will have to intervene.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_ghost_convo02_03: Assassins work in the private sector. When you're federally employeed you're called an asset.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_ghost_convo03_01: Don't worry Lady Geist, I'm not here for you today.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_hornet_convo01_01: Are you interested in joining the OSIC?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_hornet_convo02_04: I'm not a zealot.  The OSIC isn't perfect, and neither is the world.  You of all people should understand that the ends justify the means.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_hornet_convo03_01: I'd quit while I was ahead.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_hornet_convo03_03: I'd quit while I was ahead.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_hornet_convo03_05: Your war with the Friends of Humanity.  Martyring John Hathorne will galvanize them.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_hornet_convo03_07: And the one after that? And the one after that?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_inferno_convo01_01: Those guardians won't be standing for long.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_inferno_convo02_01: I would think a bartender would be a little more nervous.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_inferno_convo03_02: That might be the first time somone asked me if I had friends.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_inferno_convo03_06: "Friend" would be pushing it, but I know someone.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_inferno_convo03_08: If the ritual goes bad, why would I want to?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo01_04: Nightmares are easy.  There's enough commonality in what people are afraid of… What's scary is what people dream for.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo02_01: The OSIC have questions about your condition.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo02_03: It's the federal government, why not both.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo02_05: What you do with your time while I'm filing reports is entirely up to you.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo03_02: Today your dome isnt for healing.  It's to trap enemies inside with me.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_krill_convo02_02: Once I put them to sleep it will be easy for momo to grab them.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_krill_convo03_02: You want me to spoil the surprise?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_lash_convo01_02: This is gonna be a long day.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_lash_convo01_04: Well you haven't been shot yet, but there's still time.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_lash_convo02_04: Does he die at the end?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_mirage_convo01_02: I'm not a politician Mirage, my approval will neither help nor hinder the Djinn's chances of buying Wyoming.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_mirage_convo02_01: It's nice to get to work with someone else with discipline.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_mirage_convo03_02: You're talking about buying a state.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_orion_convo02_01: Not the best circumstances for a reunion.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_orion_convo03_01: So you're back with the Baxter Society?
lines.haze_match_start_haze_tengu_convo01_01: You did good things for the city, you should feel proud.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_tengu_convo01_03: No they wouldn't.  That's why it took you to do it.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_tengu_convo02_06: Of course not.  But it means the bad days would stay with you.  And in our line of work you can't let it.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_tengu_convo03_02: Assassination is rarely a team sport.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_viscous_convo01_01: Viscous, after the ritual I need you to tell me about The Adversary.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_viscous_convo01_03: Yes, but there may be others… and the OSIC needs to be prepared.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_viscous_convo03_02: We don't live in a vaccum.  If there's a problem in The Deep it's only a matter of time before it's a problem on land.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_wraith_convo01_02: The OSIC isn't concerned with your little casino, Wraith.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_wraith_convo02_03: I thought you were some big gambler.
lines.haze_match_start_haze_wraith_convo03_01: Between the two of us we should make short work of them.
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo01_01: I need you to speak with a Curator after the ritual
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo01_03: Are you really asking me that?
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo01_05: Then it shouldn't be a problem.
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo02_01: Have you started thinking about your future?
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo02_03: The OSIC could use someone like you.
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo02_05: And I'm not interested in you being one.  But we have multiple divisions… and I think you might like being a Medium
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo02_07: Think about it.  You can give me a call later
lines.haze_match_start_necro_haze_convo03_02: Curator's care about things, Sandmen care about people.  So until you become a threat to national security you're not my problem.
lines.haze_match_start_priest_haze_convo01_01: I think I work with a friend of yours.
lines.haze_match_start_priest_haze_convo02_04: I appreciate the importance of being thorough .
lines.haze_match_start_unicorn_haze_convo01_04: I don't usually get compliments on the uniform.
lines.haze_match_start_unicorn_haze_convo02_02: I see enough knife throwing in my 9 to 5.
lines.haze_match_start_viper_haze_convo01_02: The Federal Government doesn't know you exist; they're not going to send a Sandman for you.
lines.haze_match_start_viper_haze_convo03_02: You want to work for the OSIC.
lines.haze_match_start_werewolf_haze_convo02_0: I'm not trying to take your paycheck, Silver. I just want them dead. Feel free to take all of the credit.
lines.haze_match_start_werewolf_haze_convo03_0: Probably means you're living your life right.
You probably shouldn't tell me that.
lines.haze_match_start_yamato_haze_convo01_02: I don't take orders from the 7th Moon.
lines.haze_match_start_yamato_haze_convo02_01: We're going to win today Yamato.  And when we do you'll use the patrons to make the 7th Moon strong.  But know this: we're watching you.
lines.haze_match_start_yamato_haze_convo02_03: If you step out of line you will.
lines.haze_match_start_yamato_haze_convo03_02: Right now your operation is small enough that the OSIC wouldn't waste allocating resources on you.
lines.haze_match_start_yamato_haze_convo03_04: Well, if it gets big enough it stops being a gang and starts being a cartel.  That's usually when my superiors start thinking about having me kill you in your sleep.
lines.haze_melee_kill_01: You were a fool to get close to me.
lines.haze_melee_kill_02: I don’t need my guns to kill you…
lines.haze_melee_kill_03: You should have tried to parry.
lines.haze_near_miss_02: I'll have another chance to take them out
lines.haze_near_miss_03: I didn't think they were smart enough to run.
lines.haze_near_miss_05: Judgement will come for them later.
lines.haze_parry_01: You think I'm not trained in hand to hand combat?
lines.haze_parry_02: You'll need to try harder than that.
lines.haze_pick_up_gold_02: This will help fund the work…
lines.haze_pick_up_gold_04: I'd be a fool to leave this behind.
lines.haze_pick_up_gold_05: I'll take every opportunity I can for an edge…
lines.haze_pick_up_rejuv_03: Now's our chance to push the advantage
lines.haze_revenge_kill: You had your fun, now it's time to pay.
lines.haze_t1_shop_reminder_01: Time to buy some tools of the trade
lines.haze_t2_shop_reminder_01: Might want to get a new item….
lines.haze_t2_shop_reminder_02: There's some decent gear I can buy
lines.haze_t2_shop_reminder_03: The more tools I have the better
lines.haze_t3_shop_reminder_01: I can buy some impressive gear
lines.haze_t3_shop_reminder_02: Might be time to visit the store…
lines.haze_t3_shop_reminder_03: I should see what relics I can afford…
lines.haze_t4_shop_reminder_01: I can afford anything in the store
lines.haze_t4_shop_reminder_02: Souls do me no good if I don't spend them
lines.haze_t4_shop_reminder_03: I can get the finest tools of the trade
lines.haze_tower_got_denied_02: The ritual is closer to completion
lines.haze_tower_got_denied_04: We got what we came for
lines.haze_tower_got_denied_05: We won't stop until we're victorious…
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_01: They will sleep and they will die.
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_02: Death will come for them as they sleep.
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_03: No one can resist my will.
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_05: They will know what it feels to be helpless…
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_06: I will bring down the mightiest warrior….
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_07: Even the mighty need to sleep.
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_09: With coordination, this can be deadly.
lines.haze_upgrade_power1_10: Sometimes the simplest tricks are the most effective.
lines.haze_upgrade_power2_06: Theres no place I can't breach
lines.haze_upgrade_power2_08: Weak minds can never catch me
lines.haze_upgrade_power2_10: They won't see me until it's too late.
lines.haze_upgrade_power3_01: Once I pick a target, there is no escaping me.
lines.haze_upgrade_power3_02: My eyes are set on them.
lines.haze_upgrade_power3_04: I'll bring them down one at a time…
lines.haze_upgrade_power3_08: I've been forged into a weapon.
lines.haze_upgrade_power3_09: I won't stop until they're dead.
lines.haze_upgrade_power4_01: Mercy is not a gift that I bring today…
lines.haze_upgrade_power4_03: This is why sandmen are feared
lines.haze_upgrade_power4_05: Bullets will rain down on them.
lines.haze_upgrade_power4_06: Every single one of them will die.
lines.haze_upgrade_power4_07: I will dance. And they will die.
lines.haze_upgrade_power4_09: I will tear through their army.
lines.haze_upgrade_power4_10: The air will be filled with their screams.
lines.haze_use_colossus_03: Time to step outside my comfort zone…
lines.haze_use_metal_skin_03: I'm not afraid of a firefight…
lines.haze_use_power2_05: No one will bar my path
lines.haze_use_tech_purge_03: I won't be hindered by the likes of them…
lines.haze_ping_astro_on_top_of_garage: Holliday's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_atlas_on_top_of_garage: Abrams's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_bebop_on_top_of_garage: Bebop's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_bookworm_on_top_of_garage: Paige's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_can_heal_orion: Grey Talon, I can heal you!
lines.haze_ping_chrono_on_top_of_garage: Paradox's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_doorman_on_top_of_garage: Doorman's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_drifter_on_top_of_garage: Drifter's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_dynamo_on_top_of_garage: Dynamo's on top of the garage!

lines.haze_ping_fencer_on_top_of_garage: Apollo's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_forge_on_top_of_garage: McGinnis's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_frank_on_top_of_garage: Victor's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_ghost_on_top_of_garage: Geist's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_gigawatt_on_top_of_garage: Seven's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_hornet_on_top_of_garage: vindicta's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_inferno_on_top_of_garage: Infernus's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_kelvin_on_top_of_garage: Kelvin's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_krill_on_top_of_garage: Krill's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_lash_on_top_of_garage: Lash's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_mirage_on_top_of_garage: Mirage's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_nano_on_top_of_garage: Calico's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_no_teamfight: I'm not ready for a team fight
lines.haze_ping_orion_on_top_of_garage: Grey Talon's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_orion_on_top_of_mid: Grey Talon's on top of mid!
lines.haze_ping_press_advantage: We need to press the advantage!
lines.haze_ping_pre_game_02: The sooner we finish the ritual the sooner I get the paperwork filled out…
lines.haze_ping_pre_game_03: If they were smart they'd walk away now…
lines.haze_ping_pre_game_04: This is their last chance to surrender
lines.haze_ping_pre_game_06: I wont let the OSIC down
lines.haze_ping_shiv_on_top_of_garage: Shiv's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_synth_on_top_of_garage: Pocket's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_tengu_on_top_of_garage: ivy's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_use_ability4_03: Ready to mow them all down.
lines.haze_ping_use_ability4_05: When they cluster together I'll kill them all
lines.haze_ping_use_ability4_07: I'm ready for the next team fight
lines.haze_ping_use_ability4_08: Say the word and I'll dance through them
lines.haze_ping_use_ability4_10: Blood is ready to be spilt
lines.haze_ping_viscous_on_top_of_garage: Viscous's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_warden_on_top_of_garage: Warden's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_wraith_on_top_of_garage: Wraith's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_wrecker_on_top_of_garage: Wrecker's on top of the garage!
lines.haze_ping_yamato_on_top_of_garage: Yamato's on top of the garage!
lines.hornet_be_careful_02: I may have pushed too deep
lines.hornet_close_call_03: I'm lucky to get out alive
lines.hornet_desperation_power2_02: I gotta get out of here…
lines.hornet_desperation_power3_03: I need all the help I can get
lines.hornet_desperation_power3_05: I have to make this count…
lines.hornet_end_streak: I put an end to their little streak
lines.hornet_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: Be careful, they have the rejuvinator
lines.hornet_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: Let's regroup and prepare a defense
lines.hornet_hunt_01: Come out and meet your fate…
lines.hornet_hunt_03: They have to be around here somewhere
lines.hornet_killstreak_high_03: How many of you have to die before you realize it's hopeless
lines.hornet_killstreak_mid_01: It only gets worse from here
lines.hornet_killstreak_start_02: Ill stack as many bodies as it takes to win
lines.hornet_killstreak_start_03: No mercy comes for you today
lines.hornet_killstreak_start_04: And so the blood begins to flow down Manhattan
lines.hornet_kill_anyhero_03: They won't be bothering us for a while…
lines.hornet_kill_anyhero_05: If only killing Hathorne was this easy…
lines.hornet_kill_anyhero_06: No one is getting in my way
lines.hornet_kill_astro_05: You won't be stopping me Sheriff
lines.hornet_kill_atlas_04: The Detective is no threat to me
lines.hornet_kill_bebop_03: I won't let you hook me
lines.hornet_kill_bookworm_01: It would have been safer for her in the library
lines.hornet_kill_bookworm_02: Not all stories have a happy ending
lines.hornet_kill_bookworm_03: I never cared much for fantasy stories
lines.hornet_kill_bookworm_04: She was rather chipper, now wasn't she
lines.hornet_kill_bookworm_05: Sometimes you have to be willing to go for soft targets
lines.hornet_kill_chrono_02: You're not as clever as you think Paradox
lines.hornet_kill_chrono_03: I dealt with the Time Thief
lines.hornet_kill_chrono_04: I won't let Paradox ruin my chance at revenge
lines.hornet_kill_chrono_05: She won't bring me out of the sky…
lines.hornet_kill_doorman_01: You should have stayed at The Baroness
lines.hornet_kill_doorman_04: You mind games end here, Doorman
lines.hornet_kill_drifter_03: You'll pay for what you've done Drifter
lines.hornet_kill_dynamo_01: The professor won't be supporting his team for a while
lines.hornet_kill_dynamo_02: The professor is no longer a threat
lines.hornet_kill_dynamo_04: Perhaps you're more suited for the classroom Professor
lines.hornet_kill_dynamo_05: We won't need to worry about anymore black holes for a bit
lines.hornet_kill_forge_02: Sorry Miss McGinnis, this isn't your day
lines.hornet_kill_forge_03: Her inventions are novel, but not enough
lines.hornet_kill_forge_04: She was a brilliant mind, but brillance does precious little against a bullet
lines.hornet_kill_frank_01: The pain doesn't go away Victor
lines.hornet_kill_frank_02: I wish you luck on finding answers another day, Victor
lines.hornet_kill_frank_03: Victor, this is not your day
lines.hornet_kill_ghost_02: Your wealth does not impress, Lady Geist
lines.hornet_kill_ghost_03: We all have sins we must answer for
lines.hornet_kill_ghost_04: Oathkeeper will die with you, Geist
lines.hornet_kill_ghost_05: That woman thought I'd be easy prey
lines.hornet_kill_gigawatt_03: I couldn't have Seven running around.
lines.hornet_kill_gigawatt_04: That should buy us some breathing room
lines.hornet_kill_haze_02: I won't let the government take anymore lives
lines.hornet_kill_haze_03: I won't be your victim Haze
lines.hornet_kill_haze_04: I don't answer to the OSIC
lines.hornet_kill_high_networth: All the money in the world couldn't save them
lines.hornet_kill_inferno_02: I know you wanted to help your friend, but I won't let you get in my way.
lines.hornet_kill_kelvin_02: His travels have come to an end

lines.hornet_match_start_astro_hornet_convo01_: I shot Hathorne's brother while he was day drinking on a speedboat.
When this is over you are more than welcome to try.
lines.hornet_match_start_astro_hornet_convo02_: Bind them sheriff.  And leave the rest to me.
lines.hornet_match_start_astro_hornet_convo03_: Forgive me for not having much faith in servants of the law.
lines.hornet_match_start_atlas_hornet_convo02_: Don't worry Detective - I'll do my part.
lines.hornet_match_start_atlas_hornet_convo03_: It was wonderful and horrifying in equal measure
lines.hornet_match_start_bebop_hornet_convo01_: I'm excited to work with you Bebop
It's nice knowing that the  enemy won't be grabbing me out of the air.
lines.hornet_match_start_bebop_hornet_convo02_: That could be me or Wesley.
lines.hornet_match_start_drifter_hornet_convo0: I'm not psychotic enough to have a preference.
lines.hornet_match_start_dynamo_hornet_convo01: Hold them in place Professor, and leave the rest to me.
lines.hornet_match_start_dynamo_hornet_convo02: I'm not a prop for show and tell
lines.hornet_match_start_dynamo_hornet_convo03: You're a professor at Columbia, yes?
Isn't that where John Hathorne will be speaking soon?
If the ritual fails, we'll be speaking later.
lines.hornet_match_start_ghost_hornet_convo02_: It's unbelieveable... I was killed because people thought I was someone like you, meanwhile you're an actual monster and you get to run around like the belle of the ball.
lines.hornet_match_start_ghost_hornet_convo03_: If you want help, all you have to do is ask.
lines.hornet_match_start_gigawatt_hornet_convo: If I bind them, will you be able to finish them off?
lines.hornet_match_start_haze_hornet_convo01_0: I think I've had my fill of state sanctioned murder.
lines.hornet_match_start_haze_hornet_convo02_0: How can you work for them?
I don't know why I'm bothering to reason with a zealot.
lines.hornet_match_start_haze_hornet_convo03_0: What are you going on about?
And when the next snake appears, I'll chop off its head too
I'm dead Haze.  I have all the time in the world.
lines.hornet_match_start_hornet_wraith_convo02: I'm surprised you're getting your hands dirty, I thought someone like you would send out goons to do the messy work.
lines.hornet_match_start_inferno_hornet_convo0: Don't try to relate to me.  You're still alive.
Let's say that's true; how do you feel about it?
lines.hornet_match_start_kelvin_hornet_convo01: I understand.  I just stick with ghost for simplicities sake.
lines.hornet_match_start_kelvin_hornet_convo02: That ice dome of yours had best not block my line of sight.
That's your problem Kelvin… I am saving life.
lines.hornet_match_start_kelvin_hornet_convo03: A while.  People always ask me about adapting to technology, but really the language was the hardest. For a while I felt lost, but I was able to find my way and my purpose.
That's not for you to say Kelvin.  You weren't there.
lines.hornet_match_start_orion_hornet_convo02_: If all goes well today this might be the last time we see each other.
lines.hornet_match_start_orion_hornet_convo03_: Wesley.  I just.  I just wanted you to know that if I had a father like you I don't think I would have died.
It's ok.  I got to meet you.
lines.hornet_match_start_punkgoat_hornet_convo: Billy, you scream at the ills of the world but you do nothing to change them.

I'm systematically murdering the bloodline of a judge that used his power to sentence innocent  women to death, and in the process am dismantling an extremist neo-political movement.  But do tell me about how important your soapbox is.

Tell you what Billy, when you can cleanly shoot someone running center pack in the Boston Marathon from 5 blocks away,  we can trade roles.  In the mean time shut up and swing your bat like a good little boy.
lines.hornet_match_start_tengu_hornet_convo01_: Ivy.  We're not friends.  We are not going on some adventure.  When the ritual is over, you will go home ot a family and I will be counting the bodies of the dead, so let's just stay focused on the task at hand.
lines.hornet_match_start_tengu_hornet_convo02_: Carlos souns like a preschool teacher.
lines.hornet_match_start_tengu_hornet_convo03_: That you can see.  For now.  Ivy; some might mistake your naievty for charm but believe me when I say it is dangerous.  And if you don't smarten up soon someone you care about is going to be hurt.  Not everyone deserves redemption… and even fewer are capable of it.
lines.hornet_match_start_viper_hornet_convo02_: You're the woman infatuated with Lash, right?
lines.hornet_match_start_viper_hornet_convo03_: Do you have a plan Viper?

lines.inferno_kill_werewolf_01: She probably won't remember that anyway…

lines.inferno_kill_wraith_01: Hope you bet on me, Wraith.
lines.inferno_kill_wraith_02: See you at the game Friday, Wraith.
lines.inferno_kill_wraith_05: Little humility will do her good.
lines.inferno_kill_wrecker_04: Get the hell outta my city.
lines.inferno_kill_yamato_02: The 7th moon is never gonna run New York
lines.inferno_kill_yamato_03: You picked the wrong fight Yamato
lines.inferno_kill_yamato_05: You're ain't in charge here, Yamato…
lines.inferno_last_one_standing_01: I'll hold it down as long as I can
lines.inferno_last_one_standing_02: Damn it, they took out my team…
lines.inferno_last_one_standing_03: Looks like I'm the only one left….
lines.inferno_leaving_area_01: I'll be back when I can.
lines.inferno_leaving_area_03: You're on your own for now
lines.inferno_match_start_astro_inferno_convo0: He'd do the same for me.
I'm not sure the statute of limitations lets me answer that question honestly.
How bout when this is over we have a chat at the bar.
lines.inferno_match_start_atlas_inferno_convo0: New York born and raised, baby
Haven't seen you you in a minute, brother
lines.inferno_match_start_bebop_inferno_convo0: You work at the scrapyard, right?  The one the old lady runs?
We're not.  I just, um… I just wanted to make sure she's doing ok
You think we can win this thing, tin man?
Don't worry about me Bebop, I know how to take care of myself…
lines.inferno_match_start_drifter_inferno_conv: Level with me: are you The Troubadour?
Is he a friend of yours?
lines.inferno_match_start_dynamo_inferno_convo: I'd buy you a drink when this is all over but…
Sure.  We surive this I figure I'll owe you one.
Professor, you don't gotta waste a favor on that, I got you.
Not my first time lighting things on fire.
lines.inferno_match_start_familiar_inferno_con: I dunno if I could pull that off little man.
lines.inferno_match_start_fencer_inferno_convo: That's great cause I don't know who the hell you are.
This is gonna shock you, but I'm a grown ass man… I don't hang out with kids from Blackmore Academy: I kick 'em out of my bar.
Ixian.  Human.  Chupacabra.  Makes no differnece to me.
I know where I'm from…and that's why I don't give a shit.
Make the best sidecar in Manhattan?
You make enough bad choices in your life it feels real good when you start making the right ones.
English is the only language my parents will speak around me.
You'd have to ask them.  All I know is that If my parents thought living in Ixia was so great they never would've left.
lines.inferno_match_start_frank_inferno_convo0: You know you don't gotta be a sad bastard all the time right?
Trust me brother, fixating on your past is no way to build a future.
Hank saved my life... Least I can do is save his business.
You figure out where any of you came from yet?
Hey, they uh, ritual is starting…
lines.inferno_match_start_ghost_inferno_convo0: He's nervous.  The bar's not pulling in what it used to and he's got a bunch of issues with The Alchemy Beuaru.
lines.inferno_match_start_gigawatt_inferno_con: Choosing a different life for myself isn't a waste; it's the best thing I ever did
Not everyone likes killing people, Seven.
I'm surprised you stayed in New York with the OSIC setting up shop.
lines.inferno_match_start_haze_inferno_convo03: Haze, you got any friends in the Alchemy Bureau?
If the ritual goes bad, could you do me a favor?
lines.inferno_match_start_inferno_forge_convo0: You wanna swing by the bar afterwards to celebrate.
Don't worry about me mcginnis, it'll be fine.
lines.inferno_match_start_inferno_hornet_convo: You're not in the mood for friendly chit-chat are you..
You know there was a time when I was angry too…
Heard you're the one taking out the Friends of Humanity
lines.inferno_match_start_inferno_krill_convo0: Think it's best I keep my distance from wraith.
I know she wants to pull me back in. I'm afraid I'll listen.
He's nervous, but Jezebel's an institution, we won't let it close without a fight.
lines.inferno_match_start_inferno_viscous_conv: You should stop by Jezebel's sometime, if you like people watching you'll see all types there.
The bar my buddy Hank owns
Long story.  I'll tell you later.
Can I give you some adivce?
If Wraith invites you to play cards, say no.
lines.inferno_match_start_kelvin_inferno_convo: Depending on how tonight goes it may not be running much longer.
Kelvin, I wanna make this quick so I can get back to the bar.
I was born in New York.  Home is right here.
lines.inferno_match_start_necro_inferno_convo0: She tried to use a fake.
She tried.  But ain't no amount of money worth risking Jezebel's getting shut down.
Not gonna lie, it was satisfying.
I don't know if I'd trust the Blackmore Academy rumor mill.
Don't know if I'd trust what she has to say either.
Hey Graves.  I'm not gonna tell you how to live your life cause lord knows you don't wanna hear it…
If you ever find yourself over your head you can talk to me for help.
Look when I was around your age I needed help and someone gave it to me.  It changed my life, and I just wanted you to know that I'm willing to pay it forward.
lines.inferno_match_start_priest_inferno_convo: Hate to see what kind of homilies you're dropping on Sundays.
I'm next to a crazy preacher with a gun, why wouldn't I be.
What nuance am I missing here?
Ain't you heard?  The whole city's haunted.
I really thought I buried this part of me, ya know.
lines.inferno_match_start_unicorn_inferno_conv: Well let's give our boy a hand.
Assuming we get through the ritual, that sounds great.
No, if he did he'd be worried about me and that'd be worse.
lines.inferno_match_start_werewolf_inferno_con: I'm lucky to have a friend like Hank.
Hank needs me, can't let him down.
Not sure that should be your top concern.
lines.inferno_match_start_yamato_inferno_convo: You uh… you don't sound to excited to work with me.
You wanna come up with a plan.
It's gonna be a long day…
lines.inferno_near_miss_05: They won't be lucky next time.
lines.inferno_pick_up_gold_01: If they're gonna leave it, I'm gonna take it
lines.inferno_pick_up_gold_04: I need every soul I can get
lines.inferno_pick_up_gold_05: Gotta keep that money rolling in
lines.inferno_pick_up_rejuv_03: Picked up the rejuv, what do we wanna do next?
lines.inferno_revenge_kill: You thought I was going to forget what you did to me?
lines.inferno_t1_shop_reminder_02: Might want to spend some money…
lines.inferno_t2_shop_reminder_02: I need to check out the relic shop
lines.inferno_t2_shop_reminder_03: There has to be something I can buy…
lines.inferno_t3_shop_reminder_01: I can get some quality gear
lines.inferno_t3_shop_reminder_02: I shouldn't be sitting on all this coin
lines.inferno_t3_shop_reminder_03: Can't let this money go to waste.
lines.inferno_t4_shop_reminder_03: Can't just sit on these souls
lines.inferno_tower_got_denied_02: We got what we came for
lines.inferno_tower_got_denied_03: We keep this up it'll be over soon
lines.inferno_tower_got_denied_04: Just gotta keep that momentum going
lines.inferno_tower_got_denied_05: The money wasn't the goal anyway
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_01: I've been working on a special cocktail…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_02: Need something a little more flamable
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_04: First I soak 'em, then I light 'em up…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_05: Gotta get 'em primed before I set the spark…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_06: It always pays to plan ahead…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_07: I've been perfecting this concoction for years…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_08: I'll be ready to fan the flame
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_09: This takes me back to a mispent youth…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power1_10: This'll make the fires burn brighter…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power2_02: This is perfect for getting in or getting out.
lines.inferno_upgrade_power2_06: If they're covered in pitch, this'll be a wrap…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power2_07: My feet are gonna smell like asphalt for weeks aren't they..
lines.inferno_upgrade_power2_08: They won't want to follow me…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power3_01: This is what I'm known for…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power3_03: They'll be nothing but ash when I'm through…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power3_04: They'll be lit up in no time…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power3_08: Theres not gonna be a damn thing that they can do about this….
lines.inferno_upgrade_power3_09: I'll set a fire like New York's never seen
lines.inferno_upgrade_power3_10: This is my bread and butter.
lines.inferno_upgrade_power4_01: Once this goes off all they can do is burn…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power4_03: I'm gonna stun 'em or die trying…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power4_05: This is gonna make a helluva explosion…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power4_06: Hope my team can capitalize on this…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power4_07: run in. go super nova. Get out.
lines.inferno_upgrade_power4_09: They're not gonna be ready for this…
lines.inferno_upgrade_power4_10: Gotta make sure I get in quick to deliver this…
lines.inferno_use_colossus_02: Go big or go home baby
lines.inferno_use_metal_skin_02: They cacn shoot me all they want…
lines.inferno_use_metal_skin_03: I'm not worried about their bullets…
lines.inferno_use_tech_defender_03: They can throw their best shot, I'm not worried…
lines.inferno_use_unstoppable_02: Nothing will get in my way!
lines.inferno_use_unstoppable_03: Throw all the magic at me you want!

lines.kelvin_ally_dynamo_clutch_heal_02: I knew I could count on you, old friend…
lines.kelvin_ally_dynamo_clutch_heal_03: I wish I had you on the expedition…
lines.kelvin_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_02: He's as dangerous as they said… but at least he's on our side
lines.kelvin_ally_haze_big_ult_01: So that's what the OSIC does…
lines.kelvin_ally_haze_big_ult_02: Remind me never to get on her hit list…
lines.kelvin_ally_haze_interrupt_with_finesse_: Turns out the government actually is here to help. Hm.
Your reputation is well earned, Haze…
lines.kelvin_ally_orion_far_shot_01: You know how to use a bow, sir…
lines.kelvin_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_01: Thanks for the help Grey Talon
lines.kelvin_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_02: Talon was looking out for us
lines.kelvin_ally_tengu_killed_in_lane_01: Damn it, they took out Ivy!
lines.kelvin_ally_viscous_clutch_cube_01: This is like being frozen in ice without the trauma…
lines.kelvin_be_careful_03: I need to stay sharp, I don't have any backup…
lines.kelvin_close_call_01: It's getting a little rough out there…
lines.kelvin_close_call_03: They'll have to try harder than that if they want to kill me…
lines.kelvin_close_call_04: Today is not the day I die…
lines.kelvin_congrats_02: I knew we could work together!
lines.kelvin_congrats_04: We keep this up, and it will be over in no time!
lines.kelvin_congrats_05: We make a good team, yes?
lines.kelvin_desperation_power1_01_alt: I'm not dead yet! Well. Technically, I suppose I'm a wight but let's not get bogged down by specifics..
lines.kelvin_desperation_power4_01: I won't meet my final death!
lines.kelvin_desperation_power4_04: Thought you had me, didn't you…
lines.kelvin_desperation_power4_05: All I need is a little more time…
lines.kelvin_end_streak: All good things come to an end…
lines.kelvin_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_01: You'll have to try harder than that Bebop…
lines.kelvin_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They picked up the rejuv, we can't afford to make mistakes!
lines.kelvin_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_01: If it makes you feel better, I got lucky…
lines.kelvin_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_03: You were never getting away, Haze…
lines.kelvin_enemy_inferno_killed_mid_ult_02: Infernus, you didn't think that would work did you?
lines.kelvin_hunt_02: Come out and face me with courage!
lines.kelvin_hunt_03: Only a rat feels the need to hide…
lines.kelvin_killstreak_high_02: I almost feel bad for them
lines.kelvin_killstreak_high_03: There's no shame in surrender, friends
lines.kelvin_killstreak_mid_03: I came to fight the best, and so far I'm sorely dissapointed
lines.kelvin_killstreak_start_01: It would appear that I'm on a roll, yes?
lines.kelvin_killstreak_start_03: Its not your fault you're not better than me, it just is what it is
lines.kelvin_killstreak_start_04: If only Ettrick could see me now…
lines.kelvin_killstreak_start_05: Will none of you rise to the challenge?
lines.kelvin_kill_anyhero_03: Don't feel bad my friend, no one is better than me.
lines.kelvin_kill_anyhero_04: If you were going to lose, at least you lost to the best, yes?
lines.kelvin_kill_anyhero_06: They throw their lives away with such gusto…
lines.kelvin_kill_anyhero_07: It appears they've confused courage with stupidity.
lines.kelvin_kill_astro_01: Your intentions are noble Sheriff, but I can't let you win…
lines.kelvin_kill_astro_02: You came a long way to fail, Sheriff…
lines.kelvin_kill_astro_03: We're all looking for answers holliday… sadly you won't be getting yours today.
lines.kelvin_kill_astro_04: That lasso was never going to get it done
lines.kelvin_kill_bebop_01: Bebop, I really wish you'd stop trying to kill me.
lines.kelvin_kill_bebop_02: I'm not afraid of you Bebop.
lines.kelvin_kill_bookworm_01: That young lady has a bright future ahead of her, but today she will be a failure
lines.kelvin_kill_bookworm_03: I hate to stifle such imagination
lines.kelvin_kill_bookworm_05: Today we are enemies, but hopfully tomorrow we shall be allies.
lines.kelvin_kill_chrono_02: Paradox is no longer a threat
lines.kelvin_kill_chrono_03: We need not worry about Paradox…
lines.kelvin_kill_chrono_04: You're clever Paradox, but you're not better than me
lines.kelvin_kill_doorman_03: I put an end to your tricks Doorman
lines.kelvin_kill_doorman_04: No more reality bending for you, my friend
lines.kelvin_kill_drifter_01: You won't pray on us Drifter
lines.kelvin_kill_drifter_03: No more innocents will suffer at your hands
lines.kelvin_kill_drifter_04: A pity I couldn't stop him sooner
lines.kelvin_kill_dynamo_01: I'm sorry my friend, but I can't let you win.
lines.kelvin_kill_dynamo_04: I wish I didn't have to do that Professor
lines.kelvin_kill_dynamo_05: If I never see a blackhole again, it will be too soon.
lines.kelvin_kill_forge_01: McGinnis, you deserve more than being a lacky for Maximillian
lines.kelvin_kill_forge_02: You're no better than Calico, McGinnis
lines.kelvin_kill_forge_03: I could never trade my morals for coin like that woman…
lines.kelvin_kill_forge_05: You made your choice when you signed with Fairfax Industries…
lines.kelvin_kill_frank_02: I was hoping us corpses could stick together…
lines.kelvin_kill_frank_03: I wish you good luck on your search my friend, but I can't let you win
lines.kelvin_kill_frank_04: Sadly my search for the truth has to trump your own
lines.kelvin_kill_frank_05: If you wanted to be glass half full, at least he's not in pain
lines.kelvin_kill_ghost_02: You're the monster Geist, not Oathkeeper…
lines.kelvin_kill_ghost_03: I won't be fed to your pet spirit, Geist
lines.kelvin_kill_ghost_04: That woman needs to be stopped…
lines.kelvin_kill_ghost_05: I won't let that monster get what she wants
lines.kelvin_kill_gigawatt_05: Seven could only elude consequences for so long…
lines.kelvin_kill_haze_04: Glad I took her out before she killed us all
lines.kelvin_kill_high_networth: They may have the money, but WE have the talent…
lines.kelvin_kill_hornet_01: Your cause is just Vindicta, but your methods…
lines.kelvin_kill_hornet_03: I suppose now is probably a bad time to give a lecture on violence…
lines.kelvin_kill_inferno_02: See you at the bar later?
lines.kelvin_kill_inferno_03: And here I thought your firestarting days were behind you, Infernus…
lines.kelvin_kill_inferno_04: Infernus, back to your old tricks I see
lines.kelvin_kill_krill_01: You two are fun guys, sorry about shooting you.
lines.kelvin_kill_krill_02: Nothing personal Mo, it's just business
lines.kelvin_kill_krill_05: They're a scrappy pair, aren't they
lines.kelvin_kill_lash_03: Eh, I don't see what the big deal is
lines.kelvin_kill_lash_05: That solves our little lash problem…
lines.kelvin_kill_mirage_02: I empathize with the Djinn, but their fight isn't my own…
lines.kelvin_kill_mirage_03: You're a man of principle's Mirage, I respect that…
lines.kelvin_kill_mirage_05: There's no shame in losing to me, Mirage…
lines.kelvin_kill_nano_02: That cat deserves better than you, Calico…
lines.kelvin_kill_orion_01: I'm sorry Grey Talon, I don't have a choice
lines.kelvin_kill_orion_02: There are other ways to seek justice, Talon
lines.kelvin_kill_orion_03: I'm sorry for your loss Talon, but this isn't going to solve anything
lines.kelvin_kill_priest_01: I never thought I'd be at war with the Vatican
lines.kelvin_kill_priest_02: Come Venator, and learn that I'm not easy prey
lines.kelvin_kill_priest_04: You'll have to try harder Venator
lines.kelvin_kill_priest_05: You don’t have what it takes to stop me Venator
lines.kelvin_kill_punkgoat_01: How can so much anger fill up such a tiny man
lines.kelvin_kill_punkgoat_02: Billy, you need to relax and enjoy life
lines.kelvin_kill_punkgoat_04: Billy, hating life won't get you very far
lines.kelvin_kill_shiv_01: You're just a bully Shiv… and I hate bullies.
lines.kelvin_kill_shiv_02: You want to pick on someone Shiv? Pick on me.
lines.kelvin_kill_shiv_03: You give the Baxter Society a bad name, Shiv…
lines.kelvin_kill_shiv_04: It'll take more than knives to stop me!
lines.kelvin_kill_shiv_05: Take your knife throwing act somewhere else!
lines.kelvin_kill_synth_02: This is not your day Pocket
lines.kelvin_kill_synth_05: This can't be the life you want for yourself, pocket…
lines.kelvin_kill_tengu_01: I wish I was fighting alongside you, not against you…
lines.kelvin_kill_tengu_05: Ivy won't be helping her team for a while…
lines.kelvin_kill_vampirebat_03: You have much to learn Mina
lines.kelvin_kill_vampirebat_04: Maybe you're not as invincible as you think you are Mina
lines.kelvin_kill_vampirebat_05: She's precarious, to put it mildly
lines.kelvin_kill_viper_01: Viper's an odd one, that's for sure.
lines.kelvin_kill_viper_02: She certainly has a… unique personality
lines.kelvin_kill_viper_03: Alas Viper, I have not acquired a taste for your charm
lines.kelvin_kill_viper_05: She won't be harassing us for a bit
lines.kelvin_kill_viscous_01: Go back to The Deep Viscous, it's safer.
lines.kelvin_kill_viscous_02: The surface is no place for a sea anenome
lines.kelvin_kill_viscous_03: That goo suit was only going to last for so long
lines.kelvin_kill_warden_01: You're not the law, Warden, you're just a glorified bounty hunter…
lines.kelvin_kill_warden_02: Your goals are noble Warden, your tactics less so.
lines.kelvin_kill_warden_03: I wont back down from you Warden
lines.kelvin_kill_warden_04: I'll stand up to you Warden, no matter the costs
lines.kelvin_kill_wraith_05: Don't have to wrory about Wraith anymore
lines.kelvin_kill_yamato_02: I may not bleed, but that doesn't mean I'm looking to get stabbed
lines.kelvin_kill_yamato_05: A sword was never going to be enough…
lines.kelvin_last_one_standing_01: And once again, I am all alone.
lines.kelvin_last_one_standing_02: Don't worry friends… I'll do my best to slow them down
lines.kelvin_last_one_standing_03: I won't let the team down.
lines.kelvin_leaving_area_01: You're on your own for now
lines.kelvin_leaving_area_03: I'll be back when I can
lines.kelvin_match_start_astro_kelvin_convo01_: The dead rarely are consumed by fashion.
lines.kelvin_match_start_astro_kelvin_convo02_: My friend, I wish I knew… I'm just looking for answers.
lines.kelvin_match_start_atlas_kelvin_convo01_: If we work together, victory is assured
My friend, the grave has no time for pessimism
lines.kelvin_match_start_atlas_kelvin_convo03_: Detective… now more than ever we need hope, not skepticism
Trust me my friend, sometimes it’s the only thing that does.
lines.kelvin_match_start_bebop_kelvin_convo01_: I understand.  Just know that I'll do whatever I can to help you both.
lines.kelvin_match_start_bebop_kelvin_convo02_: I wish I knew.  A little of both I suppose.
It makes as much sense as me talking to an animated scrap pile, yes?
lines.kelvin_match_start_bebop_kelvin_convo03_: They'll be more than one my friend.
lines.kelvin_match_start_drifter_kelvin_convo0: Just wondering if getting the answers I seek is worth helping you in the process.
I don't want to work with someone like you.
I understand that violence is going to happen in the ritual, but it's not necessary for you to make them suffer.
lines.kelvin_match_start_dynamo_kelvin_convo01: Haven't seen you since the Black Chateau.
It certainly does cut down on socializing.
lines.kelvin_match_start_dynamo_kelvin_convo02: This story writes itself: two men of science fighting to get our lives back.
lines.kelvin_match_start_dynamo_kelvin_convo03: You picked out a gift yet?
You won't have to settle, Professor.  We'll win this day.
lines.kelvin_match_start_frank_kelvin_convo01_: Look at us: a couple of walking corpes ready to stare death in the eye
Why not?  It's better than the alternative.
My friend: we were gifted unnatural life.  Don't squander it, travel.  Write a book.  Find love.
lines.kelvin_match_start_frank_kelvin_convo02_: Do you have a plan for the battle, my morose friend.
lines.kelvin_match_start_frank_kelvin_convo03_: I'll do whatever I can to keep you in the fight Victor.
lines.kelvin_match_start_ghost_kelvin_convo01_: I never got to say thank you for your patronage Lady Geist.
I'm serious.  Obviously the expidition didn't go as planned, but we wouldn't have had the opportunity were it not for your funding.
I don't know, but I intend to find out.
lines.kelvin_match_start_ghost_kelvin_convo02_: You seem to be short on friends Lady Geist
That way of thinking is a fast path to a lonely life… you'll realize that when you're older.
lines.kelvin_match_start_ghost_kelvin_convo03_: I don't know.  I tried to find him when I returned to New York but it's like he's vanished.
I wish I could share that sentiment
lines.kelvin_match_start_gigawatt_kelvin_convo: No barbed words before the ritual?
lines.kelvin_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo01_0: What you see in people's dreams has to be facinating.
lines.kelvin_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo02_0: Is this a friendly request for a chat or a threat?
I take it I should make myself… unavailable after the ritual?
lines.kelvin_match_start_haze_kelvin_convo03_0: Stay close to me Haze, I'll  be able to heal you in my ice dome.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_chrono_convo01: Why do I have the feeling that you already robbed me.
I'm not sure what to say to that
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_chrono_convo02: You have so many gifts and yet you waste them on petty theft and childish stunts.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_chrono_convo03: Why?  I'm an explorer, not a theif.
That feels like a gross oversimplification.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_forge_convo01_: I've watched your career from afar Miss McGinnis, very impressive.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_forge_convo02_: I'm pretty sure you said Kevin.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_forge_convo03_: Let's not get ahead of ourselves.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_hornet_convo01: Some people say revenant, but I'm not sure if there's really a difference.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_hornet_convo02: Vindicta, my priority will always be saving life; not faciliting you ending it.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_hornet_convo03: It's strange returning after being gone for a year.
Oh, by no means was I trying to draw comparisons… how long did it take you to make sense of the modern world.
A lust for murder isn't purpose Vindicta.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_inferno_convo0: Good to see that Jezebel's is still up and running.
Have faith Infernus, we won't fail.
I look forward to celebrating with you there.
I'm sorry about what's going on in Ixia.
You don't care about what's happening back home?
That came across poorly didn't it.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_krill_convo01_: It's nice to meet someone who actually read them.
I believe the ritual is about to start, but we'll catch up afterwards
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_krill_convo02_: Your friendship is inspiring to behold
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_mirage_convo01: The djinn have an uphill battle facing them.
Do you think Nashala has a chance at brokering a deal?
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_mirage_convo02: I imagine your career choice has taken you to some fantastic locales.
I look forward to reading all about them.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_orion_convo01_: All that rage wont bring your family back.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_orion_convo02_: I create shelter for those in need of aid.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_orion_convo03_: The Baxter Society has done a lot of good.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_wraith_convo01: We don't have time for cynicisim today Wratih.
I've seen the contempt you have for your fellow man.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_wraith_convo02: Correct.  It's time I find answers.
lines.kelvin_match_start_kelvin_wraith_convo03: I will endevour to make  sure that's not the case.
lines.kelvin_match_start_lash_kelvin_convo02_0: This glowing rock could be the only thing keeping me alive so I'm not risking taking it off.
lines.kelvin_match_start_lash_kelvin_convo03_0: You should be kinder to people Lash
I'm not making an argument, I'm asking you to be nicer.
lines.kelvin_match_start_tengu_kelvin_convo01_: You know I could use someone like you on one of my expeditions.
If you change your mind let me know.
lines.kelvin_match_start_tengu_kelvin_convo03_: I'm already dead so the stakes are a little lower
lines.kelvin_match_start_viper_kelvin_convo01_: I don't think I'm particularly judgemental
That you've spent more time inside prison than outside of it, so perhaps crime is not what you're best suited for.
lines.kelvin_match_start_viper_kelvin_convo03_: I'm not giving you any money.
lines.kelvin_melee_kill_01: You asked for this fight my friend…
lines.kelvin_melee_kill_02: I had no choice but to defend myself
lines.kelvin_melee_kill_05: It's in your best interest to stay down
lines.kelvin_pick_up_gold_01: I'll put these souls to good use
lines.kelvin_pick_up_gold_02: Can't leave souls lying around, now can we
lines.kelvin_pick_up_gold_03: If no one's going to claim it, I might as well
lines.kelvin_pick_up_gold_04: Who am I to say no to free souls
lines.kelvin_pick_up_gold_05: No sense letting this go to waste
lines.kelvin_pick_up_rejuv_03: Now that we have the rejuvinator, what's our plan?
lines.kelvin_revenge_kill: If someone's going to kill me, it's going to be Ettrick, not you…
lines.kelvin_t1_shop_reminder_01: I gotta get to the store…
lines.kelvin_t1_shop_reminder_03: Might want to get some gear….
lines.kelvin_t2_shop_reminder_01: I can buy some better gear now…
lines.kelvin_t2_shop_reminder_02: Maybe now's the time to go shopping…
lines.kelvin_t3_shop_reminder_02: I can afford some quality merchandise
lines.kelvin_t3_shop_reminder_03: I can get some high tier equipment…
lines.kelvin_t4_shop_reminder_01: There's nothing I can't get at the shop…
lines.kelvin_t4_shop_reminder_02: I wonder what they have at the curiosity shoppe
lines.kelvin_t4_shop_reminder_03: This is the moment I've been saving for…
lines.kelvin_tower_got_denied_01: No worries friends, we got the objective.
lines.kelvin_tower_got_denied_04: We're closer to summoning the patron
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power1_03: If it doesn't kill 'em it will slow them down.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power1_04: I need to deal with groups.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power1_05: When the waves come, I'll be ready.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power1_06: This should keep them at bay.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power1_08: It's like a snowball, if snowballs could explode and kill you and your neighbors.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power1_09: What's the point of being a scientist if you don't get to blow things up.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power2_01: They really hate it when I use this…
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power2_02: Aside from my devestating good looks, this is what else I am known for.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power2_04: This is why I am feared.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power2_06: Soon they will run from me.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power2_07: This is why I was chosen.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power3_03: I must be ready to give chase.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power3_04: It pays to have an exit strategy
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power3_07: I bring rockefeller plaza wherever I go…
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power3_09: I can go anywhere in this city
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power3_12: Who knows where the magic ends and the science begins…
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power3_13: A chill wind is about to blow…
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power4_03: I will isolate them from their friends
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power4_05: I'll fight them on my terms.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power4_07: I have a few tricks up my sleeve.
lines.kelvin_upgrade_power4_09: It's about to get cold out there
lines.kelvin_use_power4_03: You have no where to run!
lines.kelvin_use_power4_05: Let's see how you fare now…
lines.kelvin_use_power4_09: And where praytell, do you think you're going.

lines.kelvin_ping_press_advantage: We need to press the advantage!
lines.kelvin_ping_pre_game_01: So friends, who among you is ready to summon an elder god?
lines.kelvin_ping_pre_game_02: This will be an expedition to remember…
lines.kelvin_ping_pre_game_03: I have been given a second chance at life, and I won't squander it
lines.kelvin_ping_pre_game_04: I'm so close to finding the answers I seek…
lines.kelvin_ping_pre_game_05: We don't have like each other, but we need to work together as a team
lines.kelvin_ping_pre_game_06: Once the ritual begins, there's no time for fear or second guesses.

lines.kelvin_ping_use_ability4_05: Well be safe in my ice dome
