lines.krill_ally_dynamo_clutch_heal_02: That was looking rough for a minute…
lines.krill_ally_forge_clutch_heal_01: Thanks for taking care of us McGinnis…
lines.krill_ally_forge_clutch_heal_02: We were getting worried for a minute
lines.krill_ally_forge_clutch_heal_03: Good thing you were here McGinnis…
lines.krill_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_03: I'm glad he's on our side…
lines.krill_ally_haze_big_ult_01: Mo. If we ever find out Haze is after us we're leaving town.
lines.krill_ally_haze_big_ult_02: So that's what a sandman does…
lines.krill_ally_haze_big_ult_03: Good lord that was lot of bullets…
lines.krill_ally_hornet_far_snipe_01: Where did you learn to shoot like that?
lines.krill_ally_hornet_far_snipe_02: I think I just saw a pilgrim take someone's head off…
lines.krill_ally_kelvin_clutch_heal_02: I knew I could count on you Kelvin…
lines.krill_ally_kelvin_clutch_heal_03: Thanks for keeping us in the fight
lines.krill_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_03: I was worried we wouldn’t make it…
lines.krill_ally_viscous_clutch_cube_03: This is the best sewer sludge I've ever bathed in…
lines.krill_ally_warden_big_ult_02: Thank god Warden is on our side
lines.krill_be_careful_01: Be careful Maurice, it's just us out here
lines.krill_be_careful_02: If things go bad we need an exit strategy
lines.krill_be_careful_03: I don't know about you Mo, but I'm feeling a little exposed…
lines.krill_close_call_01: We need to get out of here!
lines.krill_close_call_05: It takes more than to kill us!
lines.krill_congrats_02: We keep this up, they won't have a chance in hell
lines.krill_congrats_05: We need to keep the advantage!
lines.krill_desperation_power4_05: We still have fight left in us!
lines.krill_end_streak: Glad we put a stop to that…
lines.krill_enemy_atlas_unkillable_02: Momo, I think we have a problem…
lines.krill_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: We need to regroup, they have the rejuvinator!
lines.krill_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_01: You thought you could hide, didn't you Haze…
lines.krill_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_02: You're not as clever as you thought Haze…
lines.krill_enemy_shiv_unkillable_03: This is going to be harder than we thought, isn't it…
lines.krill_hunt_01: When Maurice finds you, you're done for…
lines.krill_hunt_02: Why delay the inevitable, just come out and die…
lines.krill_hunt_03: You can't hide from us for ever
lines.krill_killstreak_high_01: They have no chance at stopping us!
lines.krill_killstreak_high_03: You know there's no shame in just giving up…
lines.krill_killstreak_mid_01: You can't hide from Maurice and I!
lines.krill_killstreak_start_01: Maurice and I are just getting started…
lines.krill_killstreak_start_02: These people wouldn't last 2 hours in the tunnels…
lines.krill_killstreak_start_03: I can't believe we were nervous about fighting these people…
lines.krill_killstreak_start_04: No one is better than us!
lines.krill_killstreak_start_05: If you're looking for mercy my friends, I'm afraid it's in short supply…
lines.krill_kill_anyhero_08: We just gotta keep doing that!
lines.krill_kill_astro_01: Why couldn't she go to Liberty Island like most tourists…
lines.krill_kill_astro_02: Out of towners, am I right?
lines.krill_kill_astro_03: The sheriff is off our case for a little while…
lines.krill_kill_atlas_02: He made us work for that, didn't he Mo…
lines.krill_kill_atlas_03: That was a big boy, wasn't it…
lines.krill_kill_atlas_04: Abrams won't be bothering us for a while…
lines.krill_kill_bebop_01: Lash would have at least put up a fight…
lines.krill_kill_bebop_03: You won't be hooking anyone for a while…
lines.krill_kill_bebop_04: Maurice, you gave that robot a helluva beating…
lines.krill_kill_bookworm_01: Perhaps next time we'll be on the same side, Paige
lines.krill_kill_bookworm_02: I like you Paige.  Not enough to not kill you.  But enough to feel a little bad about it
lines.krill_kill_bookworm_04: A shame we never started that book club Paige
lines.krill_kill_bookworm_05: I'll give her a book later and all will be forgiven
lines.krill_kill_chrono_02: She was a clever one… but clever only gets you so far
lines.krill_kill_chrono_03: She made some questionable life decisions…
lines.krill_kill_chrono_04: Be on guard, Momo… she'll be back.
lines.krill_kill_chrono_05: Ohhh she's not gonna be happy about that…
lines.krill_kill_doorman_02: Murderous Doorman or no, The Baroness still has the best mimosas on Manhattan
lines.krill_kill_doorman_03: Don't listen to him momo… I would never betray you
lines.krill_kill_doorman_04: He tried to turn us against each other, and he paid for it
lines.krill_kill_drifter_02: We won't let you prey on the people of New York
lines.krill_kill_drifter_04: That man had no remorse…. No humanity.
lines.krill_kill_drifter_05: We didn't stop The Drifter… we only slowed him down
lines.krill_kill_familiar_01: He was a cute little guy
lines.krill_kill_familiar_03: I hope he finds a way home.
lines.krill_kill_familiar_04: A shame he couldn't pick better friends.
lines.krill_kill_familiar_05: If only we got to him sooner, we could have helped him.
lines.krill_kill_fencer_01: And he thought he was better than us…
lines.krill_kill_fencer_02: And I now I feel like I've seen what Lash acted like as a teenager
lines.krill_kill_fencer_03: The arrogance that radiated off that boy was astounding
lines.krill_kill_fencer_04: Blackmore Academy: the breeding ground for Manhattan's finest narcasists
lines.krill_kill_forge_03: Whatever Fairfax is paying you, it's too much…
lines.krill_kill_forge_04: Those little machines were never going to be enough
lines.krill_kill_frank_01: Alas, some mysteries will never get solved Victor
lines.krill_kill_frank_02: Victor, you had the soul of a poet…. It's a shame you fought with the compotence of one as well.
lines.krill_kill_frank_03: Good luck in your search Victor, but success elludes you today
lines.krill_kill_frank_04: Any other day, and we would have been glad to help you
lines.krill_kill_ghost_01: New York just got a little bit safer…
lines.krill_kill_ghost_03: Lady Geist was a monster that needed to be put down…
lines.krill_kill_ghost_05: You're a long way from The Met, my friend…
lines.krill_kill_gigawatt_01: So that was the thing prowling our tunnels…
lines.krill_kill_gigawatt_04: We're not afraid of you Seven…
lines.krill_kill_gigawatt_05: We can't let Seven complete the ritual!
lines.krill_kill_haze_02: She didn't have enough bullets to take us out…
lines.krill_kill_haze_03: Oh dear, I think she was a fed…
lines.krill_kill_haze_04: She really thought she could hide from us…
lines.krill_kill_haze_05: And now we made an enemy of the OSIC, this day keeps getting better…
lines.krill_kill_high_networth: You have the money, but we have Maurice
lines.krill_kill_hornet_03: The ghost lady is dead. Well, she was already dead I suppose, but now she's even more dead.
lines.krill_kill_hornet_04: Getting our claws on her wasn't easy…
lines.krill_kill_hornet_05: Should have flown away when you had the chance Vindicta…
lines.krill_kill_inferno_01: I like my fur unburned, thank you very much…
lines.krill_kill_inferno_04: Oh Mo, he didn't burn you too badly, did he?
lines.krill_kill_kelvin_01: It was a good fight Kelvin.
lines.krill_kill_lash_01: Beating Lash is always a high point of any day.
lines.krill_kill_lash_02: Some humility would do you well, Lash.
lines.krill_kill_lash_04: If we lost that fight we'd never hear the end of it.
lines.krill_kill_magician_03: Listen they really did have an incredible stage show, it's a shame what's become of them
lines.krill_kill_magician_04: I tire of your rabbitt tricks
lines.krill_kill_magician_05: It's ok Momo… they won't be turning you into a rabbit anymore
lines.krill_kill_mirage_01: you're the best the djinn could hire?
lines.krill_kill_mirage_05: You know I was expecting more from him
lines.krill_kill_nano_04: Ego catches up with all of us
lines.krill_kill_nano_05: There's nothing like beating an egomaniac…
lines.krill_kill_nano_06: Sorry, but we're not cat people. Come to think of it, we're not even people.
lines.krill_kill_necro_01: The poor girl didn't even realize she was being used
lines.krill_kill_necro_02: Let this be a lesson on the dangers of obeying a Lich hand
lines.krill_kill_necro_05: My dear, it's not safe to hang around with lich's
lines.krill_kill_orion_02: Your hunt is over Grey Talon
lines.krill_kill_orion_03: Mo is not a trophy for you to collect Talon
lines.krill_kill_orion_05: You should have stayed in retirement my friend
lines.krill_kill_priest_02: We will not be hunted by the likes of you…
lines.krill_kill_priest_03: We don't answer to the Vatican
lines.krill_kill_priest_05: Why do I get the feeling he'd turn us into a rug if he had the chance…
lines.krill_kill_punkgoat_01: Billy, you need to stop being angry at the world and start living for something.
lines.krill_kill_punkgoat_02: There's few things more dissapointing than a man with a megaphone and nothing to say
lines.krill_kill_punkgoat_03: May we never grow to be as nihilistic as that goat man.
lines.krill_kill_punkgoat_05: I'm sure Billy will be whining about us in no time…
lines.krill_kill_shiv_02: You're a slippery, slippery, man, Shiv.
lines.krill_kill_shiv_03: Those knives were never going to stop Maurice
lines.krill_kill_synth_02: Let's be honest, that kid made some poor choices…
lines.krill_kill_synth_06: We protected you Pocket, and you betrayed us!
lines.krill_kill_synth_07: I expected more from you Pocket
lines.krill_kill_synth_09: Why did you put us in this position…
lines.krill_kill_synth_10: It didn't have to end this way…
lines.krill_kill_tengu_01: You're a long way from Spanish Harlem, Ivy…
lines.krill_kill_tengu_02: A pity. I liked that one.
lines.krill_kill_tengu_04: Don't feel bad Ivy, destroying stone is kind of our thing.
lines.krill_kill_unicorn_02: In another life she would have been our friend.
lines.krill_kill_unicorn_03: We probably should stay away from Coney for a while
lines.krill_kill_unicorn_04: We did what we had to too Momo.
lines.krill_kill_unicorn_05: You will be missed my dear
lines.krill_kill_vampirebat_04: Personally I find her fashion line to be overwrought, but who am I too judge.
lines.krill_kill_vampirebat_05: She was a cruel little girl…
lines.krill_kill_viper_01: There are the dregs of society, and then there is Vyper.
lines.krill_kill_viper_02: I'll say this about viper… actually, there's nothing nice to say about Vyper she's just kind of a terrible person.
lines.krill_kill_viper_04: It is a privallage to give Vyper what was coming to her…
lines.krill_kill_viper_05: Do not mourn that snake of a woman…
lines.krill_kill_viscous_01: Mo, I think you still got some goo on you.
lines.krill_kill_viscous_02: My friend, you have some goo in your fur
lines.krill_kill_viscous_03: Euck, I think some of viscous got in my mouth
lines.krill_kill_viscous_05: Go back to the Deep, goo boy.
lines.krill_kill_warden_02: Warden, this isn't the fight for you.
lines.krill_kill_warden_03: We were never your enemy Warden, I wish you could have seen that
lines.krill_kill_werewolf_02: Silver won't be feasting on us…
lines.krill_kill_werewolf_03: Silver, you were never going to beat Maurice
lines.krill_kill_werewolf_04: And here I thought we had a good working relationship with her
lines.krill_kill_werewolf_05: I didn't realize how desperate Silver had gotten… I wish we could have helped her
lines.krill_kill_wraith_01: I thought we had a deal, Wraith!
lines.krill_kill_wraith_03: You're good at one-on-one fights wraith… too bad there's two of us.
lines.krill_kill_wraith_04: You really thought you'd get the drop on us?
lines.krill_kill_wraith_05: Those parlor tricks of yours were only going to get you so far…
lines.krill_kill_wrecker_03: That monstronsity will be back, but we still have some time…
lines.krill_kill_wrecker_04: Get out of New York, Wrecker…
lines.krill_kill_yamato_01: The 7th Moon will never strong arm us!
lines.krill_kill_yamato_02: You think we're afraid of you Yamato?
lines.krill_kill_yamato_03: A sword was never going to be enough to stop us
lines.krill_kill_yamato_04: Mo, she didn't cut you too bad, did she?
lines.krill_last_one_standing_01: Looks like we're the only ones still standing…
lines.krill_last_one_standing_02: Mo…perhaps nows the time to play it a little safer…
lines.krill_last_one_standing_03: I can't help but notice all our new friends are dead.
lines.krill_leaving_area_01: You're on your own for now…
lines.krill_leaving_area_02: We'll be back when we can…
lines.krill_match_start_astro_krill_convo01_01: Your revolver is a thing to behold.
lines.krill_match_start_astro_krill_convo01_03: I don't suppose it's for sale.
lines.krill_match_start_astro_krill_convo01_05: I wouldn't respect myself if I didn't ask.
lines.krill_match_start_astro_krill_convo02_01: Sheriff, I know that you're new to our great city.  But if you ever find yourself in need of information, Mo and I are happy to avail ourselves to you.
lines.krill_match_start_astro_krill_convo02_03: I think you'll find our rates to be reasonabile.
lines.krill_match_start_astro_krill_convo03_01: Just pull them to Maurice, and I'll make sure we finish the job.
lines.krill_match_start_atlas_krill_convo01_02: I was thinking the latter, but if you want to mastermind something we're all ears.
lines.krill_match_start_atlas_krill_convo02_01: Abrams, I know this isn't exactly the most ideal time to bring it up but do you remember last weeks card game?
lines.krill_match_start_atlas_krill_convo03_02: Aa delight for us as well.   Our enemies will likely be less enthused…
lines.krill_match_start_bebop_krill_convo01_02: You can count on us Bebop
lines.krill_match_start_bebop_krill_convo02_01: Great job at the fights the other night
lines.krill_match_start_bebop_krill_convo02_05: Bebop: you have gift, one that we can gamble on.  Please don't waste it.
lines.krill_match_start_bebop_krill_convo03_03: Sorry we couldn't do more for her
lines.krill_match_start_dynamo_krill_convo01_0: Professor, you teach at Columbia yes?
I don't suppose you have any connections in the art department.  Mo was hoping to audit a pottery class.
Ah well, I guess we'll fall back on the orginal plan of threatening someone in the admissions office
You've made his day Professor, thank you
lines.krill_match_start_dynamo_krill_convo02_0: We will endeavor not to grab someone in your black hole.
lines.krill_match_start_dynamo_krill_convo03_0: We have lived quite the life, yes.
What are you thinking? Jewels, fine art, Ixian trickets?
My friend, what if I told you I knew someone looking to move a first edition Don Quixote
That does make it a challenge, but one I gladly accept.  I will find you options.
lines.krill_match_start_fencer_krill_convo01_0: Of course not.  We are equals.
Because he's not interested in talking to you.
lines.krill_match_start_fencer_krill_convo02_0: I hope you're not above fighting dirty.
No.  But there is great satisfaction in being alive.
lines.krill_match_start_ghost_krill_convo01_04: Lady Geist, for now our purposes are aligned.  But if you wish for that pretty arm of yours to remain attached after the ritual, I suggest you be kinder to Maurice.
lines.krill_match_start_ghost_krill_convo02_01: That binding ward on your arm is very impressive.
lines.krill_match_start_ghost_krill_convo02_03: Whoever made it was an artist at their craft.
lines.krill_match_start_ghost_krill_convo03_01: It's nice to meet you Lady Geist
lines.krill_match_start_ghost_krill_convo03_03: It does.  It also plays a critical role in your survival so perhaps we should try that again.  It's nice to meet you Lady Geist.
lines.krill_match_start_gigawatt_krill_convo01: I hear you've made the old subway tunnels your home.
lines.krill_match_start_gigawatt_krill_convo02: Is the OSIC still looking for you?
We can help, but the rate will be higher
lines.krill_match_start_gigawatt_krill_convo03: Do you want to come up with a plan.
lines.krill_match_start_haze_krill_convo01_01: So you're one of the fabled Sandmen of the OSIC.
lines.krill_match_start_haze_krill_convo01_03: How impressed will I be when I see my tax dollars at work?
lines.krill_match_start_haze_krill_convo02_01: Once momo grabs them they'll be easy for you shoot.
lines.krill_match_start_haze_krill_convo02_03: This is going to work out well, I can tell.
lines.krill_match_start_haze_krill_convo03_01: Today doesn't end with us getting arrested, right
lines.krill_match_start_inferno_krill_convo01_: Fern, haven't seen you at the game in a while
Afraid she'll want to pull you back in?
lines.krill_match_start_inferno_krill_convo02_: Not bad.  Work is interesting and violent, I'm 31 chapters into my memoir, momo's trying his paws at pottery.
My friend, if I died before I got to tell the world of our adventures it would be a far greater crime than any we've committed,
lines.krill_match_start_inferno_krill_convo03_: How's Hank doing?  I heard the bar is going through a…transitional period.
If there's anything we can do, let us know.
lines.krill_match_start_kelvin_krill_convo01_0: Your adventures were inspiring to read about Kelvin
They were riviting.  I'm a… I'm a bit of an author myself actually.
If you would be willing to take a look at my manuscript -
lines.krill_match_start_kelvin_krill_convo02_0: Respect and certain death have a way of binding people together don't they.
lines.krill_match_start_kelvin_krill_convo03_0: I actually moved quite a few pieces from your ixian expedition.
Certainly not the ones that are still in the MET. Yet.
lines.krill_match_start_krill_hornet_convo01_0: When we hold them down, you take the shot.
lines.krill_match_start_krill_orion_convo01_01: You're the man making life hell for the friends of humanity, yes?
lines.krill_match_start_krill_orion_convo02_02: Traditionally we deal with objects more than people, but for you we'd be happy to ask some questions
lines.krill_match_start_krill_orion_convo03_01: Are you ready to go hunting Talon?
lines.krill_match_start_krill_orion_convo03_03: Are you ready to say anything else?
lines.krill_match_start_krill_wraith_convo01_0: How could we say no to forced conscription
lines.krill_match_start_krill_wraith_convo02_0: Wraith.  Is that compassion I hear?
lines.krill_match_start_krill_wraith_convo03_0: Wraith,  If things go bad and we-
I'm serious.  Friends come rarely in our line of work.  And it's an honor to be counted amongst yours.
lines.krill_match_start_tengu_krill_convo01_01: You're the gargoyle that rode Mendoza out on a rail, yes?
lines.krill_match_start_tengu_krill_convo02_04: Because horrible people tend to have the most money.
lines.krill_match_start_tengu_krill_convo02_06: Parquet floors don't just arrive in your hovel, Ivy
lines.krill_match_start_yamato_krill_convo01_0: Our alliance is temporary, I'm afraid…Maurice and I value our independence.
Your bargaining posture leaves something to be desired.
lines.krill_melee_kill_02: Mo, you got some blood on your fur.
lines.krill_melee_kill_04: It's a pleasure watching you work, Mo
lines.krill_melee_kill_05: What sort of idiot gets in a fist fight with a mole person?
lines.krill_near_miss_01: They won't be so lucky next time…
lines.krill_near_miss_04: Don't worry Mo: next time they won't escape
lines.krill_near_miss_05: We have them on the run!
lines.krill_parry_02: You think you can outfight Mo?
lines.krill_parry_03: You'll never beat Maurice in a fist fight
lines.krill_pick_up_gold_02: If they're gonna drop it, we're gonna pick it up
lines.krill_pick_up_gold_03: Well well well… someone dropped their souls…
lines.krill_pick_up_gold_05: Far be from me to let this go to waste…
lines.krill_revenge_kill: Looks like we got our revenge Maurice…
lines.krill_t1_shop_reminder_03: Can't forget to check out the store…
lines.krill_t2_shop_reminder_02: Wonder what we can buy now
lines.krill_t2_shop_reminder_03: I'm sure theres something worth spending our money on
lines.krill_t3_shop_reminder_01: I can afford a powerful relic
lines.krill_t3_shop_reminder_02: We might want to spend what we've saved…
lines.krill_t3_shop_reminder_03: We can put these souls to good use…
lines.krill_t4_shop_reminder_01: No point in saving any more souls…
lines.krill_t4_shop_reminder_02: I think it's time we go shopping, Mo.
lines.krill_t4_shop_reminder_03: I can't wait to see what the shop has in store…
lines.krill_tower_got_denied_01: We're closer to completing the ritual…
lines.krill_tower_got_denied_02: Look at them, scrambling to find a silver lining…
lines.krill_tower_got_denied_03: We got the real prize, let them take some scraps…
lines.krill_tower_got_denied_04: Another part of the ritual complete…
lines.krill_tower_got_denied_05: The objective's down, that all that matters.
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_01: We'll get in there and give 'em hell…
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_02: We'll never back down from a fight…
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_03: We'll be the last one standing…
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_05: We'll turn their numbers against them…
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_06: We need to keep the pressure on them…
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_07: Don't worry Mo, I'll keep you healthy…
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_08: You know how hard it is to keep Maurice down?
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_09: We aren't afraid to get up close.
lines.krill_upgrade_power1_10: They can try to outnumber us, but it wont go well for them
lines.krill_upgrade_power2_03: There's nothing Maurice can't burrow through…
lines.krill_upgrade_power2_05: Wont lie, this always weirds me out.
lines.krill_upgrade_power2_07: I love watching Maurice do his thing…
lines.krill_upgrade_power2_08: We gotta be smart how we come at 'em…
lines.krill_upgrade_power2_09: Hard to get shot when you're underground…
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_01: Some people say it's fighting dirty, I say it's fighting to survive.
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_02: There's a fine line between fighting smart and fighting dirty.
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_04: Don't worry Maurice, I got some tricks up my sleeve.
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_05: Hard to fight when theres sand in your eyes…
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_06: Who cares if it's not fair, it works!
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_07: I'm not afraid to take short cuts.
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_08: I'll take any advantage I can get.
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_09: This can create the opening we need.
lines.krill_upgrade_power3_10: I'll do whatever it takes to win.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_01: Alright Maurice, here's the plan: I hold 'em down, you maul them.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_02: Mo… I can't wait for you to get your claws on them…
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_03: I'll hold 'em down and let Maurice do his thing.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_04: We'll hunt 'em down, and Maurice'll eat em. Well, not eat so much as pummel them to death.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_05: The two of us can take down anyone.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_06: Once we get our hands on 'em, and by we I mean Maurice, they're done for.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_07: Everyone has a plan until they're grabbed by a moleman.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_08: Maurice'll make short work of anyone.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_09: I'll be ready to lock 'em down.
lines.krill_upgrade_power4_10: If there's any stragglers, we'll pick 'em off.
lines.krill_use_curse_03: They're not going to like what happens next…
lines.krill_use_decay_03: Let's see them try to heal now…
lines.krill_use_metal_skin_03: We're not worried about getting shot!
lines.krill_use_power1_03: The more of them the better!
lines.krill_use_power1_05: We don't back down from anyone!
lines.krill_use_power3_09: You think you got the edge?
lines.krill_use_power4_03: I can't hold them for long!
lines.krill_use_power4_10: You messed with the wrong team!
lines.krill_use_tech_purge_03: Come on Maurice, we need to push through!

lines.krill_ping_pre_game_01: Alight Mo, let's have some fun
lines.krill_ping_pre_game_02: I don't expect any of you are familiar with moleman ettiquette?
lines.krill_ping_pre_game_03: I am Krill, this is Maurice - please don't confuse us it's fairly rude
lines.krill_ping_pre_game_04: Realistically this is 7 on 6 so I like our chances
lines.krill_ping_pre_game_05: My friends, Mo and I will create opportunities, but it falls on you to sieze them

lines.krill_ping_use_ability4_05: I'll pull one of them out of the fight….

lines.lash_ally_bebop_killed_in_lane_02: They took out Bebop, I'm cool with it.
lines.lash_ally_bebop_killed_in_lane_03: They took out Bebop, no surprise there…
lines.lash_ally_viper_killed_in_lane_02: They took out Viper… thank god
lines.lash_be_careful_01: Alright Lash… lot of jealous people are gonna try to kill you, you need to be ready…
lines.lash_be_careful_03: I get afford to get caught off guard
lines.lash_close_call_01: When my life just flashed before my eyes I realized that I'm even more amazing than I remembered.
lines.lash_close_call_02: You're just not good enough to hit me…
lines.lash_close_call_04: Keep trying, maybe you'll get lucky!
lines.lash_desperation_power1_01: Who said that we were done?
lines.lash_desperation_power1_02: The fight ends when I say it ends…
lines.lash_desperation_power1_03: You think you got me beat?
lines.lash_desperation_power1_04: I'll be the one walkin' away!
lines.lash_desperation_power1_05: I'm putting you in the dirt!
lines.lash_desperation_power3_04: Come on Lash, you can out last 'em…
lines.lash_desperation_power3_05: Just need to hang on a little longer…
lines.lash_end_streak: Bet you thought you were on a roll, didn't you?
lines.lash_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: They got the rejuv, that just means we get to beat 'em twice
lines.lash_hunt_02: How long you think you can hide from me?
lines.lash_hunt_03: Quit wasting my time and come out and fight…
lines.lash_interrupt_04: That's not gonna happen on my watch.
lines.lash_killstreak_high_01: It's cool everyone, getting killed by me is an honor
lines.lash_killstreak_high_02: Don’t look so surprised; I'm better than all of you
lines.lash_killstreak_mid_01: Winning's my business, and business is good.
lines.lash_killstreak_mid_02: You knew what was going to happen the moment you picked a fight with The Lash
lines.lash_killstreak_mid_03: Don't feel bad, the world's full of mediocre talent
lines.lash_killstreak_start_01: Let me show ya'll how it's done.
lines.lash_killstreak_start_02: I don't know about you guys but I'm not stopping anytime soon.
lines.lash_killstreak_start_04: You're all about to enter Lash's world
lines.lash_killstreak_start_05: You think you hate me now; just wait until I kill you again.
lines.lash_kill_anyhero_03: They'll be cryin' about that one.
lines.lash_kill_anyhero_05: Don't you get it? You're out matched!
lines.lash_kill_anyhero_07: They actually thought they had a chance…
lines.lash_kill_anyhero_08: It was over the moment they decided to fight us.
lines.lash_kill_anyhero_09: They won't be the last person I take out…
lines.lash_kill_astro_01: It was never gonna work out between us Holliday.
lines.lash_kill_astro_03: Holliday's over… yeah, I gotta workshop that one more
lines.lash_kill_astro_04: She won't be back anytime soon.
lines.lash_kill_atlas_04: Bluey has got himself a case of the dead
lines.lash_kill_bebop_01: Bebop, bebop, bebop. You dumb bastard.
lines.lash_kill_bebop_02: Hey Bebop; pro tip: stop sucking.
lines.lash_kill_bebop_03: Once again, Lash rights a great wrong.
lines.lash_kill_bebop_04: Sun is shining, bebop's dead, I'm about to summon an elder god, boom.
lines.lash_kill_bebop_05: This reminds me of the time I beat the tar out of Bebop.
lines.lash_kill_bebop_06: I hope you enjoyed that Bebop, because you're gonna be experiencing that again and again.
lines.lash_kill_bookworm_01: She went to college.  I mean, it didn't help her win a fight, but what an accomplishment
lines.lash_kill_bookworm_02: Now you got a new story to tell: "The Day I Lost to Lash"
lines.lash_kill_bookworm_04: Ok, you seemed nice: Tell ya what, when this is all over I'll teach you how to not lose a fight
lines.lash_kill_bookworm_05: Don't be hard on yourself, eveyone loses to The Lash
lines.lash_kill_chrono_01: Took down little miss fishbowl head
lines.lash_kill_chrono_02: Paradox won't be bothering us for a while.
lines.lash_kill_chrono_04: I don't get the big deal.
lines.lash_kill_dynamo_01: Shoulda stuck to grading papers professor.
lines.lash_kill_dynamo_02: And this is why I never bothered with college.
lines.lash_kill_dynamo_05: Took out dynamo, no big deal, you're welcome.
lines.lash_kill_forge_02: If Bebop can't stop me, your little windup toys aren't getting it done.
lines.lash_kill_forge_03: Too bad McG, you just don't got what it takes
lines.lash_kill_forge_04: You'd think a genius would know better than to pick a fight with The Lash.
lines.lash_kill_frank_03: You thought you were in pain before, Victor?
lines.lash_kill_frank_04: By the time I'm through with him he's gonna have to find himself a new face
lines.lash_kill_frank_05: Come on Victor, Get up so I can do that again
lines.lash_kill_ghost_01: Geist, your luck's just run out.
lines.lash_kill_ghost_03: And I took out Lady Geist
lines.lash_kill_ghost_04: Only one person sucks out people's will to live, and you're looking at him
lines.lash_kill_gigawatt_03: Just took down public enemy number one, you're welcome
lines.lash_kill_gigawatt_04: I don't get what the OSIC's problem is stopping Seven was easy
lines.lash_kill_gigawatt_05: I'm not getting killed by an oversized halloween decoration.
lines.lash_kill_gigawatt_06: Seven, stop acting like your better than everyone… no one likes an egomaniac.
lines.lash_kill_haze_01: Oh, I'm sorry. Why am I supposed to be scared of you again?
lines.lash_kill_haze_02: Well, well, well, lookie who just picked a fight with a sandman
lines.lash_kill_haze_04: Im assuming this where the feds come and offer me her job.
lines.lash_kill_haze_05: I thought you were supposed to be some badass assassin, what happened?
lines.lash_kill_high_networth: All that power and you didn't even know how to use it…
lines.lash_kill_hornet_02: You made me work for it Vindicta, I'll give you that
lines.lash_kill_hornet_05: You picked the wrong fight Vindicta..
lines.lash_kill_inferno_01: You make a better bartender than you do a fighter.
lines.lash_kill_inferno_02: Buddy, you need to stay in your lane
lines.lash_kill_inferno_04: The Lash doesn't take kindly to being lit on fire
lines.lash_kill_inferno_05: You'll never be fast enough Infernus…
lines.lash_kill_kelvin_04: Had a good plan Kelvin, shame you couldn't execute it
lines.lash_kill_kelvin_05: I'm not getting trapped by you Kelvin…
lines.lash_kill_krill_01: Alright, which one is Mo and which one is Krill, just kidding I don't care.
lines.lash_kill_krill_05: Like I've never wrestled a moleman before…
lines.lash_kill_mirage_01: Well look who failed the djinn
lines.lash_kill_mirage_02: Looks like ambasador Nashala is gonna need a new bodyguard
lines.lash_kill_mirage_03: You're not on my level Mirage
lines.lash_kill_mirage_04: The Djinn picked the wrong guy to protect them
lines.lash_kill_nano_02: Calico's down and nobody misses her
lines.lash_kill_nano_03: Guess I have to clean up the Baxter Societies mess
lines.lash_kill_nano_04: Another problem solved by The Lash
lines.lash_kill_orion_02: The Lash had to make an exception to his "don't punch old people" rule
lines.lash_kill_orion_04: Times passed you by Grey Talon
lines.lash_kill_orion_05: If grey talon were 40 years younger, in peak shape, and named Lash, I would have had a problem
lines.lash_kill_orion_06: Beating up old people is surprisingly rewarding
lines.lash_kill_shiv_02: There's only room for one impossibly handsome asshole
lines.lash_kill_shiv_03: The Baxter Society will let anyone in these days, huh?
lines.lash_kill_shiv_05: The Lash hates to ruin a pretty face
lines.lash_kill_synth_02: Come back when you hit puberty
lines.lash_kill_synth_03: Pocket - this isn't the life for you
lines.lash_kill_tengu_02: Love that you hate Mendoza, hate that you picked a fight with me.
lines.lash_kill_tengu_03: Come at me again, same shit's gonna happen.
lines.lash_kill_tengu_05: Well, this is what happens when you fight the best
lines.lash_kill_viper_02: Maybe now she'll stop sending me mail…
lines.lash_kill_viper_03: Some fans take it a little too far
lines.lash_kill_viper_05: I need her to leave me alone
lines.lash_kill_viscous_02: Better luck next time goo boy
lines.lash_kill_viscous_03: How about you go slide back to where you came from
lines.lash_kill_viscous_04: That's uh, that was lot of goo.
lines.lash_kill_warden_02: If you wanted to win you never should have picked the other side Warden…
lines.lash_kill_warden_03: I don't wanna know what kind of swinger party that guy was going to...
lines.lash_kill_warden_04: He thought he was a tough guy
lines.lash_kill_warden_05: There's always someone looking to pick a fight they can't win…
lines.lash_kill_wraith_02: Backed the wrong horse Wraith, like always
lines.lash_kill_wraith_03: It's a shame it had to go down like this Wraith
lines.lash_kill_wraith_04: Wraith, you could have 8 arms and you couldn't stop me.
lines.lash_kill_wraith_05: You see that Not even wraith can take me out…
lines.lash_kill_wrecker_01: Took out that godforskaken mistake of nature…
lines.lash_kill_wrecker_04: I can direct you to a real good plastic surgeon wrecker
lines.lash_kill_wrecker_05: That is a whooole lotta not ok.
lines.lash_kill_yamato_02: That's the best the 7th moon's got?
lines.lash_kill_yamato_04: That sword is gonna look so good over my fireplace.
lines.lash_last_one_standing_01: Relax, it's all good, I'm used to high pressure situations
lines.lash_last_one_standing_02: Wouldn't have it any other way…
lines.lash_last_one_standing_03: They save the best for last
lines.lash_match_start_astro_lash_convo01_01: So you using that rope for work or recreation?
lines.lash_match_start_astro_lash_convo02_01: Small town lady looking to get a taste of the big city?
lines.lash_match_start_astro_lash_convo02_03: If you're looking for someone with a body count I'm turning myself in.
lines.lash_match_start_atlas_lash_convo01_01: Alright blue boy, let's get to work
lines.lash_match_start_atlas_lash_convo01_05: Bluey; when this is over if you want the lash to send you to nite-nite land you are welcome to try
lines.lash_match_start_atlas_lash_convo02_01: I'm excited for you Abrams… you get to bathe in the glory of Lash.
lines.lash_match_start_atlas_lash_convo02_03: Just remember to say thank you when this is all over.
lines.lash_match_start_atlas_lash_convo03_01: So, what does it feel like?
lines.lash_match_start_atlas_lash_convo03_03: Being next to greatness.  What does it feel like?
lines.lash_match_start_atlas_lash_convo03_05: No need to be nervous.  I'm approachable.
lines.lash_match_start_drifter_lash_convo01_01: So what are you supposed to be, some kind of murder hobo?
lines.lash_match_start_drifter_lash_convo01_03: Don't know if that has a better mouth feel, but whatever mobo, it's your life.
lines.lash_match_start_drifter_lash_convo02_02: Arrogance is a concept made up by people who don't want to recognize greatness.
lines.lash_match_start_drifter_lash_convo03_02: I like proving I'm better than people.  If they get hurt that's on them not me.
lines.lash_match_start_dynamo_lash_convo01_01: If Columbia ever needs an adjunct professor to teach a course in being amazing, The Lash is happy to oblige.
lines.lash_match_start_dynamo_lash_convo01_03: Don't underestimate The Lash professor… it never works out.
lines.lash_match_start_dynamo_lash_convo02_01: So how long you been with the ol' ball and chain.
lines.lash_match_start_dynamo_lash_convo03_01: What's the first thing you're gonna do once The Lash gets you your body back.
lines.lash_match_start_frank_lash_convo01_01: You should fight in the Bear Pit.
lines.lash_match_start_frank_lash_convo01_03: It's not a literal Bear Pit, it's a fight club where the winner gets the honor of losing to me.
lines.lash_match_start_frank_lash_convo03_01: Here's the plan corpseboy, you draw their fire, and I'll swing in and save the day.
lines.lash_match_start_frank_lash_convo03_03: Exactly.  That's when The Lash catches them flatfooted.
lines.lash_match_start_frank_lash_convo03_05: It gives your sad life meaning.  And that should be enough.
lines.lash_match_start_ghost_lash_convo01_01: Well take a look at Green Arm Sally.
lines.lash_match_start_ghost_lash_convo01_03: That's fine by me, I'm happy just looking.
lines.lash_match_start_ghost_lash_convo02_02: Compotent?  No. I'm god's gift to combat.
lines.lash_match_start_ghost_lash_convo03_01: Now what's the lady who's got everything need from The Patrons?
lines.lash_match_start_ghost_lash_convo03_03: They say comrades in arms build deeper relationships than lovers.
lines.lash_match_start_gigawatt_lash_convo01_0: Word on the street is that you're some kind of boogeyman.
That's fine.  The Lash knows how to carry a conversation.
lines.lash_match_start_gigawatt_lash_convo02_0: Mediocre people say lots of unintelligent things.
lines.lash_match_start_haze_lash_convo01_01: Well lucky me,I get to work with the smoke show.
lines.lash_match_start_haze_lash_convo02_01: The Lash and the Sandman.  Sounds like a movie doesn't it.
lines.lash_match_start_haze_lash_convo02_03: I can see it now.  An impossibly handsome leading man.  An emotionally unavailable killing machine.  A little action.  A lot of sexual tension…
lines.lash_match_start_haze_lash_convo03_02: It's not uncommon for folks to mistake soul-crushing envy for hate.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_forge_convo01_01: Ahhh so The  Lash is wokring with the kid genius.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_forge_convo01_03: No need to get defensive McG.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_forge_convo02_01: Are you ready to watch greatness in action?
lines.lash_match_start_lash_forge_convo03_04: Maggie Mac, if you wanna say you got a crush on the lash you don't have to pull my hair, you can just say so.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_kelvin_convo01_03: Well aren't we pair of handsome bastards.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_kelvin_convo02_03: That keep you from changing your clothes?
lines.lash_match_start_lash_kelvin_convo03_02: The Lash rejects the premise of your argument.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_kelvin_convo03_04: Kelvin: where you there when I broke someone's left arm because they were right handed?  Or when I pointed out that a woman's baby looked stupid wearing a headband bow?  The Lash needs to be nicer? No… The lash is a humanitarian through and through
lines.lash_match_start_lash_orion_convo01_03: I get it.  It must be harder seeing a younger you tear shit up.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_orion_convo02_01: You think I got what it takes to be in the Baxter Society
lines.lash_match_start_lash_orion_convo03_02: Grandpa, all you need to do to win is kick back and watch the lash do his thing.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_wraith_convo01_02: Mendoza says a lot of stupid shit.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_wraith_convo01_04: You didn't lose money.  You spent it learning a valueable lesson.  Never bet against The Lash.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_wraith_convo02_01: So you're the lady that bets on Bebop.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_wraith_convo03_01: Buckle up 4 arms.  The Lash is about to take you on a one way trip to victory-city.
lines.lash_match_start_lash_wraith_convo03_03: I'm undeniable baby… and they're about to find out why,
lines.lash_match_start_tengu_lash_convo01_01: Lookin' forward to working with you Ivy.
lines.lash_match_start_tengu_lash_convo01_03: You're the only person in New York that Mendoza hates more than me, and that's impressive.
lines.lash_match_start_tengu_lash_convo01_05: Stupid people tend to say stupid things.
lines.lash_match_start_tengu_lash_convo02_04: Ivy.  A plan's a list of things that don't happen.  What we need is The Lash.
lines.lash_match_start_viper_lash_convo01_02: That's what The Lash does.  Make dreams come true.
lines.lash_match_start_viper_lash_convo03_06: No… I uh… I really didn’t
lines.lash_melee_kill_05: Don't need a gun to take out someone like you
lines.lash_near_miss_04: Your lucks gonna run out eventually!
lines.lash_pick_up_gold_03: People just love leaving me gifts
lines.lash_pick_up_gold_05: Another donation to the ol' church of Saint Lash
lines.lash_t1_shop_reminder_02: I can use these souls at the shop…
lines.lash_t1_shop_reminder_03: Might want to spend the souls…
lines.lash_t2_shop_reminder_01: I should check what I can buy at the shop.
lines.lash_t2_shop_reminder_02: I wonder what they have at the shop.
lines.lash_t2_shop_reminder_03: Gotta remember to check out the store.
lines.lash_t3_shop_reminder_01: I should go back and spend.
lines.lash_t3_shop_reminder_02: I can get a quality relic
lines.lash_t3_shop_reminder_03: Worth seeing what I can afford
lines.lash_t4_shop_reminder_03: The Lash is ready for some retail therapy
lines.lash_tower_got_denied_02: One step closer to completing the ritual…
lines.lash_upgrade_power1_02: They can try to run… not gonna work well for them, but they can try.
lines.lash_upgrade_power1_04: It's my bread and butter baby…
lines.lash_upgrade_power1_06: I'm going to be bouncing around that battlefield.
lines.lash_upgrade_power1_07: I can come at them from anywhere…
lines.lash_upgrade_power1_08: They won't see me coming, but boy will they know I've been there…
lines.lash_upgrade_power1_09: Everytime they think they're safe I'll be ready to fly in and finish the job.
lines.lash_upgrade_power1_10: Is flying in on someone trying to escape a dick move? Sure, but I'm alive and they're dead so who cares.
lines.lash_upgrade_power2_01: Dive kicks are the new uppercut.
lines.lash_upgrade_power2_02: Winning isn't enough. You gotta do it with pinache
lines.lash_upgrade_power2_05: This used to be an uppercut. Then I grew as person. Meanwhile Bebop is still throwing uppercuts. Because he sucks.
lines.lash_upgrade_power2_06: So here's how this works…I fly in. Then I kick 'em in the face.
lines.lash_upgrade_power2_07: Yeah I can do it on the ground, but it's like a hundred billion times cooler when I do it mid air.
lines.lash_upgrade_power2_09: They're about to learn that their arms are too short to box with god.
lines.lash_upgrade_power3_03: Crowd doesn't like it when I kill 'em too quick… this helps me keep it interesting….
lines.lash_upgrade_power3_05: Perfect cardio. Perfect form. Perfect hair.
lines.lash_upgrade_power3_06: If they think they can stand toe to toe with me they're gonna have a beautifully bad day…
lines.lash_upgrade_power3_07: They'll try to stand up to The Lash, but it's not gonna go well for them.
lines.lash_upgrade_power4_01: The only thing they'll be able to do is watch in horror…
lines.lash_upgrade_power4_03: They get too close they'll regret it…
lines.lash_upgrade_power4_05: If they're not dead after this, they won't be alive much longer…
lines.lash_upgrade_power4_07: Time to play catch with some inferior fighters…
lines.lash_upgrade_power4_08: I don't just end fights, I do it with style…
lines.lash_upgrade_power4_09: There's nothing like making someone feel helpless.
lines.lash_upgrade_power4_10: They'll know it's over before I even land the final blow.
lines.lash_use_ability_refresher_01: I got more where that came from…
lines.lash_use_ability_refresher_03: Gotta be ready to make the big play…
lines.lash_use_colossus_02: You wanted to play, let's play
lines.lash_use_colossus_03: Let's see ya stop me now
lines.lash_use_curse_03: They're really about to hate me
lines.lash_use_decay_02: That should make the damage stick…
lines.lash_use_metal_skin_03: What are you gonna do, shoot me?
lines.lash_use_power1_05: I'm about to ruin your day!
lines.lash_use_power1_08: You wanna mess with the lash?
lines.lash_use_power2_04: I'm about to show you why I'm best!
lines.lash_use_power2_05: I could do this all day…
lines.lash_use_power3_03: Oh my god, you thought you were making progress…
lines.lash_use_power3_04: Don't you get it, I'm playing with you…
lines.lash_use_power3_05: You gonna run, or you want me to slap you around some more?
lines.lash_use_power3_07: You wanna piece of the lash!
lines.lash_use_power3_08: I got a little something for everybody!
lines.lash_use_power3_09: Lets see how you do against the lash…
lines.lash_use_power4_07: Alright, I'm done playing with you…
lines.lash_use_power4_09: You don't got what it takes…
lines.lash_use_tech_purge_03: You think that'll work on me?
lines.lash_use_unstoppable_02: You think you can stop me?

lines.mirage_ally_astro_bounce_pad_02: I'll follow in the sheriff's footsteps
lines.mirage_ally_forge_clutch_heal_02: Thank you for looking out for us
lines.mirage_be_careful_02: It will be easy to find myself over my head
lines.mirage_close_call_02: The Djinn have blessed me today
lines.mirage_desperation_power2_03: I need to last a little longer.
lines.mirage_desperation_power2_05: I still have fight in me.
lines.mirage_desperation_power3_01: I won't stop until they're dead…
lines.mirage_desperation_power3_02: I'll fight till my last breath
lines.mirage_desperation_power4_01: I need to get out of here…
lines.mirage_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_01: Perhaps you chose a poor time to stand still
lines.mirage_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: You made this rather easy for me Bebop
lines.mirage_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They got the rejuvinator, we can't afford to be careless…
lines.mirage_hunt_01: Where did they run off too
lines.mirage_killstreak_high_01: The Djinn will not be denied!
lines.mirage_killstreak_high_03: You will all be humbled before The Djinn
lines.mirage_killstreak_mid_01: This battle will be over sooner than later
lines.mirage_killstreak_mid_02: You were fools to stand in Nashala's way
lines.mirage_killstreak_mid_03: I'm willing to die for Nashala… and I'm certainly willing to kill for her.
lines.mirage_killstreak_start_01: The power of the Djinn is absolute
lines.mirage_killstreak_start_02: I didn't choose this fight, but I will finish it.
lines.mirage_killstreak_start_03: Yield now, while you still can.
lines.mirage_killstreak_start_04: Don't force me to kill you all.
lines.mirage_kill_anyhero_01: It was your actions that brought death upon you…
lines.mirage_kill_anyhero_06: One less threat to worry about…
lines.mirage_kill_anyhero_07: They won't be bothering us for a while…
lines.mirage_kill_astro_01: You have lost your sense of justice Holliday.
lines.mirage_kill_astro_02: You are no servant of the law, just an instrument of rage.
lines.mirage_kill_astro_03: The undisciplined will never beat me.
lines.mirage_kill_atlas_02: The detective is no longer a threat.
lines.mirage_kill_atlas_05: He had conviction that rivialed my own.
lines.mirage_kill_bebop_02: I take no joy in this, Bebop
lines.mirage_kill_bebop_04: He had passion, but passion only goes so far.
lines.mirage_kill_bebop_05: The scrap golem made questionable choices…
lines.mirage_kill_bookworm_01: Forgive me for what I must do
lines.mirage_kill_bookworm_03: She seemed like a kind soul, why would she align with them.
lines.mirage_kill_bookworm_04: A pity.  Nashala would find her amusing
lines.mirage_kill_bookworm_05: My convictions will be tested today
lines.mirage_kill_chrono_01: Nashala won't end up in one of your museums, Paradox.
lines.mirage_kill_chrono_03: The Djinn won't rest until Paradox is dismantled
lines.mirage_kill_chrono_05: The Djinn's enemies, are my enemies.
lines.mirage_kill_doorman_01: Until today our stay at The Baroness has been rather plesant
lines.mirage_kill_doorman_02: He seemed much nicer when he was handling Nashala's bags
lines.mirage_kill_doorman_03: Nashsla will be dissapointed that we need to check out of The Baroness
lines.mirage_kill_doorman_05: Perhaps I should have read the reviews of The Baroness before checking in
lines.mirage_kill_drifter_01: I will always make time to stop men like you.
lines.mirage_kill_drifter_02: The innocent of New York are safe
lines.mirage_kill_drifter_03: The Drifter died at my hand
lines.mirage_kill_drifter_04: No mercy will be given to the likes of you.
lines.mirage_kill_drifter_05: I haven't felt evil like that in some time.
lines.mirage_kill_dynamo_03: Brilliance only gets you so far
lines.mirage_kill_dynamo_04: He seemed like a kind man
lines.mirage_kill_dynamo_05: The battlefield is no place for a teacher.
lines.mirage_kill_forge_01: Miss McGinnis, your time in the sun has passed.
lines.mirage_kill_forge_02: I smashed her tools of war
lines.mirage_kill_forge_03: McGinnis is no longer a threat
lines.mirage_kill_forge_04: Ingenuity alone was never going to be enough to stop me
lines.mirage_kill_forge_05: Fairfax Industries have failed to impress.
lines.mirage_kill_frank_02: One day you will find what you seek Victor
lines.mirage_kill_frank_03: I'm sorry that your answers will not be found today
lines.mirage_kill_frank_05: Good luck in your search Victor
lines.mirage_kill_ghost_02: I may be Nashala's servant, but you are Oathkeeper's slave.
lines.mirage_kill_ghost_03: The might of Oathkeeper is nothing before the power of the Djinn
lines.mirage_kill_ghost_05: New York is a safer place with her dead.
lines.mirage_kill_gigawatt_02: I'm not afraid of you Seven
lines.mirage_kill_gigawatt_03: Men like you have no place in this world
lines.mirage_kill_gigawatt_04: You've evaded death for the last time.
lines.mirage_kill_gigawatt_05: You were destined to fail, Seven
lines.mirage_kill_haze_01: It would appear that now I'm at odds with the OSIC
lines.mirage_kill_haze_02: The OSIC needs to stay out of my way
lines.mirage_kill_haze_03: The Djinn deserve a home, Haze
lines.mirage_kill_haze_04: The question remains: was she acting alone or under orders
lines.mirage_kill_high_networth: I am not afraid to face the mighty.
lines.mirage_kill_hornet_03: You won't use me for target practice…
lines.mirage_kill_hornet_04: You're not the one who decides who lives or dies, Vindicta
lines.mirage_kill_hornet_05: You're not picking off my team
lines.mirage_kill_inferno_01: With all your wisdom, you still decided to fight me
lines.mirage_kill_inferno_03: We have nothing to fear from Infernus
lines.mirage_kill_inferno_04: The flame has been snuffed out
lines.mirage_kill_kelvin_02: Kelvin won't be supporting his team for a while
lines.mirage_kill_krill_03: That was an unusually large mole
lines.mirage_kill_krill_04: I thought New York was supposed to have a rat problem
lines.mirage_kill_lash_03: I hope his ego never heals
lines.mirage_kill_lash_04: Maybe a little humility will do him good
lines.mirage_kill_lash_05: You are not half as impressive as you think you are, Lash
lines.mirage_kill_magician_02: You two need to work something out
lines.mirage_kill_magician_03: Divided they had no chance against me
lines.mirage_kill_magician_05: A shame.  They put on a good show.
lines.mirage_kill_nano_01: I won't be stopped by you Calico…
lines.mirage_kill_nano_02: You've brought so much suffering to the world, Calico… you got what you desered.
lines.mirage_kill_nano_05: Never trust someone who owns a Sphinx
lines.mirage_kill_operative_01: There will be no reconciliation between the Soviet Empire and the Djinn
lines.mirage_kill_orion_03: A warrior to the bitter end
lines.mirage_kill_orion_04: He got the death he wanted.
lines.mirage_kill_orion_05: He knew how this would end
lines.mirage_kill_priest_01: You picked the wrong prey Venator
lines.mirage_kill_priest_02: The djinn will be protected from the likes of you
lines.mirage_kill_punkgoat_01: Anger is a fruitless pursuit Billy
lines.mirage_kill_punkgoat_03: New Yorkers are stranger than I expected
lines.mirage_kill_punkgoat_04: I hope that mind finds peace one day
lines.mirage_kill_shiv_02: Shiv is no longer a threat
lines.mirage_kill_shiv_03: You won't be stabbing anyone, Shiv
lines.mirage_kill_shiv_04: Perhaps in time you'll become a threat
lines.mirage_kill_shiv_05: I expected more from The Baxter Society
lines.mirage_kill_slork_02: We don't need to worry about Fathom
lines.mirage_kill_slork_03: I stand resolute in the face of horrors
lines.mirage_kill_slork_04: Think twice before facing me, Fathom
lines.mirage_kill_synth_03: You have noble aims Pocket, but today is not your day
lines.mirage_kill_synth_05: You are out of your depth Pocket
lines.mirage_kill_tengu_02: You seem like a sweet person Ivy, you deserve better than this
lines.mirage_kill_trapper_03: I think you need to find a new line of work, sir
lines.mirage_kill_trapper_04: You picked a horrible day to come into work
lines.mirage_kill_trapper_05: I'm sure you make a better civil servant than you do a combatant
lines.mirage_kill_vampirebat_01: Mina, you're childish antics won't stop me
lines.mirage_kill_vampirebat_03: One day you'll grow up, and realize your folly
lines.mirage_kill_vampirebat_04: You won't feed on me today, vampire
lines.mirage_kill_viscous_02: The Djinn have no quarell with The Deep, but I must do what I must.
lines.mirage_kill_viscous_04: New York is more odd than I anticipated
lines.mirage_kill_viscous_05: I imagine that Nashalla would find him rather endearing
lines.mirage_kill_warden_02: Warden is no longer a threat
lines.mirage_kill_warden_03: If only your ability matched your conviction
lines.mirage_kill_warden_04: Blind devotion isn't loyalty it's ignorance
lines.mirage_kill_warden_05: Your obsession with the patrons ends today
lines.mirage_kill_wraith_01: The path of vices leads only to a dead end
lines.mirage_kill_wraith_04: Her arrogance finally caught up with her
lines.mirage_kill_wraith_05: Greed is not a cause worth dying for
lines.mirage_kill_wrecker_02: The monstrosity has been dealt with
lines.mirage_kill_wrecker_04: Eventually we all must answer for our crimes.
lines.mirage_kill_wrecker_05: Today is not the day you feast on Djinn
lines.mirage_kill_yamato_04: I won't be bullied by the likes of you
lines.mirage_kill_yamato_05: Yamato, your cruelty has brought you the end that you deserve
lines.mirage_last_one_standing_01: I remain, and I will survive.
lines.mirage_last_one_standing_02: The stakes are higher than ever
lines.mirage_last_one_standing_03: I can't afford to fail now
lines.mirage_match_start_astro_mirage_convo01_: I think the US is interested in money and power and the djinn can offer both.
lines.mirage_match_start_astro_mirage_convo02_: That's the problem.  You  won't.  And when you cling to that path you will die because of it.
lines.mirage_match_start_astro_mirage_convo03_: I do.  When she's free of her vessel, she offers scintilating conversation.  When she rests, I get to go bowling.
I learned about it in England.  It is the sport of kings.
lines.mirage_match_start_bebop_mirage_convo01_: What would you have me do? Stick her in the dresser at our hotel?  No.  She's safer with me.
lines.mirage_match_start_bebop_mirage_convo02_: Bebop, today your courage is required.
lines.mirage_match_start_bebop_mirage_convo03_: I try not to think about questions like that.  Under confidence can be just as dangerous as over confidence.
lines.mirage_match_start_drifter_mirage_convo0: Nashala is woman of nobility and poise.   She doesn't ask me to do dirty work.
I don't like your tone vampire
You dare threaten an emissary of the djinn?
Nashala has warned me about you.
lines.mirage_match_start_dynamo_mirage_convo01: They're people.  Some are facsinating, some are…are…
No.  That's not it.   What do you say when somone is cruel as child would be
Yes!  Asshole.  Some are facinating.  Some are assholes.
lines.mirage_match_start_dynamo_mirage_convo02: Professor, would you be willing to give Nashala and I a tour of Columbia?
lines.mirage_match_start_dynamo_mirage_convo03: We haven't had the opportunity to do much sightseeing, but the library was stunning.
lines.mirage_match_start_ghost_mirage_convo01_: I've heard about you Lady Geist…
Rumors are rarely kind to their subect.
lines.mirage_match_start_ghost_mirage_convo02_: But it is.  When you decide that you wish to be fortright let me know and I'll consider your request.
lines.mirage_match_start_ghost_mirage_convo03_: It's an honor to serve her.
lines.mirage_match_start_gigawatt_mirage_convo: I serve at her pleasure, yes.
Well enough.  Sometimes its frustrating when Nashala makes impulsive short sighted decisions.
lines.mirage_match_start_haze_mirage_convo01_0: Hopfully this is just the beginning of a partnership with your nation.
lines.mirage_match_start_haze_mirage_convo03_0: Do you think your government will be reasonable?
lines.mirage_match_start_kelvin_mirage_convo01: If there is anyone that can pull it off, it will be her.
lines.mirage_match_start_kelvin_mirage_convo02: You won't be.  Revealing those details would be a major break of Nashala's trust.
lines.mirage_match_start_kelvin_mirage_convo03: Thank you Kelvin.  May success greet us both with open arms.
lines.mirage_match_start_viper_mirage_convo01_: You smell of cheap cigarettes and cheaper morals.
lines.mirage_match_start_viper_mirage_convo02_: Do not touch her if you value your life.
lines.mirage_match_start_viper_mirage_convo03_: It seemed like the most sensible place for them build a new home.
I will look into this place.
lines.mirage_melee_kill_04: You'll have to do better, my friend
lines.mirage_melee_kill_05: Today is a not a day for gentle hands
lines.mirage_near_miss_01: Perhaps they have better judgement than I thought
lines.mirage_parry_01: You won't get the best of me
lines.mirage_pick_up_gold_03: This will be put to good use
lines.mirage_pick_up_rejuv_02: Now is the time to make a move
lines.mirage_revenge_kill: I had not forgetten what you did.
lines.mirage_t1_shop_reminder_01: I should go to the store
lines.mirage_t1_shop_reminder_02: I should start looking at relics
lines.mirage_t1_shop_reminder_03: Might need to visit the curiosity shop
lines.mirage_t2_shop_reminder_02: I might want to invest in something
lines.mirage_t3_shop_reminder_01: I need to be wise about my purcahse
lines.mirage_t3_shop_reminder_02: The right item can make all the difference
lines.mirage_t3_shop_reminder_03: I need to find time to go shop
lines.mirage_t4_shop_reminder_01: Now's the time to go shopping
lines.mirage_t4_shop_reminder_02: My next purchase could shape the battle
lines.mirage_t4_shop_reminder_03: I need to spend these souls
lines.mirage_tower_got_denied_03: The souls were never the objective
lines.mirage_tower_got_denied_04: The ritual draws closer to completion
lines.mirage_tower_got_denied_05: We are one step closer to stopping their patron
lines.mirage_upgrade_power1_02: Let's see them outrun the wind…
lines.mirage_upgrade_power1_06: Hope my team can capitalize on this…
lines.mirage_upgrade_power1_07: This should buy me the time I need
lines.mirage_upgrade_power1_08: I'll take them for a ride…
lines.mirage_upgrade_power1_09: They won't forget the day they crossed me.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power1_10: The djinn blessed me with many gifts…
lines.mirage_upgrade_power2_02: Their life will become my life.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power2_03: They will suffer, and I will endure.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power2_04: I can't help Nashala if I'm dead.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power2_05: I won't fall in the line of duty.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power2_06: Sometimes the small things make all the difference.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power2_07: I'll take any edge in a fight.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power3_03: No one escapes the mark of the Djinn
lines.mirage_upgrade_power3_05: The eyes of the Djinn are unflinching
lines.mirage_upgrade_power3_06: I don't have to see them to kill them.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power3_07: The Djinn will look on them with scorn
lines.mirage_upgrade_power3_08: Anyone who faces me will suffer
lines.mirage_upgrade_power3_09: When it comes to protecting Nashala, I won't hesitate to kill.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power3_10: They will regret making me their enemy
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_01: I may need to call on Nashala's aid.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_02: Traversing the city will be a trivial matter.
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_04: I'll get to my allies when needed
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_06: My enemies will not outrun me
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_07: I'm always ready to support my allies
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_08: I'll travel the city on my terms
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_09: Nashala will take me where I need to go
lines.mirage_upgrade_power4_10: No one will be denied my aid.
lines.mirage_use_power2_03: I won't let you kill me.
lines.mirage_use_power2_08: Only one of us gets to walk away.
lines.mirage_use_power2_10: I will heal and you will die.
lines.mirage_use_power3_02: Feel the fury of the Djinn
lines.mirage_use_power3_08: Fighting me was a grevious error
lines.mirage_use_power3_09: They will not ecape their fate
lines.mirage_use_power4_03: Take me where I am needed.
lines.mirage_use_power4_04: Nashala, where do you need me to go….
lines.mirage_use_power4_05: I move at your whims Nashala…
lines.mirage_use_power4_06: The Djinn take me where I am needed
lines.mirage_use_power4_07: Time to get out of here…
lines.mirage_use_power4_09: Time for a change of environs…

lines.nano_ally_haze_big_ult_03: Now there's a lady who knows how to murder people.
lines.nano_ally_hornet_far_snipe_01: How did you even see them?
lines.nano_ally_kelvin_clutch_heal_03: Cutting it a little close, aren't we Kelvin/
lines.nano_ally_orion_far_shot_02: I see that arthritis hasn’t kicked in yet
lines.nano_ally_orion_far_shot_03: You haven't lost a step old man….
lines.nano_be_careful_01: I may want to get back to the group…
lines.nano_be_careful_02: If I'm going to go out on my own I need to keep my wits about me
lines.nano_be_careful_03: They could be coming for me any minute now…
lines.nano_close_call_01: That could have been a calamity
lines.nano_close_call_02: Better people have tried to kill me
lines.nano_close_call_03: This wouldn't even make my top 5 near death experiences
lines.nano_close_call_04: They're being a little frisky, aren't they
lines.nano_close_call_05: The day people stop trying to kill you is the day you lose relevance
lines.nano_congrats_04: Nice to work with compotent people
lines.nano_congrats_05: Now that was quite lovely, wasn't it…
lines.nano_desperation_power1_02: I'm the one in control here…
lines.nano_desperation_power1_03: I'll take you down with me…
lines.nano_desperation_power1_04: I'll put them in the dirt
lines.nano_desperation_power2_03: I'll give it everything I have…
lines.nano_desperation_power2_04: I have to make this count…
lines.nano_desperation_power2_05: I'm not dying without a fight….
lines.nano_desperation_power3_04: I have a few tricks left
lines.nano_desperation_power3_05: This won't be as easy as you think…
lines.nano_desperation_power4_02: I need to get outta here…
lines.nano_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_01: All you did was make yourself a stationary target
lines.nano_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_02: You didn't think that would work, did you/
lines.nano_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: Be careful, they have the rejuvinator
lines.nano_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_03: Of course I did that on purpose…
lines.nano_enemy_hornet_damaged_by_snipe_03: Vindicta's trying to pick us off!
lines.nano_enemy_tengu_flies_away_03: Of course she flew away, why wouldn't she
lines.nano_killstreak_high_01: I could kill them all day…
lines.nano_killstreak_high_02: I don't know what people are talking about, subjugating your enemies is rather easy, isn't it
lines.nano_killstreak_high_03: Welcome to the age of Calico.
lines.nano_killstreak_mid_01: This will go so much easier if you just except your fate
lines.nano_killstreak_mid_02: And this is what success looks like.
lines.nano_killstreak_mid_03: I hold myself to the highest standards
lines.nano_killstreak_start_03: This is even easier than I expected
lines.nano_killstreak_start_04: Hm. I thought they'd put up a fight, I guess I can be wrong
lines.nano_killstreak_start_05: They really are rather pathetic, aren't they?
lines.nano_kill_anyhero_05: I could do this all day.
lines.nano_kill_astro_01: If you can't stop me what chance do you have against The Troubadour?
lines.nano_kill_astro_02: You should have stayed in whatever backwater town you came from
lines.nano_kill_astro_03: Holliday, your grandather would be rolling in his grave
lines.nano_kill_astro_04: You weren't ready for this fight Holliday
lines.nano_kill_astro_05: A smalltown sheriff couldn’t accomplish what Scotland Yard has been trying to do for years, surprise surprise
lines.nano_kill_atlas_02: Abrams you picked a fight you never were going to win.
lines.nano_kill_bebop_01: The scrap golem is no more
lines.nano_kill_bebop_02: We don't need to worry about Bebop
lines.nano_kill_bebop_04: Keep your hooks off my friends…
lines.nano_kill_bebop_05: Your creator should have built a more compotent son
lines.nano_kill_chrono_01: I've always wanted to go toe-to-toe with Paradox
lines.nano_kill_chrono_02: Love your museums by the way.
lines.nano_kill_chrono_03: I was hoping that our paths would never cross Paradox
lines.nano_kill_chrono_04: Next time, just stay out of my way
lines.nano_kill_chrono_05: You shouldn't have provoked me Paradox
lines.nano_kill_forge_01: Fairfax Industries needs a new Engineer
lines.nano_kill_forge_02: You're brilliant McGinnis, but brilance will only get you so far
lines.nano_kill_forge_03: You rely on machines when you should be relying on yourself
lines.nano_kill_ghost_01: Given her condition I did that lady a favor…
lines.nano_kill_ghost_02: Only a fool would make a deal with Oathkeeper
lines.nano_kill_ghost_03: I can still smell her arrogance
lines.nano_kill_ghost_04: There's few things worse than someone vastly overestimating their relevance
lines.nano_kill_ghost_05: Lady Geist isn't a problem anymore…
lines.nano_kill_gigawatt_01: Your brilliant Seven, but you're not me.
lines.nano_kill_gigawatt_02: I won't lie, I'm a little dissapointed
lines.nano_kill_gigawatt_03: I expected more from someone like you, Seven
lines.nano_kill_gigawatt_05: For someone who fashions themselves a mastermind you were remarkably easy to kill.
lines.nano_kill_haze_02: You aren't the first person who's tried to kill me Haze
lines.nano_kill_haze_03: The OSIC needs to stay out of my affairs
lines.nano_kill_haze_04: The assassin has been dealt with
lines.nano_kill_haze_05: It would seem that your talents are overblown
lines.nano_kill_hornet_01: She was more dangerous than I expected
lines.nano_kill_hornet_02: She had talent, she's just not me
lines.nano_kill_hornet_03: Snipers are the wine coolers of assassins
lines.nano_kill_inferno_03: Did the mean man burn you, Ava/
lines.nano_kill_kelvin_01: You're a clever man Kelvin, why did you think you could beat me
lines.nano_kill_kelvin_02: Your expedition has come to an end, Kelvin
lines.nano_kill_kelvin_04: The bravest men are often the most stupid
lines.nano_kill_krill_01: You got in my way Krill
lines.nano_kill_lash_01: Lash, your ego will be your undoing
lines.nano_kill_lash_04: If I wanted to listen to arrogant twats I'd go to washington
lines.nano_kill_magician_02: A shame they couldn't conjure up talent.
lines.nano_kill_magician_04: It's ok Ava, no ones going to turn you into a rabbit anymore
lines.nano_kill_magician_05: Sinclar was out of their league
lines.nano_kill_mirage_01: Nashala isn't getting what she paid for…
lines.nano_kill_mirage_02: I wish all my targets had you for a bodyguard…
lines.nano_kill_mirage_04: Good to know that the Djinn can't afford decent help
lines.nano_kill_operative_02: Always a pleasure seeing you again Raven
lines.nano_kill_operative_03: The Soviet Empire isn't going to be pleased with me
lines.nano_kill_operative_04: Oh Raven, when will you learn…
lines.nano_kill_orion_04: The Baxter Society will morn him.  As will I.
lines.nano_kill_orion_05: You're a relic of a bygone era Talon
lines.nano_kill_shiv_01: You may not beable to fight, but at least you have style
lines.nano_kill_shiv_02: He won't last in the Society…
lines.nano_kill_shiv_04: You're the best Wesley could find?
lines.nano_kill_shiv_05: Love your hair by the way
lines.nano_kill_slork_01: If I didn’t kill him the Baxter Society would have eventually…
lines.nano_kill_slork_03: And now I'm fighting some sea tyrant, lovely
lines.nano_kill_synth_02: Pocket, just go home to your trust fund.
lines.nano_kill_synth_03: I love tying up lose ends
lines.nano_kill_synth_04: I'm sure Maximillian will have questions…
lines.nano_kill_tengu_02: I don't see why Mendoza couldn't stop her…
lines.nano_kill_tengu_03: I won't let you get in my way Ivy
lines.nano_kill_tengu_04: Ivy, you're not used to fighting a higher class of criminal.
lines.nano_kill_tengu_05: You aren't ready to fight someone like me, Ivy
lines.nano_kill_trapper_02: He died as irrelevantly as he lived
lines.nano_kill_trapper_03: You had no business being out here
lines.nano_kill_trapper_04: You were never going to survive the Maelstrom, Trapper
lines.nano_kill_trapper_05: I feel like I just lowered my self…
lines.nano_kill_viper_02: There's nothing worse than a criminal without standards…
lines.nano_kill_viper_03: I'm amazed she wasn't in jail
lines.nano_kill_viscous_03: Viscous won't be a problem for a while
lines.nano_kill_viscous_04: The Deep should have choosen a more compotent emmisary
lines.nano_kill_warden_02: Warden, one day you'll understand the cost of blind loyalty…
lines.nano_kill_warden_03: Warden won't be hasseling us for a bit…
lines.nano_kill_wraith_01: Sorry it had to go this way Wraith…
lines.nano_kill_wraith_02: And here I hoped we could be friends…
lines.nano_kill_wraith_03: A pity you tried to fight me, Wraith
lines.nano_kill_wraith_04: Wraith we could have had so much fun together…
lines.nano_kill_wrecker_03: You can take the girl out of the Baxter Society…
lines.nano_kill_wrecker_04: Did that mean creature try to eat you Ava?  It's ok, mommy killed it.
lines.nano_kill_yamato_01: The 7th Moon's time is coming to an end
lines.nano_kill_yamato_03: Yamato, you may be deadly but you're not me
lines.nano_kill_yamato_04: You have power Yamato… you just don't know what to do with it
lines.nano_match_start_nano_astro_convo01_04: Don't worry about us, Sheriff - we'll be fine.
lines.nano_match_start_nano_astro_convo02_04: Enough to know to stay away from it.
lines.nano_match_start_nano_astro_convo03_01: You're not much of a talker, are you.
lines.nano_match_start_nano_astro_convo03_03: God, you and Wesley would get along famously.
lines.nano_match_start_viper_nano_convo01_04: I kill people for money.  You kill people for a pack of cigarettes and a hot meal, we're not the same.
lines.nano_match_start_viper_nano_convo01_06: No I'm sounding a lot classist because I'm nothing like you.
lines.nano_match_start_viper_nano_convo02_02: I didn't realize my exploits were things of New Jersey lore.
lines.nano_match_start_viper_nano_convo03_04: Vyper, there are some who may find your pathetic nature endearing.  I am not one of them.  So let me lay down ground rules.  If you touch my cat, I'll take your hand.  If you hurt my cat, I'll kill you.  And if for some pruno addled reason you decide that it's a good idea to steal my cat, you will pray for a death that will not come.
lines.nano_pick_up_gold_05: I won't leave this lying around.
lines.nano_pick_up_rejuv_03: The rejuvinator's in hand, what's our plan?
lines.nano_t2_shop_reminder_01: I need to get to the curiosity shop…
lines.nano_t2_shop_reminder_02: I should see what I can afford at the shop
lines.nano_t2_shop_reminder_03: Might be time to improve my gear
lines.nano_t3_shop_reminder_02: I can get something of quality…
lines.nano_t4_shop_reminder_03: I can't spend this when I'm dead
lines.nano_tower_got_denied_02: And like that we are closer to victory
lines.nano_tower_got_denied_03: Oh look, they think they're making a difference…
lines.nano_tower_got_denied_04: The ritual will be completed soon.
lines.nano_upgrade_power1_03: Some of my favorite tools of the trade
lines.nano_upgrade_power1_06: Taking their lives will be easy
lines.nano_upgrade_power1_09: I'll do my best to make it quick
lines.nano_upgrade_power1_10: Not everything needs to be subtle
lines.nano_upgrade_power2_02: I'm going to put my fist through their skull
lines.nano_upgrade_power2_03: I'm ready to get my hands dirty
lines.nano_upgrade_power2_05: Why stop at metaphorical blood on my hands?
lines.nano_upgrade_power2_06: I will leave a bloody trail in my wake.
lines.nano_upgrade_power2_07: Ready to get in the mix
lines.nano_upgrade_power2_08: Oh this is going to be fun
lines.nano_upgrade_power2_10: Their blood will stain my hands
lines.nano_upgrade_power3_01: Ava darling, are you ready to get to work?
lines.nano_upgrade_power3_02: What would I do without you, Ava
lines.nano_upgrade_power3_03: No time to make biscuts today Ava, we have work to do
lines.nano_upgrade_power3_05: Thanks for joining mommy at her job, Ava
lines.nano_upgrade_power3_08: I'll always invest in you, my dear
lines.nano_upgrade_power3_09: You never let me down ava
lines.nano_upgrade_power3_10: I can always rely on Ava
lines.nano_upgrade_power4_01: I always have an escape route
lines.nano_upgrade_power4_04: I decide when and where I strike
lines.nano_upgrade_power4_05: The Baxter Society has given me many gifts
lines.nano_upgrade_power4_06: There's no situation I can't get out of
lines.nano_upgrade_power4_07: My timing needs to be perfect
lines.nano_upgrade_power4_08: There's a reason I'm hard to catch
lines.nano_upgrade_power4_09: If interpol hasn't caught me what chance do they have
lines.nano_use_ability_refresher_02: Let's try that again shall we?
lines.nano_use_echo_shard_02: I have more tricks up my sleeve…
lines.nano_use_echo_shard_03: I'm not finished with you yet…
lines.nano_use_metal_skin_02: Let's see them try to shoot me…
lines.nano_use_power1_04: Darling, you don't have a chance
lines.nano_use_power1_10: I'll be the last thing you see
lines.nano_use_power2_06: I'm ready to have some fun…
lines.nano_use_power3_01: Let's go for a walk, Ava…
lines.nano_use_power3_05: Let's see if they prepared for this
lines.nano_use_power3_06: The streets are mine to prowl
lines.nano_use_power3_08: Let's go for a little stroll
lines.nano_use_power4_02: The shadows call, and I answer…
lines.nano_use_power4_08: The shadows are my sword and shield
lines.nano_use_tech_purge_02: That was never going to work on me…
lines.nano_use_tech_purge_03: Their tricks won't work on me…
