lines.necro_ally_dynamo_clutch_heal_03: Thought I was in trouble for a minute…
lines.necro_ally_fencer_killed_in_lane_01: They took out the golden boy
lines.necro_ally_forge_clutch_heal_02: Maybe she's not as bad as I thought…
lines.necro_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_01: My mentor was right about him…
lines.necro_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_03: How did he learn how to do that…
lines.necro_ally_haze_big_ult_01: I'd hate to have the OSIC hunting me…
lines.necro_ally_haze_big_ult_02: Watching a Sandman work is scarier than I expected
lines.necro_ally_haze_interrupt_with_finesse_0: That could have been bad if Haze wasn't here…
lines.necro_ally_krill_grab_mid_enemy_ult_03: That mole is beating the hell out of 'em
lines.necro_ally_orion_far_shot_03: The old man still has it
lines.necro_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_01: Grey Talon was looking out for us
lines.necro_ally_warden_big_ult_02: He stood up to them all…
lines.necro_be_careful_01: I'm all alone in enemy territory, what can go wrong…
lines.necro_be_careful_02: I might be pushing my luck staying out here…
lines.necro_be_careful_03: I can't tell if I'm being overconfident or appropriately confident
lines.necro_close_call_01: That could have went real bad…
lines.necro_close_call_02: I'm not ready to join the dead quite yet…
lines.necro_congrats_05: This is coming together well, isn't it
lines.necro_desperation_power3_01: This part always creeps me out…
lines.necro_desperation_power4_04: The dead will have their due…
lines.necro_enemy_atlas_unkillable_03: Someone stop this guy from healing!
lines.necro_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_01: You're making this too easy Bebop
lines.necro_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_02: Come on Bebop, at least make this a challenge
lines.necro_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: Shouldn't have just stood there, Bebop
lines.necro_enemy_dynamo_charges_02: Look out for a black hole
lines.necro_enemy_dynamo_charges_03: Don't get close to the professor
lines.necro_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: We need to prepare our defenses
lines.necro_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: they have the rejuv they're going to make a push
lines.necro_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_02: You can't hide from the dead
lines.necro_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_03: You're not as smart as you think Haze
lines.necro_enemy_inferno_killed_mid_ult_03: Infernus has gotta be pissed about that…
lines.necro_enemy_krill_grabbed_02: Get this mole off of me!
lines.necro_hunt_01: Where the hell did they go
lines.necro_hunt_03: Damn it, they were right here
lines.necro_killstreak_high_01: Your lives are offered as tribute to my mentor
lines.necro_killstreak_high_02: The demands of the dead will be ignored no longer!
lines.necro_killstreak_high_03: My mentor thanks you for throwing away your lives
lines.necro_killstreak_mid_01: I can feel my power growing
lines.necro_killstreak_mid_02: It just keeps getting easier and easier
lines.necro_killstreak_mid_03: You can't stop an advocate of the dead
lines.necro_killstreak_start_01: The more they die, the stronger I become…
lines.necro_killstreak_start_02: The dead are stirring in midtown
lines.necro_killstreak_start_03: The bodies just keep piling up
lines.necro_killstreak_start_04: You don't have what it takes to stop me
lines.necro_killstreak_start_05: I bet the kids at Blackmore are gonna talk a lot less shit now
lines.necro_kill_anyhero_03: Shouldn't have gotten in my way
lines.necro_kill_anyhero_05: I promised I'd do whatever it takes
lines.necro_kill_anyhero_06: Today is definatey taking a turn.
lines.necro_kill_anyhero_07: I think I may be in over my head
lines.necro_kill_anyhero_08: Oh you'll be back, don't cry about it
lines.necro_kill_anyhero_09: I can't let you get in my way
lines.necro_kill_anyhero_10: What the hell have I gotten myself into…
lines.necro_kill_astro_03: Oh god, the law's after me that's great…
lines.necro_kill_astro_04: Shouldn't you be tracking down a serial killer or something, not worrying about a high school kid?
lines.necro_kill_atlas_03: My mentor says she needs that tome.
lines.necro_kill_atlas_04: You are messing with forces you don't understand Abrams.
lines.necro_kill_bebop_01: I'm not getting pushed around by a scrap golem.
lines.necro_kill_bebop_03: Go back to the junk yard where you belong.
lines.necro_kill_bebop_04: You'll have to find another way to help your mom.
lines.necro_kill_bebop_05: You were never going to beat me BeBop.
lines.necro_kill_bookworm_01: She is way too positive for me
lines.necro_kill_bookworm_02: How can she be so naïve
lines.necro_kill_chrono_02: Probably not welcome at the next pop up museum am I?
lines.necro_kill_chrono_03: You're not bad Paradox, but not bad's not enough.
lines.necro_kill_chrono_04: A shame we couldn't work things out Paradox.
lines.necro_kill_chrono_05: I really want to like her but she's making it hard.
lines.necro_kill_doorman_03: I don't know what the hell that thing was but it wasn't a doorman
lines.necro_kill_doorman_04: He thinks he's smarter than he is
lines.necro_kill_drifter_01: Drifter won't be hunting us any time soon
lines.necro_kill_drifter_02: That guy gave me the creeps
lines.necro_kill_drifter_03: It looks like my mastery of the dead extends to vampires.
lines.necro_kill_drifter_04: I'm not going to be one of your victims, Drifter
lines.necro_kill_drifter_05: Go whistle some place else loser
lines.necro_kill_dynamo_01: I don't like fighting teachers, it makes me feel weird.
lines.necro_kill_dynamo_02: I bet he is a better teacher than he is a fighter.
lines.necro_kill_dynamo_04: I gotta say Dynamo, a lot of your former students are big fans.
lines.necro_kill_dynamo_05: If it makes you feel better I think your jacket's cool.
lines.necro_kill_familiar_01: I wish I could make him a pet
lines.necro_kill_familiar_04: I'm gonna feel bad about that for a while
lines.necro_kill_fencer_01: Great I killed my lab partner
lines.necro_kill_fencer_02: I don't hate him as much as I wish I did
lines.necro_kill_fencer_03: He'll go cry to daddy and be fine, boo hoo
lines.necro_kill_fencer_04: This is gonna make class awkward next week
lines.necro_kill_fencer_05: Looks like you're not the best at everything after all
lines.necro_kill_forge_03: Don't worry McGinnis, the Fairefax war machine will roll on just fine without you.
lines.necro_kill_forge_04: You don't use magic McGinnis, you abuse it.
lines.necro_kill_forge_05: The old ways are the strong ways McGinnis.
lines.necro_kill_frank_01: I mean you’re a pile of dead bodies of course the necromancer was going to win
lines.necro_kill_frank_02: You should have came to me for help, Victor
lines.necro_kill_frank_03: To bad, he was kinda cool
lines.necro_kill_frank_04: At least I stoped his pain
lines.necro_kill_frank_05: The dead can be so pushy some times
lines.necro_kill_ghost_01: She looks real good for her age.
lines.necro_kill_ghost_02: I hate people like you Geist.
lines.necro_kill_ghost_03: You're not feeding me to Oathkeeper.
lines.necro_kill_ghost_04: You were a fool to make a deal with Oathkeeper, Geist.
lines.necro_kill_gigawatt_01: I wonder if he takes interns.
lines.necro_kill_gigawatt_02: It takes a little more than lightning to scare me, Seven.
lines.necro_kill_gigawatt_03: Your pursuit of power ends here, Seven.
lines.necro_kill_gigawatt_04: So that's the guy who escaped Lost Whisper.
lines.necro_kill_gigawatt_05: He won't be down for long.
lines.necro_kill_haze_01: I want the OSIC out of my business.
lines.necro_kill_haze_02: You should meet my mentor Haze, I'd think you'd like her.
lines.necro_kill_haze_04: Doesn't the government have better things to do than bother teenagers?
lines.necro_kill_haze_05: Billy was right, the OSIC sucks.
lines.necro_kill_high_networth: I go to Blackmore, you think money impresses me?
lines.necro_kill_hornet_01: I'm sorry about what happened to you Vindicta.
lines.necro_kill_hornet_02: I wish you'd let me help you Vindicta.
lines.necro_kill_hornet_03: I wasn't about to let you put more blood on your hands Vindicta.
lines.necro_kill_hornet_05: You didn't give me a choice Vindicta.
lines.necro_kill_inferno_02: For God's sake Infernus, stop trying to light me on fire!
lines.necro_kill_inferno_03: I know what you did Infernus.
lines.necro_kill_inferno_04: The people who worked at Pier 31 don't have kind things to say about you Infernus.
lines.necro_kill_kelvin_01: I read a lot about him, he seemed cool.
lines.necro_kill_kelvin_02: I wish I wasn't fighting him, I have a million questions.
lines.necro_kill_kelvin_03: I bet my mentor would love to get her hands on that stone.
lines.necro_kill_kelvin_05: I might be able to help you Kelvin, not today obviously because I killed you, but in the future.
lines.necro_kill_krill_01: I'm not getting mauled by a mole and his weird roomate
lines.necro_kill_krill_05: At least mo will be comfortable in the dirt
lines.necro_kill_lash_02: I'm not intimidated by you Lash
lines.necro_kill_lash_04: He's like all the boys in my sophmore gym class merged together to form some super prick
lines.necro_kill_magician_03: You got some nice tricks Sinclair
lines.necro_kill_mirage_04: He seemed like a decent guy.
lines.necro_kill_nano_01: When this is over I'd love to keep in touch.
lines.necro_kill_nano_04: She's as dangerous as they say…
lines.necro_kill_nano_05: Glad I'm walking away from that in one piece.
lines.necro_kill_orion_02: You're not going to stop me Grey Talon
lines.necro_kill_orion_03: My mentor warned me about you Talon
lines.necro_kill_priest_03: I won't let you stop me Venator
lines.necro_kill_punkgoat_01: Billy is such a pain in the ass.
lines.necro_kill_punkgoat_02: I can't believe you're fighting for them Billy
lines.necro_kill_punkgoat_04: You're being such a loser Billy.
lines.necro_kill_shiv_03: You're not pushing me around, Shiv
lines.necro_kill_shiv_04: He thought he was so cool
lines.necro_kill_shiv_05: You took something that doesn't belong to you, Shiv
lines.necro_kill_synth_03: Once a Fairfax, always a Fairfax
lines.necro_kill_tengu_02: Feel kind of bad about fighting her
lines.necro_kill_tengu_03: Wish we were on the same side Ivy
lines.necro_kill_tengu_05: That should get the gargoyle off our backs for a little bit
lines.necro_kill_unicorn_01: Maybe you should have stuck with the circus
lines.necro_kill_unicorn_02: You're out of your league Celeste
lines.necro_kill_unicorn_03: This was never going to end well for you Celeste
lines.necro_kill_vampirebat_02: You won life Mina, can you stop being an asshole?
lines.necro_kill_viper_02: If the cops won't deal with you, I will.
lines.necro_kill_viper_03: You're not taking this hand, Viper
lines.necro_kill_viper_05: Get away from me you scumbag
lines.necro_kill_viscous_02: That was a weird little goo guy
lines.necro_kill_viscous_03: I'd feel worse about that if he didn't get goo on me
lines.necro_kill_viscous_05: The cube was never going to be enough to protect you.
lines.necro_kill_werewolf_01: I can't let you stop me, Silver
lines.necro_kill_werewolf_02: That could have gone real bad…
lines.necro_kill_werewolf_03: Lucky I'm walking away from that fight alive
lines.necro_kill_werewolf_05: Glad I still have all 3 of my hands…
lines.necro_kill_wraith_01: I bet she's fun to hang out with.
lines.necro_kill_wraith_05: I really don't want Wraith as an enemy
lines.necro_kill_yamato_01: She's a bitch, but I'm kind of ok with it
lines.necro_kill_yamato_02: I get that I'm supposed to not like her but I can't help it
lines.necro_kill_yamato_05: I will make this up to you Yamato, please don't take it personally
lines.necro_last_one_standing_01: Keep it together Graves, you can do this
lines.necro_last_one_standing_03: Ok, it's all on me, no pressure there
lines.necro_leaving_area_03: I'll be back when I can
lines.necro_match_start_familiar_necro_convo01: Well stick with me, I'll take care of you.
lines.necro_match_start_fencer_necro_convo02_0: I was skipping class.  I'm fine.
lines.necro_match_start_fencer_necro_convo03_0: How is someone kind of a warlord?
I mean we do.  It's warlord.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_astro_convo02_08: I can take care of myself
lines.necro_match_start_necro_astro_convo03_04: And I'm hoping you get shot.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_gigawatt_convo01: What, or I'll end up like you?
Don't pretend like you care if I live or die.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_gigawatt_convo02: You don't know what you're talking about.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_gigawatt_convo03: I'm able to hold my own.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_haze_convo02_02: Right now I'm worried about living long enough to graduate.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_haze_convo02_04: Not interested in being a sandman.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_haze_convo03_01: Surprised you're not trying to take the hand.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_inferno_convo01_: Is it true you once kicked Mina Ha out of your bar?
Surprised she didn’t just bribe you.
God I would have loved to see her face.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_inferno_convo02_: Ya know there's rumors about you.
Yeah.  Supposedly you're with the mob.
That's not what my classmates say.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_priest_convo01_0: Believe me father, I already regret meeting you.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_priest_convo02_0: What kind of priest carries a gun
One that - ugh I don't do purple prose. I do.  I traffic with the dead.   If you have a problem with that  you shouldn't be here.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_priest_convo03_0: Oh my god, someone religious is being closed minded I wish I wore pearls so I could clutch them.
Thanks for your concern.  I can take things from here.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_werewolf_convo01: Are you always a bitch, or is this something special just for me?
I think I don't hate you.
lines.necro_match_start_necro_werewolf_convo03: You always want to be a bounty hunter?
lines.necro_match_start_unicorn_necro_convo02_: My parents have penthouse in midtown, what do you think?
lines.necro_match_start_unicorn_necro_convo03_: Your jacket would be cooler without the fringe.
Don’t see that changing anytime soon.
lines.necro_melee_kill_03: You shouldn't have tried to fight me
lines.necro_near_miss_04: They won't be lucky next time
lines.necro_pick_up_gold_01: If I see souls lying around I'm going to take them
lines.necro_pick_up_gold_03: Hey man, I'll take all the souls I can
lines.necro_pick_up_gold_04: If they're gonna drop it, I'm gonna take it
lines.necro_pick_up_rejuv_03: Now's our chance to press the advantage
lines.necro_revenge_kill: I didn't forget what you did.
lines.necro_t1_shop_reminder_01: I might want to swing by the store
lines.necro_t1_shop_reminder_02: Wonder what I can get at the curiosity shop
lines.necro_t2_shop_reminder_02: I can get something decent at the shop
lines.necro_t2_shop_reminder_03: I should pop by the curiosity shop when I have the chance
lines.necro_t3_shop_reminder_01: The right item can make a difference
lines.necro_t3_shop_reminder_02: May be time to buy a relic
lines.necro_t3_shop_reminder_03: I should take another look at the store
lines.necro_t4_shop_reminder_01: No point in saving any more souls
lines.necro_t4_shop_reminder_02: I can get anything at the store
lines.necro_t4_shop_reminder_03: I need to spend these souls
lines.necro_tower_got_denied_03: So they got some souls, who cares
lines.necro_tower_got_denied_04: One step closer to summoning the patron
lines.necro_tower_got_denied_05: The ritual is closer to  completion
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_01: The dead make for great sentries
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_02: These guys do a great job at keeping my sister out of my room.
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_03: It pays having a bunch of skulls lying around
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_04: Nothing says stay out like a bunch of floating skulls.
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_05: I don't care if it's on the nose it works.
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_06: I'm a lot of fun on Halloween.
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_07: This was one of the first things my mentor taught me.
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_08: Ready to put these guys to work.
lines.necro_upgrade_power1_10: I don't get why people don't like it when I use this babysitting, kids love pointing at skulls.
lines.necro_upgrade_power2_10: The dead are good at rote tasks.
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_01: I'm gonna need a helping hand.
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_02: It's a little extreme, but it should slow them down
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_03: I'll try to hinder them the best I can
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_04: This is gonna be pretty creepy
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_05: The dead can get pretty handsy with the living
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_06: Let the dead grasp at them
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_07: Here's a line they're not gonna wanna cross
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_08: This should make them stop and rethink their choices
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_09: Doesn't  get much weirder than a bunch of grasping hands
lines.necro_upgrade_power3_10: I'll do what I can to hold the line
lines.necro_upgrade_power4_01: What's the point of having a lich for a best friend if I can't tap into her power?
lines.necro_upgrade_power4_02: I've learned much from my mentors…
lines.necro_upgrade_power4_06: There's no escaping what I have planned.
lines.necro_upgrade_power4_08: Things are gonna get a little weird.
lines.necro_upgrade_power4_10: I will be one of the greatest necromancers in Manhattan.
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_02: I'm gonna have to call in all my favors with the dead if I wanna stay alive.
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_03: My mentor taught me how to stave off death
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_04: One day I'll get a phlyactary of my own, but this will have to do for now
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_05: I can't help anyone if I'm dead
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_06: I need to stay in the fight as long as I can
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_07: I won't be joining the dead anytime soon
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_09: I need to face danger head on
lines.necro_upgrade_power6_12: I need to appease my mentor
lines.necro_use_power3_04: I'll take all the help I can get
lines.necro_use_power3_05: I got some friends who would love to say hi
lines.necro_use_power3_06: Cross the line if you dare
lines.necro_use_power3_09: You should never cross the dead
lines.necro_use_power4_03: The dead's wrath will be felt.

lines.orion_ally_dynamo_clutch_heal_02: I knew I could count on you
lines.orion_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_03: I can still smell the ozone…
lines.orion_ally_haze_big_ult_01: The Baxter Society could use someone like you Haze
lines.orion_ally_hornet_far_snipe_02: I don't know if I could have made that shot
lines.orion_ally_kelvin_clutch_heal_02: I thought I was really in trouble for a minute
lines.orion_ally_viscous_clutch_cube_03: So this is the cube I've heard so much about…
lines.orion_be_careful_02: Just because I don’t see them, doesn't mean they aren't here…
lines.orion_close_call_02: It's time for discression, not valor…
lines.orion_close_call_03: I need to find a place to rest
lines.orion_close_call_04: I need to stop cutting it so close…
lines.orion_congrats_03: Together we can do great things
lines.orion_desperation_power1_04: One arrow is all it takes…
lines.orion_desperation_power3_02: Just need a little more time….
lines.orion_desperation_power3_03: It's not too late to trap them…
lines.orion_end_streak: It's always satisfying taking someone off their pedestal
lines.orion_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_01: Word of advice: never make yourself a stationary target
lines.orion_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_02: All you did was throw your life away Bebop
lines.orion_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: I thought automotons were supposed to be clever
lines.orion_enemy_dynamo_charges_03: Keep your eye on the professor!
lines.orion_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They're going to try to put the pressure on us
lines.orion_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_02: You can't hide from me Haze
lines.orion_hunt_02: The prey is around here somewhere….
lines.orion_killstreak_high_01: Today is a day for bloody retribution.
lines.orion_killstreak_high_02: The death I bring today is nothing compared to what lies in store for Hathorne
lines.orion_killstreak_high_03: How much blood must I bathe in before you give up?
lines.orion_killstreak_mid_01: New York is my hunting grounds…
lines.orion_killstreak_mid_02: You will drown in the blood of your allies
lines.orion_killstreak_mid_03: I'm not afraid to die. Are you?
lines.orion_killstreak_start_01: Walk away while you still have the chance
lines.orion_killstreak_start_02: No one will stand between me and my revenge
lines.orion_killstreak_start_03: I don't have the luxury of mercy today.
lines.orion_killstreak_start_04: They will fall one. By. One.
lines.orion_killstreak_start_05: I have enough arrows for all of you…
lines.orion_kill_anyhero_10: I'll kill as many of them as I have to…
lines.orion_kill_astro_03: I won't let the law stand in my way
lines.orion_kill_astro_04: No one is safe from me
lines.orion_kill_astro_05: Go back home while you still can Holliday
lines.orion_kill_atlas_03: I wish there was another way
lines.orion_kill_atlas_04: Any other day and we could have been allies
lines.orion_kill_atlas_05: You gave me no choice Abrams
lines.orion_kill_bebop_03: I won't be denied by a machine
lines.orion_kill_bebop_04: I won't let you stop me Bebop
lines.orion_kill_bookworm_02: She wont be shielding her allies anymore
lines.orion_kill_bookworm_03: Not all stories have happy endings…
lines.orion_kill_bookworm_04_alt: This isn't the place for you, Paige.
lines.orion_kill_bookworm_05: You're in over your head, kid.
lines.orion_kill_chrono_01: I have no time for games Paradox
lines.orion_kill_chrono_02: I won't be stopped by they likes of you Paradox
lines.orion_kill_chrono_05: Paradox, all you did was delay the inevitable
lines.orion_kill_doorman_03: The Baroness is backing the wrong patron, Doorman
lines.orion_kill_doorman_04: Return to The Baroness while you still can
lines.orion_kill_doorman_05: You should never have left the hotel, Doorman
lines.orion_kill_drifter_03: I wasn't expecting to see the Drifter here, but I'm glad he showed up to get what was coming to him.
lines.orion_kill_drifter_05: I won't let you ruin anymore lives Drifter
lines.orion_kill_dynamo_02: You're not ready for this fight Professor
lines.orion_kill_dynamo_03: He belongs in the classroom, not the battlefield
lines.orion_kill_dynamo_04: You have spirit Dynamo, but spirit isn't enough
lines.orion_kill_dynamo_05: Your wife needs you alive Dynamo. Stop this madness
lines.orion_kill_forge_01: Your machines will never stop me
lines.orion_kill_forge_02: Your little war toys will never be enough
lines.orion_kill_forge_05: That woman is proving to be a problem
lines.orion_kill_frank_01: I won't let you get in my way Victor.
lines.orion_kill_frank_03: Corpses are such a pain in the ass to kill
lines.orion_kill_frank_04: I wish you luck in your search, but you're not winning today
lines.orion_kill_ghost_02: I have no patience for those who prey on others
lines.orion_kill_gigawatt_02: I dedicated my life to killing things like you, Seven
lines.orion_kill_gigawatt_03: You may have outsmarted the law, but you'll never outsmart me
lines.orion_kill_gigawatt_04: Men like you are as predictable as they are cliché, Seven
lines.orion_kill_gigawatt_05: Justice doesn't come swiftly. But it always comes for people like you.
lines.orion_kill_haze_01: I won't let the government get in my way
lines.orion_kill_haze_02: I didn't want to fight the OSIC, but I'll do what I must
lines.orion_kill_haze_05: Your dream walking days are over, Haze
lines.orion_kill_high_networth: And you thought you were the Apex Predator…
lines.orion_kill_hornet_01: Why did you turn on me Vindicta
lines.orion_kill_hornet_02: I thought we wanted the same thing Vindicta
lines.orion_kill_hornet_03: I didn't want to do this Vindicta
lines.orion_kill_hornet_04: I thought she was my friend.
lines.orion_kill_hornet_05: Only one of us gets vengence today
lines.orion_kill_inferno_01: I wished there was another way
lines.orion_kill_inferno_02: I didn't want to spill more Ixian blood
lines.orion_kill_inferno_03: Why are you helping them Infernus
lines.orion_kill_inferno_05: Infernus won't be bothering us for a while
lines.orion_kill_kelvin_01: The dead belong in the ground
lines.orion_kill_kelvin_02: Kelvin: I'll give you the peace you seek
lines.orion_kill_kelvin_04: Quit while you still can Kelvin
lines.orion_kill_kelvin_05: There is no mercy for you today Kelvin
lines.orion_kill_krill_05: I can't let you get in my way Krill
lines.orion_kill_lash_03: Your hubris got you killed, Lash.
lines.orion_kill_lash_05: I tire of your games Lash
lines.orion_kill_mirage_02: The djinn are on the wrong side today
lines.orion_kill_nano_01: I was content to leave you alone Calico, why did you have to come here
lines.orion_kill_nano_03: I wish it didn't have to be this way.
lines.orion_kill_nano_04: She gave up on her ideals for something as pointless as money
lines.orion_kill_nano_05: I don't want to fight you Calico.
lines.orion_kill_priest_01: Wish the Venator was fighting for us…
lines.orion_kill_priest_02: I've seen a few Venator's in my time, that one was angrier than most…
lines.orion_kill_priest_03: So much for a friendly rivalry…
lines.orion_kill_punkgoat_02: One day you'll learn what real anger feels like Billy
lines.orion_kill_punkgoat_03: You're not a rebel Billy, you're just an asshole.
lines.orion_kill_shiv_01: and here I thought you could replace me, Shiv
lines.orion_kill_shiv_02: It seems I chose my replacement poorly
lines.orion_kill_shiv_03: Even the Baxter Society turns its back on me?
lines.orion_kill_shiv_04: In time you'll be great. But that day isn't today.
lines.orion_kill_shiv_05: You still have much to learn Shiv
lines.orion_kill_synth_03: How many lives must I take for this madness to end
lines.orion_kill_synth_04: You won't find your destiny here Pocket, only death
lines.orion_kill_tengu_02: You were a noble woman Ivy
lines.orion_kill_tengu_03: I took no pleasure in that Ivy
lines.orion_kill_tengu_04: You have a good heart Ivy, but good hearts don’t win wars
lines.orion_kill_vampirebat_01: Oh the misplaced arrogance of youth.
lines.orion_kill_vampirebat_02: Young vampires are always the stupidest
lines.orion_kill_viper_01: I'm not as frail as I look, Viper.
lines.orion_kill_viper_04: You prey on the weak, Viper, and I won't stand for it
lines.orion_kill_viper_05: Should have stayed in jail, Viper.
lines.orion_kill_viscous_03: That goo thing never had a chance against me
lines.orion_kill_warden_02: The world isn't black and white Warden.
lines.orion_kill_warden_03: Your obsession will be your undoing Warden
lines.orion_kill_wraith_01: You picked the wrong time to choose a side
lines.orion_kill_wraith_02: Greed got the best of you Wraith
lines.orion_kill_wraith_03: You're not half as clever as you think you are Wraith
lines.orion_kill_wraith_04: You never had a chance against me Wraith
lines.orion_kill_wrecker_01: I'll always make time to kill men like you Wrecker
lines.orion_kill_wrecker_03: Return to whatever abyss you crawled out of
lines.orion_kill_wrecker_04: Fairfax was a fool to think he could control you
lines.orion_kill_yamato_01: I'm sorry that you failed your brother.
lines.orion_kill_yamato_04: Yamato is no longer a threat
lines.orion_kill_yamato_05: She'll be looking for revenge soon
lines.orion_last_one_standing_01: And once again, I am alone.
lines.orion_last_one_standing_03: I'll hold on as long as I can…
lines.orion_match_start_astro_orion_convo01_01: What do you want from The Patron?
lines.orion_match_start_astro_orion_convo01_03: Looks like we have something in common.
lines.orion_match_start_astro_orion_convo02_01: Can I give you an unsolicted word of adivce Holliday?
lines.orion_match_start_astro_orion_convo02_03: People are going to tell you that there is a difference between justice and revenge, that you will dishonor the dead by stooping to their killer's level…ignore them. Revenge isn't for the dead.  It's for the living.
lines.orion_match_start_astro_orion_convo03_02: My son.  My daughter in law. My..my grandkids.
lines.orion_match_start_atlas_orion_convo01_02: Yeah.  They're also gonna have arrows through their necks.
lines.orion_match_start_atlas_orion_convo02_01: You remind me of my step daughter.
lines.orion_match_start_atlas_orion_convo03_02: Don't worry Abrams… I'm not dying until I have my revenge.
lines.orion_match_start_bebop_orion_convo01_01: I've never worked with a golem before.
lines.orion_match_start_bebop_orion_convo01_03: Now I feel like an asshole.
lines.orion_match_start_bebop_orion_convo03_02: I was one of the founding members.
lines.orion_match_start_bebop_orion_convo03_04: I do.  Some of them even have happy endings.
lines.orion_match_start_bookworm_orion_convo01: You remind me of my daughter in law.
lines.orion_match_start_bookworm_orion_convo03: Your parents know you're doing this.
It's not too late to go home.
I'll do what I can to protect you.
lines.orion_match_start_doorman_orion_convo01_: It's not throwing it away if they die.
lines.orion_match_start_doorman_orion_convo02_: How are things at The Baroness?
lines.orion_match_start_doorman_orion_convo03_: The Baroness still the most haunted hotel in America?
lines.orion_match_start_dynamo_orion_convo02_0: A lot more than most.  You endured something horrible and yet you live your life like it's going to be ok.
I wish I could be like you.
lines.orion_match_start_dynamo_orion_convo03_0: Have you been to Ixia professor?
I don't think so, but thank you for the offer.
lines.orion_match_start_forge_orion_convo01_02: I see charm is not one of your talents.
lines.orion_match_start_frank_orion_convo01_02: I'm old, of course I'm hurting.
lines.orion_match_start_frank_orion_convo02_01: I'll support you the best that I can, but I probably won't be charging in with you.
lines.orion_match_start_frank_orion_convo03_04: It used to be literal.  Then I retired. Now it's more figurative.
lines.orion_match_start_ghost_orion_convo01_01: That ward on your arm.  It's impressive.
lines.orion_match_start_ghost_orion_convo01_03: I'm sure the Baxter Society would love to speak to whoever designed it.
lines.orion_match_start_ghost_orion_convo02_01: You were a fool to make a deal with that thing.
lines.orion_match_start_ghost_orion_convo02_03: If you were I doubt you'd be risking your life right now.
lines.orion_match_start_ghost_orion_convo03_01: You know, you're lucky.  If The Baxter Society knew about your arrangement with Oathkeeper they probably would have put you in the ground.
lines.orion_match_start_gigawatt_orion_convo01: If I was still in the Baxter Society they would probably ask me to hunt you down.
lines.orion_match_start_gigawatt_orion_convo03: Today demands a level of brutality that few are capable of
lines.orion_match_start_haze_orion_convo01_04: Thank you. We… we got your card.
lines.orion_match_start_haze_orion_convo02_02: Let's be honest Haze, this was the only circumstance we'd have a reunion.
lines.orion_match_start_kelvin_orion_convo01_0: You don't know me.  You don't know my family.  And I'm willing to bet you don't know what real loss feels like.  So kindly keep your dime store platitudes to yourself.
lines.orion_match_start_kelvin_orion_convo02_0: Trap them in your ice dome and leave the rest to me.
Today you create a killing floor for me, do you understand?
lines.orion_match_start_kelvin_orion_convo03_0: I built it's name.  And the reputation of monster hunters is the least of my concern.
lines.orion_match_start_krill_orion_convo02_01: If we fail today, can you help me track someone down?
lines.orion_match_start_lash_orion_convo01_02: I was feeling better before you started talking.
lines.orion_match_start_lash_orion_convo01_04: Your delusions of grandeur are impressive
lines.orion_match_start_lash_orion_convo02_02: I do.  You're prowess is undeniable.
lines.orion_match_start_lash_orion_convo02_04: You'd begin your career with a string of modest successes, each one throwing logs on the fire of self confidence.
lines.orion_match_start_lash_orion_convo02_06: Then you'd start taking more dangerous work.  Work that you feel only you could handle. Your unorthodox tactics work 100% of the time.  Until they don't.  And then your brothers find your skinless corpse in a retention pond in Portugual or Denmark.   It's always Portugal or Denmark.
lines.orion_match_start_lash_orion_convo03_01: If we're going to win we need to learn to work together.
lines.orion_match_start_lash_orion_convo03_03: This is going to be goddamn nightmare.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_chrono_convo01_0: This has nothing to do with The Society.
I'm not in the mood for games Paradox.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_chrono_convo03_0: The only thing I expect from Paradox is style over substance.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_hornet_convo01_0: It is. And we won't squander it.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_synth_convo01_04: No.  Justice is for childen who don't know how the world works.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_synth_convo02_01: You're not a talker are you?
lines.orion_match_start_orion_synth_convo03_02: The suitcase is a little on the nose for a kid wearing daddy's jacket to work, don't you think.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_viscous_convo01_: Thank you for the offer Viscous.  I'm fine.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_viscous_convo02_: If we fail to summon the Patron we'll probably be dead.
*sigh* bring them my bow, they'll listen to what you have to say.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_wraith_convo01_0: Im not in the mood to chit chat.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_wraith_convo02_0: If that's all they're saying, I'm far more dangerous.
lines.orion_match_start_orion_wraith_convo03_0: First we isolate them.  Then we put them in the ground.
lines.orion_match_start_punkgoat_orion_convo01: The patron doesn't hate you.  I do.
lines.orion_match_start_punkgoat_orion_convo02: You don't know what you're talking about.
You being a moron has nothing to do with me starting the Baxter Society
lines.orion_match_start_punkgoat_orion_convo03: I think the fact that I didn't turn my head into a goat makes me better than you.
You want to act like a jackass that’s your business, but you don’t get to be indignent when I point it out.  Now shut up and try not to die.
lines.orion_match_start_viper_orion_convo02_01: I'm not looking to chit chat.
lines.orion_match_start_yamato_orion_convo01_0: It's nice that we understand each other.
lines.orion_match_start_yamato_orion_convo03_0: A sword and a bow… aren't we the icons of the modern world.
lines.orion_near_miss_02: They won't get lucky next time…
lines.orion_revenge_kill: You stirred something in me that was best left sleeping…
lines.orion_t1_shop_reminder_01: I should check out the store…
lines.orion_t1_shop_reminder_02: It might be time to get an item…
lines.orion_t2_shop_reminder_01: I wonder what else I can buy
lines.orion_t2_shop_reminder_02: I should see what I can afford now…
lines.orion_t2_shop_reminder_03: Perhaps I should spend what I have
lines.orion_t3_shop_reminder_01: It might be time to use these souls…
lines.orion_t3_shop_reminder_02: I can get something of quality
lines.orion_t3_shop_reminder_03: There must be something I can buy
lines.orion_t4_shop_reminder_02: If I want to summon the patron, I need to be well equipped
lines.orion_t4_shop_reminder_03: It's time to go back to the curiosity shoppe
lines.orion_tower_got_denied_01: We'll summon the patrons soon enough.
lines.orion_tower_got_denied_02: Soon the ritual will be complete…
lines.orion_tower_got_denied_03: We took the objective, that's what matters.
lines.orion_tower_got_denied_05: The ritual is one step closer to being complete…
lines.orion_upgrade_power1_02: I won't let my family down.
lines.orion_upgrade_power1_04: Ahhh the thrill of the hunt.
lines.orion_upgrade_power1_05: I've missed being on the hunt…
lines.orion_upgrade_power1_06: I'm ready to hunt larger game…
lines.orion_upgrade_power1_07: There's no man or beast I can't bring down.
lines.orion_upgrade_power1_08: I will find their trail… and I will end them.
lines.orion_upgrade_power1_09: They'll be dead before they know it.
lines.orion_upgrade_power2_02: They won't catch me flat footed.
lines.orion_upgrade_power2_04: I must be as mobile as my prey.
lines.orion_upgrade_power2_06: I won't let them catch me…
lines.orion_upgrade_power2_07: Need to use these buildings to my advantage…
lines.orion_upgrade_power2_08: I can't stay on the ground forever…
lines.orion_upgrade_power2_09: I must keep my wits about me…
lines.orion_upgrade_power3_01: They won't get the drop on me.
lines.orion_upgrade_power3_02: They'll walk right into my trap.
lines.orion_upgrade_power3_05: Snares have changed over the years, haven't they…
lines.orion_upgrade_power3_06: Soon I will spring the trap…
lines.orion_upgrade_power3_07: Outwitting our enemy shouldn't be too hard.
lines.orion_upgrade_power3_08: The won't find me to be easy prey.
lines.orion_upgrade_power3_10: I'll lure them into my trap.
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_01: They will have no place to hide.
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_02: The hunt is about to get more interesting.
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_04: I don't have to be the fastest… just the most clever.
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_05: Their spirits will guide my hand
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_06: I will not be denied my revenge
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_07: No one can hide from me
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_08: They will learn what it means to be hunted…
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_09: I am not alone on this hunt… the spirits join with me.
lines.orion_upgrade_power4_10: I will find them… no matter where they run to.
lines.orion_use_ability_refresher_03: I can call on the spirits again…
lines.orion_use_metal_skin_03: Fire on me all you want…
lines.orion_use_power2_04: If I stay on the ground, I'm dead…
lines.orion_use_power3_04: If they come, I'll be ready.
lines.orion_use_power3_07: Let' see what you catch, my friend…
lines.orion_use_power3_09: They won't know what hit them…
lines.orion_use_power4_06: Let them run, it will not save them.

lines.orion_ping_no_teamfight: I'm not ready for a team fight
lines.orion_ping_press_advantage: We need to press the advantage!
lines.orion_ping_pre_game_01: The hunt is about to begin.
lines.orion_ping_pre_game_02: I hope you all have the will to do what needs to be done.
lines.orion_ping_pre_game_04: We don't have the luxury of failure today
lines.orion_ping_pre_game_05: Today my grandkids will be paid in blood
lines.orion_ping_pre_game_06: I will do whatever it takes to complete the ritual

lines.orion_ping_use_ability4_03: I'll find them wherever they hide…
lines.orion_ping_use_ability4_09: I'll find them from a lane away…
lines.orion_ping_use_ability4_10: Ready to give long range support

lines.priest_ally_dynamo_clutch_heal_02: Dynamo's keeping me in the fight.
lines.priest_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_01: That man belonged in Lost Whisper.
lines.priest_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_02: He's a monster, but today he's my monster.
lines.priest_ally_gigawatt_multi_kill_ult_03: Seven is more powerful than I thought.
lines.priest_ally_haze_big_ult_02: The Sandman is beautiful to behold.
lines.priest_ally_haze_big_ult_03: It's always nice to see a professional work.
lines.priest_ally_krill_grab_mid_enemy_ult_03: I was saved by a mole man. These are strange times.
lines.priest_ally_orion_far_shot_03: Your aim's as steady as ever Talon.
lines.priest_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_01: Always a pleasure to work with The Baxter Society
lines.priest_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_02: I knew we could count on Talon
lines.priest_ally_orion_missile_stops_ult_03: Grey Talon is vigilant as always
lines.priest_ally_viscous_clutch_cube_02: The cube truly is a gift.
lines.priest_ally_warden_big_ult_01: He truly is a man of conviction
lines.priest_be_careful_02: I could be walking into a trap
lines.priest_be_careful_03: Need to be careful not to overexpose myself
lines.priest_close_call_02: It's not my time to die
lines.priest_close_call_03: I've gotten out of worse jams
lines.priest_congrats_03: We must lean on each other to win
lines.priest_congrats_04: We need to keep this up
lines.priest_desperation_power2_05: The lord has plans for me
lines.priest_desperation_power4_02: The Lord still has plans for me…
lines.priest_desperation_power4_03: I'll kill as many as I can…
lines.priest_desperation_power4_04: in nomine Patris, et Filii, et Spiritus Sancti…
lines.priest_end_streak: The mighty will be toppled from their tower.
lines.priest_enemy_atlas_unkillable_02: Help me kill Abrams damn it!
lines.priest_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_02: The scrap golemn has been dispatched
lines.priest_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: I wasn't going to let you stop me bebop
lines.priest_enemy_dynamo_charges_01: Look out for the black hole!
lines.priest_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They're going to be coming for us
lines.priest_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_01: You can't shroud my mind Haze.
lines.priest_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_03: Perhaps some divine intervention was at work.
lines.priest_enemy_inferno_killed_mid_ult_03: I don't fear the flames of demons.
lines.priest_enemy_tengu_flies_away_02: I have nothing to fear from the Gargoyle
lines.priest_enemy_tengu_flies_away_03: and so the gargoyle flys away like the craven huntress she is
lines.priest_hunt_01: You can't hide from a Venator
lines.priest_killstreak_high_03: I am the flood that washes the earth clean
lines.priest_killstreak_mid_01: No one is going to stop me
lines.priest_killstreak_mid_02: I won't stop until all of them are dead
lines.priest_killstreak_start_02: The righteous have nothing to fear from me
lines.priest_killstreak_start_03: A Venator will not be denied
lines.priest_killstreak_start_04: The tithe will be paid in blood
lines.priest_kill_anyhero_01: My work will not be deterred!
lines.priest_kill_anyhero_07: They picked a side, and now they reap what they sowed…
lines.priest_kill_anyhero_08: Let me be stained by the blood of the wicked!
lines.priest_kill_anyhero_10: Eternal rest be unto them o Lord, and may perpetual light shine upon them…
lines.priest_kill_astro_01: Leave the troubadour to me, Sheriff
lines.priest_kill_astro_02: You picked the wrong side Holliday
lines.priest_kill_astro_05: The people of Macomb deserved better than her
lines.priest_kill_atlas_03: Abrams was strong, but my will was stronger
lines.priest_kill_atlas_05: Give me the damn tome, Abrams
lines.priest_kill_bebop_02: I'll pray for Shelly Fisher, Bebop
lines.priest_kill_bebop_03: I'm sorry Bebop, your mother's needs don't outweigh the world's
lines.priest_kill_bebop_05: The scrap golem had heart, but heart doesn't win wars
lines.priest_kill_bookworm_01: Poor thing had no idea what she was in for
lines.priest_kill_bookworm_02: This isn't a story, Paige-  this is the real world
lines.priest_kill_bookworm_03: I'm sorry Paige, your brother is beyond saving
lines.priest_kill_bookworm_04: Shes throwing her life away to save someone who doesn't deserve it
lines.priest_kill_chrono_02: I'm not interested in your games Paradox
lines.priest_kill_chrono_04: I don't find your antics amusing, Paradox
lines.priest_kill_chrono_05: The other Venators will buy me a drink for killing her
lines.priest_kill_doorman_02: I need to speak to the others about The Baroness
lines.priest_kill_doorman_04: What the hell is that thing
lines.priest_kill_drifter_02: Hell is too good for him
lines.priest_kill_drifter_03: I was put on this earth to kill men like you, Drifter
lines.priest_kill_drifter_05: I will stop you Drifter, no matter the cost
lines.priest_kill_dynamo_01: Science only takes you so far, professor
lines.priest_kill_dynamo_02: You're not a fighter Dynamo, don't try to be
lines.priest_kill_dynamo_04: Why are you working with them Professor…
lines.priest_kill_dynamo_05: Cut off the support, and the rest will die soon enough
lines.priest_kill_familiar_01: Go back to whatever hole you crawled out of.
lines.priest_kill_familiar_02: I'm not falling for the cute façade
lines.priest_kill_familiar_05: Furry bastard got what he deserved
lines.priest_kill_fencer_01: He had his whole life ahead of him…
lines.priest_kill_fencer_02: He threw away his future the moment he stood with that lot
lines.priest_kill_fencer_03: I don't like snuffing out potential, but it had to be done
lines.priest_kill_fencer_04: Poor lad had no idea who he was fighting for
lines.priest_kill_fencer_05: The fencer has been dealt with
lines.priest_kill_forge_01: Your tools of war won't be enough McGinnis
lines.priest_kill_forge_03: The avarice of Fairfax Indsustries ends today
lines.priest_kill_forge_05: Pride will make a loser out of anyone
lines.priest_kill_frank_02: Victor, quit moping around and try to live a life
lines.priest_kill_frank_04: The answers you're looking for are going to ellude you today, Victor
lines.priest_kill_frank_05: I took down the walking cadaver
lines.priest_kill_ghost_01: Your unnatural life has come to an end
lines.priest_kill_ghost_03: Your days of leeching on the lives of others is over Geist
lines.priest_kill_ghost_05: No one will mourn you Geist
lines.priest_kill_gigawatt_02: We all must answer for our crimes eventually, Seven
lines.priest_kill_gigawatt_03: Some secrets were not meant for man
lines.priest_kill_gigawatt_05: A monster like him deserved to die
lines.priest_kill_haze_01: The OSIC is not in control here Haze
lines.priest_kill_haze_04: I respect you Haze, but you stood in my way
lines.priest_kill_haze_05: I don't answer to the OSIC
lines.priest_kill_high_networth: Wealth will not buy you mercy
lines.priest_kill_hornet_01: You confuse revenge with justice Vindicta
lines.priest_kill_hornet_02: You lost your way a long time ago Vindicta
lines.priest_kill_hornet_04: Her hatred used to be focused but its become indiscriminate

lines.priest_match_start_familiar_priest_convo: Don't worry.  I'll shepherd you home.

Don't worry about it.  Just know I'll protect you.
lines.priest_match_start_fencer_priest_convo01: You're the one destined for greatness, right?
lines.priest_match_start_fencer_priest_convo02: Young man, I don't care about the circumstances of your birth, I care about who you are.  I don't give a damn if you look like a monster…. But if you act like one I will put you down.
lines.priest_match_start_necro_priest_convo01_: You're in over your head child
lines.priest_match_start_necro_priest_convo02_: One that's about to go to war.  What kind of child traffics with the dead?
lines.priest_match_start_necro_priest_convo03_: It's a real shame that you're not going to live long enough to learn the wisdom that comes with age.
Threaten you?  I'm trying to save your life.
lines.priest_match_start_priest_astro_convo01_: What happened in Macomb wasn't your fault, child.
No.  But I've failed before.  You can't let it consume you.
I didn't say don't care.  Pain and anger are fires that burn in all of us, but it needs to be tended lest it destroys you.
lines.priest_match_start_priest_astro_convo02_: Harden your heart, sheriff… you can't let your sense of law and order get in the way of what needs to be done.
lines.priest_match_start_priest_astro_convo03_: I hope it brought you some peace.
lines.priest_match_start_priest_gigawatt_convo: The fact that there's not a stake throught your heart should be answer enough.
You killed a friend of mine.
You'd have to have one first.
lines.priest_match_start_priest_haze_convo01_0: Tell the bastard I said hi
lines.priest_match_start_priest_haze_convo02_0: You ever work with a Venator before?
Well just to set expectations we can be… a bit exhuberant in our methods.
Then we should have no problems
lines.priest_match_start_priest_haze_convo03_0: Today the wicked will suffer at our hands.
lines.priest_match_start_priest_inferno_convo0: I don't serve at a parish.
A lot of people try to bury the past.  Problem what that is whenever someone comes to go dig it up, they make a big mess.
Yeah.  Win.  Otherwise you're torturing youself for 2nd place, and that's not worth it.
lines.priest_match_start_unicorn_priest_convo0: We're about be shot at and you're dressed like you just got off a shift at the circus. So yes.  I have concerns.
Lord willing you'll surive and get to hear them.

The Venators are a results-centric order.
I was going to ask you the same thing.

lines.punkgoat_kill_gigawatt_01: You think you got it bad because you were locked up in Lost Whisper? Actually that probably did suck.

lines.punkgoat_kill_gigawatt_04: Only difference between you and me is that I never got arrested for doing black magic cause I'm not a moron leanin over his skis
lines.punkgoat_kill_gigawatt_05: If I bothered to read a dictionary I could sound like your smarmy ass.
lines.punkgoat_kill_haze_02: The OSIC are just a buch of goons with a badge
lines.punkgoat_kill_haze_03: It's bad enough my taxes are spent on dream walking assassins, but they're not even good dream walking assassins.
lines.punkgoat_kill_haze_05: I'm not bowing down to the OSIC
lines.punkgoat_kill_high_networth: You ain't on top now are ya pal
lines.punkgoat_kill_hornet_01: You died Vindicta, get over it
lines.punkgoat_kill_hornet_02: You think you can just fly around and shoot people with that bullshit gun of yours?
lines.punkgoat_kill_hornet_03: I ain't getting picked off by you Vindicta
lines.punkgoat_kill_hornet_04: Sniping is some coward shit Vindicta
lines.punkgoat_kill_hornet_05: Not so fun when you're not 3 blocks away, is it?
lines.punkgoat_kill_inferno_02: You think you're better than me cause you got a vest?
lines.punkgoat_kill_inferno_03: That's what you get for wearing a fadora
lines.punkgoat_kill_inferno_04: The only person that sets fires in my city is me.  Unless the Knickerbockers win the championship, then I'm fine with a little public rioting, but in general just me
lines.punkgoat_kill_kelvin_01: Why don't you take your dumb parka and piss off back to the arctic
lines.punkgoat_kill_kelvin_02: New York's not cold enough for you? What an asshole.
lines.punkgoat_kill_kelvin_04: That guy likes to pretend hes on some moral high ground but he was happy to take Geist's money
lines.punkgoat_kill_kelvin_05: You sucked in the arctic, you suck in the city, what are you good at?
lines.punkgoat_kill_krill_01: Molemen got it easy, try being a goat man.
lines.punkgoat_kill_krill_02: Theres two of you and you still can't beat me
lines.punkgoat_kill_krill_03: Krill brought his own muscle and he still aint got shit on me
lines.punkgoat_kill_krill_04: Go back to diggin holes, boys
lines.punkgoat_kill_krill_05: This city's got a damn mole problem
lines.punkgoat_kill_lash_02: "Bear pit champion" man,  I bet those fights are rigged.
lines.punkgoat_kill_lash_03: You think you're special cause you're chisled like a greek god and got a sexy mustash?
lines.punkgoat_kill_lash_04: I could look like him if I bothered to go to the gym
lines.punkgoat_kill_lash_05: Lift some more weights Lash, maybe you'll build up a personality
lines.punkgoat_kill_magician_02: You don't bring anything to the table, you just steal what someone else brought.
lines.punkgoat_kill_magician_03: It's good thing he didn't pull out the ol' cup and ball trick, then I'd really be worried…
lines.punkgoat_kill_magician_04: My card was the 3 of clubs, but you never guessed it 'cause you're a fraud
lines.punkgoat_kill_magician_05: Don't you got some kids birthday party to work?
lines.punkgoat_kill_mirage_04: Bodyguard... what are you gonna protect the Djinn from a 4th grade bully?
lines.punkgoat_kill_mirage_05: You act like your some noble guy Mirage, but I bet there's something wrong with you.
lines.punkgoat_kill_nano_04: I hope your cat gets eaten by a sewer rat
lines.punkgoat_kill_nano_05: I hope your cat eats your corpse, then I hope the cat gets eaten by a chupacabra or a spider or anything that will make that cat suffer
lines.punkgoat_kill_orion_01: The old gotta make way for the young.
lines.punkgoat_kill_orion_02: Bro, you're using a bow in the 20th century just pack it up youre done.
lines.punkgoat_kill_orion_04: Try using your bullshit ghost owl now
lines.punkgoat_kill_orion_05: That guy's got some anger issues
lines.punkgoat_kill_priest_01: Hey padre, what's the latin word for "I just got my ass kicked"?
lines.punkgoat_kill_priest_02: Oh oh the vatican's coming for me now
lines.punkgoat_kill_priest_03: Try explaining that you lost to a guy with a goat head to your superiors
lines.punkgoat_kill_priest_05: I don't know what the hell a venator is but it's dead
lines.punkgoat_kill_shiv_01: That all you got pretty boy?
lines.punkgoat_kill_shiv_02: Shoulda spent less time on your hair and more time learning how to fight
lines.punkgoat_kill_shiv_04: Guys like you make it harder for the rest of us
lines.punkgoat_kill_synth_01: "Daddy tried to kill me", poor baby
lines.punkgoat_kill_synth_02: I hope you choke on your silver spoon Pocket
lines.punkgoat_kill_synth_03: Aint no such thing as a good Fairfax
lines.punkgoat_kill_synth_04: You're just as bad as the rest of your family
lines.punkgoat_kill_synth_05: Pocket, don't pretend you're one of us, you're one of them
lines.punkgoat_kill_tengu_01: I knew Ivy was up to no good…
lines.punkgoat_kill_tengu_02: You ain't special just because everyone loves you Ivy
lines.punkgoat_kill_tengu_04: Ivy, you're just Carlos Arroyo's pawn
lines.punkgoat_kill_tengu_05: I don't buy into the whole "Savior of Spanish Harlem" hype
lines.punkgoat_kill_vampirebat_02: I'm not scared of some undead brat
lines.punkgoat_kill_vampirebat_03: Not feeling so cocky now, are you Mina?
lines.punkgoat_kill_vampirebat_04: My bat's better than your bat
lines.punkgoat_kill_vampirebat_05: I hope your new clothing line gets panned
lines.punkgoat_kill_viper_02: I've met good criminals.  I've met bad criminals.  You're just a stupid criminal.
lines.punkgoat_kill_viper_04: That lady belongs on long island
lines.punkgoat_kill_viper_05: Never trust someone who don't believe in nothin
lines.punkgoat_kill_viscous_01: I'll believe The Adversary exists when I see it with my own eyes.
lines.punkgoat_kill_viscous_03: How about you curl up into that little ball of yours and roll out of town
lines.punkgoat_kill_viscous_04: You're too good to share the cube with me, Viscous
lines.punkgoat_kill_viscous_05: I see how it is, you want them to experience the cube but not us
lines.punkgoat_kill_warden_01: Look who's going to do whatever mommy and daddy tells him to do
lines.punkgoat_kill_warden_04: Man, that guy is wound up tight
lines.punkgoat_kill_warden_05: Think you can impose your will on me Warden?
lines.punkgoat_kill_wraith_01: Whatever, Wraith wants to go straight, she's not hard
lines.punkgoat_kill_wraith_04: You ain't better than me Wraith
lines.punkgoat_kill_wraith_05: Take your floating cards and shove em up your ass, Wraith
lines.punkgoat_kill_yamato_01: I don't know what the hell she was talkin' about
lines.punkgoat_kill_yamato_02: That lady with the sword was nuts
lines.punkgoat_kill_yamato_03: She was tryin' to carve me up…
lines.punkgoat_kill_yamato_04: I don't need a sword to beat your ass
lines.punkgoat_kill_yamato_05: Come at me whenever Yamato, I'm right here
lines.punkgoat_last_one_standing_01: Of course everyone else died and left me holding the bag
lines.punkgoat_last_one_standing_02: God do I have to do everything?
lines.punkgoat_last_one_standing_03: "oh well let billy handle it", buncha assholes…
lines.punkgoat_leaving_area_02: I'll be back later, you're on your own
lines.punkgoat_leaving_area_03: You wanna stick around that's your business
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_bebop_conv: Hey bebop, the old lady that made yo-
So you work at a scrap yard?
That's the best you're getting tin man.
Alright tin man, bring 'em in and let my bat do the work.
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_bookworm_c: Who are you tryin' to impress carrying all those books around?
You can't read more than one book at a time.
I don't want to know you.
You think I give a shit about some snob that wrote in middle english
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_ghost_conv: Not like you actually give a shit, but my name's Billy.
Oh so now you know me.
When your ivory tower comes crashing down I hope you're under it.
Oh I know exaclty where my life went wrong lady.
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_hornet_con: Lady, I wake people up.  I speak truth to power.  What the hell do you do other than walk around central park barefoot.
Way to go for low hanging fruit Vindicta, real classy.
So let me guess, you're gonna sit back and shoot at people while I run in and do all the real work.
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_orion_conv: They got a group of trained killers and we got a guy with a busted hip and one foot in the grave, this is fair.
Basically this is 5 on 6, the patron must hate us.
I bet the Baxter society never killed any real monsters, it was all a bunch of smoke and mirrors for publicity.
Big surprise, the mastermind of the whole charade tells me I'm wrong.
Old timers like you don't know how hard it is in the real world.  You're just sitting around smoking cigars and getting drunk on nostaliga.
You think being smug makes you better than me?
There it is.  There it is.  I knew that you were biased against me from the beginning.
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_tengu_conv: Oh look, if it isn't Carlos Arroyo's talking billboard for his mayoral campaign.
Yeah yeah we all know the stupid story.   Lady, he used you to increase the property value of Spanish Harlem, and he's using you sit in the mayors mansion.
I don't need to justify shit to Carlos Arroyo's pet gargoyle
You ask me how I got the goat head I'll bash your skull in
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_viper_conv: Don't think I've seen you since you got pinched.
I just assumed you busted out.
Oh I know where we're going after the ritual.
lines.punkgoat_match_start_punkgoat_wraith_con: Oh great, I'm with the paper gangster.
Lady; you don't want to be a crime lord, you want to be mayor.  And while you're kissing babies the 7th Moon is going to eat your lunch.
Easy easy  I didn't say that
You think I look like this cause I lost a bet?
Don’t act like you want to get to know me
lines.punkgoat_melee_kill_04: No way I was gonna lose to you
lines.punkgoat_melee_kill_05: You asked for this fight, buddy
lines.punkgoat_near_miss_04: Come on back, we were having fun
lines.punkgoat_near_miss_05: What you don't like playing in the real world?
lines.punkgoat_pick_up_gold_01: The rich bastard will never miss it
lines.punkgoat_pick_up_gold_02: People leavin souls lyin around like they're nothin
lines.punkgoat_pick_up_gold_03: Can't believe someone would pass this up
lines.punkgoat_pick_up_gold_04: I ain't leaving this lying around
lines.punkgoat_pick_up_rejuv_03: ya know this used to go to everybody till the man decided it was too good
lines.punkgoat_revenge_kill: They got what was coming to 'em
lines.vo.votereveal.punkgoat: Hey. Hey. Hey. Hey. Hey.  Your taste in music sucks.
lines.punkgoat_t1_shop_reminder_03: I can get something at the shop

lines.punkgoat_t2_shop_reminder_03: Time to pick up something new at the store

lines.punkgoat_t4_shop_reminder_01: I can afford the best baby
lines.punkgoat_t4_shop_reminder_03: No point is sitting on the souls, I gotta spend this shit

lines.punkgoat_tower_got_denied_03: Were gonna finish this ritual if it kills me
lines.punkgoat_tower_got_denied_04: That ain't the last objective we're takin, baby
lines.punkgoat_tower_got_denied_05: The ritual's getting closer to being finished baby
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power1_01: Ain't no problem a bat can't solve.
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power1_03: Can't wait to swing this baby
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power1_04: Not many problems a bat can't solve
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power1_05: Ready to play a pick up game with their head
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power1_06: I aint a baseball guy so much as a bat guy
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power1_08: Let's see 'em look at me sideways now
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power1_09: They look at me funny and I'm takin skulls
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_01: Don't gotta over think it, just charge in
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_04: First I knock 'em up then I knock 'em down
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_05: Almost time for the runnin' of the goat
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_06: I used to do this in circle pits before venues started being babies
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_07: Goat horns get zero respect in this city, it's all Ixian this, ram horns that
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_08: They better run if they know what's good for 'em
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_09: And ma said this head was good for nothin
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power2_10: It ain't why I turned my head into a goat, but it's a helluva perk
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power3_02: Ready to get this party started
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power3_03: You got no idea how much beer I can fit in this jacket
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power3_04: Drink for me, bat for them, it's a match made in heaven
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power3_05: Smash the bottle, smash their heads, smash the ritual
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power3_08: I ain't runnin from a fight
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power3_10: I'm gonna tear it all down
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_01: They ain't gonna get very far
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_03: When they think they’re getting away I'll pull 'em back in
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_04: Ready to make some new friends and kill 'em
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_05: I got enough chain for all of 'em
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_06: If they wanna mess with The Goat they're gonna regret it
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_07: I don't got time to be scared when I use this
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_08: Pop this bad boy when I'm making my move
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_09: Ready to go in there and give 'em hell
lines.punkgoat_upgrade_power4_10: Time to get a little nuts.
lines.punkgoat_use_colossus_02: I'm about to smash in their skulls
lines.punkgoat_use_colossus_03: You wanna mess with me buddy?
lines.punkgoat_use_decay_02: They aint gonna be feelin' good in a second
lines.punkgoat_use_echo_shard_03: You want some more of that?
lines.punkgoat_use_power3_03: You want the horns, you got it
lines.punkgoat_use_power3_07: This is how we get it done
lines.punkgoat_use_power4_05: Time to get up close and personal
lines.punkgoat_use_power4_06: Don't go runnin' off on me…
lines.punkgoat_use_power4_09: I don't back down from a fight…

lines.punkgoat_use_unstoppable_03: Buddy there ain't nothing you can do to me

lines.shiv_ally_ghost_killed_in_lane_02: Geist is dead, bad for me but probably a net positive for society.
lines.shiv_be_careful_03: If I'm out here by myself I need to stay alert…
lines.shiv_close_call_01: They're really makin' me work for it…
lines.shiv_close_call_03: If I were a lesser man, I'd be dead…
lines.shiv_close_call_04: They're gonna have to try a lot harder than that to kill me…
lines.shiv_close_call_05: And they thought they could actually kill me…
lines.shiv_congrats_04: That's how we get it done around here…
lines.shiv_congrats_05: They were out of their league…
lines.shiv_desperation_power1_05: I still got fight in me…
lines.shiv_desperation_power3_03: Just need a little more time…
lines.shiv_desperation_power4_02: You wanna play rough? Fine by me…
lines.shiv_desperation_power4_04: You really shouldn'tve made me mad…
lines.shiv_desperation_power4_05: You had your fun, now it's my turn…
lines.shiv_end_streak: And you thought I wouldn't catch you…
lines.shiv_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: Damn it, they got the rejuv,
lines.shiv_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They got the rejuvinator, we need a plan…
lines.shiv_killstreak_high_01: New York is under my protection now…
lines.shiv_killstreak_mid_01: Like I told ya: no one's better than me.
lines.shiv_killstreak_mid_02: I'm not even close to finished…
lines.shiv_killstreak_mid_03: Welcome to my world boys and girls…
lines.shiv_killstreak_start_01: Let's get this show on the road.
lines.shiv_killstreak_start_03: I'll be stacking bodies all night…
lines.shiv_killstreak_start_04: The Baxter Society has your number…
lines.shiv_killstreak_start_05: One more body for the pile.
lines.shiv_kill_anyhero_03: I could do this all day.
lines.shiv_kill_anyhero_06: You don't know who you're dealing with…
lines.shiv_kill_anyhero_09: No one gets the drop on me…
lines.shiv_kill_anyhero_10: Didn't even mess up my hair…
lines.shiv_kill_astro_02: We should have worked together Holliday…
lines.shiv_kill_astro_03: Don't worry Holliday, when this is over I'll kill The Troubador on your behalf…
lines.shiv_kill_atlas_02: Looks like that's one case that's not getting solved…
lines.shiv_kill_atlas_03: Abrams ain't a problem no more…
lines.shiv_kill_atlas_04: Thought you were supposed to be tough, big guy…
lines.shiv_kill_bebop_02: You're a mean ol' bastard, aren't you Bebop?
lines.shiv_kill_bebop_05: Bebop's out of commission for a while….
lines.shiv_kill_dynamo_02: You belong in the classroom, not a fight.
lines.shiv_kill_dynamo_03: Welcome to the big time, Dynamo
lines.shiv_kill_dynamo_05: No black holes for you, Dynamo…
lines.shiv_kill_forge_01: All the toys in the world wouldn't make the difference
lines.shiv_kill_forge_02: You're smart McGinnis; but genius' bleeds the same as everyone else
lines.shiv_kill_forge_05: If I don’t see another turret again it'll be too soon.
lines.shiv_kill_ghost_02: You got what you deserved Geist…
lines.shiv_kill_ghost_03: You're done preying on the weak, Geist
lines.shiv_kill_gigawatt_02: I don't get shook, but that was one scary bastard…
lines.shiv_kill_gigawatt_04: That should keep his ego in check
lines.shiv_kill_gigawatt_05: Some mastermind he turned out to be…
lines.shiv_kill_haze_01: Sorry bout that Ma'am, but you had to go.
lines.shiv_kill_haze_04: Haze ain't hunting no one no more…
lines.shiv_kill_haze_05: Haze won't be bothering us for a while…
lines.shiv_kill_hornet_02: Vindicta won't be hunting us anymore…
lines.shiv_kill_hornet_03: The dead need to stay burried…
lines.shiv_kill_hornet_05: Should have flown away when you had the chance….
lines.shiv_kill_inferno_01: Why you gotta fight me, fern.
lines.shiv_kill_inferno_02: Damn it Fern, don't make me do this!
lines.shiv_kill_inferno_04: You should have minded your own business Infernus…
lines.shiv_kill_inferno_05: Looks like that's one bar I won't be visiting any time soon…
lines.shiv_kill_kelvin_04: Oh Kelvin. So noble. So predictable.
lines.shiv_kill_kelvin_05: Guess the rumors about Kelvin being a tough guy are unfounded…
lines.shiv_kill_krill_02: Stick to the tunnels boys, its safer for ya…
lines.shiv_kill_krill_03: You'd think between the two of ya you could have come up with a better plan than "die"
lines.shiv_kill_krill_04: Keep trying boys, one of these days you might win.
lines.shiv_kill_lash_01: You picked the wrong fight Lash.
lines.shiv_kill_lash_02: You got nothing on me Lash.
lines.shiv_kill_lash_03: You got moxie Lash, I'll give ya that…
lines.shiv_kill_lash_04: You wish you were half as good as me.
lines.shiv_kill_lash_05: Lash, lash, lash… when are you gonna learn
lines.shiv_kill_mirage_03: I can't let you win Mirage!
lines.shiv_kill_mirage_04: We're both just doing your jobs…
lines.shiv_kill_mirage_05: Thought the djinn could afford better help…
lines.shiv_kill_nano_03: You talk a big game, but you bleed just like anyone else, Calico…
lines.shiv_kill_nano_05: Calico, you're not half as dangerous as you think you are…
lines.shiv_kill_synth_02: Picked the wrong day to come out of hiding Pocket.
lines.shiv_kill_synth_03: Hey I love revenge as much as the next guy, but you get in my way I'm gonna stick ya.
lines.shiv_kill_synth_04: I know that your parents are monsters, Pocket… but I can't let you win.
lines.shiv_kill_tengu_02: I feel bad about putting her down.
lines.shiv_kill_viscous_03: The surface aint no place for you, Viscous…
lines.shiv_kill_viscous_04: Maybe you should stick to The Deep.
lines.shiv_kill_viscous_05: I think the pile of goo thought he had a chance…
lines.shiv_kill_warden_01: Picked a bad day to fight, Warden.
lines.shiv_kill_warden_02: I'm not letting you destroy this city, Warden…
lines.shiv_kill_warden_04: You're not as dangerous as you think you are Warden…
lines.shiv_kill_wraith_02: You brought a deck of playing cards to a knife fight
lines.shiv_kill_wraith_03: Keep that psychic shit away from me…
lines.shiv_kill_wraith_05: I don't need fancy mind tricks to kill someone…
lines.shiv_kill_yamato_01: I'm not scared of the 7th Moon.
lines.shiv_kill_yamato_02: Great, now the 7th Moon is gonna be gunning for me…
lines.shiv_kill_yamato_03: I showed 'em how to really use a blade…
lines.shiv_kill_yamato_05: I just finished the fight you started, Yamato…
lines.shiv_last_one_standing_01: Of course it comes down to me…
lines.shiv_match_start_astro_shiv_convo01_02: Hand picked by the old man himself.
lines.shiv_match_start_astro_shiv_convo02_02: We got our own problems right now
lines.shiv_match_start_astro_shiv_convo02_04: Trust me sheriff, if we don't clean up our own house you'll be wishing for Troubadour sized problems.
lines.shiv_match_start_astro_shiv_convo03_01: You're the one looking to kill the Troubadour, right?
lines.shiv_match_start_astro_shiv_convo03_03: You make it out alive you should look up the Baxter society…. We could use someone like you.
lines.shiv_match_start_atlas_shiv_convo01_04: Wasn't easy… who knows, in a few more years they might actually start to respect me.
lines.shiv_match_start_atlas_shiv_convo02_02: Please, I wake up looking this pretty.
lines.shiv_match_start_atlas_shiv_convo03_01: I'll make 'em bleed.  You finish 'em off.
lines.shiv_match_start_dynamo_shiv_convo01_01: Hold 'em for me Professor, and I'll take care of the rest.
lines.shiv_match_start_dynamo_shiv_convo02_01: You got the stomach for this professor?
lines.shiv_match_start_dynamo_shiv_convo03_02: Profesor, you couldn't keep me out of the fight.
lines.shiv_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo01_02: I don't know, word on the street is that you're a dangerous woman to know.
lines.shiv_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo02_04: Just try to keep up Lady Geist.  I'll be accepting your apology later.
lines.shiv_match_start_ghost_shiv_convo03_04: Wait till you see me stab something.
lines.shiv_melee_kill_01: Hope I didn't get blood in my hair…
lines.shiv_melee_kill_03: You picked a fight with the wrong man.
lines.shiv_near_miss_05: Keep runnin' friend…I'll get you soon enough…
lines.shiv_pick_up_rejuv_02: Time to take the fight to them…
lines.shiv_revenge_kill: Don't for a second think you're better than me…
lines.shiv_t1_shop_reminder_03: I should check out the shop…
lines.shiv_t2_shop_reminder_01: I should see what I can afford…
lines.shiv_t2_shop_reminder_03: Wonder what they got at the store…
lines.shiv_t3_shop_reminder_03: Might be time to pick up something new…
lines.shiv_t4_shop_reminder_01: It's time to buy the best
lines.shiv_t4_shop_reminder_03: No point in saving any more…
lines.shiv_tower_got_denied_01: Another part of the ritual complete…
lines.shiv_tower_got_denied_04: One less objective to worry about…
lines.shiv_upgrade_power1_01: I'll show 'em a little knife work
lines.shiv_upgrade_power1_05: I'm gonna ventilate every last one of them.
lines.shiv_upgrade_power1_07: I'll turn 'em into a pin cushion.
lines.shiv_upgrade_power1_08: First I stick 'em, then I finish 'em.
lines.shiv_upgrade_power1_09: Time for a little wet work
lines.shiv_upgrade_power2_07: I'll be gone before they know what hit 'em
lines.shiv_upgrade_power2_08: By the time they see me coming it will be too late.
lines.shiv_upgrade_power3_01: Once I get goin' there's no slowin' me down...
lines.shiv_upgrade_power3_03: Kill one, move onto the next. (move to power04)
lines.shiv_upgrade_power3_04: I'm gonna bounce from target to target… (move to power04)
lines.shiv_upgrade_power3_05: I don't need to hide to heal.
lines.shiv_upgrade_power3_06: Take one out. Fix my hair. Take out another one. (move to power04)
lines.shiv_upgrade_power3_09: The more people I drop, the better… (move to power04)
lines.shiv_upgrade_power3_10: They're gonna have a helluva time getting rid of me…
lines.shiv_upgrade_power4_04: It takes a monster to stop a monster…
lines.shiv_upgrade_power4_05: Things are about to get ugly
lines.shiv_upgrade_power4_07: There's a reason the baxter society keeps me around…
lines.shiv_upgrade_power4_08: Time to tap into my baser instincts…
lines.shiv_upgrade_power4_10: The wolf fears nothing from the lamb
lines.shiv_use_power3_11: This'll keep me in the fight…
lines.shiv_use_power3_16: I'm not backing down anytime soon…
lines.shiv_use_power3_17: Gotta stay in the mix as long as I can…
lines.shiv_use_power4_04: Time to pull out the big guns…
lines.shiv_use_tech_purge_03: Oh it's not going down like that…
lines.shiv_use_unstoppable_02: I'm not worried about your little tricks…
