lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_01: A little protection goes a long way…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_03: If you need more protection you know where to find me…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_05: If you're looking to survive, you came to the right place
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_07: Look who's ready for a 2 AM metro ride
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_09: That's gonna help keep your blood on the inside..
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_10: Someome's gonna be bleeding on the concreate and it aint gonna be you…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_11: Stay two steps ahead of death my friend…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_12: You'll be the last one standing…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_13: ah, the ol' New York tuxedo
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_armor_15: Come back if you need anything else
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_boundless_spirit_0: Your mastery of the occult will go down in legend.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_colossus_01: Objectively speaking: turning into a giant punching machine is a thing of beauty.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_crippling_headshot: Generally speaking, putting one in the head is always good advice - but it's even better advice now.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_curse_01: Now you my friend, are about to make their lives hell.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_diviners_kevlar_01: If I we're channeling a mystical ritual, this is the only armor I'd buy.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_diviners_kevlar_02: Now if I was hypothetically trying to summon an elder god in a convoluted attempt to make my dreams a reality… that right there is the armor I'd buy
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_01: Welcome to my shop of curiosity…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_02: And what can I do for you…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_04: These are dangerous times, you don't want to be unprepared
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_05: How may I be of service?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_06: You got souls to trade right?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_07: If you're looking for the remarkable, you've come to the right place…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_08: Such delights I can sell you…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_early_10: Allow me to pique your curiosity
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_echo_shard_01: The echo shard.  My personal favorite item for when I'm looking to cause degenerate mayhem.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_escalating_exposur: Now this isn't as flashy as some of the  glyphs I sell, but when it comes to raw power you can't do much better.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_frenzy_01: Hopfully this'll give you the edge to survive, but if it doesn't you're gonna go down swinging…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_glitch_01: I see you're looking to put someone on tilt.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_04: Tell ya what, I'll throw in a free keychain.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_05: well someone's looking to make a statement…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_06: Your enemies will curse your name
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_07: I got one of those for the missus, big fan
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_08: Little bit of advice…don't get caught.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_09: We live in interesting times, don't we
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_11: Hope you win whatever fight you're about to start
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_12: You wanna buy a mug to go with your gun?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_gun_13: I got more where that came from…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_inhibitor_01: If you're looking to cripple your enemy do I have the thing for you.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_leech_01: ohhhh my friend, you just upped your survivability by at least 30%.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_lucky_shot_01: They say a little luck never hurt anyone - but in this case it's gonna do some serious damage.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_magic_carpet_01: Fastest way to get around the city, guarenteed.  Well not an actual guarentee-  you leave the shop with this all sales are final.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_magic_overflow_01: Your abilities are about to go to the next level…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_mystic_reverb_01: You are gonna leave a lasting impression my friend…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_phantom_strike_01: Your gonna be bouncing around that battlefield like… like something that bounces around a battlefield…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_refresher_01: Just when your enemies think you're out of tricks, BAM, you use 'em again…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_richochet_01: You are gonna be shooting things that you never even knew existed.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_shadow_weave_01: If someone over 20 meters away says they can see you, they're a liar.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_silencer_01: This badboy was developed to stop possessed mystics.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_siphon_bullets_01: Allow me to provide the answer to the age old question: what if Oathkeeper was a gun?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_spiritual_overflow: You're about to make some magic happen, my friend…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_01: If you like that, I got some other stuff that fell off the truck
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_03: Don't mind the blood on that, it's gently used
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_05: Bought that off a Knickerbocker that was about to get his legs broken..
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_07: I won't lie, I don't know what that does but my kid says all the mystics are buying it.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_08: Now I don't go selling these to just anyone…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_09: Now go out there and impose your will
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_11: I see someone appreciates fine craftsmanship
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_13: A little bit of the divine right here in your hot little hands…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_14: Here's your chance to shape your destiny
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_tech_15: You got expensive taste, I love it
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_unstoppable_01: My friend, you are about to be unstoppable…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_buy_vampiric_burst_01: Looks like somebody wants to live off the blood of their enemies, am I right?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_astro_01: I will happily sell you this, as you don't have jurisdiction in New York.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_astro_03: I'd hate to be on your bad side Holliday…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_atlas_02: You are a very large man, and I feel sorry for anyone who's trying to stop you.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_atlas_03: I don't suppose you're looking to sell that book you're carrying are you?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_bebop_02: Ms Shelly's a good lady, it means a lot that you're looking out for her.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_bebop_03: Bebop you got an eye for quality…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_bookworm_01: You're a good kid, don't get dead
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_bookworm_02: I feel like you're too smart to wanna go get shot at, Paige
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_bookworm_03: Your brother is lucky to have a sister like you
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_bookworm_04: Tell your pops I said hi
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_bookworm_05: Don't tell your dad I sold you this, ok?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_chrono_01: They should know better than to mess with you.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_doorman_01: Hey buddy, don't suppose you can get me and the missus brunch reservations for Sunday?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_doorman_03: I got nothing but respect for the hospitality business, my friend
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_doorman_04: You are looking mighty professional, and I'd appreciate it if you wouldn't kill me
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_drifter_01: You Louisiana boys know how to party
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_drifter_03: Let the good times roll, baby
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_drifter_04: You wanna know a good beignet place just say the word
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_drifter_05: You are are one scary sonofabitch, and I don't want to make you mad
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_dynamo_02: Good luck getting your body back Professor.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_dynamo_03: OK, so hows this work?  I sell you guns, you get my kid through Admissions?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_familiar_01: Hope you find your way home kid
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_familiar_02: I don't know what you are, but I love that you have money
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_familiar_05: Please don't molt in my shop
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_fencer_01: Thanks for spending your parents money
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_fencer_02: Look at me rubbing shoulders with the royals…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_fencer_03: You need anything else Apollo, I'm your guy
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_fencer_04: You got a punchable face but a wallet anyone would love
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_fencer_05: Don't suppose I could buy that sword off of ya?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_forge_02: You are a one woman killing machine…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_forge_03: You’re a testament to your profession McGinnis…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_forge_04: You can spend that Fairfax Industries paychek here any time you want
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_frank_01: I threw in a pack of staples on the house
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_frank_02: Make sure you have all your body parts before you leave
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_frank_03: I'm telling you, an "I love New York" shirt would really bring the whole look together
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_frank_04: It's nice to have a regular that can't die on me
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_ghost_01: Forgive me for not shaking the glowing green arm.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_ghost_02: And a good day to you and Oathkeeper.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_ghost_03: That lock on your arms looking a little rusty, might wanna get that checked out later.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_gigawatt_01: Your rivals won't be a around much longer…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_gigawatt_02: When you get your revenge, remember who helped ya…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_gigawatt_03: I'm just gonna pretend I never saw ya…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_gigawatt_04: When the cops come asking, you weren't here and I absolutely didn't sell you anything.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_haze_01: You are gonna be the only one left standing Haze…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_haze_02: If your enemies hated you before… they're really gonna be pissed now…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_haze_03: I can't believe I get to sell  my wares to a bonafide dream stalker, the boys aren't gonna believe it
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_haze_04: The OSIC aren't investigating me, right Haze?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_hornet_01: If you're looking for Vengence, this is the only thing to buy.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_hornet_03: Vindicta it is always a pleasure to have your business, and a relief to see you leave.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_inferno_01: Fern, catch you at Jezebel's later?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_inferno_02: Hank better appreciate all the work you're putting in Fern.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_inferno_03: So long as you don't burn down my shop we're all good…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_kelvin_01: Word to the wise, if you want to blend in: take off the parka.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_kelvin_02: I've seen my share of wights, and you Kelvin… you're a mensch.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_kelvin_03: If you need anything else for your next expedition you know where to find me…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_krill_01: Mo, you beautiful Mole bastard, give me a hug!
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_krill_03: You smell like sewer but your money smells like heaven
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_lash_01: Well if it isn't the posterboy for the Celtics.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_lash_02: So is this for a pit fight?  Or just recreational mayhem?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_lash_03: Look, just don’t bring any trouble my way Lash, ok?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_mirage_01: If the Djinn need anything let me know…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_mirage_03: Hope your trip to New York is a memorable one.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_mirage_04: Look I never was a fan of Wyoming anyway.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_mirage_buys_carpet: A little on the nose, but no judgement
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_nano_01: Keep the cat off the counter
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_nano_02: So… how's the murder business treating you?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_nano_03: Blood money is like normal money with a story
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_necro_01: Shouldn't you be in class?  I'm just kidding, I don't care.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_necro_02: You Blackmore kids are into some wild stuff
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_necro_03: I know a theater kid when I see one.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_necro_04: Have fun playing with the dead
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_necro_05: High school must be weirder than I remember
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_operative_01: Raven, you are one dapper sonofabitch
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_operative_02: Helping you isn't a federal crime, right?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_operative_04: I'm not looking to make the Soviet Empire my enemy
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_orion_01: I hope you find what you're looking for Grey Talon.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_orion_02: First time in New York, Talon?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_orion_03: You're not messing around are you…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_orion_04: Talon; allow me to be your metaphorical merch guy on the revenge tour that is life.  And by metaphorical, I mean actual.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_priest_01: Hope that guy doesn't teach Sunday school…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_priest_03: God may protect, but sometimes the big man upstairs needs a helping hand.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_punkgoat_01: Good luck fighting the man Billy.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_punkgoat_03: Have fun tearing the machine down
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_punkgoat_04: Now there goes a man who kind of believes in the vague idea of something
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_shiv_02: Shiv, may your nights be long and your aim be true
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_shiv_04: You know me, anything to support the Baxter Society…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_synth_01: You can spend daddys money here whenever you want.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_synth_02: Look when I called you a trust fund baby, that was before I knew you were spending your trust fund here
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_synth_03: You ever want to sell some of your toys here, you let me know…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_synth_04: There goes one good lookin' sonofabitch.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_tengu_01: It's a pleasure to serve the savior of Spanish Harlem…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_tengu_02: Haven't seen you buy one of these bad boys since you took out the Mendoza syndicate…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_tengu_03: You're the classiest Gargoyle I've had the pleasure of selling guns to Ivy
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_trapper_02: From one New Yorker to another, good luck
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_trapper_04: Appreciate the work you do, stay safe.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_trapper_05: The city owes you boys in the Municipal Coven a lot
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_unicorn_04: Tell the boys at the sideshow I said hi
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_unicorn_05: Just got off your shift at the sideshow?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_vampirebat_01: Thanks for not drinking my blood
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_vampirebat_02: As long as you're paying me, you can be as rude as you want Mina
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_vampirebat_03: Happy to have your business Mina
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_vampirebat_04: That a gift for the Viscount?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_vampirebat_05: Mina, you may be a bad person, but you're a great customer
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viper_01: Oh my god, you're actually spending money instead of robbing me.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viper_02: I like this new Vee that buys things.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viper_03: I don't know what's gotten into you Vee, but I like it.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viper_04: Well look who broke out of jail again
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viper_05: You're my kind of lowlife, Vee
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viscous_01: Godspeed you beautiful ball of goo.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viscous_02: I like the cut of your jib Viscous.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_viscous_03: I don't know where a walking aquarium got that kind of coin, but I'm happy to take it
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_warden_02: Appreciate you keeping the streets clean.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_warden_03: I'm not one to judge the line between vigilante and civil servant.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_warden_04: You ever wanna pawn that cape or gun of yours you let me know…
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_werewolf_01: Just come back in one piece, Silver
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_werewolf_03: So I see we're leaning in on the dead part of "Dead or alive"
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_werewolf_04: Need something for the hangover while you're here?
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_werewolf_05: Glad I don't have your job, Silver
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_wraith_02: The mysterious orginazation known as Paradox has vexed law enforcement across the globe for almost a generation.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_wraith_03: Claiming to have a net worth higher than the GDP of most developed nations; the coalition of elite grifters, catburglers, and gentlemen thieves that make up Paradox no longer steal for money; but rather to prove to each other (and the world) that there is nothing they can't do.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_wrecker_01: Putting their illict spoils onpublic display at so-called "pop up museums";  Paradox brazenly taunts institutions all while the public clamors for more.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_wrecker_02: They are everywhere.  They are nowhere.  And if you possess something they want… they are inevitable
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_wrecker_03: When mystic energy awoke on Earth, the world changed… anything was possible. But just because anything WAS possible, didn't mean that anything SHOULD be possible. And so the government made rules. Laws. A means for US citizens to enjoy the benefits of the supernatural world in safety. But rules and laws are for lesser men. Men with limitations. Men who were not Seven.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_yamato_01: There are many rumors about what Seven did to land himself in the infamous government oubliette called Lost Whisper.   But there is no doubt about what happened on the night of his execution.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_yamato_02: Wards placed by the most powerful ritualists of five different nations... wards designed to not just prevent mystical interference with the execution, but to simultaneously obliterate Seven's soul so that it could never be contacted, resurrected, or otherwise used by someone looking to follow in his footsteps... failed.
lines.shopkeeper_hotdog_t4_yamato_03: Onlookers viewed in horror as the eyes of the US Army’s strongest mentalist popped like grapes. They screamed as Scotland Yard’s premiere occult investigator, the one who allegedly captured Seven, crumbled to ash. Seven’s body buckled and writhed against his restraints; his skin burning from eldritch electricity... and yet he would not die. He laughed.
lines.spirit_jar_idol_delivered_06: Nice to be free of those nasty little spirits…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_delivered_08: I knew I could count on you!
lines.spirit_jar_idol_delivered_09: A pleasure doing business with you
lines.spirit_jar_idol_delivered_10: Thanks for doing your part to keep New York safe
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropped_02: What are you dropping me for!
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropped_05: I think there's been a mistake…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropped_06: Excuse me, I don't think this is where you're supposed to leave me…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropped_09: You're just going to leave me laying around?
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropping_02: I will contain these rogue spirits…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropping_03: Fear not friends, these spirits will be contained…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropping_05: Allow me to hold these spirits
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropping_07: It's my pleasure to do my part to keep New York clean
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropping_08: We can't have rogue spirits flying about now can we…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropping_09: I need a few more moments to gather these spirits…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_dropping_10: Don't worry, I'll have these souls trapped in a jiffy…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_gets_stunned_03: Now's not the time for a nap!
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_gets_stunned_04: Why aren't your friends helping us?
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_stalls_01: You, uh, you do have a plan yes?
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_stalls_02: I can't help but notice you haven't dropped me off yet.
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_stalls_03: You seem to be running in a curious direction…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_stalls_04: You do know where you're supposed to take me, yes?
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_stalls_05: Well it would seem I'm going for a run…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_holder_takes_big_damage_: Be careful!  There's two of us!
Stop shooting me I'm a civil servant!
lines.spirit_jar_idol_picked_up_on_street_01: I was worried I was forgotten…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_picked_up_on_street_02: Please be more careful with me…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_picked_up_on_street_03: I was beginning to feel abandoned…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_picked_up_on_street_04: Well this day got a lot more  exciting…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_picked_up_on_street_05: Are you going to actually drop me off or just run around New York?
lines.spirit_jar_idol_picked_up_on_street_09: This little ritual of yours is really messing with my job…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_02: I'm sitting here, full of spirits, and no one seems to care!
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_03: I'm being used as bait aren't I…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_04: Hm, this is a view of the city I don't normally get…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_05: If someone could pick me up it would be much appreciated…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_06: Hello?  Is anyone there able to pick me up?
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_07: I swear, one celestial event and people lose their minds…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_08: This is going to be a long day isn't it.
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_09: There's a spirit jar patiently waiting  here…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_in_street_11: These New Yorkers have a curious sense of humor…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_03: *clears throat* I believe you're missing something…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_04: It would be nice if someone appreciated what I bring to the table here…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_05: Someone will pick me up. Soon.  Any time really.
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_06: I'm full of souls here people…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_07: I'm just sitting here waiting to be appreciated…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_08: There was a time when people valued my services…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_09: I can't believe I've been left here to rot…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_10: You would think someone would be interested in collecting souls…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_13: You'd think people would be more excited about a jar of souls…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_17: I'm just a spirit jar patiently waiting.  Sitting here with no cares in the world.  Just.  Waiting.   Perfectly content.  Happy in my lot in life, comfortably knowing that I haven't been forgotten.
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_18: If you're looking for souls, they're right here…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_19: hooo, the spirits are really out today, aren't they…
lines.spirit_jar_idol_waiting_on_bridge_20: Surely someone will be by anytime  now…

lines.tengu_desperation_power1_03: in spanish "I won't let you win!"
lines.tengu_desperation_power1_04: in spanish "For god's sake, just die!"
lines.tengu_end_streak: You think you run this place?

lines.tengu_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_02: Gotta be faster than that Bebop
lines.tengu_enemy_dynamo_charges_01: Look out for the black hole
lines.tengu_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: Let's regroup and form a plan!
lines.tengu_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_01: You're not as sly as you think Haze…
lines.tengu_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_02: You can't run from me Haze…
lines.tengu_enemy_inferno_killed_mid_ult_03: That could have gone bad real quick…

lines.tengu_hunt_03: Where the hell did they go?
lines.tengu_killstreak_high_01: New York is under my protection!
lines.tengu_killstreak_high_02: You guys really need to stop fighting me…
lines.tengu_killstreak_high_03: I don't know what to tell you, I'm just better at this than you.
lines.tengu_killstreak_mid_01: I won't let you hurt my friends…
lines.tengu_killstreak_mid_02: I'll do whatever it takes to protect my team…
lines.tengu_killstreak_mid_03: I bet Sophie and Manny would get a kick out of watching me win…
lines.tengu_killstreak_start_01: You never should have come here....
lines.tengu_killstreak_start_03: in spanish "this is gonna be a long day for you…"
lines.tengu_killstreak_start_04: in spanish "Oh I'm just getting started"
lines.tengu_kill_anyhero_03: in spanish "No one threatens my friends..."
lines.tengu_kill_anyhero_10: in spanish "you picked the wrong fight"
lines.tengu_kill_astro_04: Normally I'd help you Holliday, I'm sorry…
lines.tengu_kill_astro_05: I'm not letting her lasso me…
lines.tengu_kill_atlas_03: I thought you were one of the good guys, Abrams!
lines.tengu_kill_atlas_04: Whew, finally took out the big guy...
lines.tengu_kill_bebop_05: Maybe you should just spend some time with Ms Shelly….
lines.tengu_kill_bookworm_01: And she was so nice when I took Manny to story hour
lines.tengu_kill_bookworm_03: We should start a bookclub after this…
lines.tengu_kill_bookworm_05: Oh man, I feel kinda bad about doing that to her…
lines.tengu_kill_chrono_04: I'm so sick of that lady…
lines.tengu_kill_doorman_01: Oh man, The Baroness had such a great brunch too…
lines.tengu_kill_doorman_03: I'm pretty sure that's not a normal doorman
lines.tengu_kill_doorman_04: I might wanna tell Carlos and Maria to cancel their date night at The Baroness
lines.tengu_kill_drifter_01: I won't let you hunt us!
lines.tengu_kill_drifter_02: Leave New York while you can Drifter
lines.tengu_kill_drifter_03: You're never going to win Drifter
lines.tengu_kill_drifter_04: I won't let you hurt anyone else!
lines.tengu_kill_dynamo_03: I think I just beat up Sophie's professor...
lines.tengu_kill_dynamo_04: Please don't take that out on Sophie, Professor…
lines.tengu_kill_forge_03: Thought you were supposed to be some genius….
lines.tengu_kill_forge_04: You don't have enough turrets to stop me…
lines.tengu_kill_frank_02: That guy's having a rough day.
lines.tengu_kill_frank_03: I'll help you after the ritual Victor, but for now I have to stop you.
lines.tengu_kill_frank_05: I bet I could get Carlos to lend you a shirt…
lines.tengu_kill_ghost_04: People like her make the world a worse place…
lines.tengu_kill_ghost_05: I can't let someone like her win.
lines.tengu_kill_gigawatt_01: I'm just saying: siete is about as un-intimidating a name as it gets.
lines.tengu_kill_gigawatt_03: I won't let you hurt anyone else…
lines.tengu_kill_gigawatt_05: I can't let that monster summon the Patron
lines.tengu_kill_haze_03: I think I just picked a fight with the feds
lines.tengu_kill_haze_04: Carlos isn't going to be wild about me fighting the OSIC…
lines.tengu_kill_high_networth: You think just because you have money you can bully people?
lines.tengu_kill_hornet_05: She won't be happy about that…
lines.tengu_kill_inferno_03: I won't let you burn this city down!
lines.tengu_kill_inferno_05: What do you think you're doing Infernus?
lines.tengu_kill_krill_01: Don't know which is mo and which is krill, but they're dead.
lines.tengu_kill_krill_02: One less moleman to worry about
lines.tengu_kill_krill_05: I thought they'd be cuddly. They weren't.
lines.tengu_kill_lash_01: Huh. Lash really is an asshole
lines.tengu_kill_mirage_03: Mirage shouldn't be a problem for a while…
lines.tengu_kill_mirage_04: He'll be back, need to be careful
lines.tengu_kill_mirage_05: I got nothing against the djinn, but I can't let you win
lines.tengu_kill_nano_02: You're not picking off my friends Calico!
lines.tengu_kill_nano_04: Don't worry Calico, I'm sure the Arroyos will adopt Ava
lines.tengu_kill_nano_05: She used to be a hero…'
lines.tengu_kill_orion_01: I wanted to respect my elder's but you kinda gave me no choice
lines.tengu_kill_orion_03: Not a fan of being shot with arrows
lines.tengu_kill_orion_04: That bow was never going to get it done
lines.tengu_kill_priest_01: I um, I probably shouldn't tell the Arroyos about this…
lines.tengu_kill_priest_02: Maria isn't like hearing about this
lines.tengu_kill_priest_03: sooo the Vatican sent an assasssin. That's… great.
lines.tengu_kill_punkgoat_02: I used to think goats were cute
lines.tengu_kill_punkgoat_04: I won't let you stop me Billy
lines.tengu_kill_punkgoat_05: You can't blame the world for your problems Billy
lines.tengu_kill_shiv_01: I won't be hunted by you!
lines.tengu_kill_shiv_03: What kind of moron tries to stab stone?
lines.tengu_kill_shiv_04: Get out of my city Shiv!
lines.tengu_kill_synth_02: I feel like pocket just needs a hug
lines.tengu_kill_synth_03: Pocket shouldn't be bothering us for a while
lines.tengu_kill_vampirebat_03: Mina, you don't have to be so nasty to everyone.
lines.tengu_kill_vampirebat_04: Hope Sophia doesn't end up like her…
lines.tengu_kill_vampirebat_05: Vampires are a lot more fun when you're reading about them and they're not trying to kill you
lines.tengu_kill_viper_02: I stopped you when you worked for Mendoza, and Ill stop you again
lines.tengu_kill_viper_05: Lady, just turn yourself in and save us all some time
lines.tengu_kill_viscous_01: That was one big pile of goo
lines.tengu_kill_viscous_04: That thing is like if Manny's science fair project gained sentience.
lines.tengu_kill_warden_01: That guy needs to lighten up
lines.tengu_kill_warden_05: You won't stop me from summoning the patron Warden!
lines.tengu_kill_wraith_02: You criminals are all the same…
lines.tengu_kill_wraith_03: You don't run New York, Wraith…
lines.tengu_kill_wraith_05: Take your card tricks somewhere else
lines.tengu_kill_wrecker_01: What the hell is that thing…
lines.tengu_kill_yamato_03: I don't know what she was saying, but she scared the hell out of me
lines.tengu_kill_yamato_05: I took out Mendoza, and I'll take out you!
lines.tengu_last_one_standing_01: Oh man, looks like it's all up to me...
lines.tengu_last_one_standing_03: I'll do my best to buy us some time...
lines.tengu_leaving_area_02: I'll be back when I can!
lines.tengu_match_start_astro_tengu_convo01_01: Are you angry like, all the time?
lines.tengu_match_start_astro_tengu_convo01_03: You know, my sister told me that when I get mad, I should take a deep breath and count to four.  It doesn’t always work, but sometimes it does.
lines.tengu_match_start_astro_tengu_convo01_05: Yeah I'm going to shut up now.
lines.tengu_match_start_astro_tengu_convo02_04: Were they saying nice things at least?
lines.tengu_match_start_astro_tengu_convo03_01: So what do you think of New York?
lines.tengu_match_start_astro_tengu_convo03_03: OK, so that's totally fair:  but, if you decide go sight seeing let me know.  I've only recently started leaving Spanish Harlem so it would be nice to have a someone to do stuff with that's not in my family.  Not that there's anything wrong with my family, I love-
lines.tengu_match_start_atlas_tengu_convo01_04: No, I just wanted to make my neighborhood safe.
lines.tengu_match_start_atlas_tengu_convo03_01: So a private detective is a job where you help people, but charge them money?
lines.tengu_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo01_01: You want me to carry you around the city?  It's kind of fun.
lines.tengu_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo01_03: I'm stronger than I look Mr. Golem.
lines.tengu_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo02_01: Why do you fight people for money?
lines.tengu_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo02_03: Because if I didn't people would've died.
lines.tengu_match_start_bebop_tengu_convo03_01: You and Miss Shelly should come over to the Arroyos for dinner sometime, I bet they'd get along great.
lines.tengu_match_start_drifter_tengu_convo02_: Nice to meet you, I'm Ivy.
lines.tengu_match_start_dynamo_tengu_convo01_0: It's nice to meet you Professor, Sophia speaks very highly of you.
lines.tengu_match_start_dynamo_tengu_convo02_0: I didn't even know Sophia had a job.
lines.tengu_match_start_dynamo_tengu_convo03_0: Oh, my whole life.  It was a calling, but with Mendoza gone I think I'm ready to find a career.
lines.tengu_match_start_frank_tengu_convo01_02: I mean, I am a gargoyle.
lines.tengu_match_start_frank_tengu_convo01_06: Who cares?  I was a hunk of rock.  My life started when I met the Arroyo's, anything before that doesn't really matter to me.
lines.tengu_match_start_frank_tengu_convo03_01: So Victor.  I'm not sure what your plans are after the ritual…
lines.tengu_match_start_gigawatt_tengu_convo01: I'm not sure how I feel about working with you
lines.tengu_match_start_gigawatt_tengu_convo02: I'm waiting for the other shoe to drop.
lines.tengu_match_start_gigawatt_tengu_convo03: What I want is to keep an eye on you.
lines.tengu_match_start_haze_tengu_convo01_02: Anyone would have done the same.
lines.tengu_match_start_haze_tengu_convo02_01: Ms. Haze, do you think I'd be a good fit for the OSIC?
lines.tengu_match_start_haze_tengu_convo03_01: How often do you work with a partner?
lines.tengu_match_start_haze_tengu_convo03_03: Well, stick with me.  If you let me help you we can make a lot happen.
lines.tengu_match_start_punkgoat_tengu_convo03: Hey, Billy… so I was wondering…
What?  People ask about that?  That'd be crazy.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_forge_convo01_01: Carlos says Fairfax Industries is bad for the country.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_forge_convo02_01: How can you work at Fairfax Industires
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_forge_convo02_03: I don't want to work there.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_hornet_convo01_0: Together we're gonna own the skies!
I distinctly see two of us.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_hornet_convo02_0: Carlos always says it takes more muscles to frown than to smile
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_hornet_convo03_0: I was able to clean up Spanish Harlem without murdering everybody.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_kelvin_convo01_0: Thanks for the offer sir, but I don't think I could be away from the Arroyo's that long.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_kelvin_convo02_0: I know this is an awkward time to ask, but when this is over would you be willing to talk to my little brother?  He's a big fan of your adventure stories.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_kelvin_convo03_0: I always get a little nerous before I get shot at.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_krill_convo02_03: Why do you help horrible people.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_krill_convo02_05: Is money all that matters to you?
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_krill_convo03_01: So what do you guys do?
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_lash_convo01_04: Everyone told me you were going to be mean to me.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_lash_convo03_01: Why do you hate Bebop so much.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_wraith_convo02_0: Stay out of Spanish Harlem Wraith
Just cause Mendoza was run off doesn't mean you get to muscle in.
I saw you poking around the neighborhood.
lines.tengu_match_start_tengu_wraith_convo03_0: Just not a fan of criminals
lines.tengu_match_start_viper_tengu_convo03_02: Viper.  I see you managed not to get stabbed in prison.
lines.tengu_match_start_viper_tengu_convo03_08: What are you talking about, Viper
lines.tengu_melee_kill_01: I'd stay down if I were you…
lines.tengu_melee_kill_03: You tried to punch a gargoyle? really?
lines.tengu_melee_kill_04: Well. They had moxie. I mean, they're dead but... moxie.
lines.tengu_near_miss_05: That should buy me some time…
lines.tengu_parry_03: in spanish "you don't got what it takes..."
lines.tengu_pick_up_gold_03: Who says Vigilante work doens't pay the bills...
lines.tengu_pick_up_rejuv_02: We have the rejuvinator, what's the plan?
lines.tengu_t1_shop_reminder_02: Buying a relic could be a good idea...
lines.tengu_t1_shop_reminder_03: Might be time to pick up a relic...
lines.tengu_t2_shop_reminder_01: Wonder what I can afford now...
lines.tengu_t2_shop_reminder_02: Bet there's something good in the shop...
lines.tengu_t3_shop_reminder_01: Now I get some quality gear...
lines.tengu_t3_shop_reminder_02: I could pick up something nice at the store…
lines.tengu_t3_shop_reminder_03: I should check out the store...
lines.tengu_t4_shop_reminder_01: Going shopping could be a game changer...
lines.tengu_t4_shop_reminder_02: Got a lotta souls to spend…
lines.tengu_t4_shop_reminder_03: Maybe it's time to buy some real power...
lines.tengu_tower_got_denied_01: The ritual is one step closer!
lines.tengu_tower_got_denied_05: They can keep the money, we got what we came for....
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_01: I'll do my best to slow them down...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_02: New York's about to get a lot more vegitation…
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_03: It's not fancy but it gets the job done...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_06: Sometimes you have to make your own opportunties...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_07: I'll help out however I can...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_08: in spanish "It's not a grenade, but it's better than nothing..."
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_09: This might keep them at bay...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power1_10: The slower they are, the better...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power2_02: If i find the right ally this'll be over soon...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power2_03: Hope I'm working with some team players...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power2_04: I'll give my allies the chance to shine...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power2_05: All we need now is a little coordination...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power2_07: Like Carlos says: you can make opportunities, but you can't make people take them...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_02: This can buy me some time...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_03: Being a statue isn't riviting, but it beats being killed
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_04: I'm no good to anyone dead...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_05: I can take care of myself...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_06: In spanish "This should get me out of trouble"
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_07: What can I say, i'm a work of art...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_08: I'm not just going to crush them, I'm going to look good doing it...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_09: No one will be able to harm me...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power3_10: I hope I don't need to use this...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power4_02: This is good for getting in or getting out...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power4_05: There's nothing like being in the sky...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power4_06: Wish Sophie was around to watch this...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power4_07: I'll bring hope to the team...
lines.tengu_upgrade_power4_09: in spanish "there's a reason I'm the guardian angel of El Barrio"
lines.tengu_upgrade_power5_02: Everyone should get the chance to fly
lines.tengu_upgrade_power5_04: The arroyo's always get a kick out of this…
lines.tengu_use_metal_skin_02: Go ahead and waste your bullets!
lines.tengu_use_power2_03: We need to move as one!
lines.tengu_use_power3_07: I'm not going down without a fight...
lines.tengu_use_power3_09: in spanish "Takes a lot more than that to kill me"
lines.tengu_use_power4_08: in spanish "Walking's not gonna cut it..."
lines.tengu_use_power5_05: Hope you don't mind the pick up…
lines.tengu_use_tech_purge_03: They think they can wear me down?

lines.vampirebat_killstreak_start_02: You are all bearing witness to perfection
lines.vampirebat_killstreak_start_03: Trust me, the longer this goes on the worse it's going to get for you
lines.vampirebat_killstreak_start_04: No one stands between me and my destiny
lines.vampirebat_kill_anyhero_04: No one stops me from getting what I want
lines.vampirebat_kill_astro_02: Blah blah Macomb massacre blah blah
lines.vampirebat_kill_astro_05: Took care of the Midwest hayseed.
lines.vampirebat_kill_atlas_03: Don't think Abrams will underestimate me again
lines.vampirebat_kill_atlas_05: Aww. I though he was supposed to be tough
lines.vampirebat_kill_bebop_03: What chance did and automaton have against me?
lines.vampirebat_kill_bebop_05: "Oh, I wanna save Ms. Shelley so she doesn’t die" whatever
lines.vampirebat_kill_bookworm_01: Arthur dies at the end. Yeah, I read it, don’t act surprised
lines.vampirebat_kill_bookworm_03: She would have been eaten alive at Eastside.
lines.vampirebat_kill_bookworm_04: Why couldn't she have brought Dickens or some other boring shit?
lines.vampirebat_kill_bookworm_05: What was she going to do? Chaucer me to death?
lines.vampirebat_kill_chrono_02: You know, there was a time when Paradox was actually relevant
lines.vampirebat_kill_chrono_03: She thought she was so smart
lines.vampirebat_kill_chrono_04: Hey, I killed the time thief
lines.vampirebat_kill_doorman_03: The Doorman's dead, it was easy
lines.vampirebat_kill_doorman_04: Of course they left it to me to kill the cosmic being
lines.vampirebat_kill_doorman_05: Just so you know, that hat makes you look stupid
lines.vampirebat_kill_drifter_01: Get that thing away from me
lines.vampirebat_kill_drifter_03: Never seen a vampire like him before
lines.vampirebat_kill_drifter_04: There's only room for one predator of the night
lines.vampirebat_kill_drifter_05: Sure he was a vampire, but he was a shitty vampire, so its ok
lines.vampirebat_kill_dynamo_01: Word of advice Dynamo, burn the jacket
lines.vampirebat_kill_dynamo_02: I can only imagine having to sit through his lectures
lines.vampirebat_kill_dynamo_03: You are not very good at this, are you professor?
lines.vampirebat_kill_dynamo_04: The best help their patron could find was a college professor? Oh man, they're screwed.
lines.vampirebat_kill_dynamo_05: We don't need to be scared of the professor
lines.vampirebat_kill_forge_02: Some genius she turned out to be
lines.vampirebat_kill_forge_03: If I cared enough about science, went to engineering school, and actually applied myself.. I could've been you
lines.vampirebat_kill_forge_04: "I'm a genius" nah bitch, your dead
lines.vampirebat_kill_forge_05: I don’t get why people thing she's a big deal
lines.vampirebat_kill_frank_01: He'll model for me one day
lines.vampirebat_kill_frank_02: He looked so sad, oh well, who cares
lines.vampirebat_kill_frank_04: I hate killing a man who can pull off leather pants…
lines.vampirebat_kill_frank_05: So now that you know you're going to lose, do you think your name's ironic or just tragic?
lines.vampirebat_kill_ghost_02: I don't care that she tried to kill me, Lady Geist is amazing
lines.vampirebat_kill_ghost_03: Now hopefully I impressed her with my ruthlessness
lines.vampirebat_kill_ghost_05: Well that might have killed my chances of dressing her for the Met gala
lines.vampirebat_kill_gigawatt_01: He smelled like a dirty subway tunnel
lines.vampirebat_kill_gigawatt_02: Oh my God, would it kill you to put on real pants?, a shirt, a jacket, anything
lines.vampirebat_kill_gigawatt_03: I think he was creepier than Espina
lines.vampirebat_kill_gigawatt_04: I don't get why people are so scared of the world's tackiest lamp
lines.vampirebat_kill_gigawatt_05: Seven's dead. No big deal. You're welcome.
lines.vampirebat_kill_haze_01: Ok. So sandmen are as scary as people say.
lines.vampirebat_kill_haze_02: She was making that uniform work
lines.vampirebat_kill_haze_03: I'm not worried about the OSIC, vampires are a protected species
lines.vampirebat_kill_haze_05: Haze you may walk through dreams, but I own the night
lines.vampirebat_kill_high_networth: I know how to deal with rich assholes.
lines.vampirebat_kill_hornet_01: What lame costume party did she walk out of?
lines.vampirebat_kill_hornet_04: You tried to assassinate me? Who do I look like? Arin FaireFax?
lines.vampirebat_kill_hornet_05: You don't have what it takes to stop me Vindicta
lines.vampirebat_kill_inferno_01: You should've stayed behind the bar where you belonged
lines.vampirebat_kill_inferno_02: That's for carding me on my 16th birthday
lines.vampirebat_kill_inferno_03: Your stupid little bar is going to close, and there is nothing that you can do about it.
lines.vampirebat_kill_inferno_04: Being killed by me is probably the highlight of your miserable life
lines.vampirebat_kill_kelvin_03: I thought that guy was supposed to be a big deal
lines.vampirebat_kill_kelvin_04: You make walking corpses look bad Kelvin
lines.vampirebat_kill_kelvin_05: You know Kelvin, maybe if you stopped underestimating people,  your whole expedition wouldn’t have died in the arctic
lines.vampirebat_kill_krill_01: I'm pretty sure those were the guys selling knockoffs of my dresses
lines.vampirebat_kill_lash_01: I get why Sandra thinks he's hot
lines.vampirebat_kill_lash_02: I was expecting more from you Lash
lines.vampirebat_kill_lash_04: I'm not some grubby pit fighter Lash, I'm a real talent
lines.vampirebat_kill_lash_05: Well he wasn't lacking in confidence. Skill yes, but confidence, no.
lines.vampirebat_kill_magician_01: Magic tricks are stupid and I'm glad you're dead
lines.vampirebat_kill_magician_03: I'm glad those two losers weren't on my team
lines.vampirebat_kill_magician_04: To think there was a time where the Sinclair's were actually relevant
lines.vampirebat_kill_mirage_01: We get it, you like the djinn
lines.vampirebat_kill_mirage_03: You'd think an ambassador would have a better personal assistant
lines.vampirebat_kill_mirage_05: You don't have you yell everything, Jesus
lines.vampirebat_kill_nano_01: A shame, in another life, you could've been my cool aunt or something
lines.vampirebat_kill_nano_02: I'd rather die than become a creepy cat lady
lines.vampirebat_kill_nano_03: Oh my God, I think that cat was her only friend, that is so sad
lines.vampirebat_kill_nano_04: If you had to have a cat, why'd you pick a sphinx?
lines.vampirebat_kill_orion_01: I'm surprised that he didn’t crumble to dust
lines.vampirebat_kill_orion_02: That was one angry old man
lines.vampirebat_kill_orion_03: Aww, you stumbled out of hospice just to die here
lines.vampirebat_kill_orion_04: Your grandkids are dead, I get it, go buy a dog.
lines.vampirebat_kill_orion_05: His old man smell will haunt me
lines.vampirebat_kill_priest_02: You think I was going to just let you hunt me?
lines.vampirebat_kill_priest_03: You're just a man Rourke, and you're gonna die screaming like one
lines.vampirebat_kill_priest_04: I won’t be hunted by the likes of you
lines.vampirebat_kill_punkgoat_01: Ahhhh, I hope I didn’t get rabies
lines.vampirebat_kill_punkgoat_02: He was not a very nice person
lines.vampirebat_kill_punkgoat_04: You're angry, we get it, get a hobby
lines.vampirebat_kill_punkgoat_05: Bye Billy, no one will miss you
lines.vampirebat_kill_shiv_01: Man, the Baxter Society must be falling on hard times if he's working for them…
lines.vampirebat_kill_shiv_02: Oh, a bad boy. How original.
lines.vampirebat_kill_shiv_03: He though he was so cool, didn’t he?
lines.vampirebat_kill_shiv_04: *Sigh* Get with the times Shiv. Stabbing people was so three years ago
lines.vampirebat_kill_tengu_02: "I'm the savior of Spanish Harlem" No, you’re a dumb gargoyle and you're dead
lines.vampirebat_kill_tengu_03: No one likes you Ivy, they're just pretending
lines.vampirebat_kill_tengu_05: Tell you what Ivy, if you ask nicely, I'll let you carry my purse
lines.vampirebat_kill_viper_01: Oh my God, you are the most disgusting woman I've ever met
lines.vampirebat_kill_viper_02: I could not kill that woman fast enough
lines.vampirebat_kill_viper_04: I loathe everything about you Viper
lines.vampirebat_kill_viper_05: I hate your stupid face, I hate your stupid attitude, and I hate your stupid midwest accent
lines.vampirebat_kill_viscous_01: Oh my God, he was made of goo
lines.vampirebat_kill_viscous_04: He's like if saltwater taffy grew arms and legs
lines.vampirebat_kill_viscous_05: That goo better not stain my jacket
lines.vampirebat_kill_warden_01: I've seen vampire elders with a smaller stick up their ass
lines.vampirebat_kill_warden_03: That guy's gotta work through some mommy and daddy issues
lines.vampirebat_kill_warden_04: Yeah, I don’t get why people are scared of him
lines.vampirebat_kill_warden_05: Course I killed Warden, I'm me
lines.vampirebat_kill_wraith_01: Yeah, she has money, but it's new money, so its like "eeh"
lines.vampirebat_kill_wraith_02: Credit where credit is due, her hat was pretty great
lines.vampirebat_kill_wraith_03: You shouldn’t try to rise above your station Wraith
lines.vampirebat_kill_wraith_04: Some queen bee she turned out to be
lines.vampirebat_kill_wraith_05: Looks like she was all hype
lines.vampirebat_kill_yamato_01: Who would've guessed thw woman swinging an antique didn't survive?
lines.vampirebat_kill_yamato_03: Yamato's dead, which isn't surprising, cause she was fighting me
lines.vampirebat_kill_yamato_04: I don't get why people are scared of her
lines.vampirebat_kill_yamato_05: You lost Yamato, deal with it
lines.vampirebat_last_one_standing_01: It's ok, I'm used to high pressure situations
lines.vampirebat_last_one_standing_02: I'll hold on as long as I can
lines.vampirebat_last_one_standing_03: Well, the help is all dead, that's awesome
lines.vampirebat_match_start_frank_vampirebat_: I'm sure you're self concious about the whole corpse thing, but I bet if you were in a dimly lit club you'd be a Midwest 8,  New York 6.
Whoever stitched you up did a shit job.
Of course I could do it better.
I'm not, I'm someone who actually knows how to sew.
You walk one of my shows then sure.
I don't hate working with you.
lines.vampirebat_match_start_vampirebat_doorma: I try not to talk to the help.
So what do you plan on doing to help? Holding open a door while I do all the work?
You could have at least changed when you got off of work.
lines.vampirebat_melee_kill_04: Great, now Im going to have to get this dry cleaned…
lines.vampirebat_melee_kill_05: You really need to respect your betters
lines.vampirebat_near_miss_03: Oh, but I was starting to have fun
lines.vampirebat_near_miss_04: Look who's running home to cry
lines.vampirebat_parry_03: You're going to suffer for this
lines.vampirebat_pick_up_gold_01: I don't say no to free money
lines.vampirebat_revenge_kill: I didn't forget what you did…
lines.vampirebat_t1_shop_reminder_02: I can get an item to help
lines.vampirebat_t1_shop_reminder_03: Might want to go by the curiosity shoppe

lines.vampirebat_t2_shop_reminder_03: Might be time to swing by the store again

lines.vampirebat_t3_shop_reminder_02: I should see whatelse they're selling at the store
lines.vampirebat_t3_shop_reminder_03: I have enough souls to get something good

lines.vampirebat_tower_got_denied_04: So they got some souls, who cares

lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power1_03: This should keep the rabble away
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power1_05: They'll die, I'll live, itll be fine
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power1_06: I'm not worried about my health
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power1_07: If I want their blood I'll take it
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power1_08: They're going to regret getting close to me
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power1_09: I hope I don't bend my umbrella beating them to death
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power1_10: Mom would say I'm lowering myself to their level but whatever, she's not here

lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power2_04: Good luck trying to stop me…
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power2_05: They can try to stop me, but it's not going to go well for them
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power2_06: Oh I am going to be so annoying
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power2_09: I can't wait to fly around manhattan
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power3_01: I don't need to be up close to kill someone
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power3_02: I'll be sure to spread the love
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power3_06: When the end comes there's nothing they can do about it
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power3_07: They die when I say they die
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power3_08: I'm going to kill them all
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power3_09: I'm coming for every one of them
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power3_10: I have to be sure to spread this around…
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_01: They have no idea whats in store for them
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_02: The umbrella's not just for show
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_03: You ready to streatch your wings darlings?
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_04: I can't wait to hear their wings flutter
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_05: This just keeps getting better and better
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_06: The sky will be filled with crimson
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_07: Looking forward to hearing them scream
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_08: It starts slow, but boy does it ramp up…
lines.vampirebat_upgrade_power4_09: This is going to be spectacular
lines.vampirebat_use_ability_refresher_03: Ready to release the swarm again
lines.vampirebat_use_power1_09: I'm going to take my time with them
lines.vampirebat_use_power3_13: I can't wait for the grand finale…
lines.vampirebat_use_power3_15: I'd give up if I were you….
lines.vampirebat_use_power4_06: I love hunting in the city
lines.vampirebat_use_power4_09: You have no idea what I'm capable of
lines.vampirebat_use_tech_purge_03: I can't let this effect me…
lines.vampirebat_use_unstoppable_02: I don't care about their abilities
lines.vampirebat_use_unstoppable_03: Their magic is too weak to matter…

lines.viper_ally_bebop_killed_in_lane_01_alt: oh no.  They took out Bebop.

lines.viper_be_careful_01: You're on a metaphorical island V.  Well I suppose literal island cause it's manhattan but the original point stands I need to be careful
lines.viper_be_careful_02: Yeahhhh I'm all alone out here
lines.viper_be_careful_03: If I were them Id ambush me right about now.
lines.viper_close_call_01: You know me, cheatin' death and breakin' hearts
lines.viper_close_call_02: Takes more than that to kill me
lines.viper_close_call_03: Things got a little spicy back there…
lines.viper_close_call_05: I need to not put myself in those situations…
lines.viper_congrats_03: This is more fun than Philly prison riot
lines.viper_congrats_04: I love takin' these guys out
lines.viper_congrats_05: We make a helluva team don't we
lines.viper_desperation_power2_01: I gonna give 'em something to remember me by
lines.viper_desperation_power2_05: I need this stuff to kick in
lines.viper_end_streak: Doesn't matter how good you think you are, life catches up with you eventually.
lines.viper_enemy_gets_rejuv_02: They got the rejuvinator we need to stop them!
lines.viper_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They got the reuv, what's the plan?
lines.viper_hunt_02: Damn it, where did they go
lines.viper_hunt_03: C'mon, don't hide - come out so we can talk
lines.viper_killstreak_high_01: I am gonna mow you all down
lines.viper_killstreak_high_02: Guys, why do you keep fighting me you know what's going to happen
lines.viper_killstreak_high_03: I feel like Lash in a room full of Bebops
lines.viper_killstreak_mid_01: It's my time to shine, baby
lines.viper_killstreak_mid_02: These guys ain't putting up much of a fight
lines.viper_killstreak_mid_03: This party ain't stopping anytime soon
lines.viper_killstreak_start_03: No one's getting in our way
lines.viper_killstreak_start_04: Maybe now people will start taking me seriously
lines.viper_killstreak_start_05: Just give up baby, no ones better than V
lines.viper_kill_anyhero_01: Like I've never had fight for my life before…
lines.viper_kill_anyhero_03: Thought these guys were supposed to be tough.
lines.viper_kill_anyhero_04: They wouldn't 2 minutes in a prison riot.
lines.viper_kill_anyhero_05: That's what they get when they mess with me.
lines.viper_kill_anyhero_09: They never fought someone like me.
lines.viper_kill_anyhero_10: I shoulda put money on this thing…
lines.viper_kill_astro_01: Cops man, when they gonna learn
lines.viper_kill_astro_03: Everyone with a badge thinks they're hard
lines.viper_kill_astro_05: We don’t need to worry about the Sheriff

lines.viper_kill_bebop_04: Your time's over Bebop, retire with what's left of your dignity
lines.viper_kill_bebop_05: When you gonna get the message Bebop, you suck?
lines.viper_kill_bookworm_02: Her brother was way more fun to hang out with..
lines.viper_kill_bookworm_03: Man, her brother was right she is wound up tight
lines.viper_kill_bookworm_05: Never trust someone that's read more than 4 books
lines.viper_kill_chrono_03: Won't be seeing Paradox for a while
lines.viper_kill_chrono_04: Gotta say, she really makes that coat work
lines.viper_kill_chrono_05: Maybe next time you guys shouldn't kick me out of the Paraox museum
lines.viper_kill_doorman_02: That's for kicking me out of The Baroness
lines.viper_kill_doorman_04: And I thought I got a kick out of messing with people…

lines.viper_kill_drifter_04: I've seen scarier vampires in Kenosha

lines.viper_kill_dynamo_04: I'm not waiting for you to do that weird blackhole stuff
lines.viper_kill_forge_02: Some genius she turned out to be
lines.viper_kill_forge_05: McGinnis, you aren't ready for someone like me
lines.viper_kill_frank_03: You're a shambling mass of flesh, boo hoo
lines.viper_kill_frank_04: That guy thinks he's the only one with problems here
lines.viper_kill_frank_05: As far as I'm concerend I did that sad bastard a favor
lines.viper_kill_ghost_03: What the hell is wrong with her arm?
lines.viper_kill_gigawatt_01: Glad I'm walkin' away from that fight…
lines.viper_kill_gigawatt_04: Seven won't be bothering us a for while

lines.viper_kill_haze_03: I don't get why people are scared of her

lines.viscous_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_0: Goo doesn't care if you're visibile or not
lines.viscous_enemy_tengu_flies_away_02: Well that's not fair, she flies…
lines.viscous_enemy_tengu_flies_away_03: Now I know how people feel when I turn into goo…
lines.viscous_hunt_01: They have to be here somewhere…
lines.viscous_hunt_02: Come back surface dweller, I want to be friends… but first I have to shoot you.
lines.viscous_killstreak_high_01: The deep has proven it's dominance…
lines.viscous_killstreak_mid_01: Even in a borrowed body, no one can stop me…
lines.viscous_killstreak_mid_02: Surface dwellers aren't so scary after all
lines.viscous_killstreak_mid_03: I'm rather good at violence, aren't I?
lines.viscous_killstreak_start_01: Time to keep this streak going…
lines.viscous_killstreak_start_02: I'm doing rather well aren't I…
lines.viscous_killstreak_start_04: The Deep will be silent no longer…
lines.viscous_killstreak_start_05: Do I have your attention now?
lines.viscous_kill_anyhero_05: This body is proving to be useful.
lines.viscous_kill_anyhero_06: I never realized violence would be so exciting…
lines.viscous_kill_anyhero_07: Oh the things you can do with arms and legs…
lines.viscous_kill_anyhero_09: The Deep's grievences will be heard
lines.viscous_kill_astro_03: I hate fighting a fellow tourist
lines.viscous_kill_astro_04: Holliday won't be grabbing anyone for a while
lines.viscous_kill_atlas_05: The blue creature is nolonger a threat
lines.viscous_kill_bebop_03: We don't need to worry about Bebop anymore.
lines.viscous_kill_chrono_03: She's clever. But now she's clever and dead.
lines.viscous_kill_chrono_05: That should buy us some time.
lines.viscous_kill_dynamo_03: We don't need to be afraid of a black hole for a while…
lines.viscous_kill_dynamo_04: Sorry I had to kill you Professor
lines.viscous_kill_dynamo_05: He seemed like a happy person
lines.viscous_kill_forge_02: I killed a morally compromised scientist
lines.viscous_kill_forge_03: Fairfax Industries doesn’t hire good people
lines.viscous_kill_forge_04: You're kind of a monster McGinnis
lines.viscous_kill_forge_05: Fairfax Industires has a lot to answer for
lines.viscous_kill_ghost_04: Turns out Geist isn't immortal, she's just a narcassist
lines.viscous_kill_gigawatt_02: Seven seems like a bad person.
lines.viscous_kill_haze_03: Horray! One less government assassin to be scared of
lines.viscous_kill_haze_05: Haze won't hurt us anymore. Until she's back. Then she'll probably shoot us.
lines.viscous_kill_hornet_02: I won't let you hurt my friends
lines.viscous_kill_inferno_03: Stop lighting things on fire, please
lines.viscous_kill_inferno_04: You can't burn me, I'm goo.
lines.viscous_kill_kelvin_05: I bet if you weren't trying to kill my friends I'd think you're really nice
lines.viscous_kill_krill_03: Now I have mole hair in my goo
lines.viscous_kill_krill_04: I bet before he was dead Mo gave nice hugs
lines.viscous_kill_krill_05: I hope they'll be my friend later
lines.viscous_kill_lash_02: I don't have anything against you Lash, I'm just jumping on a bandwagon
lines.viscous_kill_lash_04: Lash thought he could kill me. He was wrong
lines.viscous_kill_lash_05: Sorry lash. That was sarcasim, I'm not actually sorry.
lines.viscous_kill_mirage_01: I'm sorry Mirage, The Deep's problems are more serious than the Djinn's
lines.viscous_kill_mirage_04: I have nothing against the Djinn, Mirage but too much is at stake
lines.viscous_kill_mirage_05: He was good person but only a so-so bodyguard,
lines.viscous_kill_orion_01: I don't want arrows getting stuck in my goo
lines.viscous_kill_orion_02: That was one angry old man
lines.viscous_kill_orion_03: Talon didn't seem happy to see me
lines.viscous_kill_shiv_01: I couldn't let Shiv kill me, because then I'd be dead
lines.viscous_kill_shiv_02: Why's the Baxter Society hunting me?
lines.viscous_kill_synth_02: We should have been on the same side Pocket
lines.viscous_kill_synth_05: Can we still be friends Pocket?
lines.viscous_kill_warden_03: I couldn't let him hurt my friends
lines.viscous_kill_wraith_04: She won't be shooting us for a while
lines.viscous_kill_yamato_03: If you didn’t try to stab my friends I wouldn't have to kill you
lines.viscous_kill_yamato_04: She had a sword. It didn't help.
lines.viscous_last_one_standing_01: I need to find a puddle to hide in
lines.viscous_last_one_standing_02: Where did all my friends go?
lines.viscous_last_one_standing_03: This got a lot more intense…
lines.viscous_match_start_astro_viscous_convo0: When I'm in the cube it's warm.  I like being in the cube.  You seem to like revenge so I wonder if it feels the same.
Then why do you want to live in it?
lines.viscous_match_start_bebop_viscous_convo0: Ms. Shelly sounds like a nice lady.
Do you think she'd like being in The Cube?
I hear Lash doesn't like you
lines.viscous_match_start_dynamo_viscous_convo: Oh, that sounds more fun.  OK!
Is dangerous.  And it's only a matter of time before he tires of The Deep and comes for you on land.
lines.viscous_match_start_ghost_viscous_convo0: I don't have a nose.  But if I did I bet your hair would smell like flowers.
lines.viscous_match_start_gigawatt_viscous_con: The adversary… he comes for The Deep.  And if I don't stop him, he'll come for everything.
lines.viscous_match_start_haze_viscous_convo01: But after the ritual The Adversary will be gone.
lines.viscous_match_start_haze_viscous_convo03: Thanks for your help Haze, not everyone takes the problems of The Deep seriously.
lines.viscous_match_start_inferno_viscous_conv: Do you always dress fancy or is it just for work?
lines.viscous_match_start_orion_viscous_convo0: Do you want to spend time in the cube?  It's where I go when I'm sad.  Or injured.  Or just want to be in the cube.
The Baxter Society hunts monsters, right?
If we fail to summon The Patron, do you think they can help stop The Adversary.
You'll probably be dead.  I'm goo.  I'll be fine.
At your fragile age I think you'll find the  cube to be quite helpful.
No, you are.  But you lie to yourself because you're a human.
lines.viscous_melee_kill_01: Goo hits harder than you'd think doesn't it…
lines.viscous_melee_kill_02: I need to get into more fist fights, that was exciting…
lines.viscous_melee_kill_03: Who would have thought that punching strangers would feel so good?
lines.viscous_melee_kill_04: I'm tougher than I thought I was…
lines.viscous_melee_kill_05: I just won a melee, that's exciting.
lines.viscous_near_miss_04: It's ok, I'll have another chance to kill them.
lines.viscous_parry_02: This body is more capable than I thought
lines.viscous_pick_up_gold_02: Glad I got that before anyone else did
lines.viscous_pick_up_gold_04: Well this was careless of someone to leave behind
lines.viscous_t1_shop_reminder_03: I can afford some new gear
lines.viscous_t2_shop_reminder_01: I might want to revist the store
lines.viscous_t2_shop_reminder_02: I should see what I can buy
lines.viscous_t3_shop_reminder_02: Time to go to the store again.
lines.viscous_t3_shop_reminder_03: I should see what they have at the store
lines.viscous_t4_shop_reminder_02: No point in holding onto all these souls
lines.viscous_tower_got_denied_02: They can have some extra souls, we don't need them.
lines.viscous_tower_got_denied_03: One step closer to completing the ritual…
lines.viscous_upgrade_power1_01: I can't just rely on my weapon…
lines.viscous_upgrade_power1_03: I don't get why people think it's gross
lines.viscous_upgrade_power1_07: I need ot be able to defend myself.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power1_08: I can't be defensive all the time.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power1_10: I'm tired of being pushed around.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power2_01: It's not just restorative, it's great for your skin.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power2_02: They'll be safe in my cube. Well, safe-ish.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power2_07: The surface is a dangerous place.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power3_12: I'm going to metaphorically punch them. The metaphor is goo.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power3_13: You can't tell, but I smile when I use this
lines.viscous_upgrade_power3_14: People think this is a little silly. Then I punch them and they don't think that anymore because they're concussed.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power3_17: I'll take them for a ride
lines.viscous_upgrade_power3_18: They'll think it’s a puddle of goo… then it'll punch them in the face
lines.viscous_upgrade_power3_19: It's like a handshake but better
lines.viscous_upgrade_power3_20: People love it when I use this
lines.viscous_upgrade_power4_11: It's like the cube, but a sphere.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power4_12: Cubes are for healing. Balls are for murder.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power4_13: I wish I could roll in this all day. That's hyperbole.
lines.viscous_upgrade_power4_14: This is more fun than the subway
lines.viscous_upgrade_power4_15: It's a little messy, but it's worth it
lines.viscous_upgrade_power4_17: I'm going to crush our enemies
lines.viscous_upgrade_power4_18: They'll try to get away, but it won't matter because I'm going to run them over.
lines.viscous_use_metal_skin_02: I'm not worried about their weapons…
lines.viscous_use_metal_skin_03: Bullets aren't going to hurt me…
lines.viscous_use_power2_07: Life is simpler in the cube
lines.viscous_use_power2_on_others_08: Let the calm wash over you.
lines.viscous_use_power3_06: Who wants to see a goo fist?
lines.viscous_use_power4_16: It's funny because I'm basically immortal

Your training served you well Haze

lines.warden_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: You opened yourself up for that…

lines.warden_enemy_gets_rejuv_03: They piced up the rejuvinator, and they're going to mount an offensive

lines.warden_enemy_gigawatt_hide_from_ult_03: I need to get out of here!

lines.warden_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_02: You can't hide from me Haze
lines.warden_enemy_haze_kill_when_invisible_03: You were never going to escape me…

lines.warden_enemy_hornet_damaged_by_snipe_03: vindicta has me in her sights…
lines.warden_hunt_02: They have to be around here
lines.warden_killstreak_high_01: One by one my enemies fall!
lines.warden_killstreak_high_02: Not even the Patrons can stop me!
lines.warden_killstreak_mid_03: Don't feel bad, I've trained my whole life for this.
lines.warden_killstreak_start_03: I'll give my life for The Cause… but first I'll take yours
lines.warden_killstreak_start_04: Who among you will stand and face me!
lines.warden_kill_anyhero_10: I've trained my whole life for this moment…
lines.warden_kill_atlas_05: Your will is strong detective, but not strong enough.
lines.warden_kill_bebop_01: The will of man is stronger than any machine.
lines.warden_kill_bebop_05: Go back to the scrapyard bebop.
lines.warden_kill_chrono_01: To think I was worried about the Time Theif
lines.warden_kill_chrono_02: All your power, and you squander it on petty nonsense.
lines.warden_kill_chrono_03: Paradox, if you applied yourself you might actually be dangerous.
lines.warden_kill_chrono_04: Paradox… you masquerade as having a code, when really you are driven by nothing but ego.
lines.warden_kill_chrono_05: Pride will only get you so far, Paradox.
lines.warden_kill_dynamo_05: I can't let you complete the ritual Dynamo
lines.warden_kill_forge_01: Man was never meant to play god McGinnis…
lines.warden_kill_forge_04: McGinnis won't be bothering us for a while.
lines.warden_kill_gigawatt_01: You're a monster seven… and I won't let your sins go unpunished.
lines.warden_kill_gigawatt_02: No mercy awaits the likes of you Seven…
lines.warden_kill_gigawatt_04: We have nothing to fear from Seven.
lines.warden_kill_gigawatt_05: You will pay for every life you took…
lines.warden_kill_haze_02: The OSIC is out of their depth
lines.warden_kill_haze_03: Even you have your limits Haze
lines.warden_kill_haze_04: I won't be intimidated by you Haze
lines.warden_kill_high_networth: I don't care about your wealth, you bleed the same as anyone else…
lines.warden_kill_hornet_02: Your vengence is justified Vindicta… but your time has long since passed
lines.warden_kill_hornet_03: I put the spirit to rest.
lines.warden_kill_hornet_04: There was no escaping me Vindicta…
lines.warden_kill_hornet_05: You won't prey on my friends anymore…
lines.warden_kill_inferno_04: I won't let you burn New York…
lines.warden_kill_inferno_05: This plane is not your playground…
lines.warden_kill_kelvin_04: Kelvin should be out of our hair for a little while…
lines.warden_kill_kelvin_05: He'll be back sooner than I'd like…
lines.warden_kill_krill_03: The tunnelrats have been dealt with…
lines.warden_kill_krill_05: They thought they could have their way with us.
lines.warden_kill_lash_01: You mistake ego for competence Lash.
lines.warden_kill_lash_02: You have met your better, Lash.
lines.warden_kill_lash_03: Stick to fighting town drunks, Lash.
lines.warden_kill_lash_04: I have no tolerance for bullies.
lines.warden_kill_lash_05: There's always someone more dangerous Lash.
lines.warden_kill_mirage_01: I can't let you succeed Mirage.
lines.warden_kill_mirage_02: You won't complete the ritual mirage!
lines.warden_kill_orion_01: Don't make me do this Talon.
lines.warden_kill_orion_02: I looked up to you once.
lines.warden_kill_orion_03: How can you of all people align yourself with that thing?
lines.warden_kill_shiv_01: Is this what the Baxter Society has turned into?
lines.warden_kill_shiv_03: Spend less time on your hair and more time learning how to fight…
lines.warden_kill_shiv_04: You look better. I fight better.
lines.warden_kill_synth_01: This war isn't meant for you Pocket.
lines.warden_kill_synth_02: I believe you want to change the world for the better Pocket… but you picked the wrong friends.
lines.warden_kill_synth_03: That case will be your undoing Pocket
lines.warden_kill_synth_05: Don't worry. I'll take care of that case for you.
lines.warden_kill_tengu_05: You're meddling in things you don't understand Ivy.
lines.warden_kill_viscous_05: Who did you think you were fighting Viscous?
lines.warden_kill_wraith_02: I won't be one of your victim's wraith…
lines.warden_kill_wraith_03: Money won't keep you warm in the coffin Wraith
lines.warden_kill_wraith_05: Wraith, picking a fight with me was a mistake…
lines.warden_kill_wrecker_01: I won't be consumed by you!
lines.warden_kill_wrecker_04: You won't feast on my allies!
lines.warden_kill_yamato_01: This is the beginning of the end for the 7th Moon.
lines.warden_kill_yamato_03: You fought with grace Yamato… but that will only get you so far.
lines.warden_kill_yamato_04: I won't let the 7th Moon get a foothold in New York
lines.warden_kill_yamato_05: This city is under my protection Yamato!
lines.warden_last_one_standing_03: I'll hold the line until my fellows return…
lines.warden_leaving_area_02: I'll be back when I can…
lines.warden_melee_kill_03: You never were going to beat me
lines.warden_near_miss_04: They're cagey, I'll give them that…
lines.warden_near_miss_05: It appears I have a worthy foe.
lines.warden_pick_up_gold_01: Better I have it than them
lines.warden_pick_up_gold_02: Changing the world doesn’t come cheap
lines.warden_pick_up_gold_05: I'll put this to good use.
lines.warden_pick_up_rejuv_03: We have the rejuvinator, and now we press the advantage!
lines.warden_see_enemy_metal_skin_02: Bullets are just going to bounce off!
lines.warden_t2_shop_reminder_02: I should take a look at what I can afford…
lines.warden_t2_shop_reminder_03: Might be time to go shopping
lines.warden_t3_shop_reminder_01: I should stop by the shop
lines.warden_t3_shop_reminder_02: The right purchase can shift the battle…
lines.warden_t3_shop_reminder_03: I can't let these souls go to waste…
lines.warden_t4_shop_reminder_01: I can afford anything at the shop…
lines.warden_t4_shop_reminder_03: No point in saving more souls
lines.warden_tower_got_denied_02: The objective is all that matters
lines.warden_tower_got_denied_03: We're one step closer to completing the ritual
lines.warden_ult_interrupted_01: That was supposed to be my moment!
lines.warden_upgrade_power1_02: These secrets have been handed down generation to generation.
lines.warden_upgrade_power1_03: I'll lead them from the front…
lines.warden_upgrade_power1_04: Now this is how you start a fight…
lines.warden_upgrade_power1_05: Ready to get in the fight…
lines.warden_upgrade_power1_09: They'll lose their will to fight.
lines.warden_upgrade_power1_10: Break their weapons… break their will.
lines.warden_upgrade_power2_02: If I'm not willing to charge into battle, how can I expect others to do the same.
lines.warden_upgrade_power2_05: Time to run through the fire…
lines.warden_upgrade_power2_06: My mettle will be tested… and I will not falter.
lines.warden_upgrade_power2_07: I do not shy away from conflict…
lines.warden_upgrade_power2_09: They will come for me, and I will be ready.
lines.warden_upgrade_power3_03: Control the battlefield, and you control the war.
lines.warden_upgrade_power3_04: They'll try to run. It won't go well for them.
lines.warden_upgrade_power3_05: First they panic, and then they die.
lines.warden_upgrade_power3_07: If they know what's good for them, they'll run.
lines.warden_upgrade_power3_08: Time to keep them on their toes…
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_01: They will try to kill me, and they will fail.
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_02: I will stride across the battlefield in glory!
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_03: I will never back down to the likes of them.
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_04: Today I stand before the mighty and make them kneel…
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_06: I will face their entire army alone if I have to.
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_07: I'm ready to hold the line.
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_09: I must fight, no matter the odds.
lines.warden_upgrade_power4_10: I will stand as a beacon for my allies.
lines.warden_use_power3_02: You have no place to go…
lines.warden_use_power3_03: Will you run, or will you fight?
lines.warden_use_power3_08: This will end one way or another…
lines.warden_use_power4_04: I'll take on all of you!
lines.warden_use_power4_06: Never show fear, no matter the odds.

lines.wraith_match_start_astro_wraith_convo01_: If you think I'd be worried about a sheriff from Missoula…
Wherever.  The point is that I don't get scared by cops who probably just experienced running water for the first time in their lives.
lines.wraith_match_start_astro_wraith_convo03_: I will repent all my wicked ways.
No I think you're a joke.
