lines.wraith_match_start_bebop_wraith_convo02_: Why are you wasting your time at a junk yard.
How long are you planning on lying to that lady.
No, you just lie to yourself.
lines.wraith_match_start_bebop_wraith_convo03_: Well, in that case let's go out with a bang…
lines.wraith_match_start_chrono_wraith_convo01: Oh it's going to be hilarious.
lines.wraith_match_start_chrono_wraith_convo02: You know what I like about you Paradox?  You don't just like to win.  You like to do it with style.
lines.wraith_match_start_chrono_wraith_convo03: I thought that was at the MET.
lines.wraith_match_start_drifter_wraith_convo0: I know where you're going with this: here's the problem with gambling on body counts with you.  You're a psychotic killing machine, which means if I incentivize you to kill more on top of that, there's a non zero chance that you don’t finish the ritual because you want to pad your numbers.
I really wanted to make it work
Between the two of us they don't have a chance in hell at escaping.
Glad you're on our side Drifter
No need to threaten me, I'm already scared of you.
lines.wraith_match_start_dynamo_wraith_convo01: This may surprise you Professor, but college kids like to have fun.
lines.wraith_match_start_dynamo_wraith_convo02: I don't suppose you're a gambling man Professor?
lines.wraith_match_start_dynamo_wraith_convo03: I mean I've killed people but it's not like a recreational thing for me.
Honey, I got you covered don't worry.
lines.wraith_match_start_forge_wraith_convo01_: Suppose now's not the time to ask for an introduction.
lines.wraith_match_start_forge_wraith_convo02_: Bet your turrets can't keep up with me…
lines.wraith_match_start_forge_wraith_convo03_: Ya know I'm used to working with people that are a little more subtle.
lines.wraith_match_start_ghost_wraith_convo01_: You know what the difference between us is?
I worked for what I have, it wasn't handed to me.
lines.wraith_match_start_ghost_wraith_convo02_: I had a marker on him, so not very long.
lines.wraith_match_start_ghost_wraith_convo03_: I don't suppose you have any moral issue with taking people out while they're helpless?
I think this'll work out just fine
lines.wraith_match_start_haze_wraith_convo01_0: You're not here for me, right?
I think "little" is underselling me a bit, but that's good to know
lines.wraith_match_start_haze_wraith_convo02_0: Anyone who says they aren't nervous when the stakes are high are either liars or morons.
That's why I do it.  Nerves let you know you're alive.
lines.wraith_match_start_hornet_wraith_convo01: Yeah you don't have to equivicate with me, I don't care.  You're killing them out of principle right?
Have you considered killing people for money?  Because boy do I have list for you.
You should.  I think you'd be great at.  Anyway, you ever want to chat about financial freedom you let me know
lines.wraith_match_start_hornet_wraith_convo02: I believe in leading by example.
lines.wraith_match_start_hornet_wraith_convo03: How you like being a ghost?
lines.wraith_match_start_inferno_wraith_convo0: It is going to be offensive how fast we burn down their objectives
How's working at the boring bar.
He is.  A good. Boring. Man.
It's ok, you can say it.
Practice that line more so next time you say it I might believe you.
lines.wraith_match_start_kelvin_wraith_convo01: You say contempt, I say managed expectations.
lines.wraith_match_start_kelvin_wraith_convo03: People say you're a noble man.
Noble men tend to get other people killed.
lines.wraith_match_start_krill_wraith_convo01_: Hey, of all the people I could call markers on I chose you, and that should count for something.
lines.wraith_match_start_krill_wraith_convo02_: I almost feel sorry for the poor bastards waiting for us in the lane.
lines.wraith_match_start_krill_wraith_convo03_: Boys we don't talk about losing at the table.
Feeling's mutual.  Now let's summon a god.
lines.wraith_match_start_lash_wraith_convo01_0: Mendoza said you were gonna take a dive in that fight.
I lost a lot of money.
lines.wraith_match_start_lash_wraith_convo02_0: And you're the guy that lost to Bebop.
One time's all it takes to be a loser.
lines.wraith_match_start_orion_wraith_convo02_: Are you as dangerous as they say?
That when you retired you had more confirmed kills than anyone in The Baxter Society.
lines.wraith_match_start_punkgoat_wraith_convo: Oh, you're a fan of the 7th Moon.

Look Billy, I know that people give you shit  for having a goat head and I just wanted to say that I really appreciate that whatever bet you lost to have that be the case you were man enough to follow through with the consequnces.
If you didn't you're even dumber that I thought
What do you do for fun?
What do you do for fun? I mean, you say you hate everything but there has to be something.
So we can find common ground.  Share some laughs.  Bet on sports games then hold markers when you can't cover them.  It's a whole thing but it all starts with building a connection, ya know.
lines.wraith_match_start_tengu_wraith_convo01_: It's nice to finally work with you.
Look,  I'm a big fan of anyone who makes Mendoza's life hell.  Relax, let's have some fun.
lines.wraith_match_start_tengu_wraith_convo03_: Try not to sound too excited.
That’s just because you haven't gotten to know me yet
lines.wraith_match_start_viper_wraith_convo02_: It's not.  But tell you what; if we complete the ritual we'll call things square.
lines.wraith_match_start_viper_wraith_convo03_: Obviously.  How much you wanna wager? A thousand?

It seem's haze's reputation is well earned

lines.yamato_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_01: You made it too easy, Bebop…
lines.yamato_enemy_bebop_kill_mid_laser_03: The scrap golem never had a chance….
lines.yamato_enemy_dynamo_charges_02: Look out for the black hole!
lines.yamato_hunt_02: Come out and die with honor.
lines.yamato_killstreak_high_01: New York belongs to the 7th Moon.
lines.yamato_killstreak_high_02: The world will not forget the name Yamato.
lines.yamato_killstreak_mid_01: Surrender and I'll give you a quick death
lines.yamato_killstreak_start_01: And here I was expecting a challenge…
lines.yamato_killstreak_start_02: I'll kill you all, one by one.
lines.yamato_killstreak_start_03: The 7th Moon takes what it wants
lines.yamato_killstreak_start_04: None of you will escape me
lines.yamato_killstreak_start_05: You were a fool to fight me
lines.yamato_kill_anyhero_07: No one will stand between me and completing the ritual.
lines.yamato_kill_astro_03: Stay out of my business Holliday.
lines.yamato_kill_astro_05: The 7th Moon is above the law.
lines.yamato_kill_atlas_01: Today my blade drinks Ixian blood.
lines.yamato_kill_atlas_05: That was one big son of a bitch…
lines.yamato_kill_bebop_01: I won't lose to scrap metal
lines.yamato_kill_bebop_03: You aren't ready to fight me Bebop.
lines.yamato_kill_bookworm_01: She never should have left the library
lines.yamato_kill_bookworm_03: A pity I had to kill you
lines.yamato_kill_bookworm_04: It's a shame, she was tolerable
lines.yamato_kill_bookworm_05: Some people aren't cut out for war
lines.yamato_kill_chrono_03: You're not a criminal, you're a brat.
lines.yamato_kill_chrono_04: What is Paradox compared to the 7th Moon
lines.yamato_kill_chrono_05: She's not as clever as she thought…
lines.yamato_kill_doorman_01: The help are meant to be seen, not heard
lines.yamato_kill_doorman_03: I will burn The Baroness to the ground
lines.yamato_kill_doorman_05: And he thought he was so clever…
lines.yamato_kill_drifter_02: I won't be your prey, Drifter
lines.yamato_kill_drifter_05: He was strong, but not strong enough…
lines.yamato_kill_dynamo_01: The professor could never stop me
lines.yamato_kill_dynamo_02: Hope he's a better teacher than a fighter
lines.yamato_kill_dynamo_03: A noble man, but a dead one
lines.yamato_kill_dynamo_05: You made a poor decision Dynamo
lines.yamato_kill_familiar_03: I rid us of that pest
lines.yamato_kill_fencer_01: You have much to learn, boy.
lines.yamato_kill_fencer_05: There's no shame in losing to me
lines.yamato_kill_forge_01: Go back to the factory where you belong.
lines.yamato_kill_forge_02: You are nothing to me, McGinnis
lines.yamato_kill_forge_05: You put too much faith in your creations.
lines.yamato_kill_frank_01: He was an affront to nature.
lines.yamato_kill_frank_04: He had no business walking amongst the living
lines.yamato_kill_frank_05: Stand up all you want Victor, the result will be the same.
lines.yamato_kill_ghost_01: I'll take that arm as a trophy
lines.yamato_kill_ghost_02: Oathkeeper could never protect you, Geist
lines.yamato_kill_ghost_04: She should have died a long time ago.
lines.yamato_kill_gigawatt_01: Your power is nothing compared to the 7th Moon.
lines.yamato_kill_gigawatt_02: You're what people are afraid of?
lines.yamato_kill_gigawatt_04: I'll finish what your captors started
lines.yamato_kill_gigawatt_05: I expected more from you, Seven.
lines.yamato_kill_haze_01: I'm not afraid of the OSIC
lines.yamato_kill_haze_02: So that's what passes for an American assassin?
lines.yamato_kill_haze_04: The feds will have to learn their place.
lines.yamato_kill_hornet_05: I could have used someone like her.
lines.yamato_kill_inferno_01: I'm not loosing to a bartender
lines.yamato_kill_inferno_02: You should have stayed retired, Infernus…
lines.yamato_kill_inferno_03: I'm not an enemy you want Infernus
lines.yamato_kill_inferno_04: When this is over, I'll burn down his bar
lines.yamato_kill_inferno_05: This is what happens when you fight your betters
lines.yamato_kill_kelvin_01: You don't belong among the living Kelvin
lines.yamato_kill_kelvin_02: The dead belong in the ground
lines.yamato_kill_kelvin_03: His travels have come to an end
lines.yamato_kill_kelvin_04: Legends rarely live up to their reputation
lines.yamato_kill_krill_01: I'll turn the big one into a coat and the the small one into a hat.
lines.yamato_kill_krill_04: He thought his strength would save him
lines.yamato_kill_lash_02: American hubris will only get you so far.
lines.yamato_kill_lash_03: His parents should have spanked him more.
lines.yamato_kill_mirage_02: You need to get better at your job
lines.yamato_kill_mirage_03: Perhaps Nashala should work for me.
lines.yamato_kill_mirage_04: Protect the Djinn? Please, you couldn't protect yourself.
lines.yamato_kill_mirage_05: You're as useless as my brother's bodyguards were.
lines.yamato_kill_nano_01: You're nothing compared to me, Calico…
lines.yamato_kill_nano_02: I knew I could never trust you…
lines.yamato_kill_nano_04: Crossing the 7th Moon was a mistake, Calico…
lines.yamato_kill_nano_05: pfff, "Most dangerous woman on the planet", please…
lines.yamato_kill_necro_02: You meddle with things you could never understand…
lines.yamato_kill_necro_03: You don't belong here little girl
lines.yamato_kill_necro_04: She desecrates the memory of the dead
lines.yamato_kill_orion_01: I take no joy in killing an old man
lines.yamato_kill_orion_03: He wasn't as frail as I thought he'd be.
lines.yamato_kill_orion_05: I gave him the death he wanted.
lines.yamato_kill_priest_03: That's the best the Vatican has?
lines.yamato_kill_priest_04: You never were going to beat me, Venator…
lines.yamato_kill_priest_05: You're out of your depth, Venator
lines.yamato_kill_shiv_02: How long can he play at being a hero…
lines.yamato_kill_shiv_03: You run from your nature when you should run from me.
lines.yamato_kill_shiv_05: What's a knife compared to a sword.
lines.yamato_kill_synth_02: No wonder your family disowned you.
lines.yamato_kill_synth_03: They need to let go of the past.
lines.yamato_kill_synth_05: Just give me the case pocket.
lines.yamato_kill_tengu_02: Thanks for dealing with Mendoza, saved me time.
lines.yamato_kill_tengu_03: For your insolence, I'm taking Spanish Harlem next.
lines.yamato_kill_tengu_04: That's the thing that stopped Mendoza? Taking over New York should be easy…
lines.yamato_kill_tengu_05: I don't see what people are so afraid of…
lines.yamato_kill_unicorn_02: This isn't some show, it's real life.
lines.yamato_kill_unicorn_05: Go back and die in the circus
lines.yamato_kill_vampirebat_05: She brings much shame to her family
lines.yamato_kill_viper_02: You can never work with lowlifes like her
lines.yamato_kill_viper_05: You never had a chance against me, Viper
lines.yamato_kill_viscous_02: What a vile pile of goo…
lines.yamato_kill_viscous_04: What the hell was that thing…
lines.yamato_kill_warden_01: You will never stop me Warden.
lines.yamato_kill_warden_02: I don't bow to you Warden
lines.yamato_kill_warden_04: I'm not afraid of you Warden.
lines.yamato_kill_wraith_04: She's never fought someone like me…
lines.yamato_kill_wraith_05: Your operations will belong to the 7th Moon.
lines.yamato_kill_wrecker_03: I'm glad I'm walking away from that fight in one piece.
lines.yamato_kill_wrecker_05: The Butcher of Ixia has been dealt with
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_astro_convo01_: in japanese "I can't believe I'm stuck working with a cop" - まさか警察の犬と協力することになるとはな
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_astro_convo02_: in japanese " So you're Murphy's lover, yes?" - あんたがマーフィの女か？
Don't worry Sheriff.  Play your part and he lives.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_bebop_convo02_: In Japanese "so this is the killing machine I've heard about" - やつが噂の殺戮マシーンか？
in japanese "No shit." - だろうな
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_bebop_convo03_: I heard you know how to fight.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_dynamo_convo01: in japanese " We need to come up with a plan" - 計画を立てなくては
in japanese " You don't know what I said do you." - どうせわかってないだろう？
in japanese " Oh god." - まったく。。。
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_dynamo_convo02: in japanese "Your ego brought your curse upon you." - お前のエゴが招いた結果だ
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_ghost_convo01_: Don't worry about me Geist.  Take care of yourself.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_ghost_convo02_: In Japanese "What's with your arm?" - なんだその腕は？
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_ghost_convo03_: I can cut that arm off.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_haze_convo01_0: Stay out of my head dreamwalker.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_haze_convo03_0: When do you try to arrest me?
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_inferno_convo0: In Japanese "If this guy lasts  5 minutes it'll be a miracle" - こいつは５分持てば奇跡だな。
I have one.  Kill them all and ignore your existance.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_priest_convo01: You are the Vatican's killer, yes?
Good.  Better you than someone with morals.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_priest_convo02: I'm not psychotic enough to keep track, or weak enough to remember.
lines.yamato_match_start_yamato_priest_convo03: Don't worry Venator.  I've never been plagued with a soft heart.
lines.yamato_melee_kill_04: No one fights me and lives
lines.yamato_melee_kill_05: I was expecting more from them
lines.yamato_pick_up_gold_05: The 7th Moon takes what is owed.
lines.yamato_revenge_kill: I don't forget what you did.
lines.yamato_t2_shop_reminder_02: I can get a better item.
lines.yamato_t2_shop_reminder_03: I'll go to the store when I can,
lines.yamato_t3_shop_reminder_01: I can get something of quality.
lines.yamato_t3_shop_reminder_03: The right item can shape the battle.
lines.yamato_t4_shop_reminder_03: I should spend the souls I have.
lines.yamato_tower_got_denied_01: The souls were not the goal anyway.
lines.yamato_tower_got_denied_02: We did what we came here to do.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power1_01: I will focus, and they will die.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power1_03: THe blade is just a focus, the real weapon is my will.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power1_04: They will learn to fear this blade.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power1_05: They think I can't strike from a distance?
lines.yamato_upgrade_power1_06: Brother. I will honor you with blood.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power1_10: It's time to satiate the blade.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power2_02: I will strike, and they will fall.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power2_05: No one is beyond my reach.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power2_06: I'll get in close and dispatch them.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power2_10: I need to get in fast
lines.yamato_upgrade_power3_01: Their blood will give me strength.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power3_02: Life will be bought with life.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power3_05: I'll fight as long as I can.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power3_07: My spirit will not be broken
lines.yamato_upgrade_power4_01: Just when they think they've won, I'll steal their victory.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power4_02: We all face death, and when my time comes, I'll win.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power4_03: My family has defied death for generations.
lines.yamato_upgrade_power4_05: My brother will guide me to victory
lines.yamato_upgrade_power4_06: They feel the wrath of the "7th Moon"
lines.yamato_upgrade_power4_08: Today is not the day I die
lines.yamato_upgrade_power4_10: It's time to make a stand.
lines.yamato_use_ability_refresher_03: Prepare for the wrath of the 7th Moon.
lines.yamato_use_colossus_03: I'll cut them down like wheat.
lines.yamato_use_power4_02: Behold the power of the "7th Moon"
lines.yamato_use_power4_03: And you thought you could stop me…
lines.yamato_use_power4_04: The "7th Moon"'s legacy doesn't end here!
lines.yamato_use_power4_10: This is the birthright of the "7th Moon"…
